content: A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired style with dramatic lighting and rich texture. At the center is a beautiful young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, and an elegant, calm but dangerous presence. Her face is mostly obscured in shadow and mystery. She wears an ornate black-and-deep-blue crystalline dress with lace, feathered and jagged organic details, semi-transparent flowing sleeves, and glowing blue highlights across the bodice and collar, as if infused with magic. Her right hand is raised slightly with an open gesture, while her left hand rests lower near her waist. Surrounding and partly growing from her are luminous blue butterflies and shard-like petals, creating a sense of transformation and corruption. Behind her looms a gigantic monstrous entity made of darkness, ink, smoke, and cosmic texture, with exactly 7 glowing blue eyes visible and a huge fanged grin packed with sharp icy-blue teeth. The creature feels Lovecraftian, predatory, and intimate, curling around her like a guardian, curse, or inner demon. The palette is dominated by black, midnight navy, indigo, and electric blue, with sparkling highlights like stars or wet paint splatter. Add a decorative antique silver filigree border in all 4 corners and along the edges, making it feel like a sinister book cover or exhibition poster. Place large Japanese title text at the top: {argument name="title text" default="私の中のバケモノ"}. Add 8 blocks of vertical Japanese copy around the figure, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, in elegant white Mincho-style type. Left side text blocks, top to bottom: 「創造の源、すべてを壊し、すべてを生む。」, 「正しさよりも、心が動く瞬間を信じる。」, 「美しいものに飢えている。」, 「静けさの中で、世界をかき混ぜる。」. Right side text blocks, top to bottom: 「感情を深く、人の痛みも、希望も、まるごと抱きしめる。」, 「枠を壊し、誰も見たことのない景色を描きたい。」, 「怖い、危ない、それでも止められない。」, plus a short atmospheric handwritten-style accent near the mid-right edge. At the lower center, add a large Japanese question line: {argument name="bottom question" default="これは、力？それとも、呪い？"}. At the very bottom, add a smaller Japanese line: {argument name="tagline text" default="私の中のバケモノは、私だけの物語を待っている。"}. Make the whole image feel obsessive, beautiful, unsettling, and emotionally intense, like a high-end dark art poster about inner monsters and creative power.
title: Dark Fantasy Inner Monster Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic gothic anime-style poster of a silver-haired woman and a blue-eyed eldritch monster, ideal for moody art campaigns, book-cover concepts, or social media design pieces.

content: Create a soft, elegant Japanese lifestyle magazine editorial page in a warm botanical watercolor style, formatted as a full-page A4 portrait layout with a cream paper background, thin beige border, muted sage-green accents, and a refined nature-themed design. The page is a single cohesive magazine spread design with 6 distinct content sections: 1 large main illustration panel on the left, 1 tall title-and-article column on the upper right, 3 stacked informational point boxes on the mid-to-lower right, 2 small photo-card style image panels along the lower left, 1 circular quote badge near the lower left of the main panel, and 1 summary box at the lower right. The theme is elephant appreciation day in Japan. At the top left, place small editorial header text reading "LIFESTYLE / FEATURE / TOPIC" with a short Japanese subtitle beneath it. Across the upper right, add the large date heading "4.28 EVENT" and the main Japanese headline "象の日特集" in an elegant serif style, with a short subheading line beneath it and a tiny elephant icon. Below that, set 3 short Japanese body paragraphs in a clean magazine column, explaining elephant day. The main illustration panel shows a gentle elephant standing on the left, rendered in delicate watercolor with realistic wrinkles, large ears, soft ivory-gray skin, and a lowered trunk reaching toward a small child standing beside it. The child is an androgynous anime-style boy with messy wavy dark purple-black hair, pale skin, large eyes, a black graphic T-shirt with a purple emblem, loose brown knee-length cargo shorts, and bare feet, standing casually with one hand in a pocket while touching the elephant’s trunk with the other. Behind them is a sunny zoo walkway with a wooden fence, soft green trees, dappled light, and leafy branches hanging from above. Near the elephant, include a small wooden sign reading "Elephant 4.28". Add a circular text badge in Japanese near the lower left of the main image. On the lower left area, place exactly 2 small bordered snapshot-style panels with taped-corner scrapbook presentation: the first labeled "Feeding Time" showing the child in side profile offering leaves to the elephant’s trunk across a fence; the second labeled "Peaceful Time" showing the child seated on a wooden bench in profile with elephants in the background, in a calm reflective scene. Each small panel has a short Japanese caption underneath. On the right side, stack exactly 3 informational boxes labeled "POINT 01", "POINT 02", and "POINT 03" in olive green circles, each with a simple line icon and Japanese text: box 1 features an elephant icon and discusses memory, box 2 features a trunk or elephant-face icon and discusses delicacy despite size, box 3 features a zoo building icon and discusses what can be learned at the zoo. At the bottom right, add 1 bordered summary box with a ribbon-like header reading "まとめ", a small elephant silhouette, and 2 short Japanese summary paragraphs. Along the bottom margin, include the page number "068", the date "APRIL 2025", and a row of small walking elephant silhouettes. Add subtle botanical flourishes, leaves, and light decorative strokes throughout. Overall mood: gentle, educational, heartwarming, airy, natural, child-friendly, and sophisticated, like a premium seasonal magazine feature.
title: Japanese Elephant Day Magazine Feature
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese editorial-style magazine page about Elephant Day, ideal for seasonal feature graphics, lifestyle spreads, or educational zoo-themed art.

content: A whimsical anime fairytale illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Rapunzel"} leaning out from a high stone tower window, viewed from outside at a slightly elevated angle. She wears a soft lavender medieval-inspired princess dress with puff sleeves, white lace trim, and a fitted bodice, plus a pink-and-white bunny ear headband. Her extremely long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair is styled into a single enormous thick braid that spills over the windowsill and drops straight down the full height of the image. A small fluffy white rabbit sits on her right shoulder, adding a cute fantasy touch. The tower is pale beige stone with a rounded balcony-like window ledge, an arched opening, deep purple interior curtains, and green ivy climbing around the walls and window frame. In the background, show a bright sunlit storybook landscape with a vivid blue sky, scattered white clouds, rolling green hills, a winding river, a stone bridge with 3 arches, and a distant European-style town with a castle or cathedral. The mood is triumphant, charming, and magical, like a polished high-end fantasy anime key visual. Detailed painterly rendering, soft natural daylight, clean linework, gentle atmospheric perspective, lush foliage, elegant composition, vertical format.
title: Anime Rapunzel Tower Scene
description: A polished fantasy anime illustration of a Rapunzel-like princess with an extremely long braid leaning from an ivy-covered tower above a scenic river valley, ideal for fairytale-themed character art or storybook visuals.

content: Create a polished vertical real-estate promotional flyer in a clean, modern social-media ad style, 4:5 poster composition. Use a bright daytime outdoor theme with a pale blue sky, soft clouds, and leafy green tree branches framing the top left and top right corners. The layout should feel like a premium property investment advertisement with bold typography, glossy marketing design, and a teal, red, white, and gray color palette. At the upper left, place a small uppercase headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="LIVE BETTER. INVEST SMARTER."}. Directly below it, add a very large stacked main headline: {argument name="main headline line 1" default="OWN YOUR"} in deep teal and {argument name="main headline line 2" default="DREAM HOME"} in vivid red, using a bold condensed sans-serif font. Beneath that, add a teal ribbon banner with white uppercase text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="LUXURY LIVING. LASTING VALUE."}. Under the tagline, show exactly 3 circular feature icons arranged horizontally with thin vertical separators between them: a shield icon with the caption "SECURE YOUR FUTURE", a rising bar-chart icon with the caption "HIGH VALUE INVESTMENT", and a house icon with the caption "MODERN & ELEGANT". In the middle left and lower center, feature a large photorealistic contemporary luxury house with 2 stories, white and gray exterior walls, black trim, large glass windows, a balcony, landscaped shrubs, and a paved driveway, shown from a front three-quarter angle. On the right side, place a waist-up adult Black man in a green knit sweater, facing forward and pointing directly at the viewer with an assertive sales-poster pose; his body overlaps the house and extends into the foreground. Near his lower torso, add a glossy red circular badge with a slight 3D effect containing large white uppercase text {argument name="callout text" default="BUY NOW!"}, and attach a small dark teal angled banner across its bottom edge reading "LIMITED UNITS AVAILABLE!". Across the bottom, create a dark teal panel containing exactly 3 rounded rectangular property cards with white borders and equal spacing. Card 1 should show a row of modern townhouses and the label "MODERN TERRACES"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Spacious Rooms" and "24/7 Security". Card 2 should show a luxury villa with a pool and the label "LUXURY VILLAS"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Premium Amenities" and "Prime Locations". Card 3 should show a detached upscale modern home and the label "EXCLUSIVE HOMES"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Registered Title" and "Trusted Developer". At the very bottom, include one large empty white rounded rectangle spanning most of the width as a placeholder area for contact details or footer information. Make the overall image crisp, high-contrast, commercial, aspirational, and professionally designed like a premium real-estate marketing poster.
title: Luxury Dream Home Real Estate Flyer
description: A bold vertical real-estate ad poster promoting luxury homes and property investment, ideal for social media marketing or sales flyers.

content: A refined Japanese travel guide magazine cover illustration in a soft watercolor-and-ink editorial style, vertical A4 layout, airy pastel palette, elegant tourism-poster composition. The cover headline is dominated by very large serif blue text reading {argument name="main title" default="IBARAKI"}, with large Japanese title text below reading "茨城県 旅行ガイド" and a pale pink cursive English subtitle reading "Ibaraki Travel Guide". At the top left, include two lines of small Japanese copy about nature, history, scenery, and gourmet travel in Ibaraki, accented with a tiny pink cherry blossom icon. At the top right, place a large circular badge with fine dotted border containing Japanese text and the phrase "完全保存版" in the center with a small ribbon flourish underneath. The main subject is a young Japanese woman shown from the chest up, placed slightly right of center, facing left in three-quarter view. She has a chin-length wavy bob in deep dark brown to black, delicate loose strands, soft natural texture, and a calm neutral expression. She wears a light blue cardigan over a white ruffled blouse with a high gathered neckline, plus a thin beige shoulder bag strap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain vertical rectangular gray censor block centered over the face area. Surround her with a collage of iconic Ibaraki scenery blended seamlessly into the cover art: a vast field of blue nemophila flowers across rolling hills in the upper right with a Ferris wheel in the distance and tiny visitors along the ridge; a traditional temple or pavilion among pink cherry blossoms at mid-right; a bright waterfall and landscaped stream at lower right; a torii gate standing in shallow ocean water at sunset in the lower left; and a mountain landscape near the bottom left center. Add abundant blue flowers in the foreground along the bottom edge and soft pink cherry blossoms framing the right side. Along the left side, include exactly 7 vertically stacked destination list entries in Japanese, each with a colored heading line and smaller descriptive subtext: "国営ひたち海浜公園", "偕楽園", "袋田の滝", "大洗磯前神社", "筑波山", "水郷・霞ヶ浦", and "グルメ・カフェ・おみやげ". At the lower left, place a blue circular badge with white Japanese text reading "モデルコース 4" and smaller itinerary copy below. At the lower right, include exactly 3 horizontal white label tabs with Japanese text and small icons: "絶景スポット", "ご当地グルメ", and "おみやげセレクション". Add a pink ribbon banner near the bottom right with small Japanese promotional text. Use a clean white background for the upper left, elegant magazine typography, delicate linework, dreamy spring atmosphere, polished tourism-cover design, high detail, premium print look.
title: Ibaraki Travel Guide Cover
description: This prompt generates an elegant illustrated Japanese travel magazine cover for Ibaraki, suitable for tourism posters, editorial covers, or regional guidebook artwork.

The 4 text blocks must read exactly: "ELE NÃO TEM A MIDIA", "ELE NÃO TEM PROJETOS", "ELE TAMBÉM NÃO TEM O POVO", and "O RESTO ELE VAI DESCOBRIR NA HORA". At the bottom, place an oversized distressed headline in uppercase reading "CANETA AZUL", with "CANETA" in weathered white and "AZUL" in vivid blue, spanning almost the full width. Below it, add a secondary subtitle in uppercase blue italic condensed text reading "PARA DEPUTADO", flanked by thin blue horizontal lines. The overall design should feel like a viral meme campaign ad, bold, satirical, aggressive, and highly shareable, with dramatic rim lighting, sharpened details, realistic skin and fabric texture, and polished poster-quality compositing.

content: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash painting on aged rice paper, minimalist monochrome with soft warm parchment tones, showing a lone ancient swordsman standing on the edge of a steep dark cliff at the right side of the composition, seen mostly from behind in three-quarter back view. He wears flowing historical robes and a long wind-whipped cloak, with long dark hair tied in a topknot and loose strands streaming sideways in the wind, and he holds a straight sword lowered in his right hand. Below and to the left stretches a vast misty landscape with 1 distant walled frontier city, faint watchtowers and rooftops, a winding river or plain, and layered mountain silhouettes fading into haze. Use expressive black brushwork, splattered ink textures, dry-brush edges, atmospheric empty space, and a powerful contrast between the dense dark figure and cliff and the pale open background. Add 2 large vertical columns of bold black calligraphy on the left half, reading “愿将腰下剑” and “直为斩楼兰。”, plus 1 smaller vertical inscription to the far left reading “塞下曲六首 李白”, and include 2 small red seal stamps, one near the small inscription and one near the upper right corner. The mood is heroic, lonely, contemplative, and defiant, like a Tang-dynasty poet-warrior poster rendered as traditional sumi-e.
title: Chinese Ink Swordsman and Calligraphy
description: This prompt generates a dramatic wuxia-style ink painting poster with a lone swordsman, frontier landscape, and bold Chinese calligraphy, suitable for literary or historical art prints.

content: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink wash painting in monochrome black, charcoal, and soft gray on off-white rice paper, in the style of expressive shan shui brush art and heroic historical wuxia illustration. On the right side, a lone armored general sits upright on a dark warhorse atop a rocky cliff, viewed from behind and slightly in profile, looking out over a vast army below. The warrior wears layered black lamellar armor, a flowing windblown cloak, and a topknot with long trailing ribbons; he holds a straight sword angled downward beside the horse. The horse is muscular and glossy black, standing firmly near the cliff edge with its tail and mane subtly swept by the wind. Below and across the lower half of the scene, a dense battlefield mass of soldiers appears as misty silhouettes with upright spears and several battle flags, partially obscured by fog. In the distance, steep mountain peaks emerge through drifting mist on the upper right, with 7 small birds flying across the pale sky near the center. On the left side, include 2 large vertical columns of bold black Chinese calligraphy in wild cursive brush strokes: the main quote reading “一身转战三千里，一剑曾当百万师”, with a smaller vertical signature “王维” below, plus a small red seal stamp. Emphasize strong negative space, textured ink bleeding, splattered brush edges, atmospheric haze, epic solitude, martial grandeur, and a solemn, contemplative mood.
title: Chinese Ink Warrior on Horseback
description: This prompt generates a cinematic monochrome ink-wash poster of a mounted ancient Chinese general overlooking an army, ideal for poetic historical art and wuxia-inspired visuals.

content: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash fantasy painting on warm off-white rice paper, combining monumental calligraphy with a heroic figure scene. On the right side, a lone ancient warrior in ornate dark robes and layered black armor sits astride a large tiger on the edge of a jagged cliff, both shown in three-quarter back view facing left toward the open landscape. The warrior wears a flowing cape and long ribbon streamers whipping in the wind, and raises a straight sword vertically so that it becomes a brilliant pillar of golden-white light piercing upward into dense storm clouds. The tiger is powerfully built, realistic, alert, and richly detailed with bold stripes, white fur accents, and ceremonial cloth and tack with subtle gold ornament. The sky is filled with smoky gray ink clouds, softly blooming washes, and scattered gold flecks around the glowing sword beam. Below and to the left, a misty shanshui landscape opens into distant mountains, river water, tiny tree clusters, and layered atmospheric haze rendered in pale gray ink. On the left half of the composition, include 2 large vertical columns of expressive black brush-calligraphy in Chinese, bold and irregular, occupying most of the height; add 1 narrower vertical line of smaller calligraphy beside them and 4 red seal stamps total, with 2 small seals near the smaller inscription, 1 seal near the upper right edge, and 1 double-stacked red seal at the lower left. Emphasize high contrast between empty paper space and dark ink masses, literati painting aesthetics, sweeping brush energy, epic martial grandeur, and a subtle modern fantasy finish with restrained metallic gold highlights.
title: Ink-Wash Warrior Riding a Tiger
description: This prompt generates a dramatic Chinese calligraphy and ink-painting style fantasy illustration suited for poster art, literary visuals, or heroic mythic scene design.

The model turns her upper body slightly away from the camera while looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer, creating a tense and magnetic pose, with one hand raised delicately near the jacket zipper and collar, fingers lightly touching the fabric as if adjusting it, giving a controlled, elegant, and intentional gesture that contrasts softly with the heavy oversized jacket, while her shoulders are slightly hunched into the coat to create a protective, stylish, and intimate silhouette. Her facial expression is calm, serious, and subtly mysterious with direct eye contact, slightly parted lips, relaxed brows, and a smooth yet intense gaze, conveying a quiet, emotionally reserved, high-fashion attitude that feels soft, cold, elegant, and untouchable. The overall mood is moody, minimalist, premium, and polished with a quiet luxury winter editorial feel. The outfit consists of an oversized matte black down puffer jacket with dramatic volume, a high collar, and a clean zipper line, with no additional accessories, maintaining a monochrome modern Korean magazine vibe. The poster design features a clean graphic magazine cover style with a white background, oversized {argument name="accent color" default="red"} vertical typography behind the subject spelling “{argument name="brand" default="GUVET"}” or similar bold letterforms, a sharp editorial layout, red and black color scheme, modern sans-serif text, small microtext blocks, inset cropped detail frames showing close-up facial features, and subtle fashion publication branding elements at the bottom. The lighting is soft studio lighting with clean skin texture, crisp contrast, smooth shadows, high detail on the eyes and lips, refined print-magazine finishing, ultra sharp focus, and a luxury commercial fashion poster aesthetic in high resolution with a premium composition.
title: Luxury Streetwear Fashion Poster

content:
A vertical 2:3 premium design poster with two sections, inspired by elegant {argument name="theme" default="perfume advertisement aesthetics"}, luxury branding, {argument name="color palette" default="soft pink tones"}, and a magical storytelling atmosphere.
TOP HALF (PROCESS / TRANSFORMATION SEQUENCE)
A seamless horizontal sequence of 5 pencil sketch stages on a clean white background, flowing smoothly from left to right with no visible borders.
The sequence illustrates the transformation into a luxury trophy:
Motion – Abstract flowing lines and light gesture strokes, symbolizing energy and achievement in motion.
Emergence – The lines begin forming a graceful upward structure, hinting at a sculptural object.
Forming Shape – A recognizable trophy silhouette starts to appear, with soft curves and elegant proportions.
Refinement – Details sharpen: handles, base, and structure become clearer and more defined.
Final Sketch – A complete, polished pencil rendering of a premium trophy with intricate design details.
Style: delicate graphite pencil, soft shading, artistic motion trails, minimalist luxury sketch aesthetic.
BOTTOM HALF (FINAL PRODUCT SHOWCASE)
A hyper-realistic, premium gold trophy placed on a circular pedestal.
Material: polished gold with soft reflections
Base: black marble or glossy stone with a metallic nameplate
Background: flowing satin fabric in soft blush pink tones
Lighting: warm, cinematic glow with subtle sparkles and dreamy particles
Atmosphere: magical, elegant, aspirational luxury
TEXT ELEMENTS (LUXURY BRAND STYLE)
Top center (above sketches):
“FROM VISION TO VICTORY”
subtext: “Where ambition takes form.”
Bottom left (main copy):
“CRAFTED WITH PASSION”
“DEFINED BY EXCELLENCE”
Tagline (small, elegant):
“More than a trophy. A symbol of legacy.”
STYLE KEYWORDS
Luxury • Perfume-ad aesthetic • Soft pink palette • Gold accents • Minimal • Elegant • Dreamlike • Editorial • High-end branding • Cinematic lighting • Ultra-clean composition

description: A sophisticated poster prompt combining a pencil sketch transformation sequence with a hyper-realistic product showcase, using a luxury perfume-ad aesthetic.

content: Create a dramatic manga-style character poster on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired Stand profile page with heavy ink lines, screentone texture, painterly shading, and exaggerated comic energy. The layout is vertical, with a dense information panel on the left and the main figures dominating the center and right. At the top left, large serif English title text reads "LEVERAGE INFINITY" under smaller Japanese text "スタンド名:". Below it, a left-column profile card contains 6 visible info lines with Japanese labels and values: "スタンド使い名:" with the value "1-sphere", "性別: 不詳", "見た目:" followed by a short Japanese description, "年齢: 不詳", "身長: 96cm", and "職業: 市場の条省・養分". Beneath that, add a framed ability box titled "スタンド能力" containing several lines of Japanese body text and a bold English catchphrase at the bottom reading exactly: "Choose... TO THE MOOOOON!! Or face the MARGIN CAAAAALL!!". At the lower left, add a framed radar chart section titled "スタンドパラメータ" with 5 labeled stats around the graph: "破壊力 B", "持続力 C", "成長性 A", "スピード C", and "人念力 B"; fill the radar graph with a translucent pink polygon. The main illustration shows 2 stacked figures: a humanoid Stand above and a pig-like user below. The Stand is tall, metallic, and menacing, with a mushroom-cap helmet head in glossy red with white spots, circular gold-and-pink ear-like side discs, a segmented chrome-and-brass body, muscular but sleek mechanical arms, and a pink pig-snout emblem on the chest. Its face area is obscured by a rectangular censor blur. It reaches one articulated hand toward the viewer in an aggressive foreshortened pose. Around the Stand’s upper body, place 3 large stylized sound-effect glyphs reading "ゴゴゴ" in purple and black. On the far right, add a jagged speech or impact shape with 4 stacked lines of bold Japanese text reading "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ", "レヴァ!!". Behind both figures, erupting pink-purple aura flames and floating rock fragments create intense supernatural energy. The lower figure is a short, squat, pig-bodied character standing wide-legged, with pink skin, small hoof-like feet, a yellow-green neckerchief, and a huge mushroom cap hat in red with white spots and a thick yellow underside rim; the torso area is obscured by a large rectangular censor blur. The pig points outward with one hand and holds a woven basket in the other hand containing 3 visible items: 1 blue heart-shaped object and 2 small round produce-like objects. Keep the composition theatrical and bizarre, combining grotesque humor, market-speculation parody, and high-impact manga poster aesthetics.
title: Leverage Infinity Stand Poster
description: A JoJo-inspired manga profile poster showing a bizarre mushroom-themed Stand and pig-like user, ideal for parody character sheets and dramatic anime-style meme art.

content:
Full-body fashion editorial of a confident {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} sitting casually on a concrete ledge, relaxed pose with one leg slightly extended and arms resting naturally, direct gaze into the camera. She has long flowing hair moving gently in the wind, natural glowing skin, and subtle modern makeup. She is wearing a {argument name="jacket style" default="light blue oversized denim jacket"} layered over a clean white t-shirt, neutral-toned fitted shorts, bright colorful socks, and trendy sneakers.
Behind her, {argument name="characters" default="Tom and Jerry"} appear as playful cartoon characters integrated into the scene — slightly oversized, interacting with each other and the environment (Tom peeking from behind the ledge, Jerry standing on it or running playfully), positioned naturally in the background as if part of the world. Their style remains true to classic animation with bold outlines and expressive motion.
Beside her, a bold cartoon dragon illustration with thick outlines and vibrant neon blue, green, and yellow colors, playful yet powerful, subtly wrapping around the composition and interacting with the model’s pose.
Scene is set in a bright urban outdoor environment with a clear blue sky, strong natural sunlight, crisp shadows, and high contrast lighting. Add subtle wind motion in clothing and hair.
Mixed-media aesthetic blending high-end photorealism with graphic illustration elements — include hand-drawn doodles, arrows, motion lines, sparkles, and dynamic graphic overlays around the subject and characters.
Ultra-detailed, HDR, sharp focus, cinematic composition, fashion magazine quality, 8K resolution.

content:
A minimalist literary book cover in a refined East Asian editorial style, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background and subtle grainy print texture. The composition is vertically split into 2 large abstract fields: a rough torn gray paper shape occupying the upper left half, and a deep black painted block occupying the lower left corner. Emerging from the black area is 1 stark white theatrical mask shape with a single black eye slit, cropped large and angled upward, suggesting alienation and hidden identity. At the center-bottom where the gray and white fields meet, place 1 tiny solitary human figure in a long dark coat standing on a narrow triangular ledge, facing forward, emphasizing isolation and vulnerability. From near the top center, let 1 thin red thread descend vertically with a slight waviness, ending around the middle in 1 muted red circular seal-like disc, aligned above the figure. Set 1 large vertical title in bold expressive black Chinese calligraphy on the right-center: {argument name="title text" default="人间失格"}. Add 1 small vertical Japanese reading beside it: "にんげんしっかく". On the far right margin, add 1 vertical quote in fine black text: "—— 我的不幸，恰恰在于我缺乏拒绝的能力 ——". On the upper left, add 1 vertical author and translator credit in small black type: "【日】太宰治｜著　杨伟｜译". Below that, add 1 short two-line Chinese phrase in black: "生而为人
我很抱歉". On the lower right, add 1 small red vertical note: "太宰治
代表作". Beneath it add 1 small publication block in black with 3 lines: "人间失格", "太宰治", "だざい おさむ". On the lower left, add 1 publisher block in small black text: "上海译文出版社
2024" with a short horizontal line beneath. Use restrained negative space, asymmetrical balance, raw paper collage edges, sumi-ink and gouache textures, muted charcoal black gray and faded vermilion palette, elegant literary melancholy, premium contemporary Chinese novel cover design.
title: Minimalist No Longer Human Cover
description: A moody minimalist literary book cover prompt for generating an elegant East Asian edition of a classic novel with collage textures and symbolic imagery.

content: A literary book cover in a refined minimalist editorial style, vertically oriented, with a muted palette of deep black, dark green, sepia, and warm cream. The composition is divided by large flowing curtain-like abstract shapes that create dramatic negative space and diagonal wedges of light. On the right side, show an elderly butler-like man seen from behind, standing upright in a formal black tailcoat or tuxedo jacket, white shirt cuffs visible, hands clasped behind his back, facing a tall softly glowing window with sheer curtains. His posture is reserved, dignified, and solitary. On the lower portion, within a triangular beam of light, place a dim still life on a table: exactly 3 objects, a wine glass, a teapot, and a plate, all partially obscured in shadow. The left side should carry elegant vertical Chinese title typography reading {argument name="title text" default="长日将尽"}, set large in pale gold serif-like characters. Beneath it, include smaller Chinese author and translator lines, and a short Chinese quote in small text. Near the lower left, add small English text reading {argument name="english title" default="The Remains of the Day"} and {argument name="author name" default="Kazuo Ishiguro"}, plus a small publisher line and the year {argument name="year" default="2024"}. The image should feel like an award-winning contemporary literary fiction cover: quiet, melancholic, restrained, cinematic, with paper grain texture, soft vignette, subtle painterly shading, and highly intentional asymmetrical layout. Keep the typography integrated into the design, with generous negative space and no bright colors.
title: Minimalist Literary Novel Cover
description: This prompt generates a sophisticated modern book cover for literary fiction, ideal for classic novels, translated works, and prestige publishing mockups.

content: Design a literary Chinese book cover in a refined minimalist collage style on warm off-white textured paper with subtle grain and faint aging. The composition is tall and elegant, with one dominant central-right vertical Chinese title in large distressed black calligraphy-style characters reading “你当像鸟飞往你的山”, arranged in 2 vertical columns, with the right column reading “你当像鸟” and the left column reading “飞往你的山”. A delicate indigo-blue bird flies near the top center, and a thin winding blue dotted flight path snakes diagonally down across the title and toward the lower right, creating a sense of ascent and freedom. In the lower left, place a large triangular mountain form like a torn paper collage or painted wedge, its peak white and snowy, fading into deep ultramarine and navy textures below. Integrate a faint vertical strip of tiny English book text along the mountain’s right edge, as if the mountain is partially constructed from printed pages. Inside the blue mountain, set the original English title in serif type: “Educated” on one line and “A Memoir” below it, in white. On the upper left, add a short vertical block of small Chinese quote text in black, arranged as 6 lines, with a long dash below, then the author name “Tara Westover” in muted blue serif on 2 lines, followed by another dash. Along the lower right edge, add slim vertical credits in small type: Chinese text for the author followed by the English name “Tara Westover” in blue, then translator and publisher lines beneath in black. Keep the layout spacious with strong negative space, asymmetrical balance, and a poetic contemporary publishing aesthetic. Use only 3 main colors: black, off-white, and indigo blue. The overall feeling should be intellectual, restrained, modern, and award-winning, suitable for a premium edition of {argument name="book title" default="Educated"} by {argument name="author name" default="Tara Westover"}.
title: Minimalist Literary Cover for Educated
description: This prompt generates a sophisticated Chinese-market literary book cover with bold vertical typography, a blue mountain collage, and a bird motif, ideal for premium fiction and memoir cover design.

content: A minimalist literary book cover for {argument name="book title" default="素食者"}, designed in an elegant East Asian art-book style with muted dark forest green and warm off-white as the only main colors. The composition is vertical and highly refined, with a split layout: the left two-thirds are textured off-white paper, while the right third is a deep green field divided by a rough organic torn-paper edge running vertically from top to bottom. On the lower center-right, place a grayscale side-profile portrait of an East Asian woman facing right, her head slightly tilted upward, eyes closed or nearly closed, with black hair tied in a low bun. Her figure should feel quiet, fragile, and contemplative. The upper part of her head is visually replaced by a torn white paper shape that merges into the page, creating a surreal collage effect. From inside the opening around her head and neck, thin wild plant stems with tiny leaves and buds grow upward diagonally, as if vegetation is emerging from her body. Add subtle paper grain, print texture, and soft tonal fading for a poetic, fine-press look. Set the main Chinese title vertically in very large dark green serif-style characters on the far left: {argument name="title text" default="素食者"}. Near the upper middle-left, add vertically arranged author and translator credits in Chinese, small and elegant: "[韩] 韩江 著" and "胡椒筒｜译". In the upper right on the dark green area, add small Korean and English text in a delicate serif font: {argument name="korean title" default="채식주의자"}, "The Vegetarian", and {argument name="author name" default="Han Kang"}. On the mid-to-lower right, add a short vertical Chinese quote in small type: {argument name="quote" default="我的身体里 有一片荒芜的森林 它枯萎了 我不想吃的东西"}. At the bottom right, place the publisher and year in small Chinese text: "四川文艺出版社" and "2022". Include one small solid dark green dot on the left side below the title as a graphic accent. The overall mood is restrained, melancholic, intelligent, and literary, like an award-winning modern novel cover.
title: Minimalist Literary Cover for The Vegetarian
description: This prompt generates a refined, surreal modern book cover with torn-paper collage, female profile, and botanical imagery, ideal for literary fiction and translated novel designs.

content:
Create a TV anime key visual using the attached characters.
4:5 size.
Faithfully reproduce the character's hairstyles and the logo.

1. A woman with an ogre mask (legendary blacksmith) in the background with a mysterious large close-up of her face.
2. A man with a troubled expression holding the sword from the 7th image (slightly smaller as a sub-character).
3. A girl in green clothes holding the plushie from the 6th image, looking up at the sky with a startled face from a front position (protagonist).
4. A woman in a kimono looking on from a distance with a worried expression (supporting character).
5. A girl with a ponytail also looking on with a worried expression (supporting character).

Use the logo effectively.

Production: Aoahiru, Ikehaya, Osushi Shokunin, Kurumi, tk, HATAHATA, Matabee, Yokappa

content: A bright, high-energy anime-style summer advertisement poster for a sparkling soft drink, set at the seaside under a vivid cobalt-blue sky with towering white cumulus clouds and a blazing sun near the top center creating lens flare and radiant beams. Feature exactly 3 Japanese high school girls in matching summer sailor uniforms: short-sleeved white blouses with navy ribbon bows and dark navy pleated skirts. All three have dark, windblown shoulder-length to long hair and youthful, lively poses. In the left foreground, show one girl from a dramatic low angle thrusting a large plastic soda bottle toward the viewer so it dominates the composition; her hand and the bottle are oversized by perspective. In the middle, show a second girl seated low near the water, one knee raised, drinking from a smaller bottle. On the right, show a third girl standing in profile or three-quarter view, also sipping from a bottle while her hair and skirt stream in the sea breeze. Make the ocean water intensely turquoise and sunlit, with energetic splashes framing the bottom left and bottom right edges, scattered droplets and sparkling highlights across the scene. Add a few small white seabirds in the distant sky. The overall mood is refreshing, nostalgic, youthful, and cinematic, like a premium Japanese beverage commercial key visual. The bottle label should be clean and minimalist white with modern sans-serif typography reading {argument name="brand name" default="ASCII SPARK"}, with smaller flavor text {argument name="flavor text" default="Yuzu White Peach Soda"} and a subtle 500 mL marking. Place the brand logo in the upper left in thin uppercase letters, and add a handwritten-style Japanese tagline in white at the lower left reading {argument name="tagline text" default="夏がくれる、はじけるひととき。"}. Use crisp cel-shaded anime rendering mixed with painterly light effects, ultra-detailed water droplets on the bottle, condensation, transparent plastic, glittering carbonation bubbles, and dramatic foreshortening.
title: Anime Summer Soda Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style Japanese beverage advertisement poster featuring 3 schoolgirls, a sparkling soda bottle, and a vivid seaside summer atmosphere for commercial key art or mock branding.

content: Create a high-end global sportswear campaign poster on a clean light gray studio background with a full-body female athlete crouching in the foreground, photographed in a fashion-advertising style. She is a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} shoulder-length slightly tousled hair, wearing a fitted white short-sleeve athletic t-shirt with a small black puma logo on the chest, black leggings, a light gray sweatshirt tied around her waist, and gray running shoes with subtle white branding. Her pose is low and powerful, one knee raised, one hand resting on the lifted knee and the other hanging loosely, facing camera with confident energy. Behind and around her, fill most of the composition with oversized black hand-painted brush lettering in an expressive activist style. The text must read exactly: "WE ARE THE VOICE OF" above, then the huge central word "STRENGTH," then beneath it "UNITY," and "AND CHANGE." Add a bold handwritten hashtag "#OWNYOURPOWER" near the middle-right. In the lower-right corner place the black Puma leaping cat logo above the wordmark "PUMA" and the tagline "FOREVER. FASTER." At the very bottom add 3 small footer text blocks: left "PUMA.COM", center "FOREVER. FASTER. TOGETHER. A GLOBAL MOVEMENT FOR EQUALITY, EMPOWERMENT AND CHANGE.", right "JOIN THE MOVEMENT. #OWNYOURPOWER". Composition should feel like a contemporary empowerment campaign, blending sports fashion editorial photography with protest-style brush typography, minimal palette of white, black, and gray, crisp studio lighting, premium ad layout, vertical poster format.
title: Empowerment Sports Campaign Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished vertical sportswear advertisement featuring a crouching female athlete and bold activist brush lettering for global brand campaign visuals.

content: A romantic fantasy wedding illustration of two women standing arm in arm in a moonlit palace balcony at night, highly detailed anime style with luminous painterly rendering, elegant and dreamy. The taller woman on the left has {argument name="left character hair color" default="light brown"} shoulder-length softly layered hair and wears a regal ivory-white tailored wedding suit with gold embroidery, a high-collared ruffled shirt, cream vest, cravat, chain accessories, and a long ceremonial coat whose inner lining is deep violet with floral patterns; a purple flower corsage is pinned to her chest. The woman on the right has {argument name="right character hair color" default="black"} long wavy hair and wears an ornate bridal gown in ivory with gold lace embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, a fitted bodice, a very long translucent veil, and rich crimson inner panels and accents peeking from the skirt; she wears red gemstone jewelry and floral hair ornaments in white and red. She holds a large bouquet of red, burgundy, and white flowers with greenery and trailing red ribbons while gently linking arms with her partner. Set them before gothic arched windows, hanging crystal ornaments, glowing lanterns, purple flowers, a distant city skyline, a star-filled sky, and a bright full moon. Add decorative vertical Japanese title text integrated into the composition: on the left, {argument name="left title text" default="紫苑の護り"} with smaller vertical ruby text beside it; on the right, {argument name="right title text" default="紅雪の献心"} with smaller vertical ruby text beside it. Include crescent moon and snowflake-like decorative motifs framing the titles. Use a tall poster composition, full-body view, luxurious fabrics, sparkling highlights, soft bokeh, and an overall palette of ivory, gold, violet, crimson, and midnight blue.

content: A bold Japanese advertising poster on an off-white textured paper background with a slightly worn print grain. Create a full-body fashion-style photo of a young woman standing slightly right of center in a wide, confident stance, legs apart, arms relaxed at her sides, facing forward. Her face is intentionally blurred for anonymity. She has long straight split-dyed hair, one half {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} and the other half {argument name="second hair color" default="pastel blue"}, falling past her chest. She wears a white oversized T-shirt with the black chest print {argument name="shirt text" default="OKIHIRO AI Creative"}, a light pink pleated mini skirt, and chunky white sneakers. Use clean studio lighting with soft shadows under her feet. Fill the left half of the poster with huge distressed black Japanese typography in an energetic diagonal layout reading {argument name="main headline" default="センスない奴は画像とテキストを極めろ"}, with oversized characters stacked and overlapping for maximum impact. Add 2 broad paint-brush swashes behind the lower headline area: 1 pink brush stroke sweeping from the lower left toward center and 1 blue brush stroke sweeping from center-right toward the far right. In the upper right, place a compact vertical block of small black Japanese copy in 4 lines reading: 「AI動画の自動化に 溺れるな。 静止した一枚と、 研ぎ澄まされた言葉が、 最も強い武器になる。」 arranged like a manifesto note. In the lower right, add a small angled English text block in uppercase reading {argument name="tagline text" default="MASTER TEXT & IMAGE. SHAPE PERCEPTION. CONTROL THE OUTCOME."}. In the lower left corner, add a small brand signature reading "OKIHIRO AI CREATIVE MANIFESTO". The overall composition should feel like a modern creative manifesto poster, mixing fashion editorial photography, Japanese street advertising, bold typography, and minimalist graphic design.
title: Japanese AI Creative Manifesto Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold fashion-editorial manifesto poster with oversized Japanese typography, a full-body model, and graphic brush accents for marketing, social posts, or creative branding.

content:
Use the uploaded reference image as the identity source. Create a premium streetwear campaign poster designed to stop people mid-scroll. Show the same person leaning confidently against a giant oversized {argument name="item" default="beige sneaker"} nearly the same height as the model. Rich glossy {argument name="background color" default="red"} seamless studio background and reflective {argument name="floor color" default="red"} floor. Minimal but dramatic composition with luxury editorial lighting, sharp shadows, polished reflections, cinematic depth, realistic textures.

The person wears a monochrome beige tracksuit with matching chunky sneakers, relaxed confident pose, hands in pockets. The giant sneaker is sculptural, futuristic, detailed sole patterns, premium suede and leather textures.

Add bold oversized headline typography at the top in clean modern sans serif font: “BIGGER MOVES”. Large white text dominating the frame. Add secondary copy on left: “STAND TALL. BREAK THE SCALE.” Add right side text: “NOT FOR EVERYONE. MADE FOR YOU.” Add bottom center brand text: “HARBORIS” with tagline below: “OWN YOUR EDGE”.

Add small left bottom watermark: black Instagram logo, black X logo, harboris.

High-end fashion advertising aesthetic, luxury sneaker campaign, sharp focus, ultra realistic, scroll-stopping social media poster, premium branding, balanced layout.
title: High-End Streetwear Campaign Poster
description: A detailed prompt for creating a luxury streetwear poster using a reference image, featuring dramatic lighting and bold typography.

content:
What you will generate is not a regular illustration, but a high-end concept poster that expresses the meaning and symbolism of the person and name "{argument name="person name" default="ELON MUSK"}" as a visual metaphor.

Place the giant letters "{argument name="person name" default="ELON MUSK"}" as the main protagonist of the entire screen. The letters should be thick, powerful sans-serif characters with an overwhelming presence. The background should be {argument name="background color" default="deep black"}, and the characters a slightly yellowish off-white, with paper texture, graininess, and light scuffs like vintage silkscreen printing or old posters.

At the bottom center, place a monochrome portrait of a man reminiscent of Elon Musk. It should have an atmosphere similar to the person himself, with an expression looking up at the future. The face should not be too realistic, but expressed with strong shadows in a print/poster style.

In the upper right, include a composition where a rocket is launching diagonally upward. Use {argument name="accent color" default="red"} as an accent color for the rocket's exhaust flames and smoke, and have it pass through the giant letters as if cutting through them. This visualizes the meaning of "breaking through to the future," "breaking through existing frameworks," and "large-scale challenges."

Make the overall design a minimalist and powerful graphic poster. Do not add too many elements; compose it only with the text, the person, the rocket, and the red smoke. The composition should be bold and designed to leave an impression at a glance, even from a distance.

In the lower left, add small auxiliary text like "VISION / SCALE / MOTION," and in the lower right, "BUILD THE FUTURE." You may discreetly place small symbols associated with Tesla or X if necessary, but the main focus remains the symbolism of the name "ELON MUSK" and the person.

Unify the colors around three main colors: black, off-white, and red. Create a concept poster with a strong visual memory that conveys luxury, futurism, ambition, solitude, a sense of scale, and the energy of destruction and creation.
title: Luxury Concept Poster Design
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a minimalist, high-end conceptual poster featuring a subject and thematic metaphors like a rocket launch.

content:
Create a vertical poster composition on aged cream paper with a handmade analog feel. Use rough ripped paper edges, layered magazine cutouts, photocopy grain, halftone texture, ink bleed, and slightly imperfect screen-print registration. Keep the subject as the main black-and-white photographic portrait, placed prominently in the center or upper center.

Surround the subject with graphic blocks of deep red, cobalt blue, warm yellow, black, and ivory. Add supporting collage fragments such as a rainy European street, film-strip borders, newspaper clippings, urban silhouettes, and cinematic details, arranged like a handmade 1960s art-house movie poster.

Use bold condensed typography with a strong visual hierarchy. Add large headline text: “{argument name="main title" default="[MAIN TITLE]"}”. Add smaller subtitle text: “{argument name="subtitle" default="[SUBTITLE]"}”. Add bottom text: “{argument name="event details" default="[BRAND NAME / EVENT NAME / COMING SOON / DATE]"}”. If needed, include a small top line reading “[TAGLINE]”.

The final result should feel cinematic, intellectual, rebellious, and editorial — like a lost 1960s European film poster with a strong point of view. Keep it raw, tactile, printed, imperfect, and handmade. Avoid a glossy modern finish.
title: 1960s Art-House Film Poster
description: A detailed prompt for creating a vintage-style 1960s European art-house film poster with collage elements, bold typography, and a raw, tactile aesthetic.

content: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo of a glamorous beach cosplay portrait inspired by Raiden Shogun from Genshin Impact. A single adult woman sits on a large dark seaside rock in a three-quarter front pose, one hand resting behind her on the rock and the other relaxed near her side, with one thigh raised prominently toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor centered over the face. She has very long, rich violet-purple hair with magenta highlights, styled with a thick braid draped over one shoulder and loose windswept strands flowing to the right, decorated with blue flower hair ornaments and gold accessories near one side of the head. She wears an elegant lavender, lilac, and deep purple Raiden Shogun-style cosplay outfit: a low-cut kimono-inspired bodice, translucent flowing sleeves, layered sash and obi with ornate circular gold-and-purple emblem at the waist, a jeweled choker with a purple gem, dangling blue-and-gold earrings, a black armored-looking forearm piece, and sheer purple thigh-high stockings with garter straps and decorative patterns. The lighting is natural golden beach daylight with soft highlights on skin and fabric, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious editorial look. The background is a softly blurred shoreline with pale sand, shimmering water, sea mist, and a distant rocky island or cliff. Compose it as a full magazine cover with elegant fashion typography in dark royal purple. The masthead is huge across the top reading {argument name="magazine title" default="COSPLAY"}, with small top-left text "COSPLAY REALM MAGAZINE" and small top-right text "JANUARY 2024". Add left-side cover lines: "RAIDEN SHOGUN", "COSPLAY BY SAKURA", "BEHIND THE SCENES AT THE BEACH", and "EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW" followed by smaller text "Sakura talks about her love for Genshin Impact". Add right-side cover lines: "GENSHIN IMPACT" with smaller text "SPECIAL EDITION", and at lower right "TOP COSER OF 2024" with smaller text "Sakura’s rise to stardom". Place a realistic barcode with small pricing text in the bottom-left corner. Overall style: ultra-realistic cosplay photography, glossy magazine cover design, cinematic, sensual but tasteful, premium fashion editorial, high detail fabrics and accessories, sharp subject with softly blurred ocean background.
title: Raiden Shogun Beach Cosplay Cover
description: This generates a realistic fashion magazine cover featuring a Raiden Shogun-inspired beach cosplay portrait, ideal for editorial mockups and cosplay-themed cover art.

content: A manga-style JoJo-inspired character card poster set in a narrow urban alley, with dramatic cel shading, heavy ink lines, stylized speed-line energy, and a vertical comic-page layout. The main subject is a young Japanese man, {argument name="character name" default="タカ・ハシ"}, age 19, shown from mid-thigh up in the left foreground, raising his right fist high in a triumphant pose while holding a handheld microphone near his mouth with his left hand. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular mosaic blur. He has short messy {argument name="hair color" default="green"} hair and wears a fitted green track jacket with gold side stripes and a large golden phoenix emblem across the chest, zipped up, with black pants and black fingerless gloves. To his right and slightly behind him stands his humanoid Stand, {argument name="stand name" default="サガミ・サヴァイブ (SAGAMI SURVIVE)"}, a compact armored mascot-like figure with a rounded pale yellow bird head, sharp angry eyes, an orange beak, and a sleek white-and-green mechanical body with metallic silver musculature. The Stand has green shoulder armor, green gauntlets, gold trim, and a bold letter S on each side of its chest armor. It is posed punching forward with both fists, aggressive and energetic. Include exactly 4 distinct text panels and effects: 1 large white rectangular description box at the top right filled with dense Japanese text explaining the Stand, 1 jagged white speech bubble at the mid-right with vertical Japanese battle cries, 1 white character-info box at the bottom left with Japanese profile text, and 1 white stat box at the bottom right containing a radar chart labeled STAND PARAMETERS with Japanese and English category labels and a 5-line stat list. Add exactly 4 stylized purple sound-effect texts around the figures: 1 large "ゴゴゴゴ…" near the upper middle, 1 "ド" near the lower left, and 2 separate "ドド" effects near the lower center and lower right. The background is a gray-blue city alley with tall buildings receding in perspective. Overall tone: parody homage to JoJo's Bizarre Adventure character introductions, combining comic intensity with a goofy mascot Stand concept, polished manga poster composition, sharp print-like detail, and Japanese magazine page aesthetics.
title: JoJo-Style Stand Character Poster
description: This prompt generates a manga-style parody character sheet with a masked street performer and his bird-headed Stand, ideal for anime homage posters and dramatic comic-style character introductions.

content:
A photorealistic Japanese summer beverage advertisement poster in a tall vertical layout, designed like an official sports drink campaign. Show a full-body teenage schoolgirl standing outdoors on a sunny hilltop road overlooking a coastal town and the ocean under a vivid blue sky with large white clouds. She is centered slightly left, posed confidently with one leg relaxed, looking off into the distance, holding a clear plastic bottle of {argument name="drink brand" default="POCARI SWEAT"} in her right hand near shoulder height. She wears a classic Japanese sailor school uniform: 1 white short-sleeve sailor blouse, 1 navy sailor collar with white stripes, 1 large navy neckerchief bow, 1 navy pleated skirt to the knees, 2 white knee-high socks, and 2 dark navy or black loafers. Her hair is long, straight, and black with a glossy sheen. Bright midday lighting, crisp shadows, fresh clean atmosphere, high realism, commercial poster finish.

Use a strong brand-forward composition. In the top left, place a large bold white logo reading "ION SUPPLY DRINK" above oversized {argument name="main logo text" default="POCARI SWEAT"} with a white wave shape beneath it. In the top right, add a small white corporate mark and the text {argument name="company name" default="Otsuka"}. On the right side, set a vertical Japanese headline in dark blue reading {argument name="headline text" default="渇いたからだに、水よりうれしい。"}. In the lower left, add a Japanese body copy block in blue, including a larger subheading and several smaller lines of explanatory text, styled like authentic ad copy. Near that text, include 1 white circular information badge with blue Japanese text and 2 small inner circles labeled "水分" and "イオン" joined by a plus sign. At the very bottom left, add small blue recycling-related fine print and iconography; at the bottom right, add the website URL {argument name="website" default="www.pocarisweat.jp"}. Make the overall design feel like a believable premium Japanese poster for a refreshing ion supply drink, suitable as a desktop wallpaper.
title: Japanese Summer Sports Drink Poster
description: A realistic Japanese-style beverage advertising poster featuring a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform against a bright coastal sky, ideal for wallpaper or mock campaign visuals.

content: A refined vertical cultural exhibition poster on a warm ivory textured paper background, designed with abundant negative space and an elegant museum-catalog aesthetic. The centerpiece is one monumental piece of Chinese calligraphy formed as sculptural 3D architectural typography, reading {argument name="main Chinese character" default="北京"} as two large interconnected characters built entirely from miniature Beijing heritage landmarks and traditional decorative elements. The strokes are constructed like carved lacquer and wood architectural fragments in rich vermilion red, aged gold, jade green, turquoise blue, stone gray, and ivory, with exquisite relief detail, soft shadows, and a handcrafted collectible feel. Across the calligraphy, integrate iconic Beijing imagery: palace roofs with glazed tiles, temple pavilions, stairways, carved balustrades, watchtowers, a winding section of the Great Wall, ornamental clouds, guardian lion sculptures, small old trees, golden ginkgo branches and leaves, hanging red lanterns, a Beijing opera mask, a skewer of glossy candied hawthorn, the Temple of Heaven, and a plated roast duck tucked into one lower stroke. Make the composition feel like a cultural miniature world embedded inside each brushstroke, with realistic depth, crisp surface detail, and subtle museum lighting from the upper left. Add sparse typography around the main artwork in a sophisticated editorial layout: at upper left, a tiny emblem and the words "BEIJING CHINA", beneath it "2024" and "CITY CULTURE SERIES" in small thin serif capitals; at upper right, a vertical Chinese title reading "北京 一座城的壮阔史诗" with several smaller vertical lines of Chinese copy and a red seal stamp; at lower left, large elegant serif text reading {argument name="city name in English" default="BEIJING"} and beneath it {argument name="subtitle" default="ETERNAL GLORY"}, followed by smaller text "EXHIBITION POSTER", "NO.2024-001", and tiny heritage-themed footer copy; at lower right, tiny small-cap text reading {argument name="tagline" default="TIMELESS HERITAGE"} and "CULTURAL LEGACY OF A THOUSAND YEARS". Keep the overall style luxurious, poetic, highly detailed, and premium, blending Chinese traditional culture, architectural miniature art, and contemporary poster design.
title: Beijing Cultural Heritage Poster
description: This prompt generates a premium city-culture exhibition poster featuring Beijing-themed architectural calligraphy and elegant editorial typography, ideal for tourism, museum, or heritage branding.

content: A vertical cultural travel poster on warm off-white textured paper, designed like a handcrafted 3D shadow-box collage that forms the silhouette of the Chinese character for Shanghai. Use a refined old-meets-new Shanghai theme with miniature architecture, street scenes, props, food, and typography, photographed straight-on with soft studio lighting and delicate drop shadows. The composition should feel elegant, editorial, nostalgic, and premium, with muted cream, brass gold, teal green, brick red, jade, and weathered wood tones. At the upper left, build the top section of the character from 1 modern glass skyscraper, 1 tall historic high-rise with a golden crown, 1 domed neoclassical waterfront building, 1 clock-tower civic building, 2 smaller background towers, 2 red vintage Shanghai trams, and 1 rickshaw. Beneath that, create a canal-town section with 2 tall red Oriental Pearl Tower spheres-and-columns motifs, 2 qipao dresses displayed vertically, 4 old shikumen and lane houses, 1 curved waterfront canal, 4 wooden boats on the water, and 2 gramophones placed at the far left and right edges. Across the center, place a large diagonal metallic-gold embossed title reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHANGHAI COLLECTION"} in bold retro 3D lettering. To the right of the upper composition, add hand-lettered vintage script text reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="OLD SHANGHAI FUSION"}. On the lower left, add serif text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="DESIGN POSTER"}. The lower half should form the rest of the character using traditional Chinese architectural miniatures and market objects: 1 large classical Chinese roofed building complex, 4 vertical neon-style shop signs with Chinese characters, 2 square decorative plaques, 1 small green ceramic ewer, 2 shallow food trays, 1 rectangular tray of 6 soup dumplings, 1 long tray with 3 white tanghulu-like skewered sweets, 2 round mooncakes, and 1 small sauce dish, 1 rectangular display shelf containing 4 steamed buns, 1 bowl of noodles, 2 golden pastries, 1 plate of white flower-shaped sweets, 1 small doll figurine, and 2 painted opera masks, plus 2 hanging newspapers at the lower right. Keep the background spacious and minimal, with the collage and text arranged diagonally for a sophisticated poster layout. Make the whole image look like a meticulously assembled handmade paper-and-wood diorama, combining Art Deco Shanghai glamour, Republican-era nostalgia, Jiangnan water-town charm, and traditional Chinese market culture.
title: Old Shanghai Fusion Poster
description: A handcrafted 3D-style cultural poster celebrating Shanghai through miniature architecture, food, signage, and retro typography, ideal for travel, branding, or editorial design.

content:
A bright, cheerful anime-style promotional poster for a folding bike cycling event, designed like a polished Japanese advertisement with dense typography, stickers, callouts, and event info panels. The scene shows a sunny riverside promenade under a vivid blue sky with fluffy clouds, green tree branches framing the top right, flower beds, bunting, drifting petals, and a distant modern city skyline across the water. In the foreground, a cute teen/young adult anime girl with {argument name="hair color" default="light chestnut brown"} shoulder-length wavy hair, side-swept bangs, and two colorful hairpins smiles directly at the viewer and winks with one eye. She is posed in dynamic perspective, reaching one hand toward the camera as if inviting the viewer to join her. She wears a yellow hooded windbreaker, a white T-shirt printed with colorful bicycle lettering, dark blue shorts, black thigh-high stockings, and a light blue backpack. Beside her is a mint-green compact folding bicycle labeled "FOLDY," shown unfolded and parked on the promenade with visible small wheels, frame hinge, handlebars, saddle, pedals, and kickstand, emphasizing portability and urban leisure cycling. Use a glossy, high-saturation anime poster aesthetic with clean linework, soft facial rendering, energetic lighting, and playful graphic decoration.

Fill the poster with Japanese ad-style layout elements. At the top left, a huge multicolored headline reads "Let’s FOLDING RIDE!" in oversized playful bubble and block lettering, with a smaller curved Japanese line above it reading "さあ、いっしょに出かけよう！" and a blue ribbon-like subtitle below reading "フォールディングバイクで、もっと自由に、もっと遠くへ！". At the upper right, place a yellow burst badge with a tiny flag icon containing the text "フォールディングバイク サイクリングイベント 開催！". Add a white speech bubble near the girl’s face with pink outline and handwritten-feel Japanese text: "ねえ、キミ！ 折りたたみは どこへでも行けるよ♪ 一緒に 行こっ！". Near the bicycle, include a small angled sticker with text "コンパクトにたためて 持ち運びラクラク♪". Near the lower center-left, add a section label "イベントの楽しみポイント♪" followed by exactly 4 round icon features in pastel circles: 1) a pink bicycle icon with text "折りたたみで 持ち運び自由！" 2) a blue camera icon with text "フォトスポットで 思い出を残そう！" 3) a yellow drink icon with text "カフェタイムで ほっとひと息♪" 4) a purple gift icon with text "オリジナルグッズ プレゼント！".

On the lower right, add a rounded white information card with green accents titled "FOLDING BIKE サイクリングイベント" and large pink date text "6.15(日)". Inside the card, present exactly 4 event detail rows with colored circular icons: 1) calendar row: "開催日 2025. ※雨天時は6.22(日)に順延" 2) location row: "集合所 みなとみらい 臨港パーク" with smaller note "(神奈川県横浜市)" 3) course row: "コース みなとみらい〜湾沿いの気持ちいいルートを走ります" with smaller note "(約20km、初心者安心！)" 4) fee row: "参加費 3,000円" with smaller note "(保険・記念品付き) ※レンタルバイクあり（要予約）". At the bottom of this card, add a pink strip reading "初心者歓迎！ひとり参加も大歓迎！". Along the very bottom of the poster, create a wide pink banner with large Japanese copy "さあ、次の休日は一緒に走ろう！" and smaller text on the left "お申し込み・詳細は公式サイトへ！". In the center-bottom place a search-bar style box containing {argument name="search text" default="フォールディングライド 2025"}. To its right, add a black-and-white QR code and a pink label reading "エントリーはこちらから！". In the bottom-right corner, include a small inset photo-style illustration of two cyclists riding together with a handwritten note "たのしいかも♡". Maintain a lively, magazine-quality event poster composition with exactly 1 main character, 1 folding bike, 1 large event info card, 1 speech bubble, 1 yellow burst badge, 1 angled portability sticker, 4 feature icons, 1 QR code, and 1 inset image.
title: Anime Folding Bike Event Poster
description: A colorful Japanese-style anime poster advertising a folding bicycle cycling event, ideal for recreating eye-catching promotional key visuals.

content: A retro 1980s Japanese manga magazine cover illustration with a faded paper texture, slightly grainy print look, and warm vintage ink colors. The composition is crowded and playful, set against a deep blue-purple background filled with fluffy pink clouds and floating pink hearts. At the top left, a huge dramatic Japanese title in bold hand-drawn lettering reads {argument name="headline text" default="危険な恋愛手引書"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading （ラブ・バイブル）. In the center, a tall delinquent-style teenage boy in a dark gakuran school uniform points toward the viewer with one hand, confident and charismatic. Beside him at center-right is a sweet shoujo-style teenage girl with a short dark-brown bob haircut, large sparkling eyes, and a cream sailor-style school uniform with a pink collar and bow, looking up in surprise and admiration. At lower left sits 1 gothic-lolita girl with pale lavender twin-tail hair, black ribbon accessories, and an elaborate black-and-pink frilly dress, blushing shyly with her hands near her mouth. At the bottom center is 1 fluffy black toy poodle wearing a mint-blue polka-dot scarf, facing forward with a cute expression and tongue slightly out. In the upper center-right, 1 tiny cupid girl with black twin ponytails, white wings, a pink pleated skirt, white socks, and a flower hair accessory flies while reading a pink book with a heart on the cover. In the upper right background, 1 panicked bespectacled schoolboy in a blue uniform clutches his head with bulging comedic eyes. Near the right-middle background stands 1 glamorous older woman in warm orange clothing, partially obscured by the main pair. At the far right is 1 dramatic villain-queen woman in glossy black armor-like corset attire, long black gloves, a high red-lined cape, and a gold crown, posing with one hand lifted. At the bottom right, an enormous open book rises diagonally into the frame, as if all the characters are emerging from its pages. Use dynamic manga cover composition, exaggerated expressions, romantic-comedy energy, hand-painted cel anime shading, and nostalgic weekly-magazine poster design.
title: Retro Manga Love Guide Cover
description: This prompt generates a busy vintage-style Japanese manga cover illustration packed with romantic-comedy characters, ideal for nostalgic poster art or faux magazine covers.
