content:
A dynamic, vertical advertising poster for {argument name="product" default="Nike Joggers"} featuring {argument name="celebrity" default="Sydney Sweeney"} in a mid-air jump pose. Sydney Sweeney is smiling brightly with her blonde hair flowing dynamically, wearing a vibrant, color-blocked outfit: an {argument name="outfit colors" default="orange and purple"} patterned windbreaker over a blue hoodie with a yellow and pink "NIKE" logo. She wears black athletic leggings with mesh panels and a large, padded, multi-colored (orange, purple, green, blue) leg sleeve on her left leg that matches the jacket. Her footwear is prominent: a massive, highly detailed, chunky Nike M2K Tekno sneaker in white with bold orange, blue, and black accents in the foreground, with a smaller, matching sneaker on her other foot. Her right hand is raised with bracelets.
The background is a high-key, stylized light blue gradient, with abstract architectural lines and motion streaks of a city, and a huge, translucent, light blue stylized "NIKE" logo overlapping. The top has text: "JUMP HIGHER. REACH FURTHER." in white with a Nike swoosh. The bottom features large, bold text: "puma”JOGGERS" followed by "POWER. PERFORMANCE. STYLE." The bottom contains more text and logos: "JUST DO IT." and two small Nike swooshes. The entire image has a high-energy, motion-blur-effect aesthetic with graphic textures and a clean, commercial design.
title: Nike advertising poster prompt
description: A prompt designed to generate energetic commercial posters featuring specific celebrities and products with a motion-blur aesthetic.

content: A high-end surreal sports advertising poster in a 3:4 vertical composition featuring an athletic woman frozen mid-jump against a deep moody charcoal-to-violet gradient background. She is centered slightly to the right, with her body stretched dynamically as if sprinting through the air, left arm extended back, right arm bent forward, one leg kicked forward and the other trailing behind. She has {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair in a messy bun with loose wisps, and wears an off-white oversized Nike crewneck sweatshirt, loose violet-gray marbled athletic pants, and clean white Nike sneakers with a subtle violet glow along the soles. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur block, creating an anonymous editorial fashion look. Behind and around her, dramatic electric violet smoke and energy clouds erupt and swirl, wrapping around her torso, legs, and feet, with luminous vapor trails and a storm-like aura that intensifies the motion. Place 1 white Nike swoosh logo in the top-left corner. Integrate 3 huge metallic silver 3D words across the lower middle of the poster reading {argument name="slogan text" default="JUST DO IT"}, split into the visible word blocks “JUST”, “DO”, and “IT”, partially overlapping the athlete’s body and cutting across the composition like bold campaign typography. The overall look is glossy, cinematic, premium, and energetic, with dramatic rim lighting, strong contrast, soft atmospheric haze, fashion-ad realism, and a viral AI-generated sports campaign aesthetic for {argument name="brand name" default="Nike"}.
title: Surreal Violet Sports Ad Poster
description: A cinematic athletic advertising poster with a mid-air female runner, violet energy smoke, and bold slogan typography, ideal for premium sportswear brand campaigns.

content: A polished Japanese museum exhibition poster in a contemporary anime illustration style, vertical layout, warm ivory and gold color palette with pastel confetti accents, designed like a high-end promotional ad for a spring holiday event. The composition features 4 school-age to young adult female characters in the foreground and one monumental Buddhist statue in the background. At center back is a towering gilded Thousand-Armed Kannon statue with a radiant halo, intricate carved details, many arms fanning outward symmetrically, and hands pressed together in prayer at the chest, glowing with sacred golden light. In the foreground on the right is the largest figure, a friendly young woman guide or older student reaching one hand dramatically toward the viewer in forced perspective; she has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} shoulder-length hair, a blue striped blouse, a cream sweater draped over her shoulders, and a light skirt, with a warm inviting expression. Across the lower middle are 3 younger schoolgirls in matching uniforms: short-sleeve pale blue shirts with navy ribbon ties and dark blue skirts. The left girl points upward excitedly with one arm raised and wears a small shoulder bag; the center girl holds an exhibition booklet upright; the right girl drinks from a clear water bottle while looking toward the scene. Give all 4 girls lively anime-style faces, glossy hair, soft shading, and energetic museum-outing body language. Fill the poster with dense Japanese typography and decorative graphic shapes. Place a large bold main headline on the left reading {argument name="headline text" default="国宝を見に行こう!"}, with oversized gold and black calligraphy-style characters and one red-highlighted character. Above it, add smaller text: "千手観音、祈りの宇宙". Add a red circular callout near the top left that says "はじめての美術館にもおすすめ!" and a white cloud-shaped speech bubble near the top right that says "いっしょに新しい発見をしよう!". Add a gold ribbon banner under the main headline reading "アスキー美術館 GW開催". Include a pale blue circular information box on the left with 5 lines of Japanese copy describing the statue: "国宝 千手観音立像", "千の手が、千年の祈りを", "伝える", "圧巻のスケールを、", "その目で感じてみて。". In the lower left, place a dark rectangular exhibition plaque with gold trim and 5 text lines: "アスキー美術館 GW特別展", the large title "国宝展", then "千手観音、祈りの宇宙", then the date line {argument name="event dates" default="2026.4.26 SAT - 6.15 SUN"}. Along the bottom center, add the museum name in large text: {argument name="museum name" default="アスキー美術館"}, followed by a smaller address line and nearest-station access text in Japanese. Add a red-and-black slogan along the bottom right: "心に残る体験が、きっとここに。". In the lower right, include 3 circular benefit icons with captions: one peach circle with a ticket icon and text "学生はお得! 学生証提示で当日券200円OFF!", one blue circle with a camera icon and text "撮影OK! 一部の作品は写真撮影OK!", and one gold circle with a gift icon and text "来場者プレゼント! オリジナルしおりをプレゼント!". Scatter subtle sparkles, halftone dots, abstract blobs, and confetti shapes around the page. Overall mood: inviting, educational, elegant, and exciting, combining sacred cultural grandeur with cheerful youthful discovery, like a fictional premium museum advertisement generated as a complete poster with integrated typography.
title: Anime Museum Poster with Kannon Statue
description: This prompt generates a fictional Japanese-style museum exhibition poster combining anime characters, a grand Thousand-Armed Kannon statue, and fully integrated promotional typography for editorial or advertising use.

content: Please create a poster-style illustration promoting "{argument name="place name" default="place name"}." Place this illustration in the center, and display photos and names of tourist spots or famous landmarks. Maintain the illustration style. The background should evoke that location. Please introduce several locations.
title: Tourism Poster Illustration
description: A prompt for creating regional tourism posters that combine a central symbolic illustration with photographs and names of local landmarks.

content: Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign poster for {argument name="brand" default="NOIR"}, a modern streetwear brand. Show one {argument name="product" default="hero oversized hoodie"} as the main focus against a gritty urban backdrop with wet concrete floors, dramatic low lighting, subtle smoke in the air and a raw street energy. Add bold minimal typography with the brand name NOIR and a short campaign headline like "{argument name="headline" default="Wear the Dark"}." Make it feel like a real high-end streetwear editorial, sharp detail, realistic fabric textures, modern and edgy, deep black tones with subtle grey accents, no clutter, no collage.
title: Streetwear Campaign Poster Prompt
description: A prompt for generating a premium urban streetwear campaign poster for a brand called NOIR, featuring a gritty aesthetic and minimal typography.

content: Create a vintage French New Wave political cinema poster as a torn-paper collage, vertical one-sheet composition, aged and distressed like a weathered 1968 street poster pasted on a wall. Use a limited palette of cream paper, faded black, deep red, mustard yellow, and muted cobalt blue, with heavy analog film grain, halftone print texture, ink bleed, fold creases, scratches, rough paper fibers, ripped edges, glue stains, and slightly misregistered letterpress typography. In the center, place a large black-and-white portrait of a brooding young man in a dark coat, seen in three-quarter profile, cropped from chest up, with curly dark hair and his face partially obscured by a rectangular censor-like paper block, giving the image a mysterious art-house feel. Surround the portrait with torn collage fragments: at upper left, a red paper panel with a black silhouette of a running protester; beneath it, a narrow off-white text strip reading “PARIS, MAI 68” and smaller French copy “LES MURS ONT DES OREILLES, L’AVENIR AUSSI.”; along the far left edge, a vertical black film-strip border with “36 KODAK TRI-X PAN FILM” in white; at lower left, a mustard-yellow torn panel with a cropped dark silhouette portrait; at upper right, a blue torn panel containing the quote “UN FILM COUP DE POING ET DE POÉSIE.” with “— CAHIERS DU CINÉMA” below; directly below that, a tall black-and-white photo fragment of a lone figure walking down a wet Paris street at night under lampposts; near the middle-right, a small torn newsprint block with the French slogan “LA BEAUTÉ EST DANS LA RUE” above a crowd scene; at lower right, a red torn panel with a black silhouette of a domed Paris landmark. Across the very top, centered in narrow black capitals, add the tagline “NOT EVERY REVOLUTION IS TELEVISED.” Near the lower middle, in small black condensed type, add “A FILM BY {argument name="director name" default="JEAN-PIERRE LEMAIRE"}”. Make the main title dominate the lower half in huge condensed red uppercase letters over torn cream paper: “{argument name="French title" default="L’HOMME QUI RÊVAIT"}”. Directly underneath, in smaller blue condensed capitals, add the English subtitle “{argument name="English subtitle" default="THE MAN WHO DREAMED"}”. At the bottom center, place a black strip with large white condensed capitals reading “COMING SOON”, and below it smaller text “ÉTÉ 1968”. In the bottom left corner, include a Cannes-style laurel mark with “SÉLECTION OFFICIELLE FESTIVAL DE CANNES 1968”. In the bottom right corner, add tiny production credits in French, including “UNE PRODUCTION LES FILMS DU SOLEIL DISTRIBUTION”. Keep the whole design asymmetrical, raw, rebellious, and elegant, evoking Godard, Truffaut, May 1968 protest graphics, and handmade French art-house poster collage.
title: French New Wave Protest Film Poster
description: A distressed 1960s-style French art-house movie poster collage for creating rebellious vintage cinema graphics with torn paper, bold typography, and political street-poster energy.

content: A vintage 1960s French New Wave cinema poster collage on aged beige paper, designed like a torn-paper art-house one-sheet with analog grain, distressed print texture, rough ripped edges, ink wear, halftone imperfections, and slight misregistration. Center the composition around a large black-and-white portrait of a woman with messy dark hair, hand raised to her face, holding a cigarette, cropped from the chest up, with her face obscured by a rectangular blur block. Use a layered collage layout with exactly 8 major paper elements: 1) a top-left black text block reading "LES FILMS DU CARREFOUR présentent" above the large stacked name "ANNA KARINA" and smaller text "dans un film de JEAN-LUC GODARD"; 2) a red torn quote panel on the left reading "Il faut essayer d’être jeune comme on peut. - GODARD"; 3) a blue torn panel in the upper right with a black label reading "PRIX JEAN VIGO 1962"; 4) a narrow torn newspaper clipping on the upper right reading "l’amour est plus fort que la mort"; 5) a yellow torn panel on the mid-right showing a black silhouette of a man in a hat facing a woman, beside a vertical black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes; 6) a bottom-left black-and-white Paris street photo with wet pavement, a lamppost, pedestrians, and a visible sign reading "HOTEL DU NORD"; 7) a small bottom-left review text block reading '"LE FILM QUI A CHANGÉ LE CINÉMA" - CAHIERS DU CINÉMA'; 8) a bottom-right cropped black-and-white portrait of a man in a suit with his face obscured by a rectangular blur block, partially covered by a red torn paper shape. Across the lower middle, place the huge torn-paper title in bold condensed uppercase: "À BOUT DE" in black and "SOUFFLE" in red, slightly angled and spanning most of the width. Under the title, add a blue torn strip with white uppercase text "UNE HISTOIRE D’AMOUR ET DE LIBERTÉ". At the bottom center, add "COMING SOON" in black uppercase and below it "LES FILMS DU CARREFOUR". Limit the palette to faded cream, black, deep ultramarine blue, muted poster red, and mustard yellow. The overall mood is rebellious, romantic, and cinematic, like an iconic French New Wave poster made from ripped magazines, street photography, and bold typography.
title: French New Wave Torn Poster Collage
description: This prompt generates a distressed 1960s-style French art-house movie poster collage, ideal for retro cinema branding, editorial artwork, or vintage film-inspired cover designs.

content: A clean, warm, minimalist promotional poster for a coding study meetup, in a soft lifestyle-photography plus editorial design style. Show 3 young adults seated around a light wooden table in a bright neutral room, collaborating with laptops and notebooks. The group consists of 2 men and 1 woman, all casually dressed in muted colors; the person on the left wears a dark navy sweater, the woman in the center-right wears an off-white knit top, and the person on the far right wears a light gray hoodie in side profile. Their faces are softly obscured and not detailed. Place 2 open silver laptops on the table, 2 ceramic mugs, 2 notebooks, 1 smartphone, and 1 pen visible near the right person’s hand. Compose the people on the right half of the image, with a large pale sage-green organic blob shape behind them as a graphic backdrop. Keep the lighting soft, natural, airy, and slightly warm, with lots of negative space on the left. On the left side, add large elegant headline typography reading {argument name="headline text" default="Claude Code"} on one line and {argument name="subheadline text" default="勉強会"} below it in large Japanese characters. Under the headline, add a thin dotted horizontal divider line, then 2 lines of smaller Japanese body text reading {argument name="body text" default="集まって、学んで、つくって、\n一緒にスキルをアップデートしよう。"}. Add playful hand-drawn doodles in thin dark lines around the layout: 1 hanging lamp centered near the top, 1 handwritten note in the upper left saying {argument name="note text" default="Let’s coding!"}, 1 small laptop icon in the upper right, 1 steaming coffee cup icon beside it, 1 potted plant icon in the lower left, and 3 long curving decorative squiggle lines distributed across the page. Use an off-white background, restrained Japanese cafe-meets-tech branding, balanced whitespace, and a polished social-media event flyer aesthetic with a 16:9 horizontal composition.
title: Minimal Coding Study Group Poster
description: A warm, modern event flyer showing three people studying with laptops, ideal for promoting a coding meetup or tech workshop on social media.

content: A soft, airy promotional hero image for a {argument name="class theme" default="Japanese home cooking class"} on a warm off-white background, styled like a minimalist lifestyle flyer. On the left half, show 2 people: an adult woman and a young girl cooking together at a white kitchen counter, both with calm, natural poses and gentle body language. The woman stands slightly behind and to the left of the child, leaning in supportively while helping guide the girl's hands as she slices a cucumber on a wooden cutting board with a kitchen knife. Their faces are intentionally obscured with soft rectangular blur blocks. The woman has dark brown hair tied in a low ponytail and wears a loose white blouse with a natural linen apron. The girl has dark hair in a high bun and wears a light short-sleeve top with a matching beige linen apron. On the counter, include a clear glass mixing bowl with salad, a folded striped kitchen towel, a wooden bowl of vegetables on the far left, a small wooden tray or plate with colorful vegetables in front, and a small potted green herb plant near the center-right edge of the cooking area. Visible produce should include sliced cucumber on the board and whole vegetables such as tomatoes, leafy greens, mushrooms, lemons or yellow citrus, and green peppers or cucumbers, arranged in a fresh, wholesome way. On the right half, leave generous negative space and place elegant Japanese headline text in a refined serif style: {argument name="headline text" default="お料理教室開講"}. Beneath it, add 2 lines of smaller Japanese body text: {argument name="subtext" default="はじめてさんも、もっと楽しみたい方も。 一緒に『おいしい』を作りましょう。"}. Surround the composition with 7 delicate hand-drawn dark gray doodle elements: 1 small leafy sprig on the far left, 1 hanging line at the upper left with 5 kitchen tools suspended from it (a frying pan, a spatula, a ladle, a peeler or slim utensil, and an oven mitt), 1 cluster of 2 floating leaves in the upper right, 1 small cooking pot icon on the right, 1 whisking bowl icon with tiny hearts near the lower middle-right, and 1 long single-line flourish sweeping across the lower right. Use soft natural daylight, muted beige and cream tones, shallow depth of field, clean editorial photography, gentle shadows, and a calm family-friendly premium aesthetic suitable for a cooking class landing page or poster.
title: Minimal Japanese Cooking Class Hero Image
description: This prompt generates a soft lifestyle-style promotional banner showing a mother and child cooking together with Japanese text and hand-drawn kitchen doodles, ideal for cooking class ads or website headers.

content: A soft, airy studio photograph on a warm off-white background with a minimalist Japanese greeting-card aesthetic. Show a small child, about toddler to preschool age, running joyfully toward the camera from left-center, with one arm raised high holding a tall pole with 2 carp streamers attached: 1 large blue koinobori on top and 1 smaller red koinobori below. The child wears a simple handmade samurai helmet folded from paper, a loose long-sleeve ivory shirt, light beige pants with rolled cuffs, and white sneakers. Keep the face unobtrusive and generic, with the focus on motion, innocence, and seasonal atmosphere. Surround the child with delicate hand-drawn doodle illustrations in thin gray pencil-like lines and faint pastel accents: 2 puffy clouds, 1 flying bird, 1 small origami crane near the text, 4 drifting leaves, 2 curved wind-line clusters, 1 small house, 2 tall trees, 2 purple iris flowers with grass at the bottom left, and sparse grass marks along the ground. On the right side, add elegant Japanese handwritten text reading {argument name="headline text" default="こどもの日"}, beneath it smaller Japanese text {argument name="subtext" default="すこやかな\n成長を願って。"}, and below that the English subtitle {argument name="english subtitle" default="Children's Day"} in a light handwritten script. Use a clean editorial layout with abundant negative space, natural soft lighting, muted cream and beige tones, subtle pastel blue and red accents, gentle shadows, and a calm premium lifestyle-photography look suitable for a seasonal holiday card or social media post.
title: Japanese Children's Day Photo Card
description: A minimalist lifestyle-style Children's Day image featuring a running child with koinobori and hand-drawn seasonal doodles, ideal for greeting cards and holiday social posts.

content: Create a high-end futuristic product advertisement poster for {argument name="product name" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}, styled like a premium tech magazine cover. Vertical composition, clean soft gray studio background with subtle rainbow prism lens flares around the edges. A fashionable young person is centered in the background, face obscured by a simple rectangular blur block, wearing a bright neon-lime knit beanie, wavy shoulder-length pink hair, and a black-and-white zebra striped top. One white wireless earbud is visible in their ear. In the extreme foreground, their hand is extended toward the camera holding an open glossy white charging case, shot with dramatic shallow depth of field and forced perspective so the case dominates the frame. Inside the open case, exactly 2 white earbuds are visible. Add 4 larger floating earbuds around the composition: 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, softly blurred as if suspended in space. Place huge bold white sans-serif headline text across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="AIRPODS"}. On the upper right, add smaller stacked white sans-serif product text reading {argument name="product label" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}. On the left middle, add a white feature callout in stacked text: {argument name="left feature text" default="Premium sound and noise cancellation"}. On the right side, add 2 large numeric feature blocks in white: one reading "30" with smaller text "hours of battery life." beneath it, and one reading "1" with smaller text "year warranty." beneath it. Sleek commercial lighting, glossy reflections on the case, crisp product detail, modern fashion-tech aesthetic, polished Apple-inspired ad design, photorealistic, premium editorial finish.
title: Premium Earbuds Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a sleek photorealistic wireless-earbuds commercial poster for tech product ads, social campaigns, and magazine-style promotional visuals.

content: Create a retro cinematic personal-brand poster in a distressed 1970s propaganda-meets-film-advertising style, landscape orientation, with a thick worn black border and heavy paper grain, ink bleed, halftone texture, scuffed edges, and aged print imperfections. Use a bold limited palette of deep black, warm cream, saturated poster red, and mustard yellow. The composition is a single unified poster with a large cropped portrait of {argument name="character name" default="HOSSEIN"} on the left half, shown from chest up, wearing dark sunglasses, a dark shirt, a chain necklace, and a mustard yellow jacket, with short dark hair styled up; the face is intentionally obscured by a centered rectangular block in muted taupe-gray, creating an editorial anonymized look. On the far left, place a vertical black panel containing 2 stacked “AI” blocks and 1 subtitle: top block reads “AI”, beneath it the subtitle reads “CREATIVE AGENT”, lower down another large “AI” sits over a gold circuit-board graphic. Across the center-right, place the main diagonal cream title band with huge black condensed lettering for the name {argument name="main name text" default="HOSSEIN"} and an oversized red “AI” at the far right of the band. Beneath the large name, add a small stretched subtitle line reading “AI CINEMATOGRAPHER · ADVERTIVE FOR BRAND”. In the top-right corner, add a 3-line stacked headline reading {argument name="top right headline" default="AI CINEMATOGRAPHER ADVERTIVE FOR BRAND"} in bold cream text on red. On the red field below the title band, include exactly 4 stacked black label boxes with cream text: “CINEMATOGRAPHER”, “AI CREATOR”, “VISUAL ARTIST”, and “BRAND ADVISOR”. Near the right side, add a handwritten white script note with exactly 3 lines: “Visual Storyteller”, “Brand Builder”, and “AI Explore”. In the lower area, arrange exactly 6 creative-tech objects: 1 circular orange graphic icon, 1 white audio waveform/equalizer graphic, 1 black film clapperboard labeled with “AI”, 1 open silver laptop, 1 pair of black headphones, and 1 large professional cinema camera body with visible “RED” marking; also include the edge of a music keyboard/controller at the bottom right. In the bottom-right corner, place a small dark terminal-style text block with tiny white monospace lines suggesting AI-generated visuals and analytics. Keep the whole design bold, gritty, and highly graphic, like a premium personal branding poster for an AI creative director and visual storyteller.
title: Retro AI Creative Brand Poster
description: A gritty vintage-style cinematic branding poster for an AI creative professional, ideal for personal brand visuals, social headers, or promo artwork.

content: Using REFERENCE_0, turn the attached desk photo and its written brief into a clean editorial-style infographic poster. Create a side-by-side comparison with exactly 2 labeled photo panels: “Current Setup” on the left using the original scene, and “Optimized Setup” on the right showing a plausible improved version of the same room and desk from a matching angle. Add a large serif headline at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="Desk Setup Audit"}. Around the left panel, add exactly 5 issue callout cards connected by leader lines: 1) MONITOR HEIGHT — 👍 acceptable — “Screens close, but split focal plane” — tag “Neck fatigue”; 2) CHAIR POSITION — ❌ actively hurting — “Low lounge chair, weak support” — tag “Back pain + slouching”; 3) LIGHTING — ⚠️ costing energy — “Mixed lamps + side glare” — tag “Eye strain”; 4) CABLE MANAGEMENT — ❌ actively hurting — “Loose cables on desk + floor” — tag “Visual drag / trip risk”; 5) CLUTTER — ⚠️ costing energy — “Tools, boxes, papers in view” — tag “Focus loss”. Add a small red “TOP FIX” badge pointing to the chair position issue. Around the right panel, add exactly 5 improved callout cards: 1) MONITOR HEIGHT — ✅ working — “Primary screen centered at eye level”; 2) CHAIR POSITION — ✅ working — “Chair tucked in, feet flat, elbows ~90°”; 3) LIGHTING — ✅ working — “Soft front light, glare reduced”; 4) CABLE MANAGEMENT — ✅ working — “Cables routed under desk”; 5) CLUTTER — ✅ working — “Clear work zone, gear zoned”. In the optimized panel, visibly show the improvements: one main monitor centered, laptop centered below it, ergonomic office chair, cleaner desktop, cable routing hidden under the desk, softer balanced lighting, and a small drawer cabinet on the right while keeping the same room recognizable. Add a bottom legend with exactly 5 items: “LEGEND”, “Top Fix”, “working”, “acceptable”, “costing energy”, “actively hurting”. Along the bottom, add exactly 4 boxed sections: 1) “FREE FIXES” with 3 numbered items — “Top Fix: Raise sitting posture / ditch low slouch”, “Center primary monitor”, “Clear desk + floor spillover”; 2) “UNDER $50” with 3 numbered items — “Velcro ties + under-desk cable tray”, “Lumbar pillow or footrest”, “Simple desk organizer”; 3) “WORTH THE INVESTMENT” with 3 numbered items — “Ergonomic task chair”, “Monitor arms for perfect alignment”, “Closed storage / drawers”; 4) “FOCUS FORECAST” showing 2 gauges labeled “Current: 2.5 hrs/day” and “After Top 3 Fixes: 5.5 hrs/day”, plus a green pill reading “+3.0 hrs”. Use a refined magazine infographic aesthetic, muted green and cream palette, rounded boxes, minimal text, crisp icons, thin connector lines, and polished layout suitable for sharing on social media.
title: Desk Setup Audit Infographic
description: This prompt turns a desk photo into a polished side-by-side ergonomic audit infographic for workspace improvement and social sharing.

content: A cinematic crossover promotional poster for a gritty sci-fi military game collaboration, designed like a premium Chinese game event key visual. Vertical composition, ultra-detailed, dark futuristic battlefield city at night with rain, smoke, sparks, neon haze, satellite dishes, towers, launch structures, and a war-torn industrial skyline. Two female combat characters stand back-to-back in the center as the main focus. The left character is a tactical recon operative in a black hooded armored stealth suit with layered plates, straps, gauntlets, and glowing blue tech accents, holding a compact high-tech crossbow pointed downward; her silhouette is sleek, lethal, and military. The right character is a cyberpunk female fighter inspired by a punk marksman archetype, with long electric-{argument name="hair color" default="blue"} braided hair, shaved side details, tattoos on her arm, black leather and tactical belts, and a large futuristic minigun-like weapon glowing purple-blue; she feels rebellious, dangerous, and iconic. Their faces are obscured by dark censor-like square blocks, preserving a mysterious meme-poster look. At the very top, small Chinese tagline text reads “两大战场 一种信念”. Dominating the header is enormous distressed metallic Chinese title text reading “三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟”, with the first part in weathered silver and the second part in worn gold. Beneath the headline is a thin line of smaller Chinese slogan text: “战术协同 · 信息制胜 · 突破极限”. On the left midground, include a large luminous blue holographic sign with a geometric logo and the word “HAAVK”. On the right midground, add a purple neon billboard with Chinese text “金克斯·信息位” and smaller subtitle lines beneath it. On the lower left near the left character, add a green-labeled caption box reading “露娜·侦察位”. Across the environment, add red laser streaks in the sky, blue scanning lines, purple atmospheric glow, faint explosions, and dense cinematic volumetric lighting. At the bottom center, place collaboration branding logos and text: “三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟” with English subtitles “DELTA FORCE” and “LEAGUE OF LEGENDS”, followed by the date line “战场集结 6月12日 战场重构”. Beneath that, show exactly 4 small feature badges in a row with icons and bilingual labels: “限定皮肤 / LIMITED SKIN”, “限定任务 / LIMITED MISSIONS”, “专属奖励 / EXCLUSIVE REWARDS”, and “战术协同 / TACTICAL SYNERGY”. Add a final small Chinese footer slogan and tiny copyright text. Overall style: blockbuster game marketing art, hyper-detailed photorealistic concept art, cyberpunk militarism, Tencent-style collaboration poster, dramatic contrast, blue-purple-orange lighting, crisp typography, epic and commercially polished.
title: Cyberpunk Game Crossover Poster
description: Generates a high-end Chinese-style crossover promotional poster for two game franchises, ideal for collaboration campaigns, event key visuals, and cinematic marketing art.

content: A refined New Chinese aesthetic poster on a warm ivory rice-paper background, minimalist and vertical, featuring a single luxurious golden 如意金箍棒 as the central subject. The staff is placed diagonally from the lower left foreground to the upper right, with the bottom end planted into a dark ink-splashed rocky surface and the top extending upward in a poised, heroic angle. The metal surface is richly engraved with intricate traditional relief patterns, cloud-and-dragon style ornament, polished gold highlights, and subtle glowing reflections. Around the staff, 2 sweeping metallic-gold brushstroke ribbons spiral upward in elegant S-curves, like calligraphic energy trails, partially transparent and painterly. At the base, black and gray ink wash, smoke, mist, and splash textures spread outward in a dramatic burst, blending realism with Chinese ink painting. Keep the composition spacious with strong negative space and a premium gallery-poster feel. Add 5 text groups arranged in traditional poster layout: on the upper left, a large vertical black calligraphy headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="如意金箍棒"}; beside it, a smaller vertical line of Chinese text reading "心有如意，万象皆可破"; below that, a small romanized subtitle in thin uppercase serif/sans style reading "RUYI JINGUBANG"; on the lower right, another vertical poetic line reading "一念起，风云动 / 一棒定，乾坤静"; at the bottom center, a faint small horizontal line reading "自在如意，无所不成". Include 2 red seal stamps, one on the left mid-lower area and one small seal near the lower-right text. Use elegant black typography, subtle gray ink traces, soft diffuse lighting, ultra-detailed product rendering, cultural luxury branding, serene yet powerful mood, and a balanced blend of ancient mythic artifact presentation and contemporary high-end Chinese poster design.
title: New Chinese Golden Staff Poster
description: This prompt generates a premium New Chinese style mythic artifact poster, ideal for cultural branding, title art, and elegant product-style concept visuals.

content: A premium vertical poster advertisement in elegant new Chinese aesthetics, featuring a single plastic cup of strawberry sundae-style ice cream drink as the central product. The cup is placed slightly below center, shot straight-on with soft studio lighting, with glossy white swirled soft serve on top, creamy white layers marbled with vivid strawberry-red streaks inside the cup, and a simple gold line-art mascot printed on the front. Add a jagged yellow burst on the upper left-middle that says "ぶっちぎりの新連載!!" and a diagonal magenta ribbon nearby that says "2089年 最速の物語が始まる―". In the lower half, arrange 7 supporting characters around the hero: 1 silver-haired man in a white futuristic coat with blue glowing lines on the left; 1 red-haired tough-looking young man in a black-and-red jacket at bottom left with fire blazing from his right fist; 1 hooded figure in a purple cloak holding a glowing purple book left of center; 1 short blue-black-haired girl in a dark tech outfit at center holding a transparent holographic interface; 1 brown-haired young man in a gray racing jacket with arms crossed at right center; 1 green-haired gentle-looking girl in a pale top near lower right center; and 1 blond youth in a yellow outfit on the far right holding up a small cube or die. Along the very bottom, include 4 rectangular teaser panels for other manga series, each with a colored banner tag at the top and Japanese titles: panel 1 red tag "新連載!" with title "覇の剣聖" and subtitle "～宿命の刃～"; panel 2 blue tag "新連載!" with title "アストラル・コード" and subtitle "～銀河の記憶～"; panel 3 pink tag "激推し!" with title "エリクシア・ハート" and subtitle "～魔法少女再起動!～"; panel 4 green tag "激推し!" with title "喧嘩王キング" and subtitle "～頂上決戦編～". Near the lower right, add a small inset image of the same magazine volume with text beside it reading "最新単行本 第1巻 4月15日発売!!". At the very bottom, place a white disclaimer line across a black strip: "※これはファンメイドのフィクションです。実在の雑誌・出版社とは関係ありません。". Use bold manga cover typography, exaggerated Japanese magazine composition, dense overlapping text, thick outlines, explosive bursts, glossy highlights, gritty neon cyberpunk atmosphere, and polished anime illustration.
title: Cyberpunk Japanese Manga Cover
description: This prompt generates a dense faux Japanese weekly manga magazine cover for a futuristic cyberpunk racing series, ideal for magazine mockups and anime-style promotional art.

The poster should feature a large full-body cross-section in the center with all major components clearly visible, surrounded by detailed exploded views of each module: engine, battery, suspension, motor, drive unit, thermal system, steering system, chassis, electronics, interior systems, and structural frame. Style: clean background, ultra-fine engineering style, premium fonts, luxury product display, highly detailed specifications, collector-grade poster aesthetic, and cinematic artistic effects.

content:
ASPECT_RATIO: [{argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"}]

SOURCE_IMAGE: [{argument name="reference" default="uploaded photo"}]

ACCENT_COLOR: [{argument name="accent color" default="single vivid highlight color"}]

Use the uploaded photo as the base image and the only identity source. Keep the person exactly the same and clearly recognizable. Ignore the original framing and always recompose into a tight close-up or upper-body editorial crop, with the face dominating the frame. Transform the image into a gestural editorial ink fashion illustration. The style must be built from bold black brushwork, not delicate sketch lines.

Use:

very thick black brush strokes

broad dry-brush sweeps

large asymmetrical black ink masses

long loose calligraphic lines

broken contours

scratchy secondary linework

strong black-on-ivory contrast

smooth monochrome skin

The thick strokes must be clearly dominant. Do not render the portrait mainly with thin contour lines. Do not make it neat, polished, or softly illustrated. The image should feel painted with a loaded brush and finished with sharp expressive pen marks.

Keep the portrait stylish and high-fashion.

Use one hero accessory, preferably oversized translucent tinted sunglasses.

The accent color [ACCENT_COLOR] must live mainly inside that accessory, especially in the lenses, as a bold luminous tint. Only tiny supporting traces of the same color may appear elsewhere.
title: Gestural Ink Fashion Illustration
description: An advanced image-to-image prompt that transforms a photo into a bold, high-fashion black ink illustration with a specific color accent.

content: A dramatic parody anime light novel cover in a dark gothic romantasy style, designed like an absurdly over-the-top isekai web novel volume cover. Center a handsome young male antihero from the chest up in a heroic three-quarter pose with arms crossed, face mostly obscured by shadow, messy {argument name="hair color" default="black"} emo hair, pale skin, and a cold brooding presence. He wears glossy black armor with large shoulder plates, a black cloak and scarf wrapped high around the neck, dark gauntlets, a diamond-patterned tunic beneath the armor, and a small silver crest pinned at the chest. A massive black battle axe is strapped over one shoulder, with a sword hilt visible near the lower left side. Set him inside a ruined cathedral or castle archway with towering stone columns and a huge circular gothic window behind him, backlit by cold silvery moonlight. In the distant background, show sharp fantasy castle spires fading into mist. Use a palette of black, steel blue, silver, and antique gold, with high contrast rim lighting, subtle magical sparkles, and painterly anime illustration detail. Surround the entire cover with an ornate filigree gold border and elegant flourishes in every corner. Add lavish gold serif and script typography layered over the character like a real fantasy paperback cover. The main title should dominate the lower half in stacked lines with decorative swashes and mixed font sizes: {argument name="title text" default="The Absurdly Overpowered, Excessively Edgelord, Emotionally Constipated, Black-Haired, Red-Eyed, World-Saving, Dragon-Slaying, Harem-Accidentally-Collecting Demon Lord (Who Just Wanted a Nap)"}. In the upper right, add author text reading: {argument name="author name" default="TISAYAI"}. In the upper left, place a small ornate badge with the number {argument name="volume number" default="1"}. Include 3 side text blurbs in small gold type: upper left blurb, “I came to this world to flex my red eyes, emo hair, and godly plot armor. You're welcome.”; lower left oval blurb, “Villains Tremble. Heros Whine. He Yawns.”; lower right blurb, “I don't chose the isekai life, the isekai life made a huge fuss over me.” The overall tone is ironic, melodramatic, gorgeous, and intentionally ridiculous, like a premium fake bestselling isekai romance-action novel cover. Portrait orientation, highly polished, ultra-detailed, cinematic, decorative, readable typography integrated into the artwork.
title: Parody Isekai Edgelord Novel Cover
description: A lavish fake anime light novel cover featuring an absurdly brooding black-armored isekai hero, ideal for parody fantasy book art and ironic romantasy web novel visuals.

content:
Create a premium cinematic tennis sports poster in a bold {argument name="color theme" default="black and orange rainy theme"}. Show one athletic male tennis player in a powerful action pose, lunging forward during heavy rain, holding a tennis racket close to the camera as he strikes a yellow tennis ball. The player wears a {argument name="outfit" default="bright orange sports shirt"}, black shorts, black socks, and black tennis shoes. His body is wet from the rain, with dramatic water droplets, splashes, and motion blur around him. Add a subtle cyan rim light around the player for a sharp energetic outline.

Use a dark gritty textured background with heavy rain streaks, wet court reflections, water splashes, and orange diagonal graphic shapes behind the player. The poster should feel intense, modern, competitive, and social-media-ready.

Use large bold distressed typography on the left side with the main headline:

{argument name="main text" default="PLAY THROUGH THE STORM"}

Make “STORM” the biggest word in a rough brushstroke style. Add the {argument name="date" default="26 APRIL"} below:

Add a small supporting line:

RAIN SESSION

Color palette: deep black, charcoal gray, bright orange, white text, and subtle cyan glow.

Style: premium sports campaign poster, high contrast, gritty editorial design, dramatic rain atmosphere, sharp details, dynamic composition, modern typography, 4:5 vertical poster format.
title: Cinematic Tennis Sports Poster
description: A premium gritty sports poster prompt with a black and orange theme, featuring an athletic tennis player lunging through heavy rain.

content: Create a lavish vertical anime character collector poster in a premium magazine-cover and merchandise-catalog style, centered on {argument name="character name" default="Yae Miko"}, a beautiful adult shrine maiden with very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pink"} hair, violet eyes, and a confident flirtatious expression, seated elegantly on a dark lacquered shrine chest with gold tassels and floral ornamentation. She wears an elaborate sheer sakura-themed ceremonial outfit in layered translucent pink and white fabric, with floral embroidery, ribbons, jeweled accessories, gold details, detached sleeves, a delicate veil, ornate earrings, and strappy high heels, showing a glamorous fashion-illustration silhouette with one leg crossed and one hand near her lips. Surround the whole composition with cherry blossoms, petals, decorative borders, gold filigree, and soft pastel pink lighting. The page should look like a special edition fan collectible poster with many integrated design elements and readable labels. At the top, place giant decorative serif typography reading “YAE MIKO” across the background, plus a small upper-left label “Generalpost • ETERNAL SAKURA” and an upper-right plaque reading “Lady Guuji OF THE GRAND NARUKAMI SHRINE”. On the right side near the character, add one vertical Japanese text line. Include a left-side stamp sheet titled “CHIBI STAMP COLLECTION” containing exactly 6 stamp-style chibi portraits arranged in a 2x3 grid, all of the same character in different cute expressions or poses. Below that, include a section titled “Mini Figure Collection” with exactly 3 small chibi figure variants standing side by side. Below that, include a “Stickers” section with exactly 5 die-cut stickers: 4 chibi character stickers and 1 fox mask sticker. content: Create a bold streetwear fashion campaign poster with a gritty editorial collage aesthetic. Show a young man from the waist up seated behind a dark table, centered slightly right, with thick dark hair swept back, wearing a black leather biker jacket over a plain white t-shirt. His face is obscured by a rectangular censor-style blur block. His right hand is raised near his face, pinching a tiny gold building brick piece between thumb and index finger, while his left hand rests on the table. On the table, place exactly 1 partially assembled gold brick trophy on a green base at the lower right and exactly 18 scattered small gold brick pieces spread across the tabletop in front of him. Build the background as a layered black-and-electric-blue torn paper collage with rough ripped edges, distressed print texture, halftone dot patterns, white scribble marks, thin grid overlays, and sticker-like graphic elements in neon green, white, and black. Make the oversized headline dominate the left half in stacked typography reading “NO RULES.” in huge distressed white block letters, with a neon green X slashing across the O area, then “JUST” in large neon green hand-painted brush script, and “STYLE” in white brush script beneath it with a neon green underline. Add exactly 8 secondary sticker/text graphics around the composition: 1) top right black taped sticker reading “BREAK THE NORM” in white stacked text with a small neon green smiley face beside it, 2) mid right narrow white vertical label reading “STYLE IS FREEDOM”, 3) mid left black stacked sticker reading “OWN YOUR LOOK. OWN YOUR WORLD.”, 4) lower left blue torn-paper label reading “STREET CODE” with a barcode and small globe icon, 5) bottom center black strip reading “BUILT DIFFERENT.” with neon green script underneath reading “MADE TO STAND OUT.”, 6) bottom right neon green label reading “GLOBAL VIBES” with smaller text “LOCAL ATTITUDE” and a globe icon, 7) bottom right small black stamp reading “EST. 20XX” with tiny subtext, 8) lower left hand-drawn crown doodle. Also add several neon green X marks and white arrow/squiggle doodles as accent graphics. Use a high-contrast palette of electric blue, black, white, and neon green, with the gold bricks as warm metallic accents. The mood should feel youthful, confident, rebellious, energetic, and like a modern Instagram ad for a fashion-forward streetwear brand.
title: Streetwear Collage Poster With Gold Bricks
description: This prompt generates a high-energy streetwear campaign poster featuring a censored male subject, bold collage typography, and graphic editorial elements for fashion ads or social media branding.

content:
A delivery flyer for a Japanese Chinese restaurant (3:4 aspect ratio). B5 size, double-sided style.

Flyer characteristics (following the logic of real delivery flyers):
- Loud red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! {argument name="restaurant name" default="Mona Restaurant"}" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a {argument name="character" default="Chinese girl (red cheongsam, brown short bob)"} holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" (with a speech bubble).
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: various ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, chili shrimp, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Name and price for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery for all orders over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ {argument name="phone number" default="072-XX-XXXX"}" highlighted with a red circle.
- Business hours: "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Cheap paper texture finish. Includes fold lines. High accuracy indistinguishable from real Japanese delivery flyers.
title: Authentic Japanese Delivery Flyer
description: An elaborate prompt that replicates the specific visual language of Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyers, including typography, layout, and paper texture.

content: A dreamy anime-style illustration of a fashionable young woman floating through the famous Shibuya Scramble Crossing in Tokyo on a bright spring day, with a soft pastel palette, glowing light, and whimsical urban fantasy mood. She is centered full-body, hovering slightly above the crosswalk while standing on a giant iridescent soap bubble. She has very long flowing dark indigo-black hair with a slight violet sheen, a pink floral headband with ribbons, and a sweet elegant outfit: a dusty pink knee-length dress with puffed long sleeves, layered ruffles, ribbon lacing at the chest, sakura flower embroidery near the hem, and a tan belt at the waist. Her expression should feel gentle and dreamy, her pose graceful and balanced, with one hand raised and pointing upward. Around her are many transparent rainbow soap bubbles of different sizes, about 16 visible bubbles total, drifting through the air. One large bubble near her raised hand contains a modern smartphone with a cherry blossom wallpaper. One medium bubble at lower left contains an open slim laptop angled toward the viewer. One large teardrop-shaped bubble hanging from her other hand contains 3 shopping items: a paper shopping bag printed with “SHIBUYA 109”, a second pastel shopping bag, and a pink bunny-shaped pouch or plush accessory. One medium bubble on the lower right contains a silver compact camera. The setting is a lively, recognizable Shibuya streetscape with the cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building in the center background and multiple Japanese commercial billboards and signs surrounding the crossing, including visible signage such as “DHC,” “H&M,” “DMM TV,” and colorful vertical Japanese signs. Include pedestrians in the distance, crosswalk stripes, city poles, and realistic urban depth, but keep the girl as the clear focal point. The atmosphere should feel airy, magical, glossy, and slightly nostalgic, combining detailed city realism with highly polished anime character art, soft bloom lighting, shimmering reflections, translucent materials, and delicate springtime romance.
title: Pastel Anime Girl at Shibuya Crossing
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style fantasy city portrait of a stylish girl floating through Shibuya amid iridescent bubbles, ideal for social-media-ready AI art with a magical Tokyo vibe.

content: A writing brush in the process of painting, tracing an S-shaped calligraphy stroke from the bottom right to the top left. Within the stroke is a microscopic landscape of landmarks from {argument name="city name" default="Guangzhou"}, styled as a 3D high-saturation poster. The content within the stroke features iconic buildings of {argument name="city name" default="Guangzhou"}, blending local traditional architecture with modern structures to create a visual layer of old and new. If the city has a water system (such as a river or bay), incorporate the corresponding water body into the stroke to create a misty and atmospheric feel, enhancing the sense of spatial depth. The stroke as a whole shows natural ink diffusion and edge fragmentation effects while maintaining clear urban structures and rich details. The tip of the brush is at the end of the stroke in the upper left corner, capturing a dynamic moment of "currently drawing." Outside the stroke is a large area of clean white space, highlighting an Oriental minimalist composition. Add text at the beginning of the stroke: {argument name="city name" default="Guangzhou"} and a {argument name="city slogan" default="short slogan for the city"}, with the text naturally arranged along the direction of the stroke. Overall style: A blend of traditional Chinese style and modern 3D art, high detail, high saturation but clean, vibrant colors, realistic physical lighting, HDR, 8K resolution, commercial-grade visual quality.

description: A sophisticated prompt for creating 3D high-saturation city posters that use a calligraphy brush stroke to frame a miniature landscape of urban landmarks and traditional architecture.

content: A hyperrealistic {argument name="phone model" default="Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max"} advertisement shot in a dark, moody editorial style. A young stylish woman with a warm complexion and soft upswept brunette hair, wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="dusty mauve velvet off-shoulder mini dress"}, thigh-high taupe suede heeled boots, and a thin black choker necklace, is captured mid-pose extending her arm forward holding an iPhone 17 Pro Max toward the camera in a confident selfie gesture. The phone — featuring a titanium Desert Sand finish with a flush quad-lens camera system and a edge-to-edge ProMotion display glowing with vivid color — dominates the center of the frame. The composition uses shallow depth of field with tack-sharp focus on the phone screen and extended arm, soft cinematic blur on the background figure. The {argument name="background style" default="near-black charcoal"} background is layered with subtle urban texture — faint graffiti strokes in electric yellow and muted olive barely visible through a heavy dark vignette. Multiple rows of ultra-small all-caps typographic text orbit the phone at different angles reading phrases like "EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU." and "THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS" — some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. At the upper right, the Apple logo appears in clean brushed silver against the dark background. At the top center, a thin horizontal navigation-style text bar reads "PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE" in spaced all-caps serif font. A large commanding headline is placed center-right — "CAPTURE" in massive ultra-bold white letters followed by "EVERYTHING" in lighter weight creating dramatic type hierarchy. Small yellow plus (+) symbols and diagonal arrows (↗) scattered throughout as accent details. Bottom left features a bold slogan lockup: "YOUR WORLD. YOUR FRAME." in large bold sans-serif white text with a thin subline reading "The most powerful iPhone ever made. Every selfie is a cinematic moment." The overall lighting is dramatic and directional — a single cold key light from the upper left causing the titanium frame to shimmer, the ProMotion display to glow, and the velvet dress to catch a soft warm sheen against the darkness. Photorealistic. Commercial photography quality. High contrast. 4K resolution. 3:4 vertical format optimized for social media.
title: Hyperrealistic iPhone 17 Pro Max Ad
description: A complex, high-detail commercial prompt for a smartphone advertisement featuring urban textures, chaotic typography, and dramatic lighting.

Pose her in a confident dominant stance with one leg straight and the other knee raised, resting on the throat of a white tennis racket held vertically with one hand on the grip and the racket head touching the floor. She is looking to the side with her face turned away, sleek dark hair pulled into a low ponytail, glossy skin, long toned legs, and a luxury campaign aesthetic. content: A cinematic, hyper-detailed rustic interior scene of a solitary {argument name="subject" default="older farmer"} sitting at a wooden table, intensely focused on a modern laptop as if entering deep work mode. He wears a weathered straw hat, a light sage-gray work shirt with rolled sleeves, and blue denim overalls. The composition is centered and symmetrical, medium shot from the front, with both forearms resting on the table behind the laptop. A dramatic golden energy aura explodes outward from behind and around his body, forming radiant sparks, glowing streaks, electric filaments, and a halo-like outline that makes him look powerfully energized and unstoppable. The room is a warm, moody farmhouse workspace with 1 large multi-pane window on the left casting soft natural light, 1 metal cup holding several pens and pencils, 1 ceramic mug, 1 open notebook with 1 pen in the foreground, 1 closed book at the lower left edge, and 3 stacked books on the right side of the table. In the dim background, include 2 faint ghostlike or memory-like human figures, one on the left and one on the right, subtle and partially obscured by the glowing energy. Use rich amber and sepia tones, dust motes, dramatic backlighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, textured wood grain, and a heroic, surreal atmosphere blending rural life with modern productivity. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, square composition.
title: Farmer in Deep Work Aura
description: This prompt generates a dramatic photorealistic image of a rural worker using a laptop while surrounded by explosive golden energy, ideal for illustrating intense focus, productivity, or solitary work time.

content: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same business meeting as a polished, high-end corporate publicity photo from a new angle. Move the viewpoint closer to the presentation screen and shift to a wide front-left perspective so the display dominates the left side and the meeting table with the attendees sits on the right near large floor-to-ceiling windows. Replace the dim surveillance-camera look with bright natural daylight, clean modern office lighting, and a professional architectural interior feel. Remove all CCTV overlays, timestamps, recording indicators, floor/device text, and other security-camera artifacts. Upgrade the display content into a sleek keynote-style strategy slide in Chinese with the headline "2026年度战略规划：云端协同与新生态构建". On the left side of the slide, show 1 upward-trending quarterly bar chart labeled with 4 bars: Q1 +15%, Q2 +22%, Q3 +18%, Q4 +25%. On the right side, show 3 text sections with bold headings: "技术驱动创新", "全球化市场拓展", and "用户体验升级", each with short Chinese body copy beneath. Keep the scene photorealistic, with a premium corporate brand aesthetic, neat seating arrangement, and subtle face anonymization/soft blur on the people.
title: Corporate Meeting Photo Upgrade
description: This prompt turns a surveillance-style conference room reference into a bright, premium corporate presentation photo suitable for business decks, reports, or marketing visuals.

content:
High-end luxury skincare advertisement featuring a giant, oversized bottle of '{argument name="brand name" default="VELORA Hydrating Skin Cleanser"}' standing approximately 3 feet tall on a premium stone pedestal. The bottle design is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish, and its color perfectly matches the outfit of the model — a soft satin dress in {argument name="color theme" default="warm champagne gold tones"}, reflected identically in the bottle’s body color for a cohesive fashion-forward aesthetic. 

In the background, a {argument name="model description" default="stylish Western woman with glowing sun-kissed skin and blonde hair styled in a loose messy bun"} wears gold-accented sunglasses and a flowing satin dress. She leans elegantly over the oversized bottle, reaching toward the pump with a relaxed, confident pose, creating a striking forced perspective illusion that emphasizes scale and interaction.

The setting is a warm, editorial-style studio environment with earthy luxury tones — beige, sand, terracotta, and soft gold hues. In the foreground, premium natural elements such as sliced oranges, dripping golden honey, chamomile flowers, and smooth stones are arranged artistically on textured sand, enhancing the organic skincare narrative. Subtle condensation droplets are visible on the bottle, adding realism and freshness.

Lighting is cinematic and inspired by golden hour, with soft shadows and a warm glow that highlights both the product texture and the model’s skin. The composition includes intentional negative space for branding text. 

Overlay minimal, elegant advertising text in modern serif font:
'VELORA — Pure Hydration, Elevated.'
'Skin that glows naturally.'

Ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, sharp focus on product details, shallow depth of field, editorial fashion campaign, luxury skincare advertisement, premium branding, Vogue-style composition.

content: Create a soft editorial lifestyle poster for {argument name="event date" default="4.26"} celebrating Japanese bath culture, designed like a refined magazine feature page in portrait orientation. The layout is split into two main columns with a pale cream and warm gray background, thin divider lines, elegant serif typography, and muted sage-green accents. At the top left, include the small heading “LIFESTYLE / FEATURE”, then a large date line reading “{argument name="event date" default="4.26"} EVENT”, followed by the large Japanese title “よい風呂の日” and the subtitle “特集” in sage green, with a small bathtub icon nearby. Beneath that, add the Japanese tagline “心も体も、ととのう時間。” and several short body-text blocks in Japanese explaining the meaning of Good Bath Day, including references to “4（よ）2（ふ）6（ろ）” and the benefits of bathing for body and mind. On the right side, show a bright, airy bathroom interior lit by soft natural morning light from a window, with beige and off-white tones, a wooden counter, folded white towels, a pump bottle, a sponge, woven baskets, and a few green plants. In front of the bathroom scene, place a youthful anime-style person with {argument name="hair color" default="soft medium brown"} tousled short hair, fair skin, and a relaxed expression, standing in a casual post-bath pose. The character wears a loose white T-shirt with a tiny dark square chest logo and light brown drawstring lounge pants, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a white towel up near the face and shoulder, conveying a fresh, just-bathed feeling. Near the character, include the handwritten-style Japanese side note “湯上がりの、リラックスタイム。” Add an oval badge on the lower right of the main image area with the English heading “GOOD BATH DAY” and Japanese explanatory text inside, plus a small bathtub icon. Below the main feature, include exactly 2 small inset images of the same character in the bathroom, each framed as rectangular mini-panels with narrow vertical Japanese captions beside them. At the bottom, create exactly 4 rounded rectangular information cards in a row: card 1 labeled “POINT 01” with the heading “お風呂の基本” and text about soaking in lukewarm water around 38–40°C; card 2 labeled “POINT 02” with the heading “日常でできること” and text about making bathing part of a routine instead of only showering; card 3 labeled “POINT 03” with the heading “楽しみ方・取り入れ方” and text about bath salts, scents, music, and lighting; card 4 labeled “まとめ” with concluding Japanese text about sustainable self-care. Decorate the cards with small illustrated elements such as leaves, a bathtub, a candle, a bottle, lavender sprigs, and a basket of folded towels. Along the very bottom, add a horizontal green tip strip labeled “今日からできる TIP” with exactly 3 checklist items: “就寝の１〜２時間前に入浴する”, “スマホは浴室に持ち込まない”, and “水分補給を忘れずに”. Place a final handwritten-style Japanese phrase at the lower right reading “自分をいたわる時間を。” The overall look should be clean, gentle, wellness-focused, feminine-neutral, and polished like a Japanese seasonal magazine infographic, with delicate anime illustration, soft shadows, subtle textures, and calm spa-like atmosphere.
title: Good Bath Day Editorial Poster
description: A Japanese magazine-style wellness feature poster about Good Bath Day, ideal for seasonal lifestyle campaigns, social posts, or bath-care editorial art.

The face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block centered over the face. Use an off-white textured paper background with distressed grunge design elements and collage layering. Behind the model, place a large rough red paint brushstroke shape spanning diagonally across the center. Add black ink splatters, sketch circles, torn paper scraps, and hand-painted graffiti accents. Include 4 major graphic doodles: a large black X in the upper right, a hand-drawn upward arrow in the lower left, a rough crown sketch in the lower right, and a circular scribble near the top center. In the upper left, place a stylized eye logo above the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}" and a smaller tagline below reading "A MOMENT OF YOUR STYLE". On the left middle area, add the handwritten slogan "INNOVATE CREATE INSPIRE" in stacked black brush lettering. On the right middle area, place a torn black paper patch with the handwritten white slogan "BUILT DIFFERENT MOVE DIFFERENT" and a red underline stroke. In the lower left near the shoe, add a black distressed label sticker containing a globe scribble, the text "{argument name="brand name" default="NESS STUDIO"}", and a barcode. Along the bottom footer, create a clean horizontal strip with 3 social media icons and handles separated by thin vertical dividers: Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter, each followed by "@NESS.STUDIO". The overall style should be edgy, urban, youthful, high-contrast, editorial street fashion, mixing product advertising photography with graffiti poster design, collage textures, and dynamic branding.
title: Streetwear Sneaker Poster Ad
description: A grungy urban fashion poster showcasing a seated model and branded chunky sneakers, ideal for streetwear marketing, social ads, and promotional brand visuals.

content: A dramatic anime concert illustration seen from behind the performers onstage, showing 4 teenage girls standing shoulder to shoulder at the front of a huge indoor arena, arms around each other in a triumphant post-performance moment. The camera is positioned slightly behind and below them, facing out toward the audience and the giant venue screen. The atmosphere is dazzling and emotional, filled with dense blue-and-gold confetti, sparkling particles, and strong white stage spotlights pouring down from above. The crowd fills the entire arena as a sea of tiny glowing blue lights. At center top, a giant rectangular screen displays elegant serif concert text: {argument name="band name" default="ELEMAYU"}, "1st LIVE at 日本武道館", {argument name="concert date" default="2024.6.15"}, and "SOLD OUT". On both upper side walls of the arena, the large venue name "日本武道館" is visible. The 4 girls all wear matching dark stage outfits: black or very dark navy hooded jackets with subtle decorative back prints, short pleated skirts, and live-performance styling. Count and depict all 4 members distinctly from left to right: 1) a girl with short wavy silver-lavender hair holding a bass guitar slung over her shoulder, 2) a girl with long straight black hair holding a red electric guitar, 3) a girl with fluffy shoulder-length blonde hair holding a dark guitar, 4) a girl with brown hair in a high ponytail, no visible instrument, raising one arm high and holding a drumstick or baton in celebration while the other arm wraps around the blonde member. Show their backs and silhouettes rim-lit by stage light, with soft highlights on their hair. Include stage equipment: a microphone stand and part of a bass neck at the far left, and a visible drum kit with cymbals at the right edge. The stage floor is glossy and reflective, covered with scattered confetti and several blue flower bouquets near the bottom foreground. Use rich midnight blues, violet shadows, warm golden sparkles, and cinematic bloom. The mood should feel like a sold-out dream performance finale, sentimental, victorious, and breathtakingly luminous, in highly detailed painterly anime style.
title: Anime Band Finale at Budokan
description: This prompt generates a cinematic anime-style illustration of a four-girl band embracing onstage before a sold-out arena crowd, ideal for concert key art or emotional music visuals.

content: A clean editorial fashion advertisement poster on a pale powder-blue studio background with a glossy reflective floor. The composition is vertical and minimal, dominated by oversized bold white condensed sans-serif typography in the background reading “OSAKA SIX:” on the top line and “006 REMAINS” below, filling most of the upper half behind the subject. In the top right corner, small white branding text reads “Designed by ARTTEESHOW.” Centered in the lower middle is an oversized forest-green crewneck sweatshirt standing upright like a sculptural object, with soft heavy cotton fabric, dropped shoulders, extra-long sleeves pooled on the floor, and a small black neck label that reads ARTTEESHOW. On the chest of the sweatshirt is a large abstract collage print made from torn paper fragments in beige, tan, black, gray, white, and vivid red, arranged vertically like layered scraps. Leaning against the right side of the giant sweatshirt is a slim female fashion model with long straight black hair, wearing a matching {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="forest green"} sweatshirt and relaxed wide-leg sweatpants with clean white low-top sneakers. She is posed in profile with a calm detached editorial attitude, one hand in her pocket, her body reclining diagonally against the giant garment, legs extended forward; her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur for an anonymous art-fashion look. The smaller worn sweatshirt has the same abstract torn-paper collage graphic centered on the chest. At the bottom center, add 2 lines of small white copy text: “Made for comfort, worn for confidence.” and “Because life feels better when someone’s carrying the weight of the world.” The image should feel like a premium conceptual streetwear campaign from the early 1990s reimagined as contemporary luxury advertising, with crisp studio lighting, soft shadows, subtle floor reflections, precise product focus, surreal scale contrast between the oversized sweatshirt and the model, and a polished magazine-poster aesthetic.
title: Editorial Osaka Six Sweatshirt Ad
description: A surreal high-fashion streetwear poster showing a giant green sweatshirt, a matching model, and bold campaign typography, ideal for apparel advertising or concept-brand visuals.

content: A highly detailed vertical Taoist esoteric infographic poster in the style of an ancient Chinese religious scroll, printed on aged beige rice paper with fine ornamental borders, inked calligraphy, faded stains, and classical diagram annotations. At the top center, large black brush-calligraphy title text reads {argument name="headline text" default="道·三魂七魄"}. Directly below the title is a smaller paragraph of classical Chinese explanatory text in neat calligraphy. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered on a glowing vertical spiritual axis made of white-gold energy, mist, and lightning-like qi currents running from the bottom of the page to the heavens. At the very top, above the axis, depict 3 seated Taoist immortals or deities on clouds in a golden celestial realm, arranged left, center, and right, with halos and flowing robes in muted green, cream, and blue. Beneath them, create a towering multi-layered cosmological body diagram made of 9 stacked circular realms or platforms connected by swirling clouds and luminous energy. The upper 5 larger realms represent the five zang organs as miniature mythic landscapes: 1 forested green realm labeled liver/wood, 1 fiery red-gold temple city realm labeled heart/fire, 1 yellow earth realm with terraces labeled spleen/earth, 1 silver-blue mountain-and-water realm labeled lung/metal, and 1 dark blue watery abyss realm labeled kidney/water. Place a glowing meditating figure in a bright orb at the center junction between the upper organ realms and lower spirit layers. Below these, add 7 progressively darker circular underworld-like realms for the seven po souls, each densely populated with tiny scenes of human figures, spirits, beasts, ritual activity, suffering, temptation, conflict, and karmic symbolism, all wrapped by drifting smoke and energy ribbons. At the very bottom, show a seated human figure in meditation within a root-like cavern or corporeal foundation, surrounded by chains, rocks, and embodied worldly attachments. Around the central column, include exactly 9 labeled side panels and diagrams in traditional Chinese layout: top left a bagua and yin-yang cosmology circle; top right a dotted numerological or constellation-like chart; left upper a boxed list for 3 souls; right upper a boxed list for 7 po souls; left middle a five-elements relationship diagram with 5 colored nodes; right middle a circular essence-qi-spirit cycle diagram with 3 nodes; left lower a vertical boxed list of 7 categories or stages; right lower a boxed correspondence table; bottom left a five-direction and five-element human-body relation chart; bottom right a standing and seated meridian or cultivation body diagram. Use many small Chinese labels throughout every section, with classical seal stamps in red. The overall palette is antique parchment, sepia ink, muted jade, cinnabar red, smoky gray, gold, teal, and indigo. The style should feel like a museum-quality Daoist metaphysical chart, ultra intricate, hand-painted gongbi plus ink wash illustration, sacred, mystical, scholarly, dense with symbolism, extremely fine linework, soft cloud layering, and high-resolution poster design.
title: Taoist Three Souls Seven Po Poster
description: A dense ancient-style Daoist cosmology poster showing the three souls, seven po, five organs, and spiritual body diagrams, ideal for mythic infographic or esoteric philosophy artwork.

content: Create a vintage editorial poster on aged rice paper celebrating {argument name="artist name" default="CHEN UEN"}, designed like a museum infographic mixed with Chinese ink wash illustration and calligraphy. The format is a single vertically oriented poster with a weathered parchment background, ink splatters, faded handwritten annotations, red seal stamps, and a scholarly, archival atmosphere. At the very top, place large black Chinese calligraphy for the name 鄭問, followed by a slash and the romanized name {argument name="romanized name" default="CHEN UEN"} in large serif capitals, with a small red seal beside it. Under the title, add the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="The Taiwanese Master Who Turned Comics into Ink-Born Epic"} in elegant reddish-brown serif text. In the center, feature a dramatic painterly scene of 1 seated male artist in a loose white shirt at a desk, holding a brush over paper, his face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. Behind him, surround him with a swirling halo-like storm of monochrome ink-brush warriors and historical figures: exact count 9 visible character figures, including armored generals, swordsmen, and mounted riders, emerging from explosive black brushwork and smoke-like ink textures. On the left side, create a vertical section titled “Life & Milestones” with a black brushstroke header and smaller Chinese subtitle text. List exactly 6 timeline entries with red year markers and bilingual captions: 1958 born in Taiwan, 1983 Warrior Panther, 1989 Abi Sword, 1990 Heroes of the Eastern Zhou, 1991 Japan Cartoonists Association Award, 2017 legacy continues. Below that, add a small section titled “Ink in Detail” containing exactly 4 boxed brush studies labeled with short English captions: Dry brush texture, Ink wash gradient, Splatter energy, Bold contour line. On the right side, create a vertical section titled “Visual Method” with a black brushstroke header and smaller Chinese subtitle text. Include exactly 5 stacked boxed studies with image-and-caption layout: Brush as blade, Ink as atmosphere, Anatomy as fate, History as theatre, Speed lines become calligraphy. In the lower center, create a section titled “Major Works Constellation” with a dark brushstroke heading. Arrange exactly 5 circular work nodes around a central ink ring with Chinese calligraphy inside. Label the 5 nodes: Abi Sword, Heroes of the Eastern Zhou, Assassin Biographies, Magical Super Asia, Game character design legacy. Each circle contains a distinct monochrome or muted-color ink illustration, with subtle connecting marks like a constellation diagram. At the lower right, add a section titled “Studio Notes” containing exactly 6 visible objects: 4 hanging calligraphy brushes, 1 ink bowl, and 1 painter’s palette with blue and red pigment; beneath them place a sketchbook page with light pencil figure studies. Across the bottom, add a wide section titled “Why He Matters” with a black brushstroke header and smaller Chinese subtitle text, followed by a paragraph of serif body text in English describing his importance to comics, painting, calligraphy, cinema, and epic storytelling. Use a restrained palette of sepia, black ink, off-white paper, muted gray, with small accents of deep red and occasional blue. The whole image should feel like a refined cultural tribute poster, dense but balanced, highly detailed, painterly, and authentic to Chinese ink aesthetics.
title: Ink-Wash Tribute Poster for Chen Uen
description: This prompt generates a richly detailed biographical museum-style poster about Chen Uen, suitable for cultural tributes, editorial art, or historical artist showcases.
