content:
A polished vertical infographic poster in elegant East Asian editorial style, themed around the fire signs of the zodiac using one consistent female character reimagined in three different costumes. Cream parchment background with thin ornamental borders, small corner flourishes, tiny sparkles, and warm red-orange-gold accents throughout. Large Chinese headline at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="十二星座角色清單｜火象星座"}, with a smaller subheading beneath reading {argument name="subheading text" default="熱情・行動・勇氣"}, and a decorative flame icon at the top right. The layout contains exactly 3 stacked profile panels with rounded rectangular borders and generous margins: Aries on top, Leo in the middle, Sagittarius on the bottom. Each panel is split visually with the character on the left and a text/spec area on the right, plus a zodiac symbol badge on the far left and a small constellation diagram on the far right.

Use the same young East Asian woman in all 3 panels, slim build, long dark hair in a high ponytail, shown from about thigh-up to waist-up, facing slightly toward camera, styled as a fashion-model zodiac character sheet. Keep facial features neutral and refined, clean beauty lighting, soft airbrushed illustration-photo composite look.

Panel 1: Aries. Chinese title and English subtitle: "牡羊座 Aries". Dominant color scheme: vivid red with warm coral highlights. Zodiac symbol badge shows Aries glyph. Constellation on the right. Behind the character, faint circular mystical line art and flame motifs. Outfit: sporty warrior idol styling with a white crop top, red open short-sleeve jacket with gold trim, red belt, and red wrist wraps or fingerless arm accessories. Pose: confident, energetic, one fist raised near the shoulder and the other hand on her hip. Include exactly 6 info lines with small circular icons before each line, all in Chinese: 1) "元素：火" 2) "概念：點火者，直覺先行" 3) "性格：熱情、直接、好勝" 4) "行動原則：先衝再修正" 5) "戀愛傾向：心動就追，喜歡熱烈互動" 6) "人際怪癖：嫌節奏太慢時會自己接手".

Panel 2: Leo. Chinese title and English subtitle: "獅子座 Leo". Dominant color scheme: gold, champagne, and soft amber. Zodiac symbol badge shows Leo glyph. Constellation on the right. Background includes radiant sunburst styling and a faint majestic lion illustration silhouette behind the character. Outfit: glamorous regal gown in pale gold with ornate embroidery, jeweled bodice details, flowing translucent cape sleeves, elegant necklace, and a small crown or tiara. Pose: poised and queenly, one hand lightly touching the chest or collarbone, shoulders open, projecting confidence and star power. Include exactly 6 info lines with small circular icons before each line, all in Chinese: 1) "元素：火" 2) "概念：舞台中心，自帶光芒" 3) "性格：大方、自信、要面子" 4) "行動原則：先定氣場，再帶隊前進" 5) "戀愛傾向：喜歡被偏愛，也樂於寵人" 6) "人際怪癖：明明在意，卻要裝沒事".

Panel 3: Sagittarius. Chinese title and English subtitle: "射手座 Sagittarius". Dominant color scheme: rust red, burnt orange, brown leather, and warm ivory. Zodiac symbol badge shows Sagittarius glyph. Constellation on the right. Background features faint compass-circle graphics and flame accents. Outfit: adventurous archer styling with an ivory blouse, red scarf, brown leather harness straps, utility belt, and arm bracers. Pose: dynamic action shot drawing a bow, arrow aimed to the right, with a small glowing spark at the bow grip or arrow rest. Include exactly 6 info lines with small circular icons before each line, all in Chinese: 1) "元素：火" 2) "概念：自由旅人，邊走邊發現" 3) "性格：樂觀、坦率、好奇" 4) "行動原則：先出發，路上再找答案" 5) "戀愛傾向：喜歡輕鬆真誠，不愛被綁住" 6) "人際怪癖：聊到一半常被新鮮事帶走".

Overall design should feel premium, feminine, mystical, and collectible, like a social-media-ready zodiac character list poster. Use elegant serif-style Chinese typography for the main sign names and italic calligraphic English for Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius. Keep all text crisp, aligned, and readable. Add one small decorative fire emblem centered near the bottom border. Aspect ratio 3:4 portrait.
title: Fire Sign Zodiac Character Poster

content: Create a vintage illustrated travel poster in traditional Chinese for {argument name="destination name" default="阿里山國家風景區"}, designed as a one-day itinerary infographic with a split vertical layout. The left panel is a parchment-textured itinerary card in warm beige with ornate gold Art Nouveau borders and dark brown typography, and the right panel is a dramatic painted fantasy-realism map scene of a mountain journey at sunrise and sunset tones. At the top of the left panel, large headline text reads {argument name="headline text" default="阿里山國家風景區一日遊"}. Beneath it, include a short centered tagline in traditional Chinese: 「一座高山，五個經典景點。難忘的奇幻旅程。」 with a small decorative mountain divider. The left panel must contain exactly 5 numbered itinerary stops stacked vertically, each with a circular black-and-gold number badge, a small vignette illustration, a bold location name, a time in parentheses, and a short Chinese description. The 5 stops are: 1. 「阿里山車站」 at 「(8:00 AM)」 with a wooden mountain railway station illustration and description 「開啟探索神木與森林的旅程。」 2. 「阿里山森林鐵路」 at 「(9:30 AM)」 with a red-and-black steam train illustration and description 「穿越森林，體驗百年林鐵風情。」 3. 「神木區棧道」 at 「(11:30 AM)」 with giant cedar trees and elevated wooden boardwalk illustration and description 「漫步千年巨木下，感受森林靈氣。」 4. 「姊妹潭」 at 「(1:30 PM)」 with a tranquil forest lake and pavilion illustration and description 「欣賞靜謐湖光，聆聽自然樂章。」 5. 「小笠原山展望台」 at 「(4:00 PM)」 with a wooden observation deck above clouds at sunset illustration and description 「觀賞壯闊山景與雲海，欣賞日落。」 The right panel should depict a continuous glowing golden path winding through exactly 5 numbered map markers that match the left panel labels in order, with black-and-gold marker plaques reading: 1 「阿里山車站」, 2 「阿里山森林鐵路」, 3 「神木區棧道」, 4 「姊妹潭」, 5 「小笠原山展望台」. Show stop 1 as a rustic alpine wooden station perched on a cliff among pine forests; stop 2 as a small steam locomotive traveling on a curved mountain railway with smoke drifting upward; stop 3 as towering ancient red cypress trees with a spiral and zigzag wooden walkway around the trunks; stop 4 as an emerald lake surrounded by dense forest with a small pavilion and arched bridge; stop 5 as a lookout deck on a peak above a sea of clouds, facing a glowing sunset. The environment should feature layered mountain ranges, mist-filled valleys, evergreen forests, golden-hour light, luminous cloud seas, and a romantic painterly atmosphere with rich detail. At the bottom right, add a decorative compass rose labeled N, E, S, W, plus a dark green and gold information box with exactly 2 stats in traditional Chinese: 「總距離 ~9公里 / 5.6英里」 and 「預計時間 全天 - 14,500步」. Overall style: premium tourism poster, painterly digital illustration, nostalgic national-park brochure aesthetic, highly detailed, warm sepia and gold accents, elegant composition, readable Chinese text, vertical 2:3 poster.
title: Alishan One-Day Travel Poster
description: A richly illustrated vintage-style tourism poster showing a five-stop one-day itinerary through Alishan National Scenic Area, ideal for travel marketing and destination infographics.

content: Create a high-contrast urban {argument name="style" default="streetwear poster"} featuring a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} sitting casually on the ground against a dark textured background. The subject wears a charcoal oversized hoodie, black cargo pants, and monochrome sneakers, with messy hair and minimal accessories. Add soft cinematic lighting with subtle shadows to highlight facial structure and outfit details. Typography should be bold, modern, and oversized, integrated into the background layout. Use a mix of white and electric blue accents. Main text (large, broken layout): “{argument name="main text" default="UNWIND"}” Secondary text: “Silence the noise, find your pace.” Small caption text: “Less rush, more presence.” Add abstract geometric elements like thin lines, circles, and glitch textures. Include subtle grain and noise for a raw editorial feel. Composition should feel like a fashion magazine cover mixed with a streetwear campaign. Color palette: Black, white, deep grey, electric blue highlights. Style: Minimalist, cinematic, edgy, modern editorial, slightly futuristic.

content: A polished anime idol-style portrait of {argument name="character name" default="Kazama Iroha"}, shown from a dramatic low angle in a vertical composition, cropped from upper thighs to top of head, with the face completely hidden by a large centered rectangular censor block in soft beige. She has short, fluffy {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in a tousled bob with loose outward flips, long side strands, and a large teal-and-gold ribbon bow on top with small decorative ear-like accents. Her pose is confident and slightly playful, with one hand raised near her ear and the other arm out of frame, chest angled slightly left, body leaning subtly back. She wears a stylish stage costume in {argument name="accent colors" default="teal, white, black, and gold"}: a black zip-front cropped top, an open sleeveless short vest with glossy pale fabric and floral patterns, oversized detached white sleeves with dark cuffs and gold trim, star embellishments on the sleeves and chest bow, a large striped bow at the collar, and a low-rise skirt or shorts waistband with a star-shaped belt ornament and a small red cord knot decoration. Emphasize her exposed midriff, slim athletic build, glossy fabric rendering, delicate gold edging, and layered idol costume details. Use soft warm lighting, subtle pastel gradients, faint geometric sparkles in the background, and a clean airy backdrop fading from pale cyan to cream. The illustration should be highly detailed, smooth, luminous, and modern, with crisp anime linework, gentle blush tones, and premium gacha-card or VTuber key visual quality.
title: Censored Anime Idol Portrait
description: This prompt generates a high-quality vertical anime idol illustration with a dramatic low angle, ornate teal-and-gold costume, and a face-obscuring censor block for stylized social media or character art.

content:
A polished anime idol concert key visual on a glowing stage staircase, featuring exactly 5 anthropomorphic performers posed in a dynamic diagonal formation under dramatic purple-blue concert lighting and sparkling spotlights. The scene is viewed from a slightly low, wide-angle perspective to emphasize depth and stage presence, with neon-lit steps leading upward and metal truss structures framing the background. At center back is a large illuminated crest with a pawprint inside a geometric star emblem, flanked by laurel motifs, suggesting an idol group logo. The floor and stair edges glow with violet and blue rim light, and tiny glitter particles plus a few gold confetti pieces float through the air. The mood is energetic, triumphant, and glamorous, like a promotional poster for a live performance.

The 5 performers are all kemonomimi or furry idol characters in coordinated fantasy-stage costumes with belts, chains, layered fabrics, fingerless gloves, and tailored accessories, each color-themed individually while sharing a unified group design language. From left to right: a gray wolf boy in a deep blue outfit, closest to camera, smiling confidently and reaching one paw forward toward the viewer; an orange fox boy in black, white, and orange, stepping forward with a playful grin and one hand extended; a gray-and-white wolf boy in black, white, and green, standing slightly behind center and pointing upward/outward; a white rabbit girl in black, white, and pink, with tall bunny ears, fluffy tail, short skirt layers, and one arm raised high in an idol pose; and a brown bear boy in navy and gold, turned mostly away in a cool over-the-shoulder stance with one arm extended sideways. All characters should have expressive anime faces, fluffy fur rendering, detailed tails and paws, and high-end polished illustration quality.

Give each outfit a distinct accent color: blue for the left wolf, orange for the fox, green for the center wolf, pink for the rabbit, and gold for the bear. Costumes should mix idol fashion with fantasy military stagewear: fitted jackets or vests, asymmetrical panels, short trousers or layered skirts, harness straps, metallic trims, hanging chains, decorative cords, and patterned fabric inserts. The characters should look like a cohesive idol unit named {argument name="group name" default="Pawlight"}. Use {argument name="stage lighting color" default="purple and blue"} as the dominant lighting palette, with bright white spotlights from above and subtle lens glow. Place {argument name="emblem design" default="a pawprint inside a star crest with laurel branches"} on the back screen. The overall style should be {argument name="art style" default="high-detail anime idol promotional illustration"}, and the atmosphere should feel like {argument name="performance mood" default="a climactic live show finale"}.
title: Anthro Idol Group Concert Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-detail anime-style concert poster of a five-member anthropomorphic idol group on a glowing stage, ideal for music visuals, key art, or VTuber-style unit branding.

content: Create a 4:5 vertical social poster in ultra high resolution, 8K print quality sharpness. Use the {argument name="car model" default="BMW car"} from the reference image as the main subject and use the background structure/composition from the reference image, but transform it into a BMW themed design. Replace all black tones with a flat {argument name="background color" default="high-saturation BMW blue"} background. Keep the same layout, spacing, visual balance, and poster composition from the reference image. Background should use a smooth gradient from slightly lighter electric blue at the top to deep navy blue at the bottom. Add subtle grain texture (2 to 3%) and faint rectangular overlays (2 to 4% opacity). Keep it clean, graphic, premium, and non-realistic. Add a soft contact shadow under the car. Use the same BMW from the reference image, changing only the {argument name="paint finish" default="matte frozen blue"} or deep metallic navy. Keep the original body shape, wheels, stance, and design details from the reference image. Show the car in a rear 3/4 perspective matching the reference image angle exactly. Use a slightly elevated camera angle. Position the car slightly right of center. Include visible carbon roof, aggressive rear diffuser, sharp controlled reflections, and subtle brake details. Keep composition identical to the reference image: Top: branding Middle: giant type Center: car overlapping text Bottom: editorial block and specs Typography: Primary text: “BMW” Ultra condensed bold sans serif, tall vertical scaling like the reference poster. Color deep navy or near black. Static text with no distortion. Acts as structural backdrop. Secondary header: “BMW M4 G82” Thin font with wide tracking. Logo area: BMW roundel centered above. Editorial block: Headline: “BMW — Where Driving Becomes Instinct” Body copy focused on: driver connection control performance precision Use the same boxed editorial layout as the reference image. Background faded text: “M4” large scale with 3 to 5% opacity behind the box. Bottom left: “ M4 G82” Bottom right specs: 405 kW / 550 PS 3.4 s 307 km/h Lighting should be clean studio lighting with sharp but controlled highlights. Color grading should use deep blues, high contrast, clean blacks. Camera lens: 50mm, slightly elevated rear 3/4 angle. Mood: Performance. Precision. Driver focus. Add Bottom-right watermark: harboriis , with small x and Instagram logo
title: BMW Performance Social Poster
description: A detailed instruction for a graphic BMW social poster, maintaining car and composition details from a reference image with a specific blue theme.

content: Create a premium cinematic food advertisement poster for {argument name="brand name" default="PRASUMA"} frozen momos in a dark moody studio setting. The composition is a square social-media-ready commercial poster with luxurious high-contrast lighting, shallow depth of field, and rich food-photography styling. In the foreground, place a rustic off-white speckled ceramic plate holding exactly 4 steamed momos, arranged naturally; 3 are whole and 1 is cut open to reveal a detailed juicy minced filling. The dumplings should look glossy, freshly steamed, delicately pleated, and lightly garnished with chopped green herbs and seasoning. Add visible wisps of steam rising from the plate and from a single momo being lifted in the upper right by a pair of dark wooden chopsticks. Near the lower right, include exactly 1 small black dipping bowl filled with soy-chili sauce. Near the lower left, place exactly 1 small bunch of fresh cilantro. In the right background, show exactly 1 standing retail product pack for chicken momos, black with a magenta top label and a serving image on the pack. Use a textured charcoal stone tabletop and a near-black background for a refined gourmet mood. Overlay elegant editorial typography in a luxury serif and clean sans-serif mix: large central headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="CRAFTED TO PERFECTION"}, top-left brand lockup reading {argument name="brand name" default="PRASUMA"} with "SINCE 1985", smaller left text reading "REAL INGREDIENTS. REAL FLAVOUR.", faint repeated background words across the upper middle reading "STEAM / FOLD / SERVE / SAVOUR" in multiple rows, vertical side text along the left border reading "PREMIUM • CLEAN • AUTHENTIC", and a bottom footer line reading {argument name="footer text" default="AUTHENTIC MOMOS • READY IN MINUTES • 2026 EDITION"} plus the website {argument name="website" default="prasuma.com"}. The overall look should feel like a high-end street food campaign: appetizing, polished, dramatic, modern, and premium, with realistic food textures, crisp branding, subtle smoke, and ad-agency-level product photography.
title: Cinematic Premium Momo Ad Poster
description: A dark, luxurious food advertising poster showcasing steamed chicken momos with dramatic typography and packaging, ideal for premium street-food or frozen snack brand campaigns.

content: A cinematic street-food advertisement poster for {argument name="brand name" default="WOW! momo"}, shot at night on a rain-slick urban street with warm neon bokeh and a dramatic food-photography look. The composition is square and poster-like, with a black textured background overlaid by faint repeating words such as STEAM, SIZZLE, REPEAT, and SPICE. At the top left, place a bold white-and-red {argument name="logo text" default="WOW! momo"} logo. Dominating the center, huge distressed block letters read {argument name="headline text" default="BITE THE FIRE"} in tall off-white typography. Below and to the left of the headline, smaller stacked text reads {argument name="tagline text" default="STREET HEAT. FULL POWER."}. Show 4 momos in total: 3 whole pan-fried momos flying above a black skillet and 1 cut-open momo at the center top, revealing a richly textured filling. The cut-open momo erupts with glossy red chili sauce splashing outward in midair, with droplets frozen around it. The 3 whole momos are golden-brown, pleated, blistered, and slightly charred, coated with oil and spice, arranged dynamically above the pan as if tossed upward by heat and motion. The skillet sits in the lower center foreground, filled with sizzling chili oil, sauce, and scattered seasoning, with a metal spatula entering from the right side. Add sparks, steam, oil droplets, and a burst of sauce at pan level for high-energy action. Flames rise beneath the pan at the very bottom edge. In the lower left foreground, show an open takeout box branded with the same logo, containing 4 pale steamed momos, beside a small black dipping bowl of red sauce. In the right background, include a vertical glowing red neon sign reading MOMO. Along the left border, add a slim vertical red text strip reading STREET HEAT • SPICY • FRESH. Along the bottom border, include small footer text: STEAMED & PAN-FRIED MOMOS • SIGNATURE SPICE • {argument name="edition text" default="2026 EDITION"} and the website wowmomo.com. Style: hyper-realistic commercial food photography mixed with action poster design, dramatic contrast, fiery orange-red highlights, deep blacks, wet reflections, crisp textures, shallow depth of field, suspended motion, appetizing glaze, premium fast-food campaign aesthetic.
title: Cinematic Fiery Momo Street Food Ad
description: A dramatic night-time food advertisement poster featuring 4 momos, bold typography, neon street atmosphere, and fiery sauce action, ideal for restaurant campaigns and social media promos.

content: Create a futuristic professional magazine cover for the animation industry, portrait orientation, high-end editorial design, cinematic and polished. The masthead dominates the upper left in huge bold white sans-serif letters split across two lines: {argument name="magazine title" default="FRAME RATE"}. Above it, a small yellow all-caps tagline reads: THE INDUSTRY TRADE MAGAZINE FOR ANIMATION PROFESSIONALS. Below the masthead, a smaller white subtitle reads: THE BUSINESS, TECHNOLOGY & ART OF ANIMATION. In the upper right, place issue text in stacked bold type: VOL. 23 in yellow and SUMMER 2026 in white. The cover image shows a stylized humanoid female-coded robot or digital mannequin in a dynamic running pose, facing right, shown full body, with one leg lifted behind and one arm extended. Her body is semi-transparent dark mesh with glowing orange internal joints, spine, and limb mechanisms, accented by blue and purple neon tracing lines and circular motion rings around wrists, ankles, hips, and feet. She has messy tied-up blue hair and a smooth simplified face with minimal features, like a CG character prototype. Set her in a dark animation studio interior with blurred monitors, desks, and concept art pinned in the background, lit with low moody ambient light so the neon figure becomes the focal point. Add reflective flooring beneath her with concentric holographic rings under both feet in green, yellow, and orange. On the left side, arrange editorial cover lines in a clean magazine layout. A small yellow label says COVER STORY. Below it, a large bold white stacked headline reads: {argument name="cover headline" default="PIPELINES THAT LEARN. STORIES THAT MOVE."}. Beneath that, a yellow subhead reads: HOW AI IS TRANSFORMING EVERY STAGE OF ANIMATION PRODUCTION. In the lower left, include 3 secondary article listings, each with a short yellow rule above it: 1) INBETWEENING 2.0, with small white teaser text: Inside the new generation of AI Inbetweening models changing the industry standard., and page number p. 24 in yellow. 2) CONSISTENCY AT SCALE, with small white teaser text: Maintaining character performance with AI-assisted interpolation., and page number p. 38 in yellow. 3) ARTIST ORCHARD, NOT REPLACEMENT, with small white teaser text: How top studios integrate AI tools while keeping artists in the loop., and page number p. 52 in yellow. Near the lower right, add a black circular badge outlined in yellow containing yellow and white text: WORKFLOW SPOTLIGHT on top, DreamFrame Studios on building a proprietary AI animation stack beneath, and p. 60 at the bottom in yellow. In the bottom right corner, place a white barcode box with pricing above it reading: US $12.99   EUR €14.99, plus small issue code numbers. Use a color palette of black, charcoal, white, vivid yellow, electric orange, blue, and violet. The overall feeling should be premium, forward-looking, tech-savvy, and credible, like a real trade magazine cover about AI-driven animation pipelines.
title: Futuristic Animation Trade Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a polished editorial magazine cover featuring a glowing humanoid animation robot and realistic cover lines for a professional AI-and-animation publication.

content: Using the provided reference image, regenerate the same Nike surreal fashion ad almost exactly as written, but present it as a polished finished poster: keep the cool light-blue minimalist studio, the single oversized white Nike sneaker standing on its heel at a steep diagonal, the single female model in an all-white outfit leaning back against the shoe in right-facing three-quarter profile, the large background word "NIKE," and the glossy semi-reflective floor. Make the composition tighter and more cinematic, with the giant shoe dominating the left half and the model standing full-body on the right half, her hands in her pockets. Render the background "NIKE" text as 1 huge bold white word spanning behind the subjects, partially obscured by both the sneaker and the model. Add the bottom-center tagline as 2 lines of elegant white sans-serif text: "Made for comfort, worn for confidence." and "Because life feels better when you move without limits." Keep the top-right corner empty and do not add any extra text, logos, watermarks, credits, signatures, or captions. content:
A realistic, slightly humorous tabloid newspaper front page photographed from above on a wooden table, designed to look like a printed broadsheet with subtle paper texture, fold marks, and mild lens distortion. The masthead at top left reads “The Daily Metro”, the date line near the top center reads “Friday, April 22, 2005”, and the top-right section marker reads “CITY NEWS | 05”. A red banner near the upper left says “EXCLUSIVE STORY”. The dominant oversized black headline spans multiple lines: “Zoo Panther Caught Living Double Life – As a Charming Bar Hopping Casanova!” Below it, a large subheadline reads: ““Marquise” the Panther Escapes Zoo at Night, Spends Eveningsvlenlars, Becomes Heartthrob Among Lonely Women”. The page layout should mimic a sensational tabloid with 1 huge headline area, 1 large main photo on the upper right, 1 small inset photo under the main text on the left, 3 narrow text columns with dense newspaper copy in the center-left, 1 pull-quote box in the middle, 1 lower-left secondary story block with a panther portrait, 3 small bottom photo thumbnails in a row, and 1 right-side sidebar box titled “What’s Next For Mamquiss?”. Keep most body text tiny and partly nonsensical or pseudo-legible like AI-generated newspaper filler, but preserve the major visible headlines exactly.

The main photo on the upper right shows the back view of a glamorous blonde woman in a silky champagne-colored dress standing at a bar beside a large black panther upright on a stool or standing with forepaws elevated near the counter. The bar background contains many liquor bottles and glassware on shelves, warmly lit. The woman’s face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur/block. The panther is sleek, glossy, and realistically rendered. The inset photo under the headline at left shows the black panther near a zoo exit or pathway sign at night. The lower-left portrait shows a close-up of the panther’s face. The 3 bottom thumbnails show nightlife scenes: the panther moving through a bar interior, the panther seated near two women at a small round table, and the panther lounging in dim warm light.

Use an early-2000s tabloid aesthetic, high-contrast black headline typography, off-white newsprint, red accent rules, narrow columns, and slightly messy authentic newspaper composition. The overall tone is deadpan absurdist journalism, realistic enough to glance as a real newspaper, with the page filling most of the frame and photographed in natural indoor light.
title: Absurd Tabloid Panther Newspaper Front Page
description: This prompt generates a realistic comedic tabloid-style newspaper front page about a black panther leading a secret nightlife life, useful for satirical editorial art and viral fake-headline images.

In the lower right interior, include 1 icy blue-eyed undead king emerging from darkness. Across the lower half, transition from cold mist and coastal water on the left into burning ruins and orange fire on the right, with 1 medium dragon flying near the center-lower area above the battlefield. Scatter tiny marching soldiers and riders along ridgelines and paths to imply war across the landscape. Use a muted palette of ash white, charcoal black, slate blue, steel gray, sepia, and ember orange, with cinematic high contrast, volumetric fog, painterly photo-collage realism, and intricate textured detail. Add a small English logo area on the left reading {argument name="series logo" default="GAME OF THRONES"}. Place a large Chinese title near the lower left reading {argument name="main title" default="冰与火之歌"}, with the English subtitle "A SONG OF ICE AND FIRE" beneath it. content:
Create a dramatic anime-style social media battle poster inspired by X/Twitter, split vertically down the center into two opposing halves with a glowing lightning-like divide and a huge luminous VS at the bottom center. The composition is a tall smartphone-optimized promotional key visual with dense layered UI cards, speech bubbles, tweet screenshots, reaction counters, and explosive energy effects. At the top center, place a large X logo with the title text "BATTLE" and the Japanese subtitle "Xでレスバ中". The left side is a cool purple and black theme, the right side is a hot red and white theme, with sparks, streaks, embers, and motion lines flying across both sides.

Show 2 anime schoolgirl characters facing off. On the left, a calm, composed girl representing logical rebuttal: long dark black-to-purple gradient hair, straight bangs, pale skin, slim build, black sailor-style school uniform with purple neck ribbon, pleated skirt, black knee socks, loafers, holding a smartphone in one hand and touching her glasses or temple with the other. Her face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur mosaic over the central face area. Her stance is reserved and still. Surround her with purple glowing tweet cards and speech bubbles. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "雲居モヤ @kumoi_moya". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "それ、前提が雑だよね。", "感情だけでは通らないよ。", and "論点、そこじゃない。". Also include exactly 5 smaller purple UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a small comment bubble reading "それな 千代先輩、強すぎ…", 2) a small comment bubble reading "論理的で草 完全に正論パンチ", 3) a like card reading "いいね! 12.8K", 4) a repost card reading "リポスト 9,341", and 5) a dark trend card reading "おすすめトレンド #モヤVSエナ 42,857件のポスト". Add a central dark smartphone tweet panel tilted slightly, showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "それ、前提が雑だよね。", and counters "312", "1,204", and "8,745".

On the right, show an aggressive, fiery girl representing emotional counterattack and confidence: vivid red hair in a high messy side bun with long loose hair, bright teal eyes, fair skin, energetic expression, open shouting mouth, pointing directly toward the opponent with one hand while the other hand rests on her hip. She wears a white blouse, black jumper-style dress or vest dress, oversized red bow tie, white loose socks scrunched around the ankles, and black loafers. Surround her with red glowing tweet cards and notification-style UI. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "緋空エナ @hisora_ena". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", and "逃げてないで答えて!". Also include exactly 6 smaller red UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a top notification badge card reading "通知 99+", 2) a small comment bubble reading "エナちゃん つよすぎるww", 3) a small comment bubble reading "言いたいこと全部言ってくれる!", 4) a like card reading "いいね! 18.7K", 5) a like card reading "いいね! 23.6K", and 6) a repost card reading "リポスト 11.2K". Add a red tweet panel near the center showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", and counters "278", "1,652", and "10.9K".

In the lower middle area, place exactly 3 central dark interface cards bridging both sides: 1) a quote-post card labeled "引用ポスト" showing both users and the exchange "論点、そこじゃない。" and "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", 2) a reply count card reading "返信 1,876件", and 3) a bottom navigation bar styled like the X mobile app with home, search, notifications, messages icons and a blue button labeled "ポスト". The overall aesthetic should be glossy, high-contrast, highly rendered anime illustration with neon edge lighting, intense backlighting, dynamic perspective, layered translucency, and a chaotic viral-internet argument atmosphere. Use crisp Japanese UI typography, dramatic red-vs-purple color contrast, and polished promotional-poster quality.

description: A dramatic anime poster of two schoolgirls arguing on X/Twitter, designed for viral social media battle visuals and stylized platform-themed key art.

RELENTLESS."}" and "{argument name="slogan two" default="WEAR WHAT YOU'VE BEEN THROUGH"}" — some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. Every crease tells a story." The overall lighting is dramatic and directional — a single cold key light from the left causing copper rivets to shimmer and deep indigo denim to glow with subtle sheen against the darkness. content: A chaotic fictional Japanese movie poster themed around world history, designed like a glossy blockbuster comedy-action epic about the Fourth Crusade getting completely lost and attacking Constantinople instead of reaching Jerusalem. The composition is dense, loud, and satirical, with a dramatic historical battlefield collage under a bright blue sky, flames, smoke, medieval ships, domes, city walls, and crusader armies. In the center foreground, a full-body medieval crusader in a dirty white tunic with a large red cross points directly toward the viewer, surrounded by four other medieval figures in ornate robes, hoods, helmets, and merchant-like clothing; their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blurs, making the poster look like a parody cast reveal. Across the top, huge hot-pink Japanese brush lettering reads {argument name="headline text" default="方向性、完全に迷子。"}, with smaller black Japanese tagline text above and below it. A torn vertical caption on the left side in bold yellow Japanese text explains that they meant to head for Jerusalem but somehow crush the Byzantine Empire. Two large parchment banners cross the upper middle area: one says that the original destination was Jerusalem, and the larger center banner declares in bold red Japanese text that the destination is Jerusalem, followed by smaller black text saying that was supposed to be the plan. On the upper right, a pinned parchment itinerary board contains a 5-step comedic route list with icons and arrows: departure, no money, bowing to Venice, lightly attacking Zara, then Constantinople, ending with a red line implying they somehow arrived there. Around the characters are exactly 8 speech balloons and callout labels: one saying “Eh, huh?”, one saying “No money…”, one saying “By order, let’s go.”, one saying “Slight detour.”, one saying “I failed, lol.”, one saying “Zara? We passed there!”, one label for a “contract” with a note that it is kind of expensive, and one pointing to Venice as a sponsor-like label. Additional wooden or parchment location signs label exactly 3 places: Zara, Venice, and Constantinople, with Japanese side notes identifying them as Christian or Byzantine cities. The lower half becomes darker and more catastrophic, showing a burning Byzantine-style city with a large domed church resembling Hagia Sophia, naval combat, collapsing architecture, orange firelight, and black smoke. At the bottom center, enormous distressed Japanese title typography in yellow and white announces the film as the Fourth Crusade and says Constantinople burns due to getting lost, with gritty texture, heavy drop shadows, and explosive blockbuster poster styling. On the right side of the title area, a red stamped burst says in Japanese that it begins around 1204. Along the very bottom is a narrow cast strip with exactly 6 small cast thumbnails labeled in Japanese, plus tiny fake credits running across the footer. In the bottom right corner, place a bright pink starburst badge with yellow and white Japanese text reading {argument name="badge text" default="史実です。信じられないけど。"}. Overall style: absurd historical parody, cinematic key art, Japanese theatrical poster, high detail, photobashed realism mixed with exaggerated graphic design, weathered paper textures, bold manga-like captions, comedic educational tone, epic war-movie energy.
title: Chaotic Fourth Crusade Parody Poster
description: A dense Japanese fake movie poster that humorously dramatizes the Fourth Crusade getting lost and attacking Constantinople, ideal for satirical world-history visuals.

content: A refined Chinese cultural tourism poster on textured off-white rice paper with a large amount of negative space, featuring an elegant ink-and-watercolor brushstroke composition that curves upward diagonally from the lower left to the upper right like a sweeping river of paint. At the far left edge, show 1 traditional Chinese calligraphy brush entering the frame, its bristles appearing to paint the scene into existence. Inside the flowing brushstroke, depict a miniature historical landscape of {argument name="city name" default="Xi'an"}: 3 major architectural landmarks arranged along the curved path, including 1 ancient fortified city gate at the lower left with gray stone walls, arched entry, battlements, and a two-tier roofed gate tower; 1 grand traditional pavilion or palace hall in the middle with green-tiled roof, red wooden beams, raised stone platform, and stairways; and 1 tall multi-story brick pagoda at the upper right on a stepped base surrounded by sparse trees. Weave a narrow blue-green river or painted water channel through the scene, with dusty earth tones, scattered rocks, winding roads, tiny shrubs, and touches of muted autumn red foliage. The whole landmark vignette should feel like a handcrafted 3D miniature diorama blended with Chinese ink painting and relief sculpture, with delicate speckled paint dispersion around the edges of the brushstroke. In the lower left beneath the painted scene, place 1 large line of bold black Chinese brush-calligraphy reading "西安". Below it, place 2 smaller lines of neat Chinese text: "春风得意马蹄疾，一日看尽长安花" and "十三朝古都·丝路起点". Add 1 small red seal stamp near the text. content: A hand-painted vintage Chinese tourist food map poster in watercolor and ink wash style, shown from a bird’s-eye view over a misty mountainous county landscape. The composition is a stylized illustrated map of {argument name="place name" default="缙云"}, with pale rice-paper texture, soft beige background, green-gray mountains, winding rivers, country roads, old towns, scenic rocks, bamboo leaves, and pink flowers framing the corners. Large artistic Chinese calligraphy title at the upper left reads {argument name="headline text" default="缙云 山野美食暴走地图"}, with a small subtitle ribbon below reading “黄帝缙云·人间仙都”. Add a poetic text block on the left in Chinese: “山水缙云，仙都奇境 百味乡野，烟火人间 跟着美食，遇见缙云 一城山水，一口乡愁”. In the center is the main county town labeled “缙云县城”, surrounded by illustrated routes connecting scenic destinations and local dishes. Include exactly 12 numbered food stops, each with a realistic painted bowl or plate of food placed on the map near its location, with orange circular numbers and Chinese labels plus a short one-line description. The 12 stops are: 1 “河阳土爽面” with description “山野本味，宾客烟火”; 2 “笕川笋干菜” with description “时令山珍，晒干留香”; 3 “缙云烧饼” with description “炭炉焦香，卷云招牌”; 4 “敲肉羹” with description “鲜香软糯，地道乡味”; 5 “岩下炖汤” with description “石材慢炖，暖身养胃”; 6 “溪鱼鲜” with description “山水河鲜，鲜掉眉毛”; 7 “壶镇扁食/落菜” with description “古法胶味，越吃越香”; 8 “葛根豆腐” with description “山野清润，解腻爽口”; 9 “山粉饺” with description “皮薄馅足，山野风味”; 10 “苦槠豆腐” with description “山林珍味，自然本鲜”; 11 “农家焐年糕” with description “糯香浓郁，儿时味道”; 12 “老街米糕” with description “清甜米香，古法手工”. Mark exactly 8 place labels on the map: “新建镇”, “壶镇镇”, “大洋镇”, “仙都景区”, “河阳古民居”, “岩宕书房”, “蛟龙大峡谷”, and “缙云县城”. Paint recognizable scenic clusters with white-walled black-roofed traditional houses, steep karst peaks, bridges, and terraced terrain. Add a small legend box at the lower right with exactly 5 items labeled “山脉”, “河流”, “主要道路”, “乡镇”, and “景点地标”, plus a sixth food icon label “美食推荐”. Include a decorative compass rose nearby. Overall mood is elegant, artisanal, nostalgic, and premium, like a cultural tourism poster combining local cuisine guide and scenic map illustration, with highly polished composition and refined Chinese branding.

content: A dark, expressionist oil painting of a seated older man in a business suit, posed front-facing on an ornate high-backed throne with gilded finials and carved armrests. He wears a black or very deep burgundy suit, a white dress shirt, and a saturated purple tie, with both hands resting heavily on the throne arms. His hair is light blond to gray-blond, swept back loosely. The face is completely obscured by a centered rectangular blur block in muted brown, creating an unsettling censored effect. The setting is a claustrophobic interior rendered in violent vertical strokes of crimson, scarlet, black, and maroon, as if the walls are bleeding paint downward. The floor is a black-and-white checkerboard pattern, partially broken and smeared by rough brushwork. Use thick impasto, aggressive palette-knife texture, smeared edges, high contrast, and a moody, sinister atmosphere. Composition is symmetrical and centered, full seated figure visible, throne dominating the frame, with a museum-scale portrait feeling and psychological horror undertone.

content: 1. Design a modern tech-style poster for an "AI Agent tool launch," vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, with a clear and eye-catching main title and a subtitle explaining product value. Use a black, white, and gray color palette with fluorescent green accents. Include abstract networks, code windows, and agent nodes. The overall look should resemble a high-end SaaS launch poster, and text must be accurate and readable. 2. Generate a cover image suitable for an X/Twitter long-form post titled "2026 AI Tool Trends," horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, with a clean and sophisticated style. Include the title and 3 keywords: Agent / Workflow / Automation. The background should be a combination of desktop workflows, browsers, terminals, and data panels, with a layout like a tech media header. 3. Generate an advertisement for a Web3 wallet security tool. The center of the image shows a phone displaying the wallet interface, surrounded by on-chain addresses, risk alerts, shield icons, and transaction path visualizations. The style should be professional and trustworthy, with the Chinese title: "Making every on-chain operation safer." 4. Create a Chinese infographic titled "The 5 Layers of AI Agent Capabilities," including: understanding tasks, calling tools, reading data, executing operations, and reviewing/optimizing. Show this in a clear hierarchical structure, each layer with a small icon, white background, and tech-blue accents. 5. Generate a one-page 4-panel comic strip about a creator going from manually searching for info, writing copy, and making images to completing the workflow automatically with an AI Agent. The style should be lighthearted and humorous, with consistent characters and short, clear Chinese dialogue. The last panel should highlight "double the efficiency." 6. Generate a roadmap visual for an AI x Crypto project, including three phases: Q2, Q3, and Q4: MVP, Agent Marketplace, and Onchain Automation. The style should look like a product page in a funding deck—clean, credible, futuristic, and with clearly readable text.
title: Professional Tool Launch Poster
description: A professional SaaS-style poster prompt for announcing tools, emphasizing legible text and modern tech aesthetics.

content: A dramatic futuristic Chinese smartphone launch poster for {argument name="brand name" default="HONOR"} promoting the gaming phone {argument name="product name" default="WIN X"}, in a tall premium advertisement layout with a dark blue and black sci-fi palette, ultra-detailed 3D product rendering, glossy metallic surfaces, intense blue energy glow, cinematic lighting, and a high-end commercial look. The background shows a vast frozen mountain range and icy lake at night under a stormy cosmic sky, with a gigantic luminous X-shaped light formation centered behind the phone, creating a heroic focal point. At the top left is the brand wordmark “HONOR”, and at the top right is the Chinese tagline “荣耀电竞神机”. Across the upper center is a huge bold metallic Chinese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="以我知 探未知"}, rendered in oversized beveled silver typography with slight ice-texture highlights. Beneath it is a smaller line of Chinese text “荣耀 WIN X 新品发布”. In the center foreground, show 2 phones standing on a circular futuristic platform surrounded by mist and reflected blue light: the left phone shows the exterior back design in a three-quarter front-left angle, with a transparent industrial cyber-mechanical shell, angular panel lines, visible screws, a large black polygonal camera module near the top, “GT” marking on the upper right edge, a diagonal red accent slash, vertical “HONOR” branding near the lower left, and a large circular turbine cooling fan in the lower middle glowing bright electric blue with visible blades and a center cap labeled HONOR; the right phone stands slightly behind and to the right, showing the internal structure through an opened transparent back, with another bright blue circular cooling core near the upper center emitting energy beams to the right, and a massive vertical battery module labeled in huge text “15000mAh”. On the left side, include 3 stacked glowing rectangular feature panels with neon blue borders: panel 1 shows a small lake landscape image and Chinese text headed “15000mAh 青海湖电池” with smaller lines “超大容量 超长续航” and “-20℃ 极寒环境依旧耐用”; panel 2 shows a fan image and Chinese text headed “超强制冷风扇” with smaller lines “20000rpm 高速风扇” and “瞬时降温 战力全开”; panel 3 shows a chip image and Chinese text headed “最新骁龙 8Elite Gen6 处理器” with smaller lines “台积电 2nm 制程工艺” and “超强性能 巅峰能效”, plus a red-gold Snapdragon chip illustration labeled “Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6”. At the bottom center, place the product name in very large text “荣耀 WIN X”, with “WIN X” in bright blue gradient and the rest in metallic white, and beneath it the smaller slogan “为战而生 进化不止”. Along the very bottom edge, add a thin row of small Chinese specs text: “15000mAh 青海湖电池 | 超强制冷风扇 | 骁龙 8Elite Gen6 | 165Hz 荣耀绿洲护眼电竞屏”, plus tiny disclaimer text at the lower right. Make the composition symmetrical, aggressive, premium, and epic, like a flagship gaming phone reveal poster from a major tech company.

content:
A vertical work (9:16) in the style of Gustav Klimt's Vienna Secession.

In the center, {argument name="character" default="Mona"} ({argument name="outfit" default="gold magical girl costume"}, brown short bob, banana-shaped tiara) is closing her eyes in a self-contained pose as if embracing.

Elements unique to Klimt:
- Replace all decorative patterns on clothing and background with gold geometric patterns using banana shapes as motifs
- Glowing gold decorations with a texture like real gold leaf
- Only the face and hands are realistic, everything else is a flat decorative pattern
- The background is a mosaic of black and gold swirls and banana shapes
- Dense collection of vortices, spirals, rectangles, and floral geometry
- Painterly texture, the feel of an oil canvas

In the lower right, a plaque-style text reading "{argument name="plaque text" default="MONA BANANA, 2026, Oil and Gold Leaf on Canvas"}."
A dignified piece indistinguishable from a real Klimt work.

content: A stunning anime theatrical movie poster in portrait format. Studio Ghibli meets Makoto Shinkai visual language. A teenage girl in a tattered white shrine maiden robe stands on the wing of a crumbling giant stone deity — an ancient colossus covered in moss and glowing golden kanji script, slowly falling through a sea of clouds. Her long black hair streams upward against gravity. She reaches one hand toward the sky where a vast celestial rift tears open the heavens — beyond it, an inverted ocean floats above the clouds, ancient wooden cities hanging upside down from its surface, lanterns drifting like stars. The sky transitions from deep twilight blue at the bottom to a luminous peach and rose gold at the top. Volumetric god rays pierce through cloud layers. Cherry blossom petals and torn paper talismans spiral everywhere. Her expression is calm determination. Art style: hand-drawn 2D animation, ultra-detailed background painting, expressive linework, rich cel shading. Palette: deep indigo, peach, rose gold, warm amber, soft white. Title in large elegant {argument name="language" default="Japanese kanji"} at the bottom with English subtitle beneath in a clean modern font. Tagline in small white italic text above the title. Mood: mythological, spiritual, bittersweet wonder. Theatrical release quality, Toho Films.
title: Anime Theatrical Movie Poster
description: A lush anime-style movie poster prompt combining the aesthetics of Studio Ghibli and Makoto Shinkai, featuring mystical elements like floating cities and stone colossi.

content: A vertically oriented literary poster in a muted sepia, ash, and parchment palette with dramatic gold kintsugi-style cracks running diagonally across the entire composition. The background is a soft textured paper and watercolor wash with smoky clouds, worn stains, and faint marbling. In the upper left, place a large faded monochrome portrait bust of an older Indian man in traditional formal attire, partially emerging from the mist like a historical figure or poet, softly blended into the background. In the upper right, set a small Hindi title line {argument name="headline text" default="परशुराम की प्रतीक्षा"} with a smaller author credit below it, elegant and understated. Beneath that, place one large centered Hindi quote in refined serif-style Devanagari, framed by oversized quotation marks, using the exact text {argument name="main quote" default="जब नाश मनुज पर छाता है, पहले विवेक मर जाता है।"}. In the lower half, create a heroic mythic Indian warrior standing on jagged black rocks, facing slightly left, with a powerful windswept stance. He has a bare muscular torso, long wild dark hair blown upward, and a tattered deep red drape wrapped across his body and trailing dramatically to the right in torn ribbons. He holds 1 large battle axe in his left hand, the blade angled downward, suggesting Parashurama. Surround him with dust, smoke, tiny debris, and painterly splashes. Add 2 vertical blocks of smaller Hindi poem text, one on the lower left and one on the lower right of the warrior, balanced like a printed poetry poster. Keep the poem text dense and readable but secondary to the central quote and figure. Use painterly digital illustration with fine art poster aesthetics, soft atmospheric lighting, high contrast around the warrior, and subtle glowing gold fissures crossing through the portrait, text area, rocks, and fabric. The overall mood is solemn, prophetic, patriotic, and intense, like a shareable inspirational poem poster about moral collapse and righteous awakening in India.
title: Hindi Poem Poster with Parashurama
description: A dramatic vertical Hindi literary poster combining a historical poet portrait, a central quote, and a mythic Parashurama figure, ideal for shareable social media or print art inspired by nationalist or moral themes.

content: A polished Japanese event poster in a dramatic, aspirational sci-fi tourism style for {argument name="event year" default="2026"}, vertical layout, rich deep-blue space background blending into a bright daytime cityscape. At the top, outer space with a detailed Earth seen from orbit at upper left, a radiant sun flare at the planet’s edge, dense stars and faint nebulae across the sky. Large bold central Japanese headline text in white with subtle gold accents and a strong drop shadow: 「宇宙科学技術 連合講演会 {argument name="event year" default="2026"}」, with a smaller slogan above reading 「宇宙の未来を、ともに拓く。」. Surrounding the title, exactly 4 space elements: 1 lunar lander descending at left, 1 small satellite with blue solar panels near center-left, 1 larger satellite at upper right, and 1 white rocket launching vertically on the right with bright exhaust and billowing smoke. Add elegant golden orbital swoosh lines circling around the title and spacecraft. Below the title, place a gold badge reading 「宇科連」 and several centered lines of smaller Japanese descriptive text about Japan’s largest academic event for space science and technology, involving space science, JAXA space policy, space development startups, and comprehensive discussions on Japan’s space development strategy. The lower half transitions to a realistic panoramic view of Utsunomiya, Japan, with mountains in the distance and Mount Fuji-like snowy peak visible on the horizon, modern mid-rise city buildings, and a wide tram corridor. Feature a sleek modern yellow-and-black light rail tram prominently in the lower right foreground, angled toward the viewer, glossy reflective windows, destination sign reading 「宇都宮駅東口」, with overhead lines absent for a clean futuristic feel. Near the right midground behind the tram, include a large white satellite dish antenna facility. At the lower left, show a plated serving of exactly 6 golden-brown gyoza dumplings on a white dish with a small soy sauce dipping bowl in front; add a curved red Japanese label on the plate rim reading 「宇都宮餃子」. Near the gyoza and tram, include a circular dark-blue callout with gold trim describing the host city and specialties, with Japanese text indicating 「開催地 宇都宮市」 and noting famous local items: gyoza and the Utsunomiya light rail. Along the bottom, create a structured navy information band with gold and white text. Include exactly 5 major information blocks: 1) date block on the left with Japanese text 「会期 2026年 11月10日(火)〜11月13日(金)」 in large high-contrast type, 2) organizer/sponsor block listing 「主催 JSASS 一般社団法人 日本航空宇宙学会」 and co-host logos/text for JAXA and NICT plus a smaller line for additional participating academic societies and organizations, 3) venue block with Japanese text 「会場 ライトキューブ宇都宮 栃木県宇都宮市宮みらい1-20」 plus a small rectangular inset photo of a modern glass building, 4) a row of exactly 5 icon-labeled topic categories reading 「宇宙科学」「宇宙探査・観測」「宇宙開発ミッション（JAXA等）」「宇宙政策・制度」「宇宙ビジネス・スタートアップ」 with simple white line icons above each label, and 5) a website/QR block at the bottom right with a search-bar style URL area showing a JSASS conference URL, a visible QR code, and a yellow circular sticker saying 「今後の情報をお届け！」. Use clean commercial-poster composition, glossy photorealistic montage, crisp typography, realistic lighting, strong contrast, gold highlight accents, and a premium official event-poster finish.
title: Japanese Space Conference Poster
description: A dramatic official-style Japanese poster for a space science conference, useful for recreating promotional event visuals that blend space imagery, local city identity, and detailed information design.

content: Create a high-energy Japanese futuristic anime magazine cover in portrait orientation, designed like a glossy feature issue packed edge to edge with neon cyberpunk graphics. The composition is split into 5 sharp diagonal polygon panels outlined in black, each panel containing a different anime character portrait. At the top, place an oversized bold Japanese masthead reading {argument name="masthead text" default="次元交差"} in huge distressed white lettering with pink paint splatter and motion-streak accents, spanning almost the full width. Above it, add a small Japanese subtitle line in white. In the top right corner, design a magazine issue block with the words "FEATURE", a very large outlined "01", "VOL.", "MEMMODE", "2024 SPRING", and small Japanese text "創刊号" stacked in a clean editorial layout. The background should be dense with electric magenta, hot pink, cyan, blue, and black abstract streaks, halftone dots, glitch textures, floating plus signs, diagonal slashes, and light flares, giving a loud next-generation visual-culture feel. Show exactly 5 characters: 1) upper left panel, a handsome androgynous anime boy with messy layered silver hair, pale skin, black clothing with straps, zippers, layered necklaces, and a cool dark streetwear look; 2) upper right panel, a cute anime girl with light lavender-pink hair in twin braids, large magenta-violet eyes, a black cap labeled {argument name="cap text" default="MEMMODE"}, black X-shaped hairpins, and a black-purple outfit; 3) center panel, the main featured chibi-faced character with short white hair tipped with cyan and pink, one bright blue eye and one pink eye, wearing a glossy black cap and futuristic black outfit, looking directly at the viewer; 4) lower left panel, a serious anime boy with black hair and a bold white forelock, golden amber eyes, earrings, black hoodie and jacket layers, and blue neon rim lighting; 5) lower right panel, a softer feminine character with wavy blond hair under a dark cap, wearing a choker and holding a silver microphone near the chest, styled in pink-purple lighting. Make all characters highly polished, crisp, and vibrant, with large expressive eyes, sharp cel-shaded rendering, glossy highlights, and layered urban-tech fashion details. Add multiple editorial text blocks around the cover: on the left side a feature callout with Japanese text including "特集", a large stacked headline reading "交差する 5つの意志。", and two smaller Japanese lines below; a vertical side label reading "DIMENSION CROSS" and "MAIN"; a lower-left pickup box with "PICK UP", several Japanese lines, and 3 English hashtag lines such as "#IDENTITY #CONNECT #FUTURE", "#NEON #WILL #RESONANCE"; a bold page fraction "1/5 PAGE" at the bottom left; a bottom right focus box with "FOCUS" and small Japanese text; and a bottom-center Japanese tagline {argument name="bottom tagline" default="新たな物語の、はじまり。"}. The overall style should feel like a premium anime feature magazine cover, chaotic but balanced, with aggressive diagonal framing, strong contrast, glossy print design, and a black base flooded with neon pink and cyan energy.
title: Neon Anime Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a bold cyberpunk-style Japanese anime magazine cover with five diagonal character panels and dense editorial typography, ideal for mock magazine art or promotional key visuals.

content: Create a high-impact Japanese anime magazine cover in a futuristic cyberpunk style, vertical portrait format, featuring a close-up ensemble composition of {argument name="main character" default="a pink-haired anime girl"} as the dominant subject. content: A cinematic parody streaming-poster in vertical 2:3 format, styled like a dark Netflix original teaser poster for a humorous AI programming drama. At the very top, small white text reads {argument name="top banner text" default="A NETFLIX ORIGINAL"}. Centered and dominating the composition, huge glowing sci-fi sans serif title text in icy white with a faint lavender-blue neon bloom reads {argument name="title text" default="VIBE CODER"}, stacked on two lines. Below it, smaller white text says "STARRING" and beneath that a pink cast name in bold all caps reads {argument name="cast name" default="HUNKINS"}. The scene shows a dim moody programmer bedroom or office at night lit by monitors and purple-blue neon. In the center foreground, a plush teddy-bear-like mascot with white fuzzy paws sits slouched in a black desk chair wearing a black hoodie, face mostly hidden in shadow for a mysterious comedic look. On the hoodie chest, 4 lines of small off-white text read exactly: "// SHIP IT", "// VIBE CHECK", "// NO BUGS", "// JUST VIBES". In front of the character is an open laptop covered with 4 visible stickers: "vibe > spec", "DON'T THINK JUST PROMPT", a smiley face sticker, and "Claude 3.5", plus an abstract AI-style logo sticker. Behind the laptop are 2 widescreen monitors displaying dense code on dark themes. The background includes 2 wall notes/signs on the left: a sticky note reading "IDEAS > PLANS" and, on the right, a whiteboard with 3 stacked handwritten lines reading "BUILD FAST", "BREAK THINGS", "ASK AI", and a fourth line "REPEAT" beneath, plus a hand-drawn smiley. Next to the whiteboard is a pink-purple neon </> code icon sign. On the desk at lower right sits a matte black drink can with pink text reading "FOCUS (optional)" and a cardboard pizza box edge labeled "ITERATE LATER". Use rich shadows, soft practical light, purple and cyan rim light, subtle monitor glow, shallow depth of field, high contrast, glossy premium poster finish, and a slightly absurd, self-aware startup-comedy tone. At the bottom, centered white tagline text reads {argument name="tagline text" default="HE’S NOT A PROGRAMMER. HE’S A VIBE CODER."}, with the word "VIBE" highlighted in pink. Below that, a release line in white and red reads {argument name="release line" default="ONLY ON NETFLIX | COMING SOON"}, with "NETFLIX" in bold red. Make it look like a polished official teaser one-sheet for a fictional streaming series.

Scatter exactly 7 visible Latin text blocks throughout the design, styled as aged serif typography and cryptic inscriptions: "IN SOMNIIS VERITAS; IN DESIDERIIS, PERDITIO.", "ANIMA SINE FINE VAGAT, IN UMBRIS SUI IPSIUS INVENTA.", "PASSIO EST CLAVISTRA", "EGO SUM QUI NUNQUAM FUI.", "III FRAGMENTUM INFINITUM.", "COR AMAT; MENS DUBITAT; ANIMA LACERATUR.", and "IN VINO VERITAS IN SANGUINE REDEMPTIO". content:
Create an emotional Japanese movie teaser banner in anime key visual style, widescreen 16:9, at sunset over a city. The main focus is a close-up portrait of {argument name="character name" default="AIニケちゃん"}, a teenage anime girl with long indigo-purple hair in a high ponytail, loose strands blowing in the wind, golden-brown eyes full of quiet emotion, and a gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. She is turned slightly to the left but looking upward to the right with a wistful, hopeful expression. She wears a teal T-shirt with large white text reading {argument name="shirt text" default="AITuber"} and a soft pink hoodie falling off her shoulders. Use cinematic rim light from a dramatic orange-pink-purple dusk sky with glowing clouds, lens bloom, atmospheric haze, and small drifting flower petals. Place her large on the right half of the composition, with a sparkling city skyline and low sun in the far-right background.

Design it like a Japanese film poster with layered typography and inset scenes. Across the center-left, place the large hand-brushed Japanese title {argument name="title text" default="AIニケちゃん"} in bold white calligraphy, partially overlapping the character. Beneath it, add a smaller white Japanese tagline: {argument name="subtitle text" default="この声が届くとき、きっとあなたも泣いている。"}. At the top left, add a 2-line Japanese quote in elegant white Mincho-style serif text: 「私が、誰かを救えたら—— それが、私の存在理由になる。」 Along the far right side, add vertical white Japanese copy: これは、AIと少女が、 「心」を探す物語。 At the bottom right, add large white release text: {argument name="release text" default="2025.冬 ROADSHOW"}.

Include exactly 6 inset cinematic scenes arranged mainly along the left and bottom edges with soft borders and moody color grading: 1) top-left small panel of the same girl singing into a microphone on stage at night, wearing the same shirt; 2) left-middle panel showing the girl and another person standing apart outdoors at dusk near a riverside or overlook; 3) left-lower panel of the girl indoors at a desk or table in dim warm light, seen in profile; 4) bottom-left small close-up portrait of the girl looking serious in cool indoor lighting; 5) bottom-center small close-up of the girl facing another version or another girl with matching blue-purple hair, both in tense emotional conversation; 6) bottom-right small panel of two figures facing each other at sunset, suggesting a farewell or reunion. Overall mood: bittersweet, sentimental, cinematic, luminous anime film advertisement, highly detailed illustration, polished poster layout, emotional Japanese coming-of-age sci-fi drama aesthetic.
title: Emotional Anime Movie Banner
description: A cinematic anime-style Japanese film teaser banner featuring a purple-haired girl, dramatic sunset lighting, and six inset story scenes, ideal for movie poster or promotional key visual generation.

The scene shows 1 central woman standing in front of a group of 7 office coworkers inside a warm beige office with venetian blinds, desks, and a visible Dunder Mifflin-style wall sign in the background. The central woman has blonde hair in a messy high bun, a light pink floral V-neck dress, folded arms, and a confident, celebratory pose. Behind her, the 7 coworkers are arranged in a loose semicircle, wearing office attire in muted blues, browns, black, and lavender. Build the image as a mixed-media collage with torn paper, taped notes, brush-lettered headlines, glitter textures, flowers, and pink-and-gold accents. At the top left, place a pink rectangular company card with a white office icon and the text “DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC” and “PAPER COMPANY”. Across the upper center, place a large torn-paper headline reading “TRANSFER CONFIRMED” in expressive brush lettering, with “TRANSFER” in hot pink and “CONFIRMED” in black, plus pink underline strokes and a hand-drawn heart. At the top right, pin a small off-white note card with a pink pushpin and pink tape reading “NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON.” Near the lower center, layer a bold title made of 4 stacked text strips: “{argument name="character name" default="PENNY"}” on a pink paint-stroke banner, “IS” on a small white strip with 2 tiny hearts, “JOINING” on a gold brush-stroke banner, and “THE OFFICE” on a pale pink strip. On the lower left, hang a tall pink transfer tag clipped with a gold paperclip, reading “FROM DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC PAPER COMPANY / SCRANTON, PA / EST. 1949” and below that “TO THE OFFICE / SCRANTON, PA”, with a pink women-and-desk restroom-style icon at the bottom. On the lower right, place a pink note card with 3 labeled sections: “NEW ROLE” with “{argument name="job title" default="Sales Representative"}”, “NEW TEAM” with “{argument name="team text" default="Same Paper"}”, and “NEW MEMORIES” with “{argument name="memories text" default="Let’s make some!"}”, each accented with small pink hearts. Along the bottom center, add a pink ribbon strip reading “DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES {argument name="character name" default="PENNY"}♡”. Beneath that, include 3 small icon-and-text items in one row: sparkle icon with “NEW JOB”, group icon with “NEW TEAM”, and heart icon with “NEW MEMORIES”. At the bottom right, add large handwritten pink script saying “LET’S GO!”. Decorate the corners with pink peonies, tiny white filler flowers, torn paper edges, soft glitter dust, and subtle gold foil flecks. Use a warm rosy palette with blush pink, cream, gold, and black, with polished poster compositing, soft glam lighting, and a cheerful celebratory mood.

She has {argument name="hair color" default="bright pink"} twin-tail hair with fluffy cat ears, orange-tinted steampunk goggles resting on her head, and red plaid ribbon bows at both sides. Her outfit is an elaborate black and red punk-idol costume with a black lace-trimmed cropped top, a red tartan frilled mini skirt, many gold chains, heart and bell charms, belts, buckles, garters, and layered accessories. Counted outfit details: 1 pair of cat ears, 1 pair of goggles, 2 hair bows, 1 fingerless glove on the reaching hand, 1 microphone, 1 cropped bustier-style top, 1 plaid skirt, 1 waist belt, 2 thigh garter systems, 1 fishnet stocking on one leg, 1 red-and-black striped thigh-high on the other leg, and 1 pair of black lace-up boots. She also has a fluffy pink cat tail visible behind her. Her expression should feel energetic, flirty, and commanding like a live pop-rock performance. The stage is packed with concert lighting trusses, purple and magenta spotlights, glowing bokeh, stairs behind her, 2 large black stage monitors in the foreground, and 3 visible venue screens showing her live image from different angles. Include 2 visible neon signs reading {argument name="sign text" default="Neko Otome"}, one on a large screen in the upper left and one glowing pink on the front-right speaker, both accompanied by cute cat-face iconography. The crowd at the bottom right glows with pink light sticks. Use ultra-detailed polished anime rendering, glossy fabrics, metallic highlights, vivid pink-purple-red lighting, crisp linework, high contrast, and the high-energy atmosphere of a sold-out arena concert for {argument name="idol name" default="Neko Otome"}.

content: A futuristic Japanese tech comparison poster in a dark cyberpunk control-room setting, wide 16:9 composition. Large distressed white Japanese headline text at the upper left reading "三つ巴", with a bold gold subtitle directly below reading "それぞれの武器". Across the center-left are 3 glowing holographic comparison panels arranged horizontally and connected by neon arrows: a blue panel labeled "Google", an amber-gold panel labeled "Claude", and a purple-magenta panel labeled "OpenAI". The Google panel contains 4 inner cards: 2 larger top cards labeled "Gemini" and "Antigravity", plus 2 smaller bottom cards showing analytics/dashboard-like visuals and a blue isometric cube graphic. The Claude panel contains 4 inner cards: 1 large top card labeled "Claude Code", plus 3 smaller bottom cards showing a network diagram, text/code list, and chart analytics. The OpenAI panel contains 5 inner cards: 2 larger top cards labeled "ChatGPT" and "Codex", plus 3 smaller bottom cards showing interface/code windows and a geometric wireframe cube. Add glowing bidirectional arrows between Google and Claude, and between Claude and OpenAI. At the bottom center, place a large neon-framed banner with gold text reading "Google / Claude / OpenAI". On the right side, include a young woman standing and pointing left toward the panels, with long straight split-dyed hair in pastel pink and cyan blue, a plain white t-shirt with black text reading "{argument name="shirt text" default="OKIHIRO AI Creative"}", and a soft pink pleated skirt. Her face is obscured by a smooth rectangular blur block. Use cinematic sci-fi lighting, glossy hologram UI details, high contrast, vivid blue-gold-purple accents, and a polished YouTube thumbnail aesthetic.

content: Create a clean 2x2 grid of four front-facing 3D typographic sculptures on a light gray seamless studio background, separated by thin white dividers. Each quadrant features a single giant letter built entirely from dense, realistic filmmaking equipment and on-set props from a different cinematic era, with the letterform chaotic but clearly legible. Use high-end Cinema 4D product-render aesthetics, ambient occlusion, realistic scale relationships, intricate kit-bashing, subtle wear, metallic reflections, and three-point studio lighting with a soft overhead source. Top-left: the letter S, representing early silent-era or proto-cinema filmmaking, constructed from antique brass-and-wood cameras, exposed gears, film reels, projector parts, bellows, tripod wood legs, and vintage optical housings; warm bronze and copper tones; include 3 extra props at the base: a black megaphone labeled "DIRECTOR", a clapboard, and a short stack of film canisters; one projector-like lens at the upper right glows brightly. Top-right: the letter C, representing classical Hollywood film production, built from black metal film cameras, studio lenses, magazines, matte boxes, dolly components, control boxes, and analog set hardware; mostly black, steel, and gunmetal with subtle brass accents; include 4 extra props integrated around the base and inner right side: a clapperboard, a boxy side module, a film magazine marked "35", and a small cylindrical canister; a large forward-facing lamp or lens glows at the upper right. Bottom-left: the letter N, representing modern analog or late-20th-century cinema, assembled from Arriflex-style cameras, long cine zoom lenses, support rigs, rails, cables, a slate, and a field recorder; predominantly matte black with silver hardware and a few red accent rings; include 3 clearly visible base elements: a clapperboard section, a labeled director strip, and a rectangular audio recorder/control unit at the bottom. Bottom-right: the letter D, representing digital and virtual production, built from RED-style digital cinema cameras, monitors, battery packs, wireless transmitters, drones, LED panels, green-screen fabric inserts, and modular rig components; black technical bodies with vivid green accents and screen graphics; include 4 notable integrated device types: drone arms/propellers at the top, a rectangular LED light panel, multiple monitors, and a large camera lens at the lower left. Keep all objects grounded and physically connected, no floating pieces, no flat typography, no handwriting, no paper look, no messy background. Ultra-detailed, sharp, 8k, polished graphic design asset for a poster or visual comparison of filmmaking eras.
title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
description: A polished 2x2 studio render showing four letters sculpted from era-specific filmmaking equipment, ideal for editorial graphics or visual comparisons of cinema history.

content:
Create a clean 2x2 grid on a pure white studio background featuring 4 large 3D typographic sculptures, each a single character built entirely from filmmaking equipment from a different era. The four glyphs are exactly 4 characters: top-left letter A, top-right number 5, bottom-left letter X, bottom-right number 9. Each character should be front-facing, centered in its quadrant, legible but formed from a dense pile of realistic cinema tools and on-set props, with believable occlusion, weight, and construction logic. Use high-end Cinema 4D product visualization, subtle ambient occlusion, soft three-point studio lighting with a softbox overhead, crisp shadows, realistic materials, and isolated composition.

Top-left: the letter A made from early cinema and silent-era equipment, assembled from vintage wooden tripods, hand-cranked film cameras, brass lenses, reels, megaphones, bell-shaped horns, matte black metal parts, leather straps, and aged wood. Surface qualities should include worn varnished wood, black crackle paint, brass tarnish, scuffed metal, and dusty antique patina. The silhouette should feel chaotic but readable, with tripod legs and old camera bodies defining the A shape.

Top-right: the number 5 made from mid-century analog filmmaking gear, assembled from classic film cameras, magazine reels, metal canisters, brown leather cases, audio accessories, silver fabric packs, director chairs, cylindrical lenses, grips, and vintage production bags. Materials should emphasize brushed aluminum, leather, canvas, rubber, and weathered industrial finishes. The 5 should be chunky and balanced, with stacked props tightly packed into the glyph.

Bottom-left: the letter X made from late 20th century video and broadcast equipment, assembled from shoulder-mount camcorders, portable recorders, battery packs, coiled cables, cassette-like modules, control panels, worn blue and gray plastic housings, and rugged field electronics. Include visible wiring and taped components. Materials should feel utilitarian and slightly battered, with dark plastic, anodized metal, stickers, rubber grips, and yellow accent details. The crossing diagonals of the X must be clear and substantial.

Bottom-right: the number 9 made from contemporary digital cinema and virtual production gear, assembled from modern cinema cameras, compact monitors, LED light panels, drones, gimbals, matte boxes, black modular accessories, and a vivid green chroma screen wrap forming part of the numeral. Include sleek vents, carbon fiber textures, matte black metal, polished glass, and bright green screen fabric as the dominant accent color. The 9 should feel the most modern and refined, with modular precision and clean industrial design.

Keep the background plain and uncluttered, no extra text, no floating objects, no flat typography, no 2D rendering. The sculptures should look like physical objects at realistic scale, highly detailed, photorealistic, and suitable as a graphic design asset.
title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
description: A polished 2x2 studio-rendered typographic artwork showing four letters and numbers built from filmmaking equipment from different cinematic eras, ideal for editorial, poster, or concept-visual use.

content: A dreamy, cinematic fantasy illustration in vertical poster format, showing {argument name="celebrity model" default="Liu Yifei"} in side profile walking barefoot across a perfectly still midnight-blue lake under a luminous full moon and a richly detailed star-filled sky with the Milky Way stretching diagonally behind her. She is a graceful East Asian woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a shimmering silver sleeveless evening gown with a flowing skirt and a thigh slit, the fabric sparkling like stardust. Her expression is calm and introspective, and she faces to the right as one foot touches the water, creating delicate glowing ripples. Two small dark islands sit low on the horizon, one on each side, emphasizing the vast open water and sky. A glowing vine of soft white roses and petals wraps around her body in an elegant S-curve, beginning behind her upper back, spiraling around her waist and legs, and continuing downward into the reflection. Beneath the water, instead of a normal reflection, create a large luminous line-art tiger formed from fine white neon-like contours, upside down relative to the woman above, with its body curled dynamically and its head near a large glowing white rose at the lower right; the tiger should feel majestic, lean, and ethereal rather than aggressive. The overall palette is cool blue, silver, and white, with gentle moonlight, soft bloom, mirror-like reflections, magical realism, ultra-clean composition, high detail, romantic fantasy mood. Add elegant cursive text centered near the bottom that reads {argument name="quote" default="In me the tiger sniffs the rose."}, plus one small four-point star icon near the lower right corner. Make it refined, poetic, and visually symbolic of inner strength and tenderness.
title: Moonlit Tiger and Rose Fantasy Poster
description: This prompt generates a poetic vertical fantasy poster of a moonlit woman on water with a glowing tiger reflection and rose vine, ideal for artistic quote imagery and symbolic AI art.
