content: Create a vintage illustrated postcard designed as a whimsical collaboration between {argument name="franchise name" default="The Little Prince"} and {argument name="space company name" default="SPACEX"}, shown as the front and back of the postcard side by side on one canvas. Use warm aged paper with slightly worn edges, subtle grain, faint stains, and a nostalgic mid-century print feel. The left half is the postcard image: a deep midnight blue starry sky with small golden stars and a tiny ringed planet, a large white rocket standing upright on a launch pad with bright exhaust at liftoff, and a small blond child in a green outfit with a long golden scarf sitting on a rocky hill beside an orange fox, both seen from behind and looking toward the rocket. Add elegant hand-lettered quote text in the sky that reads {argument name="quote" default="To the stars, what matters is invisible."}, with smaller serif and script attribution beneath: "ANTOINE DE SAINT-EXUPÉRY" and "The Little Prince". Along the bottom of the left panel, include 2 brand names: "The Little Prince" in blue script on the left and "SPACEX" in bold blue futuristic capitals on the right, separated by a small gold star and a thin divider line. Beneath that, add the slogan in spaced small caps: {argument name="tagline" default="EXPLORING WORLDS. CARING FOR WHAT MATTERS."}. The right half is the postcard back on the same aged paper, with a centered heading "POST CARD" near the top and a small gold star ornament below it. Add a circular postmark near the upper center-right with 4 visible text parts arranged inside the stamp: "PLANET EARTH", "MAY 23", "2024", and "BEYOND". In the top-right corner, place a blue postage stamp with perforated edges showing the Little Prince standing on a tiny planet under stars, with 4 readable text elements: "1943", "Le Petit Prince", "SPACE", and a small star symbol. The right side should have 2 writing columns divided by a vertical line. In the left writing area, place a handwritten-style message beginning with "Dear friend," followed by this text in neat cursive line breaks: "One day, we'll leave Earth not to escape it, but to understand it better. The universe is vast, but kindness is our compass. Let's take care of our home, as we reach for the stars." Then sign it on 3 lines: "The Little Prince", "and", "SPACEX". In the right address area, write "To you," on the first line, then "Somewhere wonderful" and "In the Universe" on the next lines with horizontal guide lines. Add small gold star doodles and, at the bottom-right corner, a simple line drawing of a tiny round planet with little flowers sprouting from it. Keep the palette limited to cream, navy, soft gold, muted green, warm orange, and blue-gray, with crisp but painterly illustration, accurate decorative typography, and a magical, hopeful, literary-meets-space-exploration tone.
title: Vintage Little Prince Space Postcard
description: A nostalgic illustrated postcard layout combining The Little Prince and a modern rocket launch, ideal for editorial art, themed prints, or brand-crossover concept visuals.

content:
A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover photographed in a bright, airy outdoor setting with a pale blue sky and softly blurred modern railing in the background, portrait orientation. The masthead is enormous across the top in elegant soft pink serif letters reading "L’Allure", with small Japanese text above it and a bracketed Japanese subtitle at the top right. The issue information appears on the upper left as a large black "5" with smaller stacked text beside and below it indicating May 2026, No.156, and a May 2026 issue line. The cover features two adult East Asian women standing side by side from about mid-thigh upward, posed like a luxury editorial cover. Their faces are intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. Lighting is soft, natural, and flattering, with a refined premium magazine aesthetic.

The woman on the left wears a navy blouse with dramatic koi-scale sleeves in navy, white, and silver, styled with a bow or scarf-like neckline, tucked into a long flowing off-white skirt with a wide waistband. She carries 1 fish-shaped handbag: a navy and cream koi-inspired purse with a round eye detail, scale pattern, tail fin silhouette, gold hardware, and a thin chain strap hanging from her hand. Her hair is dark brown to black, loosely tied in a low messy bun with soft strands framing her face. Her pose is elegant and slightly angled, one hand near her chin.

The woman on the right wears a crisp white blouse with a soft bow-tie or vertical ruffle/placket detail at the front, paired with a striking koi-inspired skirt or dress panel featuring 2 main colors, coral pink and deep blue, with layered fish-scale motifs and a circular eye-like ornament at the waist. She holds 1 structured handbag: a rectangular white bag with coral pink koi face paneling, blue accents, gold hardware, top handles, and a shoulder strap. Her dark hair is tied back in a low ponytail. She stands facing slightly left with relaxed hands and a calm editorial expression implied by pose.

The fashion concept is themed around koi streamers and carp motifs, transforming traditional Japanese koinobori imagery into sophisticated contemporary womenswear. The palette is soft sky blue, blush pink, navy, white, cream, and coral red. Fabrics appear smooth, elegant, and lightly flowing, with printed or embroidered scale patterns. The overall mood is graceful, feminine, seasonal, and upscale, balancing tradition with modern fashion.

Add multiple Japanese cover lines in a realistic editorial layout. On the left side, include 4 grouped text blocks: 1 feature header in red and black about moody carp streamer fashion, 1 smaller blue subhead about inheriting traditional beauty with a fresh elegance balance, 1 black text block about basics and updates for women in their twenties, and 1 blue makeup feature line about translucent early-summer makeup. On the right side, include 3 grouped text blocks: 1 red "Cover Story" heading with larger black Japanese headline text beneath, 1 blue text block about conservative style that shines in fresh greenery, and 1 pink boxed reader gift notice with black Japanese text below about luxury brand new bags and accessories. Near the lower left, place 1 circular pink badge with white and cream Japanese text about a special walking guide supplement. Across the lower center, place a large dramatic Japanese main headline in pink and black serif and brush-style type, spanning most of the width.

content: A fashion magazine cover styled like a luxurious Japanese women's magazine, photographed in soft natural daylight against a pale blue sky with a faint city skyline blurred in the background. The masthead is huge and elegant across the top, reading {argument name="magazine title" default="Lumiére"} in oversized soft pink serif lettering, with small Japanese cover text above and around it, plus a small issue marker on the upper right reading "5", "May 2026", and "No.218". Center the cover on exactly 2 young adult Japanese women standing close together from about thigh-up, facing camera in a poised editorial pose, with their faces intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. The woman on the left wears a flowing pale blue dress inspired by koinobori carp streamers: high Mandarin-style collar, sleeveless inner dress, long sheer cape panels draping from the shoulders, elaborate layered metallic and satin fish-scale appliqué across the bodice, a large stylized fish eye motif on the chest, more scale detailing and fin-shaped ornamentation at the hip, and a cinched waist with decorative jeweled clasp. Her dark hair is in an elegant updo with loose wisps, and she wears dangling earrings. The woman on the right wears the same design concept in pale pink and white, also with a high collar, translucent cape-like side panels, layered fish-scale bodice, a visible fish eye motif near the waist sash, soft pleated skirt, tassel ornament at the belt, and matching dangling earrings; her dark hair is also swept into a refined updo with a few loose strands. The overall styling is airy, graceful, feminine, and sophisticated, mixing traditional Japanese elegance with modern couture. Use a pastel palette dominated by baby blue, blush pink, white, and subtle gold trim, with bright but diffused lighting and a premium glossy magazine editorial finish. Include visible Japanese cover lines arranged like a real magazine layout: one left-side block introducing the cover girls, one large main headline block across the lower half, one right-side vertical cluster of smaller teaser text, and exactly 2 pale blue circular callout badges on the right side containing Japanese text; the upper badge advertises a special appendix gift set and includes exactly 2 small product images of pouch-like accessories, and the lower badge contains a shopping-plan checklist with exactly 3 checkbox lines. content: Create a polished Xiaohongshu-style Chinese travel infographic poster in a soft watercolor map aesthetic, square format, showing a five-day high-speed-rail travel route through China. Large brush-calligraphy headline at the top left: {argument name="headline text" default="五一出行计划"}. Directly below it, a green ribbon subtitle with white Chinese text: {argument name="route text" default="广州→湖南→武汉→北京"}. Add a smaller line of Chinese text under the subtitle: “一路向北·发现中国之美”. The background is a pale illustrated map of central and northern China in beige and light sage green, with faint mountain textures, soft rivers, and subtle floral decoration in the corners. A vertical curved railway line runs from the bottom center upward to the top center, connecting 4 cities with orange-red location pins and bold red Chinese city names. The 4 cities are, from bottom to top: 广州, 湖南, 武汉, 北京. Along the route, place small white high-speed train icons on the track and 3 green travel-time labels: “广州→湖南 高铁约2.5小时”, “湖南→武汉 高铁约1.5小时”, and “武汉→北京 高铁约4.5小时”. Near each city, include a scenic collage or illustrated landmark cluster: Guangzhou with a modern skyline and Canton Tower; Hunan with green mountains and cultural scenery; Wuhan with Yellow Crane Tower and historic architecture; Beijing with the Forbidden City / imperial palace architecture. Add small scenic tag labels near the city illustrations reading “花城广州·美食之都”, “山水湖南·人文荟萃”, “江城武汉·英雄之城”, and “中国首都·历史与现代交融”. Under the main title, show exactly 4 minimalist icon badges with short Chinese labels, evenly spaced in one row: a camera icon labeled “精选景点”, a train icon labeled “高铁直达”, a suitcase icon labeled “轻松出行”, and a star icon labeled “美食推荐”. Around the map, place 4 rounded rectangular itinerary cards with green headers, cream backgrounds, and photo thumbnails. Each card must contain day-by-day plans, a starred section for recommended attractions, and a starred section for recommended food. The 4 cards are: 1) top right card titled “北京｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 2) right middle card titled “武汉｜1.5天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 3) left middle card titled “湖南｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 4) bottom left card titled “广州｜1天”, with exactly 1 day row, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo. Fill the itinerary text with compact Chinese travel-plan copy in a practical social-media infographic style. At the lower right, add a rounded notes panel containing exactly 2 sections with green titles: “行程亮点” and “出行小贴士”. Under “行程亮点”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Under “出行小贴士”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Decorate the notes area with a small luggage illustration and a handwritten-style diagonal Chinese phrase in green, such as “出发吧！去感受春天的风景”. At the bottom center, place a small rounded summary bar titled “行程总览”, including exactly 4 summary items with icons: total duration “总时长：约6.5天”, total distance “总里程：约2100公里”, recommended transportation “推荐交通：高铁”, and best travel period “最佳出行时间：4.29 - 5.5”. In the bottom left foreground, place a large sleek white high-speed train angled diagonally upward, partially overlapping the border as a hero element. Add a calligraphic closing slogan near the train in Chinese: “最美的风景在路上 最好的时光在五一”. Use an elegant olive-green, sage, beige, and warm red palette, combining traditional Chinese travel-poster charm with modern infographic clarity, crisp typography, soft shadows, rounded cards, realistic photo inserts, and clean editorial layout.
title: China May Day Rail Travel Infographic
description: A square Chinese social-media travel poster showing a five-day high-speed-rail itinerary from Guangzhou to Beijing, useful for Xiaohongshu-style trip planning graphics.

content: A dramatic Japanese motivational movie-poster style illustration set at dusk, mixing corporate burnout and hopeful space-dream fantasy. In the center foreground, an anthropomorphic Shiba Inu with warm tan fur smiles confidently at the viewer, wearing a sharp navy business suit, white dress shirt, and blue striped tie. The dog holds a black e-reader in the left paw with the screen text “kindle” and a black-and-gold fountain pen in the right paw. Behind the character, the background is split into two thematic halves that blend together: on the left, a dense Tokyo-like city skyline at sunset with Tokyo Tower glowing orange, dark office buildings, and exhausted salary workers at desks under a stressful atmosphere; on the right, a deep starry cosmos with blue nebulae, a rocket launching upward, 3 airplanes, a winding glowing golden trajectory line, 1 small planet, 2 floating paw prints, 2 packaged breads labeled “カンパン,” and 1 round biscuit labeled “南部せんべい.” Near the right lower background, show a family of 4 from behind walking toward the bright horizon with a dog, symbolizing hope and future dreams. Add 3 black signboards floating in the left midground with the Japanese words “残業,” “プレッシャー,” and “会議 満員電車.” In the foreground on a wooden desk, place exactly 3 prominently displayed books standing upright: book 1 on the left is white and blue with the title “忙しい社会人のやり直し英語勉強法” and a small illustrated author portrait; book 2 in the center is dark blue and gold with the large title “『あたりまえ』を続けることは 最強の生存戦略である”; book 3 on the right is white and blue with the title “『すぐやる』は最速の仕事術” and a large “5” plus a circular “5 MIN” icon. Also on the desk, include 1 black coffee mug with the text “未来は 5分で変わる,” 1 spiral notebook opened flat with a handwritten to-do list in Japanese reading “今日やること ① ブログを書く（5分） ② 家族と過ごす（大切） ③ 未来を信じる（ワクワク）” plus a paw-print doodle, 1 black fountain pen lying beside it, 1 globe on a stand at the far right, 1 plate of crackers, 1 extra packaged “カンパン,” and small framed photos at the lower left edge. At the top, large luxurious gold Japanese headline text reads “{argument name="headline text" default="5分で宇宙へ！"}” with a smaller gold subtitle beneath: “〜たかお柴犬のサイドFIRE物語〜”. Below that, centered white copy reads “忙しい毎日に、たった5分。 犬だけど、夢は本気で掴んだ。” At the bottom center, add a cinematic English tagline: “Based on a true story of たかお柴犬” and beneath it “A heartwarming comedy-drama about taking small steps to big dreams”. Use ultra-detailed glossy poster rendering, warm orange sunset versus cool blue space contrast, inspirational commercial key art, sharp typography, rich cinematic lighting, whimsical but sincere tone, highly polished social-media poster composition, vertical format.
title: Shiba Inu Space Dream Poster
description: A cinematic Japanese poster featuring a business-suited Shiba Inu, self-help books, and a surreal path from office burnout to space-bound dreams, ideal for inspirational social media art or parody account posters.

content: A dramatic fantasy anime poster in a clean vertical one-sheet layout for a fictional series titled LEGENDS OF URIA. Use an elegant high-contrast poster design with a parchment-white background, deep indigo title lettering, warm copper and rust-red accents, and a heroic central full-body character. At the top left, place the large stylized logo text “LEGENDS OF URIA” with a sword integrated into the typography, and beneath it a small Japanese subtitle line. The main subject is a young male fantasy scribe standing front-facing in the center, his face intentionally obscured by a flat square blur block, with messy short orange hair, fair skin, and a determined posture. He wears a cream tunic with a black world-tree emblem on the chest, long black undersleeves, dark pants, brown boots with wide cuffs, a brown belt with a rectangular buckle, and a large rust-red hooded cloak draped over both shoulders and flowing around the body. In his right hand he holds a thick dark brown book with gold corner details and a gold tree emblem on the cover. Behind him, blend a pale grayscale fantasy city with cathedral-like towers on the left and a glowing gothic stained-glass archway interior on the right. On the left side, include a large Spanish headline in serif type: “EL ESCRIBA QUE LA DESPERTÓ”, followed by a short Spanish blurb in smaller text. Also include a circular magical sigil with a tree symbol, a division insignia block reading “DIVISIÓN ESCRIBA DE LA ORDEN”, a round tree crest, 3 small icon emblems near the lower left, and a short Spanish lore sentence. On the right edge, add a tall vertical red banner with a white tree symbol and Spanish text reading “LA HISTORIA NECESITA ALGUIEN QUE LA ESCRIBA.” Beside it, add one vertical Japanese sentence in white. At the bottom center, place the character name in huge metallic serif letters: "{argument name="character name" default="MATTHEW"}", with a small Japanese rendering underneath. content: A monumental cosmic fantasy scene in ultra-detailed cinematic digital art: a giant seated humanoid figure made of transparent glass and liquid crystal occupies the left-center of the composition, its body filled with luminous internal filaments, refractive highlights, and delicate swirling patterns under the surface. The figure is posed like a divine artisan or reality-weaver, with 2 raised hands stretching and pinching an enormous veil of glowing golden threads across the right side of the image. The face is smooth and indistinct, almost mannequin-like, with no readable expression, emphasizing the sculptural body and the play of light through translucent skin. The woven sheet of light acts like a living tapestry or membrane, and inside it appears an entire fantastical world: 1 elevated bridge, 1 radiant futuristic city with slender towers and domes, multiple terraces, glowing architecture, and 3 prominent clusters of dark green trees growing on floating or elevated landforms. The environment around the giant is a vast celestial hall with ornate archways and branching, feather-like filigree structures made of gold light, opening into a deep midnight-blue, star-filled sky. The floor is black polished mirror stone with strong reflections of the figure, the golden threads, and the architecture. In the foreground, place 5 reflective metallic or glass spheres of varying size resting on the floor, catching the surrounding gold and blue light. Emphasize dramatic refraction through the glass body, shimmering caustics, intricate threadlike light trails, and rich reflections on the glossy ground. Color palette: deep navy, black, silver-blue, and radiant gold. Mood: awe-inspiring, mystical, divine, and visionary. Highly intricate, baroque sci-fi fantasy aesthetic, wide-angle composition, epic scale, razor-sharp detail, volumetric glow, surreal realism.

content: A dark, gritty Chinese crime-thriller movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout, with a moody neo-noir aesthetic and heavy cinematic contrast. The composition centers on a half-length portrait of a menacing middle-aged East Asian man with wavy black hair, wearing a dark textured overcoat over a black shirt, his face mostly swallowed by shadow, shown from chest up and slightly off-center to the right. His hands are visible in the lower-right area, calmly holding a string of dark wooden prayer beads, suggesting power, danger, and ritual. The background is a dim urban alley or old city street at night, layered with grunge textures, wet pavement reflections, decayed walls, and faint architectural silhouettes. In the lower center, place 1 small back-facing seated figure in a chair under a harsh spotlight, surrounded by 9 standing human silhouettes in the darkness, creating a tense interrogation or underworld confrontation scene. Use an almost monochrome palette of black, charcoal, and dirty gray, with deep blood-red accents and distressed white typography. On the left side, add 1 huge vertical column of expressive red Chinese brush-calligraphy title text, painted with rough splashes and dry-brush texture, dominating nearly the full height of the poster. Along the far left edge, add 2 vertical lines of smaller Chinese text in white and red: "我叫高启强，" and "风浪越大，鱼越贵". On the right side, add 1 vertical cast credit line in white Chinese text with a red circular separator: "张颂文 饰 高启强". content: A dramatic vintage anime poster in the style of a gritty sci-fi mecha key visual, featuring three teenage pilots standing back-to-back in the foreground and a towering purple biomechanical robot looming directly behind them. The center pilot is a slim teenage boy in a dark navy and black plug suit with white shoulder panels and a glowing red circular core on the chest, standing front-facing with a serious expression. On the left is a pale teenage girl with short icy blue bob-cut hair and a white futuristic bodysuit, turned slightly away in profile. On the right is a teenage girl with long auburn hair flowing to the side, wearing a vivid red plug suit, looking outward with determination. Behind all three, the giant mecha head dominates the composition, centered and symmetrical, with a single horn, glowing orange eyes, angular armor, and massive shoulder structures rising like black wings. The background is outer space with 2 visible celestial bodies: 1 huge cratered moon directly behind the mecha’s head and 1 smaller planet at the right side. The bottom of the poster shows a ruined futuristic cityscape with broken buildings, rubble, sparks, and debris. At the very bottom center, include 2 tiny human silhouettes running forward through destruction, framed by pink energy streaks arcing left and right. Use a dark indigo, black, purple, rust red, and ash gray palette with heavy film grain, distressed ink texture, weathered paper wear, paint splatter, scratched print damage, and a rough screen-printed poster finish. Compose it as a full theatrical one-sheet with dense typography integrated into the edges: large vertical English title text on the left reading "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION", smaller vertical red text beside it reading "HIRANO OF EVANGELION", a red NERV insignia and the word "NERV" near the lower left, a boxed label at bottom left reading "TOKYO-3" and "JAPAN", a red warning box at the upper right reading "ANGEL ATTACK" with Japanese characters beneath, and multiple vertical Japanese taglines along the left and right borders. content: A majestic Chinese ink-wash fantasy poster inspired by Journey to the West, composed as a double-exposure silhouette of {argument name="character name" default="Sun Wukong"} in left-facing profile occupying most of the page. At the top center inside the head, place a glowing full moon behind a celestial Buddha-like figure seated above a grand heavenly palace complex with multiple tiered roofs. In the upper-middle right, show 4 traveling figures on a cliff path: a monkey warrior with a staff, a monk riding a white horse, a pig-faced companion, and a dark-robed companion. In the middle, depict 1 dramatic battle scene of the monkey warrior confronting a coiling dragon or serpent in swirling clouds. In the lower-right, place 1 illuminated temple shrine nestled in the mountains with a golden sacred statue visible inside. In the lower area, add 3 tiny pilgrims walking through the misty valley. Add vertical Chinese calligraphy on the left reading {argument name="title text" default="西游记"}, with smaller vertical side text and several seal-style stamps for an authentic poster design. content: A nostalgic watercolor anime poster on textured off-white paper, composed as a vertical double-exposure illustration inspired by late-1990s adventure anime. The main silhouette is the left-side profile of a young boy wearing large swim goggles pushed up on his head, his face turned to the right, with the silhouette filled by a dreamlike montage of memories and fantasy scenes. Inside the upper center of the silhouette, show 8 children from behind standing together on a ridge and looking toward a glowing, distant crystalline tower beneath a circular celestial portal in a cloudy blue-violet sky; include 7 small creature companions among them. On the upper right inside the silhouette, place a large dragon-like monster emerging from the clouds. Near the center, add a glowing round handheld digital device with a small screen, radiating light. In the middle-lower area, depict 2 iconic small dinosaur-like creatures sitting above an old shrine approach, one purple horned creature and one small yellow reptilian creature. In the lower area, show a mossy torii gate, overgrown stone steps, utility poles, and a small rural train on the right, all wrapped in mist and foliage. At the very bottom, include the 8 children again as tiny silhouettes walking away together along a path, reinforcing the theme of friendship and remembrance. Use soft ink-and-watercolor washes, muted blues, indigo, lavender, sepia, and warm golden highlights, with splattered pigment edges and painterly cloud textures. Keep the composition airy and elegant, with a refined modern poster-design sensibility and almost no generic AI gloss. Add vertical Japanese text on the right side reading あの日、僕たちは選ばれた。あの日、デジモンと出会った。 and place a Japanese title logo at the lower left reading デジモンアドベンチャー, with a small English subtitle “DIGIMON ADVENTURE” and the date line “1999 - 永遠の冒険”.

content: A cinematic ultra-detailed close-up of a NASA spacecraft in low Earth orbit, viewed from very near the hull at a dramatic diagonal angle so the curved metallic body fills most of the frame from left foreground to right midground. The spacecraft exterior is brushed silver-gray metal with visible seams, access panels, latches, rivets, light scuffing, and realistic weathered texture. Prominently display the classic NASA meatball logo near the upper left area of the hull and large black stenciled mission text reading {argument name="mission code" default="ASTRA-99"} across the side. Show the craft tapering toward a cylindrical engine or docking section on the far right. In the background, include the blue limb of Earth with white cloud patterns and a thin glowing atmospheric edge against deep black space. Lighting is hard sunlight from the upper right, creating crisp highlights, soft reflections on the metal, and deep shadow falloff along the lower hull. Photorealistic aerospace engineering, sharp focus on the spacecraft surface, high contrast, epic realism, premium sci-fi documentary style.

content: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo in a polished editorial style, vertical portrait orientation, showing a beautiful young adult woman walking confidently toward the camera in the middle of a modern financial district at sunset. She is centered full-body, photographed at street level with cinematic depth of field, framed by tall glass office towers on both sides reflecting warm golden evening light. The mood is elegant, urban, powerful, and refined, like an upscale fashion magazine cover about after-work style. The woman has long dark hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, a slim sophisticated silhouette, and a poised runway-like stride. She wears a fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater in {argument name="top color" default="burnt orange"} with decorative gold buttons on one shoulder, a high-waisted pencil skirt in {argument name="skirt color" default="warm brown"}, a black belt with a gold buckle, and carries a structured black handbag in one hand. Her expression should feel calm, self-assured, and graceful. Use flattering soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric textures, crisp fashion-photography detail on the outfit, and slightly blurred businesspeople in the background walking through the plaza to suggest a busy city evening. The background should include exactly 4 distant office workers, softly out of focus, spread across the walkway. Add realistic magazine cover typography integrated over the image: a very large elegant serif masthead on the upper left reading {argument name="magazine title" default="CITY POISE"}; beneath it on the left, the cover lines "AFTER-WORK STYLE THAT COMMANDS THE EVENING", "MODERN ELEGANCE", "Polished looks for the office and beyond.", "WORK. WALK. WIND DOWN.", "Versatile pieces that move with your day.", "THE POWER OF NEUTRALS", and "Warm tones, clean lines, Quiet confidence."; on the upper right, small text "STYLE & CULTURE" and "MAY 2024"; below that on the right, the teaser "Sunset meetings and city lights. Your best look starts here."; in the lower right, the cover line "EVENING ELEVATED" with the smaller text "From desk to dinner plans— effortless style that transitions beautifully."; and a realistic barcode box at the bottom right with "MAY 2024", US and CAN prices, small issue numbers, and barcode lines. Make the overall composition clean, premium, balanced, and convincingly like a real contemporary fashion magazine cover.
title: Elegant City Fashion Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a realistic luxury fashion magazine cover featuring a stylish woman walking through a sunset-lit business district, ideal for editorial, branding, and cover design concepts.

content: A polished high-fashion magazine cover portrait of a beautiful young office woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling window in a bright modern corporate office, photographed in a refined editorial style. She faces slightly toward the camera with a calm, elegant, confident expression, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has long dark brown hair styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder. She wears a fitted ribbed mock-neck knit top in {argument name="top color" default="deep navy blue"} with short sleeves and three gold shoulder buttons on the left side, tucked into a high-waisted black pencil skirt with a slim black belt. Her right hand is raised, holding a folded light-colored cleaning cloth against the glass, suggesting a symbolic lifestyle-fashion scene rather than literal cleaning; her left arm rests naturally by her side. Warm daylight streams in from the window, creating soft highlights on her clothing and skin, subtle reflections on the glass, and a luminous cityscape of tall office buildings outside. The interior background is softly blurred, showing a minimalist office with 1 potted plant, 1 desk, and 1 office chair. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, full body cropped around mid-calf, with the model centered slightly right to leave room for typography on the left. Add elegant editorial cover text in a Japanese fashion-magazine style: a very large serif masthead reading {argument name="main title" default="Office Muse"} across the upper left, with "Office" in white and "Muse" in deep blue; small uppercase text at the top left reading "CITY LIFE / BEAUTY / CAREER"; small issue text at the top right reading "JUNE 2024" and "VOL. 28". Include 5 additional text blocks: 1 Japanese subtitle under the main title, 1 left-column beauty section with the heading "BEAUTY" and Japanese body text, 1 left-column career section with the heading "CAREER" and Japanese body text, 1 large lower-left headline reading "Focus On You" with a short Japanese subline, and 1 lower-right circular callout with the heading "Interview" and Japanese text inside a translucent pale circle. Add 3 small blue rectangular tags near the lower left reading {argument name="tag line 1" default="SKINCARE ROUTINE"}, {argument name="tag line 2" default="WORK SMARTER"}, and {argument name="tag line 3" default="MINDFUL LIFE"}. Overall mood: sophisticated, feminine, aspirational, urban, graceful, professional, luxurious, clean natural light, realistic digital photography with subtle fashion-retouching, premium Japanese magazine cover design.

content: A refined Japanese fashion magazine editorial cover set inside a bright modern office corridor, featuring a full-body portrait of a beautiful professional woman walking confidently toward the camera. She wears a sleek monochrome gray office outfit: a fitted ribbed mock-neck short-sleeve knit top with a diagonal shoulder strap detail accented by 4 metallic buttons, a high-waisted gray pencil skirt, and a matching gray belt with a rectangular buckle. She carries a folder and documents in one hand, with the other arm relaxed mid-stride. Her hair is long, dark brown, and styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder, with soft neat bangs. The setting is a sophisticated open-plan office with glass meeting rooms on the left, desks and seated coworkers on the right, soft daylight mixed with clean overhead office lighting, subtle indoor plants, and a shallow depth of field that keeps the woman sharply in focus while the background remains softly blurred. content: Create a highly detailed scientific anatomical poster of a {argument name="subject" default="neuron"} on a clean warm off-white paper background, presented as a museum-quality hybrid of 3D pencil drawing and ultra-realistic biological illustration. The composition centers on one large neuron in three-quarter view, with an oversized spherical purple nucleus inside a textured cell body, many branching dendrites spreading outward like winter tree branches, and a long axon extending diagonally down to the right. The axon is partially cut away to reveal its internal structure and is wrapped in segmented blue-gray myelin sheaths with visible gaps at the nodes of Ranvier. At the far end, the axon branches into exactly 15 thin terminal fibers, each ending in a rounded synaptic bulb with pale peach and pink tips. The main central figure should look sculptural, organic, and slightly glossy, with intricate membrane textures, subtle beige, ivory, silver, brown, and violet coloration, and extremely fine linework for the distal branches. Surround the centerpiece with 6 labeled educational inset sections arranged like a textbook infographic: top left a title block reading {argument name="title text" default="NEURON (NERVE CELL)"} with a short explanatory paragraph and a numbered structure list containing exactly 10 items; upper right a smaller monochrome full-neuron sketch labeled {argument name="style note" default="3D PENCIL DRAWING"}; lower left a cell body soma detail diagram with labels pointing to internal organelles; bottom left a myelin sheath cross-section cylinder diagram; lower center a square grayscale microscopic view panel with 4 labels; right center an electrical signal section with a small action potential graph showing membrane potential versus time; lower right a synapse close-up drawing with receptor and neurotransmitter labeling. Include fine serif typography, delicate leader lines, small circled numbers on the main neuron, and the feel of an elegant old scientific plate mixed with modern biomedical visualization. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with the central neuron dominating most of the canvas, landscape orientation, extremely high resolution, crisp educational poster design, and a refined neutral aesthetic.
title: Scientific Neuron Anatomy Poster
description: This prompt generates a detailed educational neuron infographic poster with a central 3D biological rendering and multiple labeled anatomical inset diagrams for textbook, editorial, or classroom use.

content: A whimsical yet reverent Renaissance-style parody of The Last Supper, with exactly 13 anthropomorphic teddy bears seated along one side of a long banquet table in a grand classical dining hall. The central bear is the clear focal point, posed like Jesus, facing forward with a calm, solemn expression, wearing a muted red robe with a deep blue drape. The other 12 teddy bears cluster in animated conversational groups to the left and right, each with slightly different fur tones from honey brown to cream, all with soft plush texture, rounded ears, black bead-like eyes, and expressive paws raised in discussion. Dress the surrounding bears in painterly biblical robes in earthy reds, dusty blues, ochres, and greens. Recreate the composition closely to Leonardo da Vinci’s Last Supper: symmetrical perspective, coffered wooden ceiling, three rear windows with soft blue mountain landscape visible outside, dark wall tapestries on both side walls, and a long white tablecloth hanging over trestle supports. On the table, include scattered small bread rolls, plates, bowls, and multiple small glasses of dark red wine spaced across the full length. Use warm museum-like lighting, aged fresco tones, soft shadows, detailed oil-paint texture, and a highly polished old-master look, balancing humor with genuine artistic beauty. No modern objects, no text, no extra characters, straight-on wide composition, full table visible.
title: Teddy Bear Last Supper
description: A detailed old-master parody image of The Last Supper rendered with 13 teddy bears, ideal for whimsical fine-art homage and surreal meme-style illustration.

content: A whimsical high-detail oil-painting parody of Michelangelo’s Creation of Adam, but all human figures are replaced by teddy bears. On the left, a single plush teddy bear sits reclined on a rocky slope, posed like Adam, with soft golden-brown curly fur, round ears, shiny black eyes, a small dark nose, and a slightly open mouth. Its left arm supports its body while its right arm stretches outward, index paw extended toward the other bear. On the right, a larger central teddy bear posed like God emerges from a deep reddish-burgundy swirling mantle, wearing a flowing white draped robe, leaning forward with one outstretched arm and pointed paw reaching toward the left bear, almost touching fingertips. Surrounding the robed bear inside the mantle are 8 additional smaller teddy bears clustered tightly together, peeking from different angles like attendant figures. The composition exactly echoes the iconic near-touching hands scene, with the gap between fingertips centered. Use a cracked fresco wall background in warm beige tones, muted Renaissance palette, soft directional light, realistic fabric folds, detailed plush texture, subtle shadows, and a museum-quality painted surface. Blend classical Renaissance fresco aesthetics with charming surreal humor, keeping the scene elegant rather than cartoonish.
title: Teddy Bear Creation Fresco
description: A humorous Renaissance-style parody image of The Creation of Adam in which teddy bears replace every figure, ideal for whimsical art prompts and viral social-media visuals.

content: A classical oil painting in the style of a 17th-century Dutch master, closely inspired by Vermeer’s composition, showing a teddy bear posed as the subject of a formal portrait. The bear is shown in three-quarter view from the shoulders up against a deep black background, turning its head slightly toward the viewer. It has soft golden-brown plush fur, one rounded fuzzy ear clearly visible and the other partially visible beneath a large blue-and-gold turban wrapped around its head, with a long fabric tail draping down the right side. The bear wears a single oversized pearl earring hanging from the visible ear area, echoing the iconic “girl with a pearl earring” look. The clothing includes 2 visible garments: a warm golden-brown robe or coat and a small white collar at the neckline. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the left, rich painterly texture, subtle canvas grain, realistic fabric folds, gentle highlights on the pearl, and a museum-quality old master atmosphere. Keep the composition simple, centered, and elegant, with the teddy bear’s face rendered as a plush toy version of a noble portrait subject, blending cute toy texture with fine-art realism.
title: Teddy Bear with a Pearl Earring
description: This prompt generates a whimsical fine-art parody of a Vermeer-style portrait featuring a teddy bear, ideal for playful museum-inspired AI art.

content: A surreal oil painting in the style of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa, reimagined as a teddy-bear hybrid portrait. The subject sits in the same half-length frontal pose with folded hands, wearing the dark Renaissance dress and soft draped shawl of the original painting, against the classic hazy landscape with winding water, distant mountains, and muted atmospheric perspective. The figure has 2 round fluffy teddy bear ears on top of the head and 2 plush furry paws folded at the bottom, with a warm beige teddy-bear fur chest replacing the visible skin of the neckline and hands. Long dark brown hair falls smoothly over both shoulders. The face area is intentionally left as a flat featureless brown rectangular block, creating an uncanny censored or unfinished effect. Use cracked varnish texture, aged museum-painting patina, smoky sfumato transitions, low-saturation brown and olive tones, soft golden lighting, centered composition, highly detailed fur texture blended into classical portrait brushwork, whimsical yet eerie fine-art parody.
title: Teddy Bear Mona Lisa Hybrid
description: A whimsical surreal fine-art parody that turns the Mona Lisa into a teddy-bear hybrid portrait, useful for meme-like art, concept exploration, or playful classical remix imagery.

content: Create a raw, high-contrast punk rock gig poster collage for an event called {argument name="event title" default="THE AI WEB DESIGN SPRINT"}. The design should feel like a xeroxed underground flyer pasted on a city wall: rough torn paper edges, photocopy grain, ink smudges, distressed black-and-white textures, hot magenta paint splashes, DIY zine aesthetics, and chaotic layered paper scraps taped and pinned together. Use a vertical poster composition with a black background and a central oversized torn white rectangle set at a slight angle, filled with huge condensed black distressed lettering for the main title. At the very top, add a smaller black torn strip with handwritten brush lettering in neon magenta reading {argument name="top slogan" default="LIVE PUNK!"}. On the left side, place a hot pink torn paper block with hand-drawn black text listing the date {argument name="event dates" default="April 27-30"}, then smaller stacked lines reading "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", "$10 ADV", and "$12 DOS". On the right side, add an off-white torn note with magenta "WITH:" at the top and four supporting acts listed in black handwritten text: "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", and "Surfers (Late Set)". In the center-lower area, show exactly 2 black-and-white photocopied punk band members from the chest up, standing shoulder to shoulder, both wearing leather jackets with patches and pins; the left one has round glasses, the right one wears a baseball cap. Their faces should be generic and partially obscured by the collage styling so the poster focus remains typographic and graphic rather than portrait-specific. Add a hot pink spiky starburst on the mid-right containing a black circle with a simple white radial symbol. Near the bottom right, place a beige masking-tape-like paper scrap with bold handwritten black text reading "Build Fast. Break Rules. Share Loud.". Near the bottom left, add a black rectangular venue block with magenta hand lettering for {argument name="venue name" default="THE SOUTH SIDE DIY"} and smaller white address text "218 W. 31st Street" and "Chicago, IL", plus a small white skull icon nearby. Include exactly 2 silver safety pins, one near the upper left corner and one near the lower left area, and exactly 1 strip of dark duct tape on the left edge of the main title paper. Finish the bottom edge with a black-and-white checkerboard strip spanning the full width. Overall mood: rebellious, loud, youthful, anarchic, street-pasted punk flyer meets tech event promo, with intense contrast, gritty halftone noise, screen-print imperfections, and hand-made collage energy.
title: Punk AI Sprint Flyer
description: A gritty punk-collage event poster prompt for creating rebellious promotional artwork for tech sprints, hack nights, or underground creative events.

content: Create a bold Swiss-modernist event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background, stark black typography, and vivid red accent blocks. The composition is asymmetrical and editorial, with a strong grid and generous negative space. In the top left, place a small red uppercase line of text reading {argument name="date text" default="LIVE APRIL 27–30"}, followed by a thin horizontal black rule stretching toward the right. Below it, set an oversized stacked headline in ultra-bold black sans serif, left aligned, reading {argument name="headline text" default="The AI Web Design Sprint"}, broken across 4 lines with dramatic scale so the words dominate the left half of the poster. In the upper right quadrant, add 1 large solid red rectangle as a graphic block. Beneath that red block, place a compact black uppercase subhead in 3 lines: {argument name="tagline text" default="4 DAYS. REAL PROJECTS. SHIP TOGETHER."}. In the lower middle, include 2 cropped grayscale portrait photos of men from the chest up, side by side, documentary style, slightly overlapping the typography area; the left man has dark slicked-back hair and a short beard, the right man wears a dark baseball cap with embroidered lettering and has facial hair. Obscure both faces with 2 vertical soft-edged gray censor rectangles centered over each face. Along the right side, create a vertical feature column with 4 black square icons, each separated by thin horizontal divider lines and paired with uppercase labels. The 4 items are: a starburst icon with the label "CREATIVE COLLISION", a connected-nodes icon with the label "AI-POWERED WORKFLOWS", a code brackets icon with the label "CODE IN MOTION", and a terminal prompt icon with the label "REAL-TIME DESIGN". Near the bottom, add a full-width footer separated by a thin horizontal black rule. Inside the footer, create 4 text blocks divided by slim vertical lines: block 1 says "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD.", block 2 lists "MINIMAL PLAYGROUND & AGENCY 976" with a small red line beneath reading "LIVE ON THE WEB", block 3 lists "CYBERPUNK CAFE SURFERS (LATE SET)" and below it "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE" and then "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY", block 4 lists ticket info as "TICKETS $10 ADV $12 DOS". On the far lower right edge, add vertical red text reading {argument name="location text" default="CHICAGO, IL"}. Use a clean neo-grotesk typeface similar to Helvetica or Akzidenz-Grotesk, heavy weight for the headline, condensed uppercase for supporting text, crisp alignment, subtle paper texture, and a high-contrast black-red-cream palette. The overall look should feel like a contemporary design-conference poster mixed with punk tech culture and brutalist editorial branding.
title: Swiss Poster for AI Web Design Sprint
description: A bold editorial event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, ideal for conference promotion, creative tech events, and social media announcements.

content: A stylized cinematic poster for a creative coding event, designed like a Disney-Pixar-inspired animated movie one-sheet. Vertical composition, warm cozy interior at night with a large loft window on the left showing a city skyline at sunset, exposed brick walls, and a neon-lit creative studio atmosphere. At the top center, big glossy dimensional typography reads "Disney•PIXAR" above the main title "The AI Web Design Sprint" in huge bold white 3D letters. Directly underneath, smaller bright text reads "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." In the center foreground, 2 adult men sit side by side at a wooden table with a laptop between them, casual startup-founder vibe, one in a dark hoodie and one in a light sweatshirt and baseball cap, both facing camera in a friendly promotional pose. Their faces should be generic and unobtrusive, with the emphasis on the event-poster composition rather than portrait realism. The laptop lid has 3 visible stickers: a purple code-brackets sticker, a black sticker with a white burst symbol, and a rectangular slogan sticker reading "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." Around the scene, include 4 whimsical animated mascot elements: a small hovering robot drone lamp in the upper left with glowing blue eyes and a cone of warm light shining downward; a smiling cartoon sun icon in the upper right; a tiny red pixel character floating nearby; and a glowing blue cat-like digital mascot standing on the table in front of the laptop. On the right side, a vertical monitor displays a dark coding interface with readable text including "// Welcome back, Julian!", "Opus 4.6", "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", "Surfers (late set)", and a checklist titled "Sprint Plan" with 4 items: "DISCOVER", "IDEATE", "BUILD", "SHIP". On the left side, a hand-lettered paper signboard contains 4 notices pinned together: "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", and "$10 ADV / $12 DOS". In the lower left foreground, a white coffee mug reads "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY 218 W. 31ST ST. CHICAGO, IL" with a small skull icon. In the lower right foreground, a terracotta plant pot with green leaves reads "CREATIVE COLLISION". At the bottom center, large bold text reads "APRIL 27–30" and below it "LIVE. ONLY ON THE WEB." Add a tiny line of faux credits along the bottom edge in classic movie-poster style, referencing names like Julian Lopez and Harvey Specter, projects such as Minimal Playground, Agency 976, Cyberpunk Cafe, and Surfers, and a playful production credit. Use dramatic warm-orange and cool-blue lighting, polished animated-film rendering, soft depth of field, glossy surfaces, rich contrast, highly detailed poster design, charming tech startup energy, and a premium event-advertisement finish.
title: Pixar-Style AI Web Design Sprint Poster
description: A cinematic animated-style event poster for a web design sprint, ideal for promoting hackathons, creative coding meetups, or startup workshops.

content: A highly embellished full-body anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="SOPHIE"}, a young elegant female alchemist-mage standing in the center of a vast celestial library laboratory. She has {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair in a soft short bob with a side ponytail and a large crystalline flower hair ornament, though her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block. She wears an ornate white and icy-blue dress with silver filigree, corset lacing, layered ruffles, translucent trailing panels, detached flowing sleeves, gemstone pendants, thigh garter ornaments, and white high-heeled ankle boots with metallic trims. Two glowing blue potion bottles hang at her hip. Her pose is graceful and confident: one hand raised with a floating faceted blue crystal hovering above her palm, the other holding an open magic book that projects transparent holographic pages and arcane interface diagrams in neon blue. The environment is a grand circular observatory-like library with towering bookshelves, alchemical instruments, astrolabes, hanging ornaments, glassware, candles, and luminous magical symbols. A huge backlit arched window behind her casts cool heavenly light. The floor beneath her is covered in glowing concentric magic circles and reflections, surrounded by crystalline blue flowers and sparkling particles. The composition is vertical, centered, and extremely polished, with dense decorative detail, ethereal lighting, layered translucency, shimmering highlights, and a palette dominated by white, silver, sapphire, and pale violet. Include large decorative title text on the left reading {argument name="title text" default="SOPHIE"}, smaller Japanese text beneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="ソフィー"}, a small "CV:" line below, a short block of tiny English flavor text on the lower left, and a luminous blue hologram panel on the right with the word {argument name="panel text" default="SOPHIC"}. Make it feel like a luxurious character key visual or promotional poster for a magical science heroine, ultra-detailed, glossy, radiant, and intentionally over-the-top.
title: Overdecorated Sophie Magic Poster
description: A lavish anime-style character poster of a white-and-blue alchemist heroine in a glowing arcane library, suited for fantasy game or light novel promotional art.

content: A dramatic fast-food poster advertisement for Burger King, vertical composition, photorealistic studio food photography mixed with bold Korean promotional graphic design. Place the official Burger King logo centered at the very top. Below it, add huge distressed block Korean headline text in a stacked layout reading "신제품 와퍼 출시!" with "와퍼" in vivid deep red and the other words in textured off-white, all on a dark smoky black background. In the center, show one massive hero burger shot from a slightly low front angle, perfectly centered and filling most of the frame. The burger has 8 clearly visible layers and elements: a glossy sesame seed top bun, curly green leaf lettuce, thick red tomato slices, thick white onion rings, sliced pickles, streaks of ketchup, melted American cheese, a flame-grilled beef patty with heavy char marks, and a soft bottom bun. Add a tiny golden crown icon floating just above the top bun. The burger sits on a dark rustic wooden stump pedestal. Surround the lower half and side edges with dramatic orange flames, glowing embers, heat sparks, and smoky atmosphere to emphasize flame grilling. Near the bottom, place a secondary Korean slogan in bold text, centered, reading "불맛의 정점을 경험하라" with "불맛" in red and the remaining words in warm beige-gold, separated above by a small flame icon. At the very bottom, add a red badge-shaped label with a dark border containing the Korean text "한정 판매" in bold black. Use a high-contrast black, red, orange, and toasted brown color palette, intense cinematic lighting, glossy food highlights, crisp ingredient texture, premium commercial advertising finish, and a fiery indulgent mood.
title: Fiery Burger King Whopper Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic Korean Burger King burger advertisement poster suited for fast-food marketing, social media promo art, or a realistic product campaign visual.

content: A polished Japanese animated film poster in a soft, luminous springtime anime style. The main scene shows 2 teenage schoolgirls walking hand in hand down a quiet residential street lined with blooming cherry blossom trees. They wear matching Japanese sailor school uniforms: white long-sleeve blouses with navy sailor collars, pale blue neckerchiefs, and dark navy pleated skirts, each carrying a navy school bag. The girl on the left has dark hair tied in a low side bun with loose strands and a small pink cherry blossom hairpin; she turns toward the other girl with a tender, slightly wistful expression. The girl on the right has long straight dark hair and looks back at her softly. Pink sakura petals drift through warm late-afternoon backlight, creating a romantic, emotional atmosphere with glowing rim light, gentle lens bloom, and painterly detail. Along the left edge, add a vertical collage of 7 inset memory scenes from the story: 1) two children together in a nostalgic childhood moment, 2) a close portrait of the long-haired girl, 3) the two characters standing apart in a tense or reflective moment, 4) an indoor conversation scene with 3 people, 5) a close profile of the bun-haired girl, 6) an intimate almost-kiss close-up of the two leads, 7) a rear view of the two girls walking together beneath cherry blossoms. At the top, include the Japanese tagline: 「変わってしまった朝、変わらなかった想い。」 Across the lower center, place the large glowing handwritten title {argument name="title text" default="Story of U"} in elegant pink neon script. Beneath it, add small Japanese subtitle text and a release line reading {argument name="release text" default="2027年春公開"}. At the very bottom, add dense small white Japanese credits in authentic movie-poster layout. Overall mood: bittersweet yuri coming-of-age drama, cinematic key visual, emotionally resonant, highly detailed, pastel pink and navy palette, vertical poster composition.
title: Anime Sakura Movie Poster
description: A cinematic Japanese anime poster for a bittersweet girls' coming-of-age romance, ideal for film key visuals, teaser art, or dramatic promotional posters.

content: Create a dramatic Chinese social-media poster in a warm amber office setting, featuring a stylish demon-themed female assistant character seated at a desk. The composition is a single vertical poster with dense graphic design, cinematic lighting, and a premium glossy illustration style mixing anime realism and commercial advertising. At the top, place a huge bold red Chinese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="龙虾夏夏"}, with an elegant handwritten script overlay reading {argument name="signature text" default="Xia Xia"}. Under it, add a strong black Chinese slogan: {argument name="subtitle text" default="嘴欠，但能交付"}. The character is centered, upper body visible behind a desk, with messy vivid red hair in a loose bun and many flyaway strands, small dark red devil horns, pale skin, black layered clothing, a lanyard ID badge, long red metallic claw gloves, and a tired but dangerous office-worker aura. Her face is intentionally obscured by a square censor block in the center. She props her cheek with one clawed hand and holds a branded black takeaway coffee cup in the other hand. Add subtle lobster-inspired details in the outfit and props, including segmented glossy red shell-like forms behind and around her chair. The desk contains exactly 7 visible items: 1 open laptop with a red lobster logo and the words "XIA XIA", 1 closed dark book stack beneath the laptop, 1 open notebook with handwritten sketches and Chinese notes, 1 black fountain pen, 1 rectangular black desk nameplate with Chinese text, 1 takeaway coffee cup with matching lobster logo, and 1 hanging employee badge card. In the left background, show a computer or presentation screen displaying a Feishu-style document interface with the Chinese title "内容创作流程" and a simple 3-step flowchart labeled exactly "场景", "流程", "资产", plus the sentence "Agent 是放大器，不是方向盘。" Add a sticky note near that screen reading "扣瑞芋". In the upper left, include a yellow annotation box with the Chinese text "黄叔雇来的毒舌但能干的AI实习生" and a playful doodled face beside it. In the right background, pin up 3 office notes: 1 clipboard-style intern profile card titled "实习生档案" with multiple bullet lines of Chinese profile text and a handwritten sign-off, 1 checklist board titled "今日待办" with 5 checkbox items and a red star on the final line, and 1 yellow sticky note reading "老板别演". Make all Chinese typography feel intentionally designed, as if for a meme ad campaign and character branding poster. At the bottom, add a bold centered Chinese footer slogan reading {argument name="footer slogan" default="不演龙虾，我就是龙虾。"}. Use orange sunset backlight, warm shadows, glossy reflections on the claws, a cluttered but stylish startup office atmosphere, black and burnt-orange color grading, and a humorous yet competent "sharp-tongued AI intern" vibe. Include visible branding text "XIA XIA" on the cup and laptop, and make the whole image feel like a high-end character promo poster for an assistant persona used in workplace AI marketing.
title: Demon AI Intern Office Poster
description: This prompt generates a stylized vertical Chinese promo poster of a horned red-haired AI office assistant in a warm startup workspace, ideal for character branding, meme ads, and social-media marketing.

content: Create a minimalist vertical art poster featuring a single man in clean side profile facing left, shown from about mid-thigh upward, wearing a tailored dark suit jacket, crisp white shirt, and a vintage 1940s-style black fedora with a ribbon band. His pose is upright, composed, and confident, evoking a classic noir protagonist. Render the figure in a refined monochrome photographic style with crisp editorial detail, rich tonal contrast, and dramatic Rembrandt-inspired lighting that sculpts the cheek, ear, jawline, hat brim, and shoulder with deep shadow. Place 1 bold perfectly round red disc directly behind the head and upper torso, centered like a halo or rising sun, creating a stark graphic focal point. The background should be a clean off-white or cream paper-textured surface with subtle grain and generous negative space around the subject. The lower half of the figure should dissolve into elongated black ink drips: count 12 distinct major dripping trails of varying thickness, hanging from the jacket hem and lower body, some long and straight, some tapering, with a few small splatters, as if the body is bleeding into the canvas. Keep the color palette strictly limited to black, red, and warm off-white. The overall mood should be moody, contemplative, elegant, slightly ominous, and modernist, like a high-end gallery poster blending film noir portraiture with surreal ink-paint abstraction.
title: Noir Man With Red Sun Poster
description: A minimalist surreal poster of a suited man in side profile dissolving into ink drips before a red circle, ideal for editorial art, gallery-style prints, or cinematic noir branding.

content: A minimalist fine-art poster portrait of a woman in clean side profile facing right, shown from about mid-torso up, with her face partially obscured by a soft rectangular blur over the front of the head. She has dark black hair styled in a low loose bun with gentle volume and wispy strands, and wears 1 dangling silver earring on the visible ear. Dress her in a structured black blazer or tailored coat with a deep neckline. The lower half of the figure dissolves into elongated dripping black ink trails, with many uneven vertical streaks extending downward like wet paint pulled by gravity, creating a dramatic melting silhouette. Place 1 large, perfectly round vivid red disc directly behind her head and upper shoulders, centered like a halo or rising sun. Use a strictly limited palette of black, red, and warm off-white. Set the background to a soft cream paper or canvas texture with subtle grain. Light the subject like a high-end noir editorial portrait with strong contrast, sculpted highlights on the ear, jaw, neck, and cheek contour, and deep shadow across the clothing. Keep the composition tall and centered with generous negative space, elegant poster-like balance, moody contemplative atmosphere, and crisp, refined photographic detail blended with painterly graphic design.
title: Noir Woman With Red Halo Poster
description: This prompt generates a minimalist noir-inspired art poster of a woman in profile with dripping ink clothing and a bold red circle, ideal for editorial-style wall art or dramatic cover imagery.

content:
Create a bold, high-end commercial poster for a premium {argument name="product" default="orange juice"} brand, shot in a hyper-realistic studio environment with a strong emphasis on freshness, precision, and striking visual appeal.
Hero Composition:
A sleek transparent bottle filled with rich, vibrant {argument name="liquid" default="orange juice"} stands at the center. The label is minimal, modern, and premium, featuring a clean orange graphic with refined typography. The bottle is topped with a matte black cap, enhanced by subtle highlights and realistic reflections.
Action & Story:
Two hands wearing matte black gloves interact with the product:
One hand firmly grips the bottle from the top
The other slices through a thick, juicy orange using a sharp stainless steel knife
The cut is captured mid-action, showcasing the juicy pulp and fresh citrus texture. A few orange slices are placed at the base, slightly scattered to create a natural yet styled composition.
Lighting & Mood:
Background: deep, rich green gradient with cinematic falloff
Surface: dark matte table with soft, controlled reflections
Lighting: dramatic studio setup
Strong key light from one side for depth
Soft fill light for balance
Crisp highlights on the bottle and knife
Deep, clean shadows for contrast
Typography Layout:

Top corner:
Clean, modern brand name (e.g., “VITRA”, “FRESCO”, or “NATURO”) in white
Bottom section:
Small line: “Not your average juice”

Large bold headline: “{argument name="headline" default="PURE ORANGE. NO COMPROMISE."}”
Typography should feel modern, bold, and premium with a strong visual hierarchy. Use a rich orange tone for the headline to complement the juice.

Visual Style:

High-end food advertising aesthetic

Cinematic, bold, and contrast-driven

Ultra-sharp details and textures

Premium editorial look (like a global campaign)

Clean yet powerful composition

Output Requirements:

4K resolution

Photorealistic, advertisement-grade quality

Sharp focus, rich contrast, high dynamic range
title: Premium Beverage Commercial Poster
description: A detailed professional prompt for a high-end orange juice advertisement featuring hyper-realistic textures, studio lighting, and minimal typography.

content: A dark ultra-detailed anime cyber-gothic portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="female elf warrior"} in a three-quarter side profile, framed from upper thighs to head, standing in a ruined futuristic industrial city. She has a short blunt bob in {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"}, pale skin, long sharp elf ears, and a calm cold expression with one visible glowing {argument name="eye color" default="crimson red"} eye. Her hair is windswept across her face, and she wears a black star-shaped metallic hair ornament near one temple. Outfit is a sleek black biomechanical armored dress with glossy obsidian surfaces, spiked and layered plates, torn lace-like textures around the shoulders and chest, and intricate demonic exoskeleton detailing. One arm is heavily armored into a massive organic-mechanical gauntlet. She holds or merges with an enormous jagged living sword crossing diagonally from the lower left foreground toward her torso; the blade is black metal with glowing veins, embedded red cores, and violent molten energy bursting through it like liquid fire. Red energy ribbons, sparks, smoke, and ember-like particles swirl around her body and weapon. The background is a vertical dystopian megastructure filled with black steel towers, cables, hanging chains, fragments of red holographic code, occult-tech insignias, and faint industrial symbols, all mostly swallowed by shadow. Use a black and deep crimson palette with extreme contrast, glossy highlights, sharp rim light, dramatic backglow behind the head, dense detail, chaotic painterly effects, and a grim apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should feel like premium dark fantasy key art, highly polished, cinematic, intimidating, elegant, and explosive.
title: Dark Cyber Elf With Crimson Blade

content: A polished anime-style international film poster with a cinematic, slightly painterly look and soft natural lighting. Center the composition on a young woman shown from mid-thigh up, standing in a relaxed pose with one hand in the pocket of an oversized navy zip hoodie. The hoodie has two yellow athletic stripes running down each sleeve, a loose hood, and a partially open zipper over a fitted white tank top with thin black straps visible underneath. She wears a black choker and a single dark dangling earring. Her hair is a short platinum-silver bob with long side-swept bangs and a smooth, airy texture. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. Keep the overall styling elegant and restrained rather than overly detailed, with a more natural, believable finish than flashy hyper-rendered anime art. Build the background as a travel-movie collage made of diagonal panel slices: one panel shows a coastal Mediterranean-style town on cliffs beside calm blue water with distant birds; one panel shows a rural railway line with a train on the left and utility poles along the tracks; one panel shows snow-covered mountains and a winding road in a quiet valley; one panel shows a dusky city skyline with glowing lights; and one panel shows a seaside road curving along the coast at sunset. Use a soft cream, blue, and slate palette with a nostalgic spring-travel mood. Add elegant festival-award laurels on the upper left, exactly 3 stacked laurels with Spanish text indicating major animation festival awards. Add large centered title typography near the bottom reading {argument name="headline text" default="VIAJES DE PRIMAVERA"}, with a refined serif font in pale ivory. Beneath it, add a smaller italic tagline in Spanish reading {argument name="tagline" default="Cada destino cambia su corazón."}. Add a release line below that reading {argument name="release text" default="PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES"}. Include tiny production-credit text and a small studio logo at the very bottom. The image should feel like an arthouse animated movie poster advertising a spring journey drama, with balanced negative space, premium layout design, and realistic printed-poster typography.

In the distance and lower left, layered mountains and a winding illuminated valley road. On the right, a cliffside coast at sunset with the sea reflecting warm light, a crescent moon in the sky, several flying seabirds, and a curving highway descending along the hillside. Also on the right, include a wooden signpost with exactly 3 directional signs labeled "NUEVOS CAMINOS", "VIEJOS RECUERDOS", and "SIN LÍMITES". At the top center, add the Spanish tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="CADA DESTINO CAMBIA SU HISTORIA"} in elegant serif capitals. Place the film title large across the lower center in luminous ornate serif lettering with a magical glow and sweeping flourishes, layered partly over the character. Rich blue, violet, and warm sunset orange palette, glossy poster lighting, romantic adventure mood, balanced composition, highly polished theatrical key art, vertical one-sheet film poster.

content: Create a dramatic Japanese anime-style promotional thumbnail poster for an event, vertical 4:5 composition, ultra-detailed, cinematic, neon-lit, high contrast, designed like a social media announcement image. The main subject is a beautiful anime girl centered slightly right, shown from the waist up, with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="deep blue"} hair blowing in the wind, decorated with small star hairpins, wearing a dark hoodie and large studio headphones around her neck, against a glowing sunset-to-night city skyline filled with sparkling lights, music-energy particles, lens flares, and flying glowing petals. Her face area is obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. Use a vivid palette of electric blue, violet, magenta, gold, and sunset orange. Fill the design with layered Japanese typography that is crisp, readable, and integrated into the art like a polished event advertisement. Include exactly 8 major text groups: top left copy reading 「始まるのは、キミと創る 音楽の物語。」 with a smaller subcopy beneath reading 「AIを使って、みんなで音楽をつくる特別な3日間。」; top right a glowing marquee sign reading 「GW連休!」 and a smaller neon box below reading 「みんなで最高の音楽をつくろう!」; center main title with small English text 「AI MUSIC BOOTCAMP 2」 above huge Japanese title text 「AI音楽 ブートキャンプ 2」; a gigantic gold metallic announcement across the middle reading 「開催決定!」; a date bar reading 「開催期間」 followed by 「5.2 SAT 土」 and 「5.4 MON 月」; a hashtag callout near the bottom reading 「参加はカンタン!! #AI音楽ブートキャンプ2 をつけて投稿するだけ!」; a lower encouragement line reading 「初心者も大歓迎! みんなで最高の音楽体験を!」; and 3 bottom feature captions with icons reading 「一緒に学ぶ 仲間とつながる」, 「AIで創る 新しい音楽体験」, and 「想いをカタチに 自分だけの1曲を」. On the left edge, add a vertical filmstrip with exactly 4 inset panels showing the same girl in music-related scenes: 1) performing on a stage before a crowd, 2) working at a music production desk with screens and equipment, 3) singing into a microphone, 4) playing an acoustic guitar. Add exactly 2 neon music-themed icon illustrations in the lower area: a tilted smartphone with a music note on the lower left and a glowing microphone with musical notes on the lower right. Make the text effects glossy, luminous, and embossed with gold and white highlights, with energetic streaks and spark explosions around the headline. The overall feeling should be inspiring, celebratory, futuristic, and emotionally uplifting, like a high-impact Japanese Golden Week music bootcamp ad for {argument name="event name" default="AI音楽ブートキャンプ 2"}.

content: Please create a high-completion, high-narrative tension 「Shadow Ensemble Cover」 suitable for serialized release based on the [Subject: {argument name="character name" default="Write character names"}]. This is not an ordinary character illustration, nor a simple combat poster, but an "ensemble action cover" with the feel of a novel cover, manga visual, game promotion, and dark fantasy illustration. The image needs to be composed of a huge spiritual core figure, multiple mid-ground action characters, background threat elements, local energy light effects, and a blank title area to form a complete character faction and worldview cover. [Basic Settings] Theme: {argument name="scene theme" default="Jujutsu battle / Dark Journey to the West / Cyber Hunter / Monster Hunting Team / Doomsday Survivor / Magic Academy Battle Group"} Work Name: [Work Name] Series Name / Brand Name: [Brand Name or Series Name] Subtitle: [Subtitle] Style Direction: {argument name="style" default="Dark fantasy, retro manga cover, hand-painted impasto, fantasy novel cover, game visual"} Main Tone: Dark green-black-gray / Deep blue neon / Dark brown-gold-red / Sand yellow-iron rust / Deep purple-gold Accent Color: Blood red energy, turquoise spell light, golden divine light, blue lightning Frame Ratio: 2:3 vertical / 3:4 vertical / 4:5 vertical / 9:16 vertical [Screen Structure] Use a vertical cover composition. There must be a huge visual figure as the spiritual core and atmosphere-dominating element. This person can be a profile, half-body, back, front stare, or huge silhouette, occupying the right, top, or main background area, with a calm, mysterious, and oppressive expression, not necessarily participating in the battle, but must govern the temperament of the whole picture. Arrange 3 to 6 action characters in the middle ground to form a combat faction ensemble. There should be clear division of labor and posture differences between characters, such as charging, holding a knife, casting spells, defense, summoning, jumping, alerting, long-range attack, etc. Avoid characters standing still; a strong rhythmic action and visual movement must be formed. Add enemy threats or worldview elements in the background, such as monsters, giants, villain shadows, mechanical legions, demons, ruins, forests, alien spaces, battlefield smoke, or city disasters. Background threats should not overshadow the main subject but wrap around characters like shadows to enhance the sense of crisis and narrative depth. Set 1 to 2 high-saturation energy hotspots, such as red flame fists, blue lightning, green cursed aura, purple magic, golden divine light, or white sword light. The energy effect should be concentrated on key characters or weapons, forming a visual focus, not uniformly lit across the screen. [Composition] The overall structure is "large spiritual core character + mid-ground action ensemble + background threat shadow + bottom or side blank title area". The image can use diagonal lines to organize characters, letting the ensemble rush from top-left to bottom-right or from bottom to center, forming a strong forward push. Retain a clear blank title area, suggested at the bottom-left, bottom, or side. Use off-white, gray-white, light paper color, or low-saturation background colors for the blank area to place the [Brand Name / Work Name / Subtitle]. The title typography should have a publication cover feel, using elegant serif fonts, retro title letters, manga cover titles, or high-end magazine-style layout. The text area must be clear and not completely blocked by characters and background. Do not make the edges a complete rectangle; use irregular brush edges, ink diffusion, torn paper style, or natural dissipation to let characters and background grow out of the paper, enhancing the hand-drawn cover feel and artistic quality. [Visual Style] The overall style should be a combination of hand-painted impasto and manga cover, with paper texture, brushstrokes, dark layers, and a retro publication temperament. Lighting is mainly low-key dark light with a darkened background, clear character silhouettes, and high-contrast focal points provided by local energy light. The image should not be excessively clean; it should retain hand-painted textures, paper grain, edge strokes, and dark mist. Use low-saturation dark tones mainly, supplemented by a small amount of high-saturation energy colors. The overall atmosphere should have a sense of pressure, mystery, combat, and worldview thickness. [Visual Goal] The final image should look like a mature fantasy novel cover, manga special cover, game character faction visual, or IP promo poster. It needs to possess: 1. A clear main visual character; 2. An ensemble with rhythmic movement; 3. Clear enemy threats or worldview background; 4. Strong but restrained energy effects; 5. A readable title text area; 6. An overall texture of a retro hand-drawn cover. Ensure the image is informative but not cluttered, with clear character levels and visual gravity, suitable for continuing to generate the same series with different themes.
