description: A professional and highly detailed template for creating cinematic posters with narrative depth and complex character arrangements.

content: A striking artistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="charismatic woman"} (image attached) that precisely captures her face, seated in a serene yet powerful pose. She sits cross-legged on a minimalist floor with decorative tiles, wearing a modern {argument name="top" default="blue sweatshirt"} with a minimalist print, {argument name="bottom" default="loose-fitting jeans"}, and black Converse sneakers. Her expression is serene and subtly confident, with a gentle smile and relaxed eyes as she gazes slightly toward a diffused light source. Behind her rises a monumental abstract mural of her own face, painted with bold and expressive brushstrokes in charcoal gray, white, gold, and muted red. The mural is not a literal copy, but a stylized and emotive interpretation of her: intense eyes, fragmented textures, broad brushstrokes that suggest movement, ambition, and inner complexity. Its scale dominates the background without overshadowing the main figure, creating a harmonious balance between reality and artistic representation. The lighting is cinematic and evocative, with soft reflections at the edges and a subtle overhead glow that defines her silhouette. Fine particles, like dust, float subtly in the air, catching flashes of light and enhancing the atmosphere. The setting evokes the fusion of a modern art studio with a dreamlike exhibition space: clean, spacious, minimalist, yet charged with emotion. Photographed with ultra-realistic quality, using a 50mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp details, and elegant color gradation, the scene conveys creativity, introspection, and personal transformation. Negative: blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, merged faces, unrealistic colors, watermark, text. ar. 9 :16

content: A photorealistic premium magazine cover in the style of an international design and business publication, shot as a sophisticated editorial still life. The cover features a dark, moody interior with shallow depth of field and warm ambient lighting. Center-right, standing upright on a glossy black marble table, is a cream-colored paperback book titled {argument name="book title" default="The Pathless Path"} by {argument name="author name" default="Paul Millerd"}. The book is angled slightly to the left so both the front cover and spine are visible. The cover illustration is minimalist navy-blue line art showing an office interior with an open door leading into a winding outdoor path, framed pictures on the wall, a water cooler, a desk with stacked papers, and a person slumped in an office chair. The author’s name appears near the lower left of the front cover, and the title also runs vertically on the spine. To the left of the book on the marble surface is a small stack of 4 books, softly out of focus, and in the lower-left foreground sits 1 dark coffee cup on a saucer. Behind them is a dim, elegant room with blurred shelving and a soft green plant shape in the background. The magazine masthead dominates the top: {argument name="magazine title" default="MONOCLE"} in very large white serif letters across the width, with small white issue text at top left reading {argument name="issue text" default="MAY 2024 • ISSUE 167"} and small white tagline text at top right reading “THE ENTREPRENEURS’ MAGAZINE”. Beneath the masthead is a thin rule and a category line in small gold serif text with 6 categories separated by dots: “AFFAIRS • BUSINESS • CULTURE • DESIGN • ENTERTAINING • FASHION”. On the left side, large white serif cover headline text reads “Rethinking Success”. Below it is a white serif subheadline about leaving the default path behind and building a life and work that matters, followed by a small gold page number. Further down the left column are 4 editorial teaser blocks, each with a gold circular icon and gold uppercase heading, white descriptive text, and a gold page number. The 4 headings are “ESCAPE THE DEFAULT”, “WORK WITH PURPOSE”, “A NEW STORY”, and a boxed teaser “DESIGN SPECIAL”. At the bottom right is a realistic barcode block with small pricing text above it and a small issue number beside it. The overall layout should feel like a real luxury magazine cover mockup: crisp typography, elegant serif fonts, black, white, cream, and gold palette, glossy reflections on the marble, cinematic shadows, subtle product reflection beneath the book, and high-end editorial photography styling.

content: Create a colorful humorous comic-style poster in Spanish, vertical format, with a retro cartoon look, thick black outlines, warm orange and yellow palette, halftone texture, and exaggerated expressive characters. The layout has 4 distinct panels: 1 large title panel across the top and 3 equal vertical panels along the bottom row. In the top panel, show a smug orange tabby cat handyman standing upright like a person in a cozy living room workshop, holding a screwdriver in one paw and the other paw on the hip, wearing a utility belt with visible tools. The cat has narrowed confident eyes and a sly grin. On the left side of this top panel, place a large jagged comic burst with the Spanish headline in bold distressed lettering: "3 PASOS PARA ARRUINAR ALGO FÁCIL", with "ARRUINAR" in red and the rest in black. Below it, add a taped paper strip that says "edición casera". In the background of the top panel, include a framed sign on the wall that reads "YO PUEDO SOLO" with a small paw print, a small potted plant, shelves, and dynamic radial lines behind the cat. In the bottom row, create 3 labeled step panels, each with a yellow header box and bold black text. Panel 1 header: "PASO 1". Show the same orange cat sitting calmly on the floor beside a standing lamp, eyes closed with overconfidence, casually holding a screwdriver. Add a speech bubble that says "Tranqui, esto lo arreglo en 2 minutos." Include a small open toolbox and a few screws on the floor. Panel 2 header: "PASO 2". Show the cat mid-repair, now alarmed with wide eyes, awkwardly unscrewing the wrong part of the lamp while pieces and screws fly through the air. Add a speech bubble that says "Ups..." and a sticky note near the bottom that says "tocar lo que no era". Include visual motion lines, scattered debris, and a toppled plant pot. Panel 3 header: "PASO 3". Show the aftermath: the lamp is broken and smoking with exposed wires and sparks, the room is messy with shattered parts everywhere, and the cat sits stunned holding the screwdriver. A brown dog stands to the right, looking disappointed, asking in a speech bubble "¿Qué hiciste?" The cat replies in another speech bubble "No sé... se complicó solo." Add a taped label at the bottom that says "resultado final". Make the entire image playful, chaotic, and meme-like, with polished digital illustration, expressive faces, comic lettering, and a DIY disaster tone.
title: Funny DIY Disaster Cat Comic
description: A retro comic poster showing a smug orange cat ruining a simple home repair in three Spanish-labeled steps, ideal for memes, social posts, and humorous DIY content.

content: A bold retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of red, black, and warm cream on a lightly aged paper texture. The composition features a dynamic anime-inspired action scene in the center: a martial artist in a white gi with a black belt carries a long-haired woman over one shoulder in a fireman's carry or wrestling throw pose. The fighter is shown from the knees up in a powerful wide stance, facing left, with the woman draped horizontally across the shoulders, her bare legs lifted and bent, her long dark hair flowing downward, and a black wide-brim cowboy hat still on her head. Render both figures in high-contrast inked line art with thick black shadows and sharp graphic contours, mixing manga character design with vintage screen-printed poster energy. Behind them, fill the background with aggressive geometric rays and wedges: 6 major red and black angular shapes radiating outward across the cream backdrop, creating a sense of impact and motion. In the top right corner, add 1 circular emblem containing a fierce gorilla or ape head icon with red accents. Across the lower third, place large bold condensed block typography integrated into the composition: the smaller line reads “SCOTTISH RECIPE:” and the huge main title reads “MINCE AND TATTIES”. Make the text red on cream and cream on black in layered diagonal banner panels, with the words occupying 3 text groupings total: “SCOTTISH RECIPE:”, “MINCE AND”, and “TATTIES”. Emphasize dramatic diagonal layout, posterized shadows, distressed print texture, and the feeling of a vintage Soviet constructivist or pulp exploitation food poster fused with martial arts manga aesthetics.
title: Retro Mince and Tatties Action Poster
description: This prompt generates a stylized vintage propaganda-like poster mixing manga action art and bold typography, ideal for parody food posters or graphic print designs.

content:
Create a polished Japanese travel agency summer banner ad for Okinawa in a bright, inviting commercial style. Use a wide horizontal layout with a vivid tropical beach scene as the full background: crystal-clear turquoise ocean, white sand shoreline, small green island in the mid distance, deep blue sky with large fluffy white clouds, and palm leaves hanging in from the upper right corner. On the right foreground, place 1 traditional Okinawan shisa lion-dog statue sitting on a stone wall, surrounded by red hibiscus flowers and lush tropical greenery. Near the water, include 1 small glass-bottom sightseeing boat floating close to shore. Add 2 small simple fish doodle icons over the sea.

Make the typography the hero element. Across the left-center to center, place very large Japanese calligraphic headline text reading {argument name="headline text" default="夏の沖縄"}, with a blue gradient and white glow or soft outline, highly legible and elegant. Above it, add a handwritten-style Japanese catchphrase in blue reading {argument name="catchphrase" default="青い海、青い空、心ほどける島時間。"} with a loose underline flourish. Under the main headline, add a smaller Japanese subheading reading {argument name="subheading" default="感動の景色と、あたたかいおもてなしに出会う旅へ。"}.

In the upper left, add a circular summer badge with a sunburst feel, soft cream background, tiny wave lines, a small hibiscus accent, and Japanese text reading "この夏は 沖縄で 最高の思い出を!". Decorate the headline area with 1 pink hibiscus flower on the left and subtle ocean-wave graphic strokes.

Along the lower middle, place 3 rounded white feature cards in a row, partially overlapping the beach scene. Count and depict all 3 cards clearly: the first card shows a sea turtle swimming underwater in a circular photo, with Japanese heading "美しい自然を満喫" and smaller body text about transparent waters and scenic spots; the second card shows a bowl of Okinawa soba in a circular photo, with heading "沖縄グルメを堪能" and smaller body text mentioning 沖縄そば and ゴーヤチャンプルー; the third card shows Shuri Castle in a circular photo, with heading "観光スポットも充実" and smaller body text mentioning 美ら海水族館 and 首里城. Add small coral, shell, hibiscus, and starfish decorations around these cards.

On the right lower-middle, overlap the beach with 1 tilted circular promotional sticker in pale blue and cream, with a small yellow tab on top. The yellow tab says "早めの予約がおトク!" and the main circle says "夏の沖縄ツアー 好評受付中!". Add a white plumeria flower accent near the sticker.

Create a full-width dark blue footer bar across the bottom. On the left side of the footer, place a white travel company logo icon and company name text {argument name="company name" default="〇〇旅行株式会社"}, with a smaller Japanese tagline below. Across the center of the footer, place exactly 3 circular line-icons with short Japanese captions: 1 calendar icon for tour plans, 1 support staff icon for travel assistance, and 1 suitcase icon for comfortable travel help. On the right side of the footer, add a boxed CTA area with Japanese text "詳しくはこちらから" and a mock search field containing {argument name="search text" default="〇〇旅行　沖縄"} plus a search icon. Overall design should feel premium, cheerful, summery, and highly marketable, like a professional Japanese web banner or travel campaign visual.
title: Okinawa Summer Travel Banner
description: A bright Japanese travel-agency promotional banner for Okinawa, suitable for summer tour ads, website hero images, and campaign marketing.

content: A dramatic sports poster featuring a waist-up portrait of a male cricket player in a royal blue Delhi Capitals jersey, facing slightly left in a strong three-quarter pose. His face is obscured by a large soft-edged vertical rectangular blur centered over the face, creating an anonymized reveal effect. Behind his head is a bright glowing white circular halo, centered like a spotlight or moon. The background is dark navy and black with electric blue flame-like textures rising on both sides, overlaid with rough chalk-style scribbles, arrows, circles, and large hand-drawn letters for a gritty urban sports aesthetic. The jersey has red-orange collar and placket accents, a white Puma logo on the right chest and sleeve, a Delhi Capitals crest on the left chest, a red circular Jio patch on the sleeve, a rectangular ALL SEASONS sponsor patch on the chest, and large Hero branding across the torso. Add realistic fabric texture, sweat sheen, grain, dust, scratches, and distressed poster wear. At the bottom, place elegant white handwritten script reading Welcome to Dilli above very large bold cracked white block letters reading {argument name="player name" default="REHAN AHMED"}. Use high contrast lighting, moody shadows, centered composition, and a premium IPL team announcement poster style.
title: Dramatic Cricket Signing Poster
description: A gritty, high-contrast cricket announcement poster used for player reveal or welcome graphics in a professional team branding style.

content:
Create a refined vintage-modern type specimen poster for a fictional typeface named {argument name="typeface name" default="KASEI"}, designed as an elegant fusion of Roman and Japanese typography. Use a tall portrait layout on warm ivory textured paper with thin gray divider lines, black letterforms, and muted vermilion accent text and seals. Center the composition around a large serif Latin wordmark "{argument name="typeface name" default="KASEI"}" above 2 oversized Japanese kanji, "華世", set in a matching high-contrast classical style. Above the title, place the small heading "INTRODUCING" with a tiny ornamental diamond. To the right of the title area, add a vertical Japanese tagline reading "古典の美、未来の書体。". Under the main kanji, add the subtitle "A ROMAN × JAPANESE TYPEFACE" and below it a Japanese line in vermilion: "ローマの精神、日本の美。". On the far left, create a narrow sidebar with the stacked English text "A TYPEFACE HARMONIZING ROME AND JAPAN", a small circular crest, the Japanese text "製作 — MMXXIV", and "CREATED IN KYOTO, JAPAN".

Build the lower two-thirds as a meticulous type specimen sheet with exact labeled sections. In a left column, include 2 sections: "WEIGHTS" with 5 items — Light, Regular, Medium, Semibold, Bold — and "POINT SIZES" with 9 items — 8pt, 10pt, 12pt, 14pt, 18pt, 24pt, 36pt, 48pt, 72pt. In the main area, include a section titled "ROMAN CHARACTERS" showing 4 specimen lines: uppercase alphabet A through Z, lowercase alphabet a through z, numerals 0 through 9, and a punctuation/symbol line with slashes, commas, semicolons, exclamation mark, question marks, apostrophes, quotation marks, em dash, parentheses, brackets, braces, ampersand, at sign, dollar sign, asterisk, dagger, and double dagger. Below that, include a section titled "JAPANESE CHARACTERS" with 4 lines: 19 kanji "日 月 山 川 花 鳥 風 林 火 水 土 金 木 道 心 時 空 光 夢 永", 23 hiragana "あ い う え お か き く け こ さ し す せ そ た ち つ て と な に ぬ ね の", 21 katakana "ア イ ウ エ オ カ キ ク ケ コ サ シ ス セ ソ ン タ チ ツ テ ト ナ ニ ヌ ネ ノ", and a symbols line including Japanese punctuation, corner brackets, wave dash, middle dot, parentheses, angle brackets, double angle brackets, black lenticular brackets, postal mark, reference marks, and iteration mark.

Along the next row, add 4 compact specimen panels: "LIGATURES" with 10 items — Æ, AE, AJ, Œ, KA, KE, KI, KO, KU, and "st ct fi fl ft fb"; "STYLISTIC ALTERNATES" with 12 items — A, A, A, R, R, K, K, a, a, g, g, y, y, J, J, Q, Q, t, t — arranged as a neat sampling grid; "SPACING STUDY" showing the word "KASEI" with wide tracking above the kanji string "華世永美"; and "NUMERAL STYLES" with 4 lines — lining figures 0123456789, oldstyle figures 0123456789, and small caps combinations "H 0123" and "H 0123". Add tiny red Japanese captions beneath some of these sample boxes.

At the bottom, create 3 feature panels. Left panel titled "WORDS" with 3 entries: "HARMONIA" with the red Japanese and English gloss "調和  HARMONY", "VERITAS" with "真実  TRUTH", and "FORTITUDO" with "勇気  COURAGE". Center panel with a large Japanese quote "時を越え、美は残る。" above the English statement "BEAUTY ENDURES\nBEYOND TIME." and a small signature line "— KASEI" in red. Right panel titled "DETAILS" with a large kanji "永" over faint construction circles and guide lines, plus 4 right-aligned Japanese annotation callouts connected by fine dotted leader lines.

Finish with a footer containing 4 blocks: a small crest and "KASEI TYPE FOUNDRY" with "WWW.KASEIFOUNDRY.JP"; a centered language support note "SUPPORTING 200+ LANGUAGES" and "LATIN / GREEK / CYRILLIC / JAPANESE / SYMBOLS"; a right-side statement "DESIGNED WITH RESPECT\nCRAFTED FOR THE FUTURE"; and a square vermilion seal bearing "華世". Overall style should feel like a premium Japanese foundry specimen sheet, balancing editorial Swiss-grid precision, classical book typography, subtle Japanese branding, generous margins, restrained luxury, and museum-poster elegance.
title: Japanese Roman Typeface Specimen Poster
description: A sophisticated editorial poster showcasing a fictional bilingual serif typeface, suitable for font presentation, branding mockups, or typographic art prints.

content: Create a vintage fantasy travel postcard poster for {argument name="location name" default="BEACON HOLLOW"}, designed like a large-letter souvenir postcard from the 1950s–1960s. The composition is a single richly detailed horizontal scene with heavily weathered paper texture, rounded postcard corners, faded inks, creases, scratches, foxing, and worn edges. Across the top and center, huge dimensional block letters spell “BEACON HOLLOW” in classic retro postcard style, with warm cream outlines and red-brown extruded shadows; each letter contains miniature painted scenic vignettes of the destination, including alpine peaks, waterfalls, pine forests, a magical manor, glowing towers, and valley landscapes. In the upper left, hand-painted script text reads “GREETINGS FROM” in dark red. In the upper right, include a circular black postal cancellation stamp reading “BEACON HOLLOW / MAY 18 / 1967 / CREATIVE RETREAT,” overlapping a vintage postage stamp labeled “BEACON HOLLOW” and “CREATIVE RETREAT” with “7c,” depicting a moonlit mountain and a lighthouse-like beacon tower. Beneath the title, place a small curved ribbon banner reading {argument name="tagline" default="a magejosh destination"} with tiny compass-star ornaments. The main background should show a majestic golden-hour mountain valley with a winding river, distant snowy peaks, dense evergreen forests, and on the right a large timber-and-stone fantasy lodge perched on a cliff, warmly lit from within, with stairs descending the slope. Scatter subtle magical blue lights and faint arcane circular glyphs around the lodge and foreground for a worldbuilding-meets-magic atmosphere. In the lower left, place exactly 3 foreground desk objects: a dark ceramic mug with a compass emblem, an open sketchbook spread, and a fountain pen resting diagonally across the pages. The left page of the sketchbook is titled “Campaign Ideas” and lists 3 bullets: “The Forgotten Vale,” “Clockwork Pilgrims,” and “Echoes of the First Light,” with a small castle drawing below; the right page shows a tree illustration and the handwritten text “Beery world Hollow.” Across the lower center, add an old illustrated map spread out on the table, showing mountain icons and hand-drawn cartographic details. In the lower right, place exactly 5 more foreground elements: a closed leather journal embossed with a star compass and the phrase “Ideas Become Legends,” a cluster of 4 polyhedral dice, a rustic wooden signpost with 4 directional slats reading “STORY,” “GAME DESIGN,” “WORLD BUILDING,” and “AI FOR CREATORS,” a glowing glass lamp or tube device, and a nearby floating arcane target-like sigil. Add a pinned handwritten note left of center on aged paper reading, “Wish you were here — building worlds, chasing wonder, and turning ideas into adventures. — {argument name="signature name" default="magejosh"}” in blue cursive. Use painterly illustration with high detail, nostalgic Americana postcard design, fantasy concept art sensibility, warm sunset lighting, muted teal sky, sepia aging, and an inviting creative-retreat mood.
title: Vintage Fantasy Postcard of Beacon Hollow
description: This prompt generates a weathered retro travel-postcard illustration for a fantasy destination, ideal for creative worldbuilding promotions, fictional tourism art, or nostalgic branded concept pieces.

content: A whimsical painterly illustration of a vintage turquoise station wagon driving along a coastal road, shown in clean side profile against a simple blue sky and calm ocean horizon. On the roof, tied down with 4 visible tan ropes, is an absurdly oversized white dog bone, rough-textured and sculptural, longer than the car itself. Inside the car are 4 dogs total: 1 golden-brown dog in the driver’s seat with one paw on the steering wheel, 2 golden-brown dogs sitting in the middle and rear windows looking outward, and 1 white-and-brown dog at the back with its head tilted slightly up. Use thick expressive oil-paint brushstrokes, soft impasto texture, slightly naive folk-art realism, gentle humor, and a minimalist composition with the car centered horizontally. The road is dark in the foreground with a thin sandy strip near the water, and the palette is dominated by sky blue, sea blue, faded turquoise, cream white, and warm brown. Bright daylight, no text, no extra objects, serene but funny road-trip mood.
title: Dogs Carrying Giant Bone by the Sea
description: This prompt generates a humorous painterly coastal scene of four dogs riding in a vintage car with an enormous bone strapped to the roof, ideal for whimsical art prints or social media visuals.

content: A cinematic, gritty heist-team group portrait inspired by a Spanish crime thriller, showing exactly 5 robbers standing shoulder to shoulder in a grand historic bank interior. The scene is framed symmetrically in a low-angle medium full-body shot, with the tallest figure centered in front as the leader and 2 teammates on each side. All 5 wear identical deep red hooded jumpsuits zipped up the front, black straps and backpack harnesses, and their hoods up, creating a menacing anonymous look. The far-left and far-right robbers stand with arms crossed; the second-left and second-right robbers stand with arms relaxed at their sides; the center robber stands squarely facing camera with hands down and a dominant posture. Their faces are intentionally obscured and featureless, hidden in shadow and blur beneath the hoods. The setting is an opulent old bank hall with dark polished wood, brass safety deposit boxes lining both side walls, ornate columns, balcony railings, classical architectural details, and warm globe lamps. A bright golden overhead light pours down from the ceiling behind the group, creating dramatic backlighting, rim light on the red suits, long shadows, and a tense high-contrast atmosphere. Color palette: crimson red, black, dark brown, brass, and warm gold. Style: ultra-realistic cinematic photography, suspenseful crime-drama poster aesthetic, highly detailed fabric texture, moody lighting, symmetrical composition, shallow haze in the background, sharp focus on the team. content: A romantic high-fashion travel campaign image set in a sunlit Spanish coastal village at golden hour, viewed down a narrow cobblestone stair street descending toward the sea. Whitewashed Mediterranean houses line both sides of the alley, with textured stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, black wrought-iron balconies, wall-mounted lanterns, and many potted plants and flowers. On the right side, show 2 wrought-iron balconies, 2 wall lanterns, 1 vivid deep-blue door, and at least 8 terracotta pots with green plants mounted or placed along the facade. On the left edge, frame the scene with bright pink bougainvillea blossoms in the foreground. In the distance, the calm ocean reflects the warm sunset, with a rocky coastline and glowing horizon under a soft peach-and-gold sky. In the lower middle of the street, place 1 couple walking away hand in hand: a woman in a flowing light summer dress and a man in a pale shirt and shorts, small in scale to emphasize the environment. Composition is vertical editorial poster style, luxurious, serene, cinematic, aspirational, with warm golden sunlight casting long shadows and making the white walls glow. Add elegant overlay typography on the upper left in a refined serif font, warm brown color: the large line reads {argument name="headline text" default="España,"}, below it in italic serif reads {argument name="quote" default="siempre en mi corazón."}, with a thin ornamental flourish beneath the text. Include a subtle white {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the upper right corner. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium tourism advertising aesthetic, soft atmospheric haze, natural depth, magazine-cover quality.

content: A stark black-and-white editorial anti-tech poster on an off-white background, designed like a modern brutalist magazine cover about digital addiction. The composition is vertical and highly typographic, with one central surreal image and multiple blocks of small text. At the top center, huge bold condensed sans-serif text reads DOOM on one line and SCROLLING below it, with the word SCROLLING stretched across the page and partially motion-blurred or smeared horizontally. In the upper left corner, a tiny text block reads “SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.” with a short horizontal line above it. In the upper right corner, small text reads “24 / 7 / 365” above “THE FEED NEVER ENDS” with a horizontal divider line below. On the left side under the title, add a definition paragraph in small editorial text: “the act of spending an excessive amount of time scrolling through negative or distressing content online, often leading to feelings of anxiety, helplessness, and fatigue.” Beneath that, include 2 short horizontal divider lines, then a large statistic reading “67%” followed by smaller text: “OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”. Below that, another statement reads “MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.” with a divider line beneath. The center of the poster features a glossy black smartphone standing vertically at the bottom center, seen front-on, with the bottom speaker holes and charging port visible. Emerging from the phone screen is a long impossible staircase receding upward into a narrow tunnel made of repeated translucent vertical panels, creating a claustrophobic corridor. Within the tunnel, a giant grayscale human eye appears in the upper half, partially obscured by haze, vertical slicing, and ghosted repetitions, as if trapped inside the feed. The central image should feel eerie, dreamlike, oppressive, and cinematic, with soft fog, high contrast, photocopy grain, subtle motion smear, and layered transparency. Along the right side of the central image, add a narrow vertical numbered index with exactly 24 visible entries: 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026, and an ellipsis, plus a thin downward arrow underneath. In the right column, add a text block titled “DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.” followed by 4 short lines: “Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.” Below that place a simple eye/globe icon, then a black rectangular box containing the message: “AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.” On the lower left, place a massive cropped black word fragment reading END near the bottom edge, with another stacked statement beside it: “THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.” Add tiny vertical microtext near the left margin for editorial flavor. Across the bottom footer, place 4 icon/text groups: a globe icon, an eye icon, a small warning text block reading “WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”, an expand-corners icon, a barcode, and a final statement on the far right reading “STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.” Use minimalist Swiss-grid alignment, generous negative space, sharp black typography, subtle distressed print texture, and a high-fashion poster aesthetic.
title: Doomscrolling Editorial Poster
description: A monochrome brutalist poster about social media addiction, ideal for awareness campaigns, magazine-style graphics, or conceptual editorial art.

content:
A bold editorial poster in a brutalist Swiss-modern infographic style on a light warm-gray background, portrait orientation, with a split composition: oversized typography dominating the left half and a blurred monochrome human face dominating the right half. The main headline is stacked in huge condensed sans-serif uppercase text reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHORT-FORM ATTENTION TAX"}, with “SHORT-FORM” in black and “ATTENTION TAX” in vivid red-orange. Along the far left margin place a small vertical year mark reading “-2024”. At the top left add tiny uppercase text “YOUR ATTENTION. THEIR ECONOMY.” and at the top right add tiny uppercase text “TIME IS LIMITED. ATTENTION ISN’T.” with small plus-sign registration marks near the corners. Beneath the headline on the left, add the subheading “A hidden cost extracted every time you scroll.”

Create 3 numbered information blocks stacked down the lower left side, each marked by a vertical red-orange bar and large black numerals: section 01 titled “WHAT IS IT?”, section 02 titled “WHY DOES IT EXIST?”, and section 03 titled “HOW IT AFFECTS BEHAVIOR”. Under section 01, include body text explaining that the Short-Form Attention Tax is the invisible price paid for consuming endless short-form content and that it is measured in seconds, minutes, and mental energy extracted by platforms designed to keep you scrolling. Under section 02, include body text explaining that platforms compete for attention because attention, data, and profit are linked, and that short-form content is optimized to be instantly rewarding, infinitely scrollable, and hard to stop. Under section 03, include exactly 6 bullet points in red-orange dash style: “Shortens attention span”, “Reduces deep focus”, “Increases impulsive behavior”, “Disrupts memory & learning”, “Drives comparison & anxiety”, and “Creates compulsive usage loops”, followed by a short concluding sentence about reshaping how you think, feel, and act.

In the center-left and lower-middle areas, add supporting editorial typography in mixed sizes: “Attention is the most valuable currency of the 21st century.” with the word “currency” in red-orange; a small stat block saying “THE AVERAGE PERSON SPENDS 90+ MINUTES DAILY ON SHORT-FORM VIDEO APPS.” with “90+ MINUTES” in red-orange; a giant stacked numeric statement reading “16 DAYS” in black with the surrounding text “THAT’S OVER” above and “A YEAR.” below; and a small closing line “TAX AVOIDANCE STARTS WITH AWARENESS.”

On the right half, show a close-up portrait of a human face in black and white, partially cropped, looking forward, with a serious neutral expression. Apply heavy horizontal motion blur, digital smear, scanline-like streaks, and glitch bars crossing the face, especially across the forehead, nose, and mouth. Overlay exactly 5 vertical social-media style interface icons near the center-right of the face: a white circle/profile dot, a red-orange heart, a white speech bubble, a white bookmark ribbon, and a white share arrow. Add a large translucent red-orange circle covering the lower-right part of the face. Include subtle HUD-like graphic elements: a faint circular reticle with a small red-orange triangular wedge near the upper right, a thin vertical measurement scale near the far right edge, a few white square markers, small black and white horizontal bars, and scattered tiny plus signs for layout texture.

At the bottom, place a barcode on the left with tiny coordinate-like text above it, then 3 footer callouts spaced across the width: “PROTECT YOUR ATTENTION. PROTECT YOUR LIFE.”, “BE MINDFUL. BE INTENTIONAL. BE FREE.”, and “RECLAIM FOCUS. RECLAIM TIME. RECLAIM YOU.” Use a restrained palette of black, off-white, and red-orange only. The overall look should feel like a high-end social critique poster, mixing typographic activism, data editorial design, and dystopian tech-noise portraiture, with crisp layout, strong negative space, and print-poster realism.
title: Short-Form Attention Tax Poster
description: A high-contrast editorial infographic poster about the hidden cognitive cost of short-form media, suitable for awareness campaigns, social commentary, or magazine-style design.

STILL INSPIRING. content: A dreamy pastel anime movie-poster illustration set in a narrow outdoor alley completely covered in dense floral mosaic wall art, rendered with glittering sparkles, soft haze, and romantic shoujo color grading in lavender, pink, periwinkle, and cream. In the foreground, show a cute teenage girl from a rear three-quarter view, her face mostly hidden, with short silvery-lavender bob hair and a large mauve bow hair accessory decorated with tiny flowers. She wears an oversized translucent lavender hoodie with embroidered floral appliqués on the sleeves, a layered pastel skirt, and carries a shiny lilac backpack covered with charms, ribbons, plush pom-poms, pins, and star details. She is holding a plate with a blueberry pound cake loaf that has been sliced open, and the center is dramatically overflowing with glossy dark-purple blueberry filling that pours out in thick syrupy streams down the cake and plate. Scatter whole blueberries around the cake and lower foreground. Make the scene whimsical, delicate, and slightly comedic despite the beautiful presentation. Design the image as a Japanese film poster with many decorative text overlays and laurels. Across the top, include 3 small award lines with laurel wreaths. Add a huge hand-lettered Japanese title in layered pink, white, and purple lettering with glow and sticker-like outlines reading: 「冷凍したブルーベリー使ってパウンドケーキ焼いたら中身溢れて失敗した件。」 Below it, add a smaller subtitle line: 「〜甘くて、ちょっぴり切ない青春のレシピ〜」. On the right side, place 1 vertical white quote box with Japanese text: 「うまくいかない日だって、人生のスパイスになるんだ。」 In the lower left, add 1 pinned pink note card that says “Sweet but clumsy.” and 1 torn recipe memo sheet with handwritten Japanese checklist items. Add a small speech bubble near the cake that says “Oops!”. Include a circular stamp-style seal near the lower right that reads “Blueberry disaster”. At the bottom, add film-credit style text in white, including “A FILM BY YUMEIRO PASTEL”, and a large release line in pink and white: “{argument name="release date" default="2024.6.30(SUN)"} ROADSHOW”. Under that, add the Japanese tagline: 「失敗は、最高の思い出になる。だから、また挑戦しよう。」 Frame the whole poster with lace, stickers, scraps of paper, and scrapbook-style decorations. Make it ultra-detailed, glossy, sentimental, kawaii, cinematic, and intentionally over-the-top like a fake coming-of-age movie poster about a baking failure.
title: Pastel Anime Blueberry Cake Movie Poster
description: A whimsical Japanese-style anime poster showing a pastel girl carrying a disastrously overflowing blueberry pound cake, ideal for parody film-poster art and cute cinematic social media visuals.

content: A dreamy pastel-purple Japanese movie poster illustration in a glossy shoujo anime style, packed with blueberry dessert chaos and soft sparkles. The scene shows 1 seated teenage girl with a short silver-lavender bob haircut, side bangs, a small lavender bow hair clip, and alternative cute fashion, sitting on the floor in a messy kitchen or baking workspace. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered square censor block in muted lavender-gray. She wears an oversized translucent lavender jacket with black ribbon details on the sleeves, a light purple graphic top, layered silver necklaces, a purple plaid skirt, slouchy white leg warmers decorated with lavender heart patches and black bows, and chunky lavender platform sneakers with ribbon accents. She holds 1 blueberry near her mouth with one hand and 1 metal mixing bowl smeared with vivid purple blueberry batter in the other. In front of her is 1 large golden pound cake split open dramatically, overflowing with dark glossy blueberries and purple filling, spilling across 1 cooling rack and the tabletop. Counted blueberries are scattered throughout the composition as floating and resting props, creating a whimsical suspended effect. The environment is cluttered with baking tools and notes: 1 spiral notebook page in the upper right labeled in English with a handwritten recipe for blueberry pound cake, 1 whisk in the lower right, 1 small pinned photo print in the lower left showing 2 anime girls, and 1 handwritten note card in the lower right with Japanese writing and a small bunny doodle. Use a monochrome palette of lilac, violet, periwinkle, cream, and deep blueberry purple, with luminous highlights, soft haze, translucent overlays, and romantic glitter. Add large expressive Japanese calligraphy text dominating the left half of the poster, reading vertically and diagonally like a dramatic light-novel or film advertisement, plus a ribbon banner near the cake with the date text “2026年7月メロードショー”, vertical copy on the right side, small production-credit text across the bottom, and a final tagline line at the very bottom. Make the composition feel like a cute disaster: beautiful but failed baking, sweet melancholy, fashionable messiness, and cinematic promotional poster energy.
title: Pastel Blueberry Cake Anime Poster

The scene shows an expansive futuristic skyline with dozens of ultra-tall elegant skyscrapers and needle-like towers rising from hovering platforms, connected by distant structures and suspended districts. In the center-right, a large floating urban hub features multiple illuminated glass domes and layered circular bases, surrounded by several monumental towers, including one especially tall central spire with a wide ring-like observation structure near the top. Warm golden sunlight pours in from the left horizon, creating a dramatic orange, peach, and lavender sky with thick clouds and atmospheric haze, while the lower half of the image is filled with soft pink and blue cloud banks reflecting the sunset. Several flying vehicles are visible: 1 large dark metallic spacecraft in the lower left foreground with bright blue engine trails, 1 circular landing-pad-like platform craft in the lower right foreground, 2 medium ships crossing the midground with blue light trails, and multiple tiny distant air vehicles scattered across the skyline. Add intricate city lighting, reflective metallic surfaces, immense scale, serene futuristic grandeur, and highly detailed concept art styling. content: A dramatic vintage Chinese martial-arts movie poster in a luxurious dark-gold and amber palette, styled like a classic historical epic. Center the composition on a young imperial man seated in front, wearing an ornate black-and-gold dragon robe and a Qing dynasty red-tasseled official hat, posed with one hand near his mouth in a sly, playful, confident manner. Surround him with exactly 8 beautiful court women in layered silk hanfu and gauzy robes, arranged tightly around him in a glamorous harem-like group portrait, with 4 women in the upper row and 4 women in the lower row. Each woman has an elegant updo with elaborate gold hairpins, floral ornaments, dangling earrings, and soft warm makeup; their expressions are alluring, gentle, or curious. Render the women in champagne, blush, peach, rose, and pale jade fabrics with translucent sleeves, embroidered bodices, and richly textured jewelry. Behind the group, place a large aged wooden plaque with carved golden Chinese calligraphy reading “鹿鼎记”, with a smaller line above it reading “金庸武侠经典”. Add vertical cast-name text in Chinese placed beside different figures: on the far left “苏荃”, below left “陈圆圆”, upper middle-left “阿珂”, upper middle-right “建宁公主”, far right upper “沐剑屏”, right middle “方怡”, lower right-middle “双儿”, and far lower right “曾柔”. Also add a vertical poetic slogan along the upper left margin in Chinese: “小人物，大智慧，游走江湖庙堂，玩转天下，抱得美人归”. At the bottom, blend in a secondary cinematic scene: an ancient palace gate and courtyard with soldiers and banners forming a grand processional crowd, with one lone figure centered in the foreground walking toward the viewer. Finish with a narrow line of Chinese tagline text across the bottom edge: “一部颠覆传统的英雄传奇 一段令人捧腹的江湖神话”. The whole image should feel opulent, theatrical, romantic, and slightly mischievous, with smoky sepia shadows, glowing rim light, rich texture, symmetrical poster composition, and polished high-end period-drama key art.

description: A lavish historical Chinese movie-poster prompt for generating an ensemble wuxia court drama image with one imperial man, eight women, ornate typography, and an epic palace backdrop.

content:
Create a Japanese bishoujo game promotional poster in the style of a premium visual novel box cover and store page composite. The image is split into three vertical areas. The left two-thirds is a dramatic illustrated key visual at sunset: a dreamy spring sky filled with pink and violet clouds, glowing rim light, drifting petals, and a reflective wet road or riverside path. Show 4 anime girls in school uniforms, all with soft emotional expressions and highly detailed hair moving in the wind. The largest girl is centered upper-left, shown from the chest up in profile or three-quarter view, with long dark hair and a small flower hair ornament, looking wistful. A second girl stands at lower-left with very light silver hair and a ribbon accessory, turned slightly away. A third girl is at lower center, smaller, with mauve or reddish-brown hair and a bowed, melancholy pose. A fourth girl is at mid-right, blonde or light brown-haired, facing upward with a hopeful expression. At the very bottom center of the key art, show 2 tiny full-body silhouettes of a boy and girl holding hands in the glowing distance, reflected in the wet ground. Add a white feather near the upper-left and scattered cherry blossom petals throughout. Overlay elegant Japanese title typography in large white brush-like serif lettering near the bottom-left to center: 「{argument name="title text" default="さよならの向こう側で"}」, with a smaller subtitle line beneath it. Along the far left edge, place 3 vertical lines of small Japanese catchphrase text in white. In the bottom-left corner, add 2 stacked black product labels with white text like a PC game package badge, one reading Windows compatible and one reading all ages.

The center is a narrow dark indigo vertical band separating the art from the info panel. On this band, place the game title again vertically in large white Japanese characters, with a smaller vertical tagline beneath it. Keep this band clean and elegant, like the spine of a game box.

The right third is a soft cream-colored information panel with a gentle paper texture. At top-left of this panel, add a bold Japanese heading in brackets: 「【あらすじ】」 followed by several lines of Japanese synopsis text laid out like a visual novel description page. Below that, add a dotted or dashed divider line. Then add a second bracketed heading: 「【特徴】」 with 4 feature bullets, each preceded by a simple icon. The 4 features are: branching choices, full voice support, tearjerking emotional story, and many beautiful CGs. Use small dark blue-gray icons and text. Add another divider line, then a third bracketed heading: 「【プレイヤーへ】」 followed by 2 short lines of Japanese message text.

On the far right side of the cream panel, stack 4 rounded-rectangle screenshot thumbnails vertically, each with thin white borders. Thumbnail 1: the dark-haired heroine by a seaside railing at sunset. Thumbnail 2: a pale-haired heroine with windblown hair against a bright blue ocean. Thumbnail 3: a girl indoors by a sunlit classroom or café window, warm and contemplative. Thumbnail 4: a girl surrounded by cherry blossoms in soft pink light. At the bottom of the cream panel, place a wide rounded lavender feature bar containing 4 large icons with short Japanese labels beneath or beside them: an open book, a microphone, an image/photo symbol, and a branching path/share-like icon. The overall mood should be nostalgic, romantic, cinematic, and emotionally overwhelming, like a high-budget Japanese gal game advertisement from the 2000s to 2010s. Use polished anime illustration, luminous backlighting, rich pastel sunset colors, glossy reflections, detailed typography, and authentic visual novel promo design.

content: A dark fantasy anime light-novel cover in a vertical composition, painted with detailed dramatic brushwork and moody cinematic lighting. Show three young women posed in a triangular arrangement against a ruined medieval city engulfed in flames at night, with smoke, embers, collapsed timber buildings, and a large stone castle on a rocky hill in the upper background. In the foreground center, place a beautiful young woman with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="powder blue"} hair, wearing an off-shoulder blue corset dress with white frilled sleeves and lace-up bodice, one hand lightly gripping her chest, her expression serious and vulnerable. Behind her on the left, place a tall woman with silver-white hair tied in a high ponytail and a white headscarf, wearing a modest black dress with a high collar and front fastenings, standing in profile with a stern, unreadable presence. Behind her on the right, place a blonde girl with twin braids under a brown hooded cloak, pale blue-green eyes, holding a black book with a star-like emblem on the cover close to her chest, looking sideways with a guarded expression. Use layered character overlap, strong contrast, and slightly desaturated colors except for warm firelight and deep reds. Add large vertical Japanese title typography along the left side in distressed calligraphic style: 「異世界辺境伯領」 in black and dark red, plus two smaller vertical text blocks near the lower left reading 「現代の倫理観を捨て」 and 「権力と暴力で泥臭く生き延びます」. Add a decorative compass-like emblem near the lower left and a large bold vertical subtitle 「転生」 at the bottom left. content: A bright, polished Japanese airline promotional poster in anime illustration style, formatted as a full advertising key visual with a wide 4:3 composition. The scene shows an airport tarmac under a vivid blue sky with soft white clouds, sun flare, and a large Japan Airlines passenger aircraft parked behind the character, with the fuselage and tail logo clearly visible. In the foreground stands a cheerful high school girl traveler in a dynamic welcoming pose, one arm stretched toward the viewer as if inviting them to come along. She has long blonde twin-tail hair with soft waves and pink-dyed tips, windblown dramatically, and her face is simplified and unobstructed for a clean commercial illustration. She wears a black school blazer with gold trim, a white dress shirt, a red-and-black ribbon bow, a pleated black skirt with gold hem, thigh-high black socks, and carries a black shoulder bag with a cute round animal charm. Beside her is 1 silver rolling suitcase covered with multiple colorful travel stickers, including a prominent airline-themed sticker. The overall mood is youthful, aspirational, energetic, and travel-forward, blending school life and air travel. Include exactly 2 handwritten-style English phrases in the sky area: "Let's go!" near a doodled white airplane trail at upper right, and no other English handwritten phrase besides the brand text. Recreate the poster layout with exactly 1 airline brand block at top left reading "JAPAN AIRLINES" with a red crane logo, 1 large Japanese headline in brush-style lettering across the upper left reading {argument name="headline text" default="羽ばたけ、未来の私へ！"}, and 1 smaller Japanese subheadline beneath it reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="旅は、きみをもっと強く、もっと自由にする。"}. In the mid-left area, place a large white promotional panel with pink accents for a student discount campaign. This panel contains exactly 1 campaign title block with Japanese text reading {argument name="campaign name" default="JALの学生割引 スカイメイト"}, exactly 1 pink circular badge reading {argument name="discount text" default="最大12% OFF!"}, and exactly 3 bordered icon boxes aligned horizontally underneath. The 3 icon boxes should show: 1 graduation cap icon with Japanese text indicating students can use it, 1 suitcase icon with Japanese text indicating all domestic routes are eligible, and 1 calendar icon with Japanese text indicating same-day reservation changes are allowed. Add additional handwritten-style Japanese copy in smaller sizes around the lower half of the image for an emotional travel-ad feel, plus 1 pink call-to-action banner at the bottom left with a search-bar-like box containing Japanese reservation text. Place 1 circular red JAL logo at the bottom right corner. Use glossy anime poster rendering, crisp linework, vivid lighting, subtle lens glow, saturated sky blues, pink accent graphics, and premium commercial ad composition.

content:
Genre: {argument name="genre" default="Hamburger"}
Brand Name: {argument name="brand name" default="Kashiko"}

Based on this image, generate a photorealistic poster image with a concept that completely deviates from common sense and does not exist anywhere else in the world.

Don't just make it an extension; leap with the idea to a level where it 'makes sense but the interpretation is insane.'

[Absolute Conditions]
- Photorealistic expression (reproduce textures, atmosphere, and even light particles like a real-life photo)
- All language must be in Japanese

[Exaggerated/Boosted Elements]
■ Font Design
- The characters themselves are objectified or phenomenological
- The font physically interacts with the theme

■ Text Placement
- Ignore normal layouts and place text within the space itself
- Layouts with abnormally strong gaze direction

■ Composition
- Unrealistic perspective, extreme wide angles, distortion, scale destruction
- Clear foreground, middle ground, and background layers with abnormally high information density
- A central element that catches the eye instantly + countless subtle oddities in the details

■ Lighting
- Movie-level cinematic lighting
- Intense backlighting, rim lights, neon, particle light, volume light
- Light itself has meaning (functioning as a guide or emphasis)

■ Catchphrase
- Short, intense Japanese text that makes sense but is hard to fully grasp
- Copy that is slightly off-situation but fits strangely well

[Additional Effects]
- A sense of discomfort where reality and unreality coexist simultaneously
- Parts of the image ignore the laws of physics
- Quality that functions as a professional-level advertisement

Ultimately, make it a poster that is 'understandable yet beyond comprehension' and warrants a second look. If the reference image is a character, apply actions such as wearing, using, or trying to eat the brand. Do not use any real brand logos, company names, or personal names; make it completely original. Verify that no real-world elements are included in the final finish. Suppress noise or balance disruptions caused by excessive detail, maintaining overall visual unity and a sophisticated impression.
title: Hyper-realistic Surreal Poster Design Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for creating a cinematic, photorealistic poster that blends reality with surreal concepts, featuring deep customization for branding and visual elements.

content: A side-by-side comparison image presented as two stacked documentary-style photographs of the same cramped old Chinese apartment corridor, framed by a black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes on both left and right edges. The top half is labeled {argument name="top label" default="GPT-image-2"} in large bold white sans-serif text centered near the top, and the bottom half is labeled {argument name="bottom label" default="Nano Banana 2"} in the same style. Create a gritty, nostalgic, cinematic scene in a long, narrow shared hallway of a worn residential building from the late 20th century, with peeling paint, stained walls, faded propaganda posters and old newspapers on the walls, dark wooden doorways, hanging towels and laundry, a damp concrete floor, and daylight coming from a window at the far end. In the upper scene, show exactly 4 people: 1 adult standing at the left cooking over a small stove on a wooden table with visible steam, 1 adult man sitting deeper in the corridor beside an electric fan, 1 child crouching in the center playing near a basin on the wet floor, and 1 adult woman seated at a small table on the right writing or reading; include enamel mugs, metal pots, stools, buckets, thermos containers, and cluttered household items. In the lower scene, show exactly 4 people again: 1 adult woman at the left cooking at a stove with smoke rising, 1 adult man seated on the right in a bamboo chair leaning over a tabletop fan, 1 child crouching in front writing on paper on a low stool, and 1 distant adult figure near the back window; add more visible corridor clutter including a bicycle front wheel at lower left, wash basins, baskets, thermoses, shelves, shoes, and hanging clothes. Keep the camera straight-on and centered to emphasize the corridor depth, with realistic human proportions, candid slice-of-life behavior, muted aged colors, soft natural light, high detail, photojournalistic realism, and a subtle difference in arrangement between the top and bottom scenes while preserving the same overall environment and mood.

content: A vintage late-1970s Japanese crime film poster in the style of a Nikkatsu theatrical one-sheet, vertically composed on aged beige paper with visible grain, faint stains, and slightly faded ink. The main image is a large, moody half-body portrait of {argument name="lead actor name" default="原田芳雄"} occupying the upper right and center, turned partly away from camera, with thick curly dark hair, a serious expression, and a wrinkled light gray suit jacket over an open-collar white shirt; his face is mostly in shadow. Behind him is a bleak industrial waterfront with cranes, low factory structures, and heavy gray smoke rising into a washed-out sky. Across the lower middle, place a huge hand-brushed red Japanese title reading {argument name="title text" default="影の街"}, painted diagonally and aggressively, partially overlapping the portrait and the lower scene. In the lower half, add a second scene: a rainy urban street at dusk or night with wet reflective pavement, a dark police car at left with a glowing red roof light, and 6 men in suits and trench coats walking forward, with 1 central detective figure in a beige trench coat and loosened tie leading the group. On the far right, include a vertical strip of 5 stacked inset cast portraits framed in thin borders, each a dark cinematic still with different characters. Add vertical Japanese typography: on the upper right, the actor credit “原田芳雄 主演”; on the upper left, a 2-line tagline column reading “その男、刑事。 正義より、真実を追う。”; and near the lower right of the main image, another vertical blurb reading “誰が敵で、誰が味方か。闇に消えた事件の中で、ただひとつの真実を掴むまで—”. At the bottom, include dense small Japanese credits spanning the width, plus a large release date on the lower right reading {argument name="release date" default="11.23"} with “日活ロードショー” beneath it and a small studio mark. Use muted charcoal, sepia, smoky blue-gray, and off-white tones, with the red title as the only vivid color. The overall feeling is hard-boiled, melancholic, gritty, and cinematic, like a lost 1970s Japanese detective movie poster.
title: Vintage Japanese Crime Film Poster
description: A gritty retro Japanese theatrical poster for a hard-boiled detective film, useful for generating faux 1970s movie key art with authentic typography and layout.

content: A high-impact anime promotional interview poster designed as a glossy two-page magazine spread for a futuristic live music event. The scene shows a packed nighttime concert arena filled with a crowd holding glowing light sticks in neon yellow, blue, and purple, with a huge illuminated stage in the background, laser beams, bokeh lights, haze, and a giant triangular play-icon screen reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026". In the center foreground are 2 anime-style female presenters seen from a dramatic side and back angle, both looking toward the stage. The left character is {argument name="left character name" default="ソラ"}, wearing a dark oversized hooded jacket with black and acid-lime accents, large lime-green headphones marked "06", and raising a bright yellow glow stick overhead; her face is partially obscured by a rectangular privacy block. The right character is {argument name="right character name" default="ナギ"}, with a short silver-white bob haircut and fair skin, wearing a pale oversized hooded coat, softly lit by stage lights, holding a white-blue glowing baton near her chest, with an emotional profile expression as she watches the show. Use cinematic rim lighting, richly saturated purple-blue concert colors, reflective fabric highlights, and detailed anime rendering with a polished editorial-advertising finish. Compose the layout like a Japanese special interview feature with dense text overlays, translucent dark panels, thin neon-yellow borders, and bold sans-serif typography. Include 8 distinct text blocks: 1 small header tag at top left reading "/ SPECIAL INTERVIEW /"; 1 large Japanese headline at upper left reading "この夏、AIと音楽の未来がステージで輝く！"; 1 event logo block at upper right reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026" and "2026.7.18 SAT @ FUTURE ARENA ODAIBA"; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the left with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the right with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; plus 2 character intro name boxes near the figures labeled "ソラ" and "ナギ". Add a bold closing Japanese tagline across the bottom left and center reading "AIと音楽が響き合う、新しい夏がはじまる。 一緒に、未来を体験しよう！". At the bottom right, include a footer block repeating the event name and date, plus a visible QR code and a small caption indicating the official website. The overall style should feel like a premium Japanese event flyer, interview article, and key visual combined, energetic, futuristic, emotional, and festival-like.

The mood is quiet and restrained, with unuttered emotions and a sense of time passing. The composition is the main visual of a movie, characters located at the bottom or to one side, retaining a large area of white space to emphasize space and atmosphere. The composition is a restrained close-up side profile or slightly tilted face, with the person occupying a large proportion of the screen but not overly sharp, edges slightly softened or slightly out of focus. Expression is calmness after sadness, with tears or tear marks in the eyes, emotions introverted and restrained, like having just cried and slowly returning to silence, eyes not looking at the camera, with a sense of memory and void. Light is winter natural scattered light or overcast soft light, cool white, light gray, pale blue tones, low saturation, low contrast, no strong shadows, no dramatic lighting effects. The snow and air form a clean background. The image texture is between real photography and film, with fine grain, slight mist, slightly white or slightly overexposed, like an old photo faded by time or a movie still. Skin not overly detailed, no skin smoothing, no sharpening, no retouching. Asymmetric composition, face can be partially cropped, minimalist background, retaining appropriate white space. Add the minimalist title 'Love Letter' or 'ラヴレター' in the white space area, thin Mincho or thin serif font, wide character spacing, sparse layout, color light gray; add 'Love Letter' in a tiny font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese artistic movie poster texture, quiet, subtle, restrained, like a memory covered by snow, avoiding photo studio feel, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding refined filters, avoiding lighting effects, avoiding high contrast and high saturation, avoiding sharp digital feel, avoiding theatrical emotions, avoiding 'pretty but hollow'. Negative prompt: AI feel, skin smoothing, sharpening, HDR, high contrast, high saturation, dreamy light effects, lens flare, filter feel, photo studio style, internet celebrity face, posing, looking directly at the camera, exaggerated emotions, 3D rendering, illustration style, complex background.

Use a black, crimson, and deep red palette with intense contrast, smoky atmosphere, glowing red haze near the ground, scattered embers, faint scratches, and cinematic rim lighting. In the background place 3 major graphic elements: the red-tinted gothic Duomo di Milano cathedral silhouette on the left, a large glowing AC Milan circular crest on the right, and oversized semi-transparent numerals "10" behind the running figure. Add editorial typography integrated into the poster: at the top left put "AC MILAN" with "1899" beneath it and a small club crest, on the left center stack the first name small above a very large tall-serif last name reading "MBAPPÉ", beneath that add a red handwritten signature-style scribble, and on the upper right edge place the vertical slogan "SEMPRE SEMPRE MILAN". The style should feel like elite football poster design, transfer reveal campaign art, glossy, aggressive, modern, photorealistic with graphic-design compositing, ultra-detailed fabric texture, dramatic shadows, and a high-end Champions League promo aesthetic. --ar 9:16
title: AC Milan Mbappé Transfer Poster
description: A high-impact vertical football promo poster showing a star player in AC Milan colors, ideal for transfer announcements, fan edits, and sports marketing visuals.

content: Create a dramatic vertical football poster for {argument name="player name" default="Yamal"} in a Juventus transfer-announcement style, ultra-detailed, high-contrast, black-and-white with metallic gold accents, gritty premium sports graphic design. The composition has 2 visible portraits of the same young male footballer with dark brown skin and short tight curly hair: one large upper-body rear three-quarter portrait dominating the top half, wearing a glossy white Juventus jersey with the name {argument name="jersey name" default="YAMAL"} printed large across the back, head turned slightly left so one ear and partial cheek are visible; and one full-body action pose in the lower center, arms spread wide while running or celebrating, wearing the modern Juventus home kit with black-and-white vertical stripes, white shorts with the number {argument name="squad number" default="19"}, white socks, and light-colored boots with a subtle pink accent on the sole. Keep the face areas softly obscured and non-detailed. Use a dark moody background with layered architectural imagery of Turin, including 3 landmark elements: a faint domed historic building on the left mid-background, a tall tower resembling Mole Antonelliana on the lower right, and a shadowy stadium structure across the lower middle. Add 3 Juventus logos: one small white logo at the top left, one large translucent logo integrated into the upper right background, and one medium white logo at the bottom right. Add bold typography and editorial layout elements: the word {argument name="main vertical text" default="YAMAL"} set vertically in huge white condensed sans-serif letters along the left side, small vertical gold text reading "JUVENTUS FOOTBALL CLUB" beside it, gold text on the right reading {argument name="side name text" default="YAMAL"} above the large gold number "19", a gold signature scribble below, the slogan "FINO ALLA FINE" stacked in gold on the lower left, "JUVENTUS" in small white text beneath it, and small coordinate text at the bottom left reading "45.0703° N, 7.6869° E" and "TORINO, ITALIA". The jersey on the action figure should include visible sponsor and badge details: Juventus crest with 3 stars, Adidas logo, Jeep sponsor, a circular tricolor badge on the chest, and a black sleeve patch reading "azimut". Add energetic white paint streaks and brush slashes in 3 main areas: upper right, lower center near the kicking leg, and subtle scratches on the left edge. Include marble-like black texture panels, gold star accents, faint chevrons, and smoky atmosphere. Lighting should be cinematic with rim light on the player, glossy fabric highlights, sharp contrast, and a premium transfer-poster aesthetic suitable for a social media football announcement.
title: Juventus Yamal Transfer Poster
description: A dramatic vertical sports poster showing a young footballer in a Juventus kit, designed for transfer announcements, fan edits, and viral social media graphics.

content: Luxury advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="Colgate Sensation White"}, split vertically into two mirrored halves by a narrow ornate mirror with a bright blue glow at the center. On the left side, an elderly African woman in three-quarter profile stands with arms folded, wearing a richly patterned indigo-and-gold traditional wax-print dress, a matching wrapped headscarf, layered gold bead necklaces, drop earrings, stacked bracelets, and holding 1 traditional chewing stick upright in one hand. On the right side, a younger African woman in matching indigo-and-gold dress and gold jewelry mirrors the pose and holds 1 modern white-and-blue toothbrush upright in one hand. Both figures are elegant, dignified, and photographed from the waist up against a warm textured brown studio backdrop with cinematic golden lighting, high contrast, polished skin tones, and premium beauty-ad aesthetics. Add 1 red circular Colgate logo in the top left corner. Overlay large refined serif typography in cream across the middle-lower area: left text {argument name="left slogan" default="Depuis toujours."} and right text {argument name="right slogan" default="Pour toujours."}, with a glowing blue tooth icon centered between the two phrases on the mirror divide. Add a smaller centered serif tagline near the bottom in cream: {argument name="tagline text" default="Le meilleur de la tradition, la force de la science"}. Place 1 Colgate Sensation White toothpaste box in the bottom right corner, angled slightly toward camera, glossy and realistic. The overall composition should communicate the fusion of ancestral tradition and modern dental science, premium African fashion portraiture, symmetrical balance, editorial campaign design, and a sophisticated international cosmetics advertisement.
title: Tradition and Modernity Toothpaste Ad
description: This prompt generates a premium split-screen dental campaign visual contrasting traditional oral care and a modern toothbrush, ideal for luxury brand advertising and social media comparison posts.

content:
Please create a high-aesthetic, high-completion "Brand Packaging System Display Image" for the brand {argument name="brand name" default="Brand Name"} in the category {argument name="category" default="Product Category"}. This is not a common e-commerce white background shot, nor a single product photo, but a brand proposal-style display showing a 'packaging family' with visual identity system logic and commercial photography texture. The image should reflect the 'unified implementation of a single brand across multiple packaging carriers,' presenting a complete packaging system for a mature consumer brand.

[Aspect Ratio Requirements] The overall composition must be a fixed 4:5 vertical poster. Horizontal compositions or scattered arrangements are prohibited. The layout should follow poster reading logic: breathing space at the top, the main visual focus of the packaging system in the center, and auxiliary packaging, labels, and products at the bottom. The weight should be concentrated and suitable for immediate release as a brand display poster.

[Core Requirements] Automatically match the most reasonable packaging combination based on the [Category] and build a unified visual system around the [Brand Name]. Choose a small but representative number of packaging forms to form a refined system. Prioritize hierarchy, brand unity, and display beauty over quantity. You can include: shopping bags, gift boxes, shipping boxes, long boxes, single item boxes, pouches, sleeves, sample bags, bottles, jars, tubes, spray bottles, pump bottles, labels, stickers, tags, cards, and the actual product itself.

[Category Adaptation] Adapt packaging forms to the [Category]: e.g., paper bags and food containers for Bakery; cups and sleeves for Coffee/Tea; jars and tubes for Beauty/Skincare; candles and cards for Fragrance/Lifestyle; drawer boxes and tags for Fashion/Collectibles. The result must feel category-appropriate and systematic.

[Quantity Control] Control the number of items; do not overcrowd. The scene should be "less is more." Suggest: 1-2 large items, 2-3 medium items, 2-4 small items/labels, and 1-3 actual products. Total visible elements should be between 6-10. Ensure enough white space and clear hierarchy.

[Visual System] All packaging must belong to the same brand system, using the [Brand Name] as the core element. Maintain consistent logo placement, font style, graphics, illustration/pattern systems, and material texture. The style can be minimalist, organic, modern, luxury, or youthful, but must be mature and high-quality.

[Color Mechanism] Avoid fixed combinations. Generate different schemes like Cream White/Caramel Brown, Mist Blue/Warm White, Olive Green/Linen Beige, Chocolate Brown/Ivory, etc. Avoid neon or cheap high-saturation colors. Maintain a sense of high-end restraint.

[Composition] Use a commercial studio setting with a 3/4 top-down or slight perspective view. Arrange in layers: large items in the background, core packaging in the mid-ground, and small items/products in the foreground. At least one product should interact with its packaging (e.g., half-out of a box). Create a balanced triangular or staggered composition.

[Visual Style] High-end commercial photography feel. Clean studio background (white, warm white, light grey). Emphasize material textures (paper folds, box structures, bottle silhouettes, print quality, embossing, matte/cotton/kraft textures). Modern and clean visual language.

[Lighting] Commercial grade lighting. Soft studio light or slight directional natural side light. Use clear but restrained shadows for depth. The light should be transparent and bright, never dark or messy.

[Final Effect] The final image should look like a mature brand's packaging proposal poster or visual landing page, emphasizing vertical poster feel, brand unity, systematic completeness, and commercial photography quality.
title: Professional Brand Packaging System
description: A comprehensive, high-aesthetic prompt for creating a complete brand packaging system display with commercial photography quality.

content: Create a clean, premium Japanese corporate poster for a {argument name="company name" default="Arks"} video production company, in a minimalist editorial layout on an off-white background with lots of negative space. Portrait orientation, A4-like poster proportions. At the very top left, place an oversized bold black sans-serif logotype reading {argument name="company name" default="Arks"}, spanning nearly the full width of the page. In the upper right, add a small stacked brand mark in thin uppercase letters: "VIDEO" on one line, "PRODUCTION" on the next, "COMPANY" on the third, with a small burnt-orange geometric accent nearby. Below the logo, add a vertical burnt-orange bar on the left and a large elegant Japanese headline in black Mincho-style serif: {argument name="headline text" default="4つの領域で、映像を磨く。"}. Directly underneath, add a smaller service line in Japanese with slash separators: "SNS運用 / ショートドラマ / MV制作 / AI映像". The main body is a 2 by 2 grid of exactly 4 service panels with thin light-gray divider lines. Each panel has a large black editorial number and a Japanese label. Panel 1 label: "SNS運用" with the number "01"; image shows a close-up hand holding a smartphone displaying social media analytics, on a desk with charts, a calendar sheet, a pen, and a coffee mug, in warm natural office lighting; caption below in Japanese: "企画・分析・運用を一つの流れで。" Panel 2 label: "ショートドラマ" with the number "02"; image shows exactly 2 Japanese high-school-age students in white shirts standing outdoors on a rooftop or balcony, one female and one male, side-profile composition, muted overcast daylight, cinematic shallow depth of field; caption below: "共感が残る、短編の物語設計。" Panel 3 label: "MV制作" with the number "03"; image shows a moody musician playing electric guitar in a dim studio, backlit by soft haze, with a camera monitor in the foreground showing the same performer; caption below: "アーティストの世界観を、映像で可視化。" Panel 4 label: "AI映像" with the number "04"; image shows a dark professional AI video-generation or image-editing software interface on a monitor, with a cinematic scene of a lone figure standing on rocks under dramatic clouds, plus thumbnail timeline images and side control panels; caption below: "技術を表現へ変える、次世代の映像制作。" At the bottom left, place a small three-line English slogan in uppercase: {argument name="tagline text" default="CREATE.\nCONNECT.\nLEAVE A MARK."} with a small burnt-orange line accent above it. At the bottom right, place the website {argument name="website" default="arks-vp.com"} in small serif text with a short black horizontal line beside it. Use a refined mix of bold modern sans-serif for the large logo and numbers, and elegant Japanese serif for headlines and labels. Color palette: black, charcoal, warm off-white, light gray rules, and restrained burnt-orange accents. The overall feel should be realistic, polished, contemporary, Japanese editorial advertising design, with accurate Japanese typography and natural image tones.

content: Create a hyper-realistic sports advertising poster shot from an extreme wide-angle, low courtside perspective on a bright sunny day at an outdoor tennis court. In the extreme foreground, a male tennis player lunges dramatically toward the camera while thrusting a large matte cobalt-blue insulated water bottle toward the viewer, making the bottle the dominant object in the frame. The bottle is covered with visible condensation droplets and has a brushed metallic gold cap, with the white logo text {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} printed near the bottom. The athlete wears a clean white athletic t-shirt, bright blue tennis shorts, white wristbands, white socks, and white tennis shoes. His other arm stretches back holding a black tennis racket, with 1 bright yellow-green tennis ball visible near the racket on the right side of the image. The pose should feel dynamic and athletic, with one leg bent deeply and the other extended in a wide lunge across the blue hard court. Use strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows, vivid saturated blues, and a clear cloudless sky, with green trees and a dark fence line in the distant background. Compose it like a premium hydration brand campaign, with sharp focus on the bottle and athlete, dramatic foreshortening, commercial polish, and energetic motion. Add clean white ad typography integrated onto the court surface in the lower half: a smaller line reading {argument name="headline intro" default="Play Hard"}, a very large bold line reading {argument name="headline main" default="Hydrate Smart"}, and a smaller subheading reading {argument name="tagline" default="Hydration that keeps up with every move."}. Place the {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} logo again in white at the top right, and a small website URL in white at the bottom right reading {argument name="website" default="www.aqua.com"}.
title: Tennis Hydration Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold, photorealistic outdoor tennis advertisement featuring a branded water bottle in dramatic forced perspective for sports marketing and beverage campaigns.

content: A monumental mythological fantasy painting of Lord Shiva performing the Tandava in the center of a fiery sacred arena, full-body, dynamic dancing pose with one leg raised and the other foot pressing down on a fallen figure beneath him. Shiva has ash-blue skin, a powerfully muscular physique, long wild flowing dark hair exploding outward in all directions, a high matted topknot, and a white crescent moon tucked into the hair. His expression is intense and divine. A cobra is coiled around his neck, and he wears multiple rudraksha bead necklaces, bracelets, and armlets, large circular earrings, and sacred ornaments. His clothing is a tiger-skin loincloth with dramatic red-orange cloth sashes whipping through the air. One raised hand holds a small damaru drum, one front hand is lifted in a blessing gesture with the Om symbol visible on the palm, and another hand conjures a bright flame above the open palm. Behind his head is a large glowing circular halo inscribed repeatedly with Sanskrit mantra text, creating a radiant mandala effect. The setting is an apocalyptic Himalayan temple landscape with dark storm clouds, smoke, embers, rocky mountains, waterfalls, and ancient stone shrines and temple towers on both the left and right sides. A trident wrapped with red cloth stands upright on the left side of the scene. Around Shiva is a circle of exactly 10 worshippers and ascetics, split across both sides, shown chanting, kneeling, raising arms, carrying torches, and playing drums in devotion. Beneath Shiva is exactly 1 fallen dark-skinned male figure lying on the stone ground. The ground is cracked and molten, with a blazing ring of lava and fire encircling the dance platform. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, glowing orange firelight against deep charcoal shadows, highly detailed anatomy, intricate jewelry and textures, swirling hair and fabric motion, devotional epic fantasy realism, painterly brushwork, symmetrical central composition, ultra-detailed, high contrast, vertical poster format.
title: Epic Shiva Tandava Fire Dance
description: A dramatic devotional fantasy artwork of Shiva dancing in a fiery sacred arena, ideal for mythological poster art, album covers, or spiritual concept illustration.
