[Image] Everyday photos taken by amateurs with an iPhone, themed after the seasons of each month.

[Location] Leave to AI according to the season.
[Distance] Randomly select one for each month: extreme_close, close, bust, mid, far, candid.
[Angle] Randomly select one for each month: eye, low, high, side, back.
[Exposure/Tone] Randomly select one for each month: overexp, natural, warm, cool, dark.
[Hairstyle] Randomly select one for each month: ponytail, bun, down, half_up, messy, wet, short, bob, braid, twin.
[Clothing] Leave to AI according to the season.
[Noise] Randomly select one for each month: low, mid, high, film.
[Blur/Focus] Randomly select one for each month: sharp, slight, motion, soft.
[Pose] Randomly select one for each month: natural_stand, sitting, walking, phone, wall_lean, crouch, look_back.
[Holding] Randomly select one for each month: none, smartphone, bottle, coffee, umbrella, bag, towel, script.
[Time of day] Randomly select one for each month: early_morning, morning, noon, afternoon, evening, night, late_night.
title: Candid 2026 Japanese Calendar Prompt

content: A poetic, cinematic macro illustration of the cover of {argument name="book title" default="Wind, Sand and Stars"} by {argument name="author name" default="Antoine de Saint-Exupéry"}, rendered as a surreal desert world emerging directly from the textured paper page. A large human hand holds a glossy black and gold fountain pen near the top right, the engraved gold nib touching the paper and releasing a dark stream of ink that becomes a winding path across a miniature Sahara landscape. The composition is vertical, warmly lit in amber and sepia tones, with dramatic side lighting, deep shadows, and ultra-detailed paper grain, skin texture, dust, and metallic reflections. On the upper left, the printed title text appears in elegant serif typography, with the author name below it and a short italic quote in smaller script beneath. The page transforms into a detailed map-like desert tableau with exactly 16 tiny human figures scattered across the scene: 1 lone standing figure balanced beside the pen nib, 3 figures near a small campfire, 2 central robed men in conversation, 3 figures gathered beside the biplane, 1 solitary figure walking near the lower middle, 2 riders on camels at the lower left, 3 standing figures near the truck at the lower right, and 1 tiny seated figure near the wreckage at the lower left. Include exactly 1 vintage biplane parked on the right with visible markings, exactly 1 old expedition truck at the bottom right, exactly 1 windsock near the center-right, exactly 1 desert oasis town with palm trees on the right, exactly 1 ruined sandcastle-like mound on the left, exactly 1 dark tent encampment on the left-center, exactly 1 wrecked engine or fuselage fragment in the lower left corner, and exactly 1 compass rose printed at the bottom left. The ink trail should branch through dunes and cracked earth like a route on an old map, connecting landmarks labeled with place names including {argument name="map label one" default="Tamanrasset"}, {argument name="map label two" default="Agadir"}, and {argument name="map label three" default="Dakar"}. Blend antique cartography, literary symbolism, and miniature diorama realism, evoking exploration, memory, loneliness, and the romance of early aviation.
title: Surreal Wind, Sand and Stars Book World
description: A richly detailed literary surrealist illustration of a book page turning into a miniature desert expedition map, ideal for editorial art, book-poster concepts, and classic adventure covers.

content: Create a clean, symmetrical Chinese feng shui infographic poster in a traditional almanac style on a warm light beige background. The main title at the top is large dark red Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="2026年九宫飞星图"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath in black reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="（丙午年）"}. Add a decorative compass rose in the upper left corner labeled with the four cardinal directions in Chinese: 南 at top, 北 at bottom, 东 at left, 西 at right. Center the composition around a 3x3 grid of 9 bordered square panels with thin ornamental Chinese-style corners, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned. Each square contains a large colored number, a Chinese star name, one line beginning with 吉星 or 凶星, and an illustrative symbolic object. Top row has 3 panels: top-left labeled 东南 with a purple-framed panel for number 9 and text 九紫右弼星, plus 吉星: 喜庆、姻缘、贵人, illustrated with purple balloons, a gift box, and a small firework burst; top-center labeled 正南 with an orange-framed panel for number 5 and text 五黄廉贞星, plus 凶星: 灾祸、意外、疾病, illustrated with a gold gourd and ancient Chinese coins tied with a red tassel; top-right labeled 西南 with a gold-framed panel for number 7 and text 七赤破军星, plus 凶星: 破财、口舌、盗贼, illustrated with a brass bell and a silver sword. Middle row has 3 panels: middle-left aligned with 正东 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 8 and text 八白左辅星, plus 吉星: 财运、置业、积蓄, illustrated with a bonsai-like money tree and gold ingots; middle-center labeled 中宫 in a blue capsule tag overlapping the top edge of the center square, a blue-framed panel for number 1 and text 一白贪狼星, plus 吉星: 人缘、感情、智慧, illustrated with a crystal ball on a wooden stand; middle-right aligned with 正西 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 3 and text 三碧禄存星, plus 凶星: 是非、口舌、争执, illustrated with bamboo and a small stacked rock fountain. Bottom row has 3 panels: bottom-left labeled 东北 with a green-framed panel for number 4 and text 四绿文曲星, plus 吉星: 学业、文昌、考试, illustrated with an open book, brush pen, and ink stone with bamboo leaves behind; bottom-center labeled 正北 with a gold-framed panel for number 6 and text 六白武曲星, plus 吉星: 权力、贵人、偏财, illustrated with a golden guardian lion statue on a pedestal holding a ball; bottom-right labeled 西北 with a gray-framed panel for number 2 and text 二黑巨门星, plus 凶星: 病痛、伤害、阻滞, illustrated with a stone pagoda and a small incense burner. Use exactly 6 outer direction labels around the grid: 东南, 正南, 西南 above the top row, and 东北, 正北, 西北 below the bottom row, each inside rounded capsules matching the panel colors. Add exactly 2 large vertical side direction labels outside the grid: 正东 on the left side and 正西 on the right side. At the bottom center, add a pill-shaped legend with 2 segments: a red segment reading 吉星: 1、4、6、8、9 and a dark gray segment reading 凶星: 2、3、5、7. Include faint pale cloud motifs behind some objects for traditional atmosphere. Style is crisp vector-infographic with soft watercolor-like object rendering, high readability, balanced spacing, and an elegant Chinese metaphysical chart aesthetic.
title: 2026 Nine Palaces Flying Star Chart
description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese feng shui annual flying star infographic poster for reference, educational content, or social media sharing.

content: Create a luxurious Japanese magazine-style PR editorial spread for a publishing and branding service, designed as a two-page brochure layout. The left half is a dark, cinematic portrait scene in a sophisticated office lounge: a seated Japanese businessman in a navy bespoke suit, white shirt, dark tie, white pocket square, and wristwatch sits in a leather chair with one hand near his chin, posed thoughtfully beside a glossy wooden table. His face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. The lighting is moody and warm, with reflections from tall windows and a premium executive atmosphere. On this dark left page, place large elegant serif headline text in English reading {argument name="headline text" default="PUBLISHING BRANDING"}, stacked in two lines near the upper left in muted gold. Below it, add multiple lines of Japanese copy in white, including a larger subheadline and several short body paragraphs arranged vertically. Near the lower left, include a bordered dark box containing exactly 4 checklist items, each preceded by a check mark, with Japanese text. Put a small page number "02" in the bottom-left corner. The right half is a clean white editorial information page with refined minimalist typography and generous spacing. At the top, place a large Japanese headline in black, aligned upper center-right, with two short Japanese body text blocks beneath it; on the upper far right include a small photo of exactly 4 stacked hardcover books and a glass vase near a bright window with greenery. Across the middle, add a centered section title in Japanese for five benefits, followed by exactly 5 numbered columns labeled 1 through 5, each with a short Japanese heading and several lines of smaller explanatory Japanese text. Beneath that, add another centered Japanese section title for workflow, followed by exactly 4 step blocks laid out horizontally: STEP 01 with a speech bubble icon, STEP 02 with a pencil icon, STEP 03 with an open book icon, STEP 04 with a megaphone icon. Each step includes the English word STEP plus a two-digit number, a short Japanese subtitle, and a few lines of smaller Japanese description, with small chevrons between steps. Along the bottom of the right page, place exactly 3 rectangular photos side by side: a city-view office meeting table scene, a close-up of a hand writing with a pen, and a stack of books near an open book. Under these images, add a prominent Japanese closing statement in a serif style on the lower left, and a smaller Japanese paragraph on the lower right. Put page number "03" in the bottom-right corner. Use a premium palette of deep navy, black, warm brown, ivory, and muted gold, with a balance of editorial luxury, corporate trust, and high-end publishing aesthetics. The overall composition should feel like a real magazine advertisement or consulting brochure, polished, photorealistic, elegant, and credible.
title: Luxury Publishing Branding Editorial Spread
description: This prompt generates a high-end Japanese magazine-style two-page promotional spread for publishing and branding services, ideal for brochures, PR visuals, and corporate marketing.

content: A clean, minimalist promotional poster on an off-white background in a modern tech-brand style. At the top left, a very large bold sans-serif headline in deep cobalt blue reads {argument name="headline text" default="Thinking Mode Searches"} split across two lines. Beneath it, a smaller gray explanatory sentence says that with thinking mode, the model can automatically browse the internet and find relevant contents for reference. At the top right, place a small blue OpenAI knot logo. Below the intro text, add a thin horizontal blue divider line ending with a tiny sparkle icon on the right. Under that, include a prompt line in small text with the word “Prompt:” in blue followed by the sentence {argument name="prompt text" default="Make a poster about OpenAI merch available on the official website right now."}. The main body is a centered 3-by-2 product grid with 8 total merchandise items shown as clean catalog cutouts with soft shadows inside rounded pale cards. Top row has 3 larger products: 1) a white long-sleeve striped rugby-style jersey with black collar and cuffs, small blue patches, and blue chest text “Research & Deployment Co.”, labeled “10 Year Jersey”; 2) a dark brown pullover hoodie with front pocket, small centered chest text “Research Deployment Co.” and sleeve print, labeled “Diagram Hoodie”; 3) a black T-shirt viewed from the back with a metallic knot graphic and pale pink text “Research & Deployment Co.”, labeled “Chrome Blossom Tee”. Bottom row has 5 smaller products: 4) a blue folding chair keychain shaped like a chair, labeled “Blue Chair Keychain”; 5) a black baseball cap with white flame graphics and “GPT-5” on the front, labeled “GPT-5 Flame Cap”; 6) a white notebook with a bold blue lower band and minimal OpenAI branding, labeled “OpenAI Notebook”; 7) a glossy black mug with “OpenAI” in white, labeled “OpenAI Office Mug”; 8) a dark green baseball cap with small white text “Thinking deeply”, labeled “Thinking Deeply Cap”. Keep all item labels centered below each product in small blue sans-serif text. Along the bottom footer, place “Research & Deployment Co.” on the left, the OpenAI knot logo plus wordmark centered, and “Designed with care.” on the right. Use a balanced editorial layout, lots of whitespace, premium product-ad poster aesthetics, subtle shadows, crisp studio lighting, and a restrained palette of off-white, blue, black, brown, and green.
title: OpenAI Merch Poster Grid
description: A modern editorial poster showcasing eight OpenAI-themed merchandise items in a clean product grid, suitable for tech brand promotion or social media marketing visuals.

content: A vintage political-propaganda-style poster collage on aged beige paper with a worn, slightly stained texture and torn-paper edges throughout. The composition is a bold vertical poster with a strong constructivist and Soviet-inspired graphic design, using only black, red, blue, yellow, and off-white. At the very top, centered in bold black sans-serif text, place the headline {argument name="headline text" default="Image generation with a point of view"}. In the center, reserve a large vertical rectangular area as the dominant focal block, slightly taller than wide, filled with a plain muted beige-to-taupe gradient like a blank poster insert. Around it, build a torn-paper photomontage from 4 visible collage zones: on the left, a red paper field with a black-and-white cutout of a person in a dark coat seen from behind or in profile, next to fragments of French poster text; at the top behind the central rectangle, a partial black-and-white face or head fragment peeking out; on the right, a blue paper field with a black-and-white Paris-like street scene including 1 tall ornate lamppost, old buildings, 1 car, and 1 walking man; at the bottom center, a yellow torn-paper field with a cropped black-and-white figure holding a newspaper, wearing a striped shirt. Add a vertical strip of black rectangular blocks near the upper right edge of the central rectangle, like cut graphic bars. At the bottom, place the main title in huge heavy condensed typography: {argument name="brand text" default="GPT Image"}, with "GPT" in black and "Image" in bright red. Beneath and to the right, add an enormous {argument name="version text" default="2.0"} in vivid blue. Below the left title area, add a rough horizontal black brushstroke underline. Centered near the bottom, in smaller black text, write {argument name="footer text" default="Coming soon"}. The overall look should feel like mid-20th-century avant-garde poster art, rough torn collage, distressed print, high contrast halftone photography, imperfect paper registration, and bold editorial typography.
title: Constructivist GPT Image 2.0 Poster
description: A retro avant-garde promo poster with torn-paper collage, bold typography, and propaganda-inspired graphic design, ideal for announcing an AI image model or creative campaign.

content: Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic. The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style. Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption. Add realistic newspaper elements: Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news) At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, “The Daily Prompts”, “AI Times” or similar - think creatively, according to the picture) Date, issue number and location Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography Small additional articles or captions to the main image Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality. Style: Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article. Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1 High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
title: Vintage Newspaper Front Page Generator
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating realistic vintage newspaper designs with customizable headlines and cinematic black-and-white photography.

content: An ultra-dense maximalist fantasy illustration in a perfectly symmetrical front-facing composition, depicting a candy-themed Lunar New Year shrine scene exploding with color and detail. At the exact center, a kawaii doll-like girl deity sits cross-legged in a meditative lotus pose on a mound of sweets, framed by a huge radiant mandala halo shaped like layered lotus petals and ornamental festival patterns in gold, pink, orange, teal, and neon rainbow hues. She has a glossy bob haircut with blunt bangs in dark brown with purple sheen, a porcelain face with red lips, and her eyes are covered by a dramatic striped visor or blindfold made of yellow-and-black caution-tape-like ribbons. Her hair is decorated with oversized candy beads and lollipops, and her outfit is an extravagant sculptural dress made of frosting, sprinkles, bows, hearts, candy charms, pastel mascot faces, and dripping confection textures. Her hands rest open on her knees, palms up, in a serene ceremonial pose. Surrounding her is a packed altar-city of miniature pagodas, lantern towers, dragons, dolls, sweets, toys, and lucky symbols, all arranged in mirrored abundance. Include 4 large circular framed dessert mascots in the corners: top left a smiling pink frosted cupcake, top right a smiling pink macaron with a bow, bottom left a smiling gingerbread cookie, bottom right a smiling pink sprinkled donut. Include 6 prominent red-and-gold round festival signs across the upper half with Chinese characters such as fortune, prosperity, joy, and luck. Add 2 ornate dragon figures flanking the center, 2 decorated elephants in the mid-lower left and right, and 2 gold ingot bowls near them. Scatter many small doll girls in traditional festive dress throughout the background like collectible figurines. The entire foreground should be buried under countless colorful gumballs, candies, tiny teddy bears, smiley-face sweets, lollipops, beads, and toy-like creatures, with no empty space anywhere. Style: hyper-detailed, glossy 3D digital art, candycore, pop surrealism, toy diorama, festival altar, Chinese New Year iconography, saturated reds, pinks, oranges, and golds, sparkling highlights, crisp focus, intricate textures, celebratory and divine atmosphere.
title: Candy Lunar New Year Shrine
description: A hyper-detailed symmetrical candycore festival shrine illustration, ideal for generating maximalist celebratory fantasy art with kawaii and Lunar New Year motifs.

content: A richly detailed vertical mural in the style of an aged East Asian religious wall painting on weathered silk or plaster, with visible cracks, abrasions, faded pigment, and distressed gold leaf. At the center, a celestial bodhisattva-like goddess floats gracefully above a large pink lotus pedestal, framed by a huge circular golden halo filling the upper middle of the composition. She wears an elaborate jeweled headdress, layered necklaces, armlets, and flowing robes in muted cinnabar red, cream, teal, and soft green, with long ribbon-like scarves swirling around her body in elegant arcs. Her right arm is raised, delicately holding a pink lotus flower, while her left hand extends outward in a gentle offering gesture. Surrounding her are exactly 3 smaller attendant maidens: one at lower left standing on clouds and playing a pipa, one at lower center kneeling or floating while presenting a tray of lotus blossoms, and one at lower right standing lightly on clouds with both hands raised in reverence. The background is a deep lapis-blue celestial sky filled with stylized cream and jade clouds, faint flying birds, lotus blooms, and 2 ornate temple pavilions in the upper left and upper right corners. Add hanging ornamental motifs near the mid-left and mid-right edges, and enclose the whole image in a decorative floral border. The overall mood is sacred, elegant, and antique, with intricate linework, delicate textile patterns, muted earthy tones, and a dominant blue-and-gold palette, resembling a treasured museum fresco or devotional hanging scroll.
title: Antique Celestial Goddess Mural
description: This prompt generates a weathered blue-and-gold East Asian devotional mural featuring a central lotus-bearing celestial goddess with three attendants, ideal for sacred fantasy art or antique wall-scroll imagery.

content:
Create a lively Chinese event poster with a warm, trendy coffee-shop aesthetic, photographed from inside a seaside cafe looking out through large floor-to-ceiling windows at palm trees, a bright blue sky, outdoor seating, and a Ferris wheel in the distance. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle scene combined with energetic graphic design. In the foreground, place a dark wooden table with 1 open laptop centered near the bottom, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the right side of the table, 1 black bag on the left, and 1 short stack of books near the left edge. Use a sunlit, slightly golden afternoon atmosphere with reflections on the glass and a relaxed vacation vibe.

Overlay bold poster graphics in a collage style using torn paper, brushstroke paint, stickers, and taped note-paper elements. The main headline on the upper left should be huge, hand-painted Chinese calligraphy in dark brown and orange, reading “疯狂星期四”, with a small yellow tag near it that reads “第11期”, and an even smaller top-left badge reading “活动预告” with a tiny megaphone icon. Beneath the main headline, add a green brushstroke banner with the text “下周四，不见不散！”, and below that a smaller line in parentheses: “（五一长假前最后一期）”.

Add 2 torn notebook-paper cards: 1 in the upper right and 1 in the lower left. The upper-right note should contain a short invitation paragraph in Chinese, neatly typeset in black and orange text, reading: “让我们海边小聚，远眺摩天轮，吹吹海风，和 App & AI Builder 们一起聊聊产品、远程生活与创作。” and include a small orange heart doodle in the bottom-right corner of that note. The lower-left note should list 3 info blocks with icons and orange section headers: “时间”, “地点”, and “说明”. Under “时间”, write “2026年04月23日 (星期四)” and “12:00 ~ 18:00”. Under “地点”, write “南山区·前海石公园·福叁咖啡”. Under “说明”, write “无需报名，随时来吧！”.

Across the middle-right area, place a large playful white script-style slogan with a dark outline, angled slightly upward, reading “喝咖啡、随意交流 海边散步，主打一个 Chill~”. Add 1 illustrated coffee cup sticker next to this slogan on the right. Use energetic orange paint splashes and sketch doodles around the headline and notes to make the poster feel youthful and spontaneous.

At the bottom, place a wide off-white torn-paper footer strip containing 3 feature blocks laid out horizontally. Block 1: a snowflake-like icon with the text “舒适环境” and smaller text “空调 + 宽敞桌椅”. Block 2: a Wi‑Fi icon with the text “电网无忧” and smaller text “WiFi + 插座”. Block 3: larger orange handwritten text “期待与你 海边相遇！” with a blue underline flourish and a tiny heart doodle. The overall design should mix real photography and graphic poster elements, with strong contrast, brush lettering, scrapbook textures, cafe lifestyle realism, and a fashionable AI-generated social-media event-poster look.
title: Seaside Cafe Event Poster
description: A vibrant Chinese promotional poster for a casual seaside coffee meetup, useful for social event announcements, community gatherings, and lifestyle marketing.

content:
Subject & Composition:

Central Figure: A {argument name="subject profile" default="sharp profile view of a man wearing a classic 1940s fedora and a formal suit"}.

Melting Effect: The lower half of the man's torso should dissolve or "drip" into long, vertical black ink streaks and splatters, creating a surreal, liquid-bleed effect against the background.

Graphic Element: A large, {argument name="background shape" default="solid vibrant red circle"} is positioned directly behind the man's head and shoulders, creating a "halo" or "rising sun" motif that anchors the composition.

Style & Color Palette:

Color Scheme: A strict {argument name="color scheme" default="minimalist palette of True Red, Deep Black, and Off-White/Cream"}.

Photography Style: High-contrast, black and white film noir photography for the subject. The texture should look like a high-resolution fashion editorial with a shallow depth of field.

Background: A clean, slightly textured off-white paper or canvas background to give it a premium, physical poster feel.

Technical Details:

Lighting: Strong "Rembrandt" lighting to define the facial contours, emphasizing the bridge of the nose and the jawline with deep shadows.

Atmosphere: Somber, intellectual, and high-stakes. The design should feel modern yet period-accurate to the mid-20th century.

Framing: Vertical poster orientation (A-frame), with significant negative space on the left and right to emphasize the central vertical axis.

Aspect ratio is 9:16
title: Minimalist Film Noir Poster
description: A high-contrast graphic design prompt for a poster featuring a man in a fedora with a melting ink effect against a vibrant red circle backdrop.

content: A clean editorial-style illustration on a light gray-white background showing exactly 11 young people gathered around a huge sheet of paper on the floor, collaboratively drawing a detailed Japan travel scene. The composition is viewed from slightly above, centered on the artwork, with the people forming a loose ring around it. Use a simple hand-drawn cartoon style with thin black outlines, soft muted colors, minimal shading, and a friendly modern magazine aesthetic. The central drawing on the paper includes 8 distinct scenic elements: snow-capped Mount Fuji in the middle background, a red sun to the upper right of the mountain, a few white clouds, pink cherry blossoms on a dark branch at upper left, a red multi-tier pagoda on the right, a tall city skyline with a tower near the center-right, a blue lake with a small boat, and a sleek white bullet train curving across the lower right. Add trees and bushes throughout, plus a small arched bridge near the lower middle. The 11 people are casually dressed in varied outfits and are all holding markers or crayons while leaning, kneeling, or lying around the paper. Include 6 people across the top edge, 3 along the left side, and 2 along the lower-right side. Their clothing should vary: hoodies, jackets, a knit beanie, a plaid shirt, a patterned sweater, a blue T-shirt, a black T-shirt, and one person in a red cardigan over dark clothes. One person on the right should wear glasses and a red cardigan, another at the bottom right should have curly dark hair, round glasses, a black T-shirt, and be lying on his stomach while drawing. Scatter a few loose crayons in blue and dark colors near the bottom edge of the paper. Keep the mood collaborative, creative, and playful, with the large illustrated poster as the clear focal point.

content: A flashy Japanese romantic comedy movie poster in a cute-but-dramatic pop anime mascot style, designed like a theatrical film teaser. Center the composition on a full-body cartoon bunny girl mascot named {argument name="character name" default="パン子"}, with a large white face, black body and one black ear, one bright red ear, thick black outline, half-lidded glamorous eyes with long lashes, pink blush circles on her cheeks, a tiny red nose, a small tongue peeking out, and a pink bow with white polka dots on top of her head. She wears a sleeveless pink dress with white polka dots and a black scarf-like neck detail, posing with one hand near her cheek in a confident, slightly flirty stance. The background is a dreamy sunset waterfront city skyline with golden reflections on the water, pastel pink-orange-blue sky, sparkles, soft bokeh, and a ferris wheel on the left. Place 2 male silhouette figures in the midground, one on the left standing casually and one on the right in a suit-like pose, suggesting potential love interests. Add lush tropical flowers and leaves around the borders, especially pink hibiscus blossoms in the corners, plus floating hearts and glitter effects throughout. Use a bold, layered Japanese poster layout packed with decorative typography and stickers. At the top, handwritten-style Japanese text reads: 「笑って、泣いて、恋をして。アラサーの私、まだまだ諦めない！」 with pink emphasis and doodled heart lines. On the upper left, include a bright pink scalloped badge that says 「2026年 夏公開」. Along the right side, place vertical Japanese text: 「私の幸せ、探しにいきます。」. Near the lower left, add a pink ribbon label reading 「劇場版！」. Across the bottom center, create the large main title in bold decorative Japanese lettering: 「アラサー パン子の 婚活奮闘記」 with pink and dark navy text, white outlines, and a cute heart accent. Beneath it, add a pink slogan banner with yellow-highlighted text: 「恋に迷って、人生はもっとキラキラする♥」. Include small faux credits at the bottom in Japanese film-poster style. Around the lower area, place 4 small polaroid-style inset snapshots of the bunny character: 2 on the lower left and 2 on the lower right, each showing different cute situations such as a close-up pose, sitting at a cafe table, wearing sunglasses, or posing outdoors. Add a small notebook page labeled "Today's Mission" with checklist hearts in the lower left, and a plastic iced drink cup with straw plus sunglasses in the lower right. Overall feeling: feminine, comedic, inspirational, sparkly, over-the-top, and nostalgic, like a parody of a live-action romance film poster starring a mascot heroine. Use vivid pinks, peach sunset tones, sky blue, white, and navy, with glossy highlights and a polished promotional-poster finish.

Mark exactly 12 destinations on the map with black dot markers and bold black capsule labels with white uppercase text: BASEL, ZÜRICH, ST. GALLEN, LUCERNE, BERN, INTERLAKEN, CHUR, ST. MORITZ, LUGANO, ZERMATT, GENEVA, and LAUSANNE. Integrate miniature landmark buildings and scenery directly onto the map, including churches, old town towers, waterfront structures, castles, and mountain villages, plus two small red trains moving through the landscape. Add surrounding travel ephemera arranged around the map: 1 worn brown vintage suitcase with travel stickers and a red Swiss-cross badge in the upper left, 1 antique brass compass rose on the left, 1 postage stamp in the upper right reading TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND with mountain art and postal cancellation marks, 1 realistic Swiss flag on a pole in the top right corner, 1 tilted polaroid photo in the lower left with snowy mountains and the caption {argument name="photo caption" default="Swiss Alps"}, and 4 faceted heart-shaped crystal charms total, with 2 clear/silver hearts and 2 red hearts placed around the composition. On the right side, add a vertical sightseeing list with icon illustrations and thin separators, containing exactly 12 city entries with headings and short attraction lines: ZÜRICH — Bahnhofstrasse; Old Town (Altstadt); Lake Zurich. LUCERNE — Chapel Bridge; Lion Monument; Lake Lucerne. INTERLAKEN — Jungfraujoch; Harder Kulm; Lake Brienz & Thun. ZERMATT — Matterhorn; Gornergrat Railway; Skiing & Hiking. GENEVA — Jet d'Eau; United Nations; Lake Geneva. LAUSANNE — Olympic Museum; Lausanne Cathedral; Lake Geneva. BERN — Federal Palace; Zytglogge Clock Tower; Bear Park. ST. MORITZ — St. Moritz Lake; Skiing; Luxury Shopping. LUGANO — Lake Lugano; Monte Brè; Swiss-Italian Culture. ST. GALLEN — Abbey Library; St. Gallen Cathedral; Textile Museum. CHUR — Old Town; Bishop's Palace; Rhine Valley. BASEL — Kunstmuseum; Basel Minster; Rhine River. Use a premium editorial travel-brand aesthetic, combining realistic miniature map rendering, crisp typography, soft studio shadows, subtle drop shadows under objects, and a polished tourism campaign look.

content: A cinematic live-action action scene in a narrow old European stone street at golden-hour sunset, shot from an extremely low, close-up perspective with a dramatic wide-angle lens. In the center-left foreground, a dynamic male fighter inspired by {argument name="character name" default="Luffy"} lunges forward in mid-motion, wearing a straw hat, an open {argument name="jacket color" default="red"} shirt, a light tank top, and dark pants. His body is twisted aggressively as he launches a spinning-top battle attack with a handheld launcher. In the right foreground, a sharply dressed gangster-like man in a dark suit and white shirt leans in, also firing a launcher, with two more suited men behind him and a crowd of onlookers filling the street. In the immediate foreground, exactly 2 spinning tops collide on a glossy dark surface, producing showers of bright orange sparks and multiple circular light trails that arc around them, emphasizing speed and impact. The environment is dense and atmospheric: weathered stone buildings rise on both sides, the street is packed with spectators, and a grand baroque cathedral dome and towers stand in the sunlit background. Use intense warm amber and copper lighting, deep shadows, high contrast, dust and spark particles, gritty texture, dramatic motion blur, shallow depth of field, and an epic blockbuster tone. The composition should feel like a hybrid of underground battle, street duel, and anime-inspired live-action adaptation, with kinetic energy, tension, and hyper-detailed realism.
title: Cinematic Spinning Top Street Duel
description: This prompt generates a dramatic live-action style action image of a straw-hatted hero battling suited opponents with 2 colliding spinning tops in a historic city street, ideal for cinematic poster art or viral anime-inspired concept imagery.

content: A hyper-realistic cinematic action photo of a young man mid-jump above a rooftop at golden-hour sunset, captured from a dramatic low angle against a glowing orange sky filled with scattered clouds. He is centered in the frame, airborne with both knees bent, wearing a woven straw hat, an open {argument name="jacket color" default="bright red"} overshirt flaring in the wind, a white tank top, dark loose cargo-style pants, rugged dark boots, layered necklaces, fingerless gloves, and a belt with a launcher holster clipped at his waist. His right arm is thrust toward the camera, launching a spinning top toy on a visible ripcord, with the toy in the extreme foreground on the right side rendered large and motion-blurred for depth and speed. Place a transparent plastic Beyblade battle stadium at the bottom foreground, catching warm reflections from the sunset, with the clearly visible printed logo text {argument name="brand text" default="BEYBLADE X"}. The city skyline stretches across the lower background with several high-rise buildings silhouetted by the setting sun near the horizon. Lighting is intensely warm and backlit, with strong rim light, cinematic contrast, subtle lens flare, and dynamic fabric movement. The composition should feel like a live-action promotional poster for {argument name="toy franchise" default="Beyblade X"}, emphasizing energy, youth, speed, and urban rooftop competition, in vertical poster format.
title: Cinematic Beyblade Rooftop Launch
description: This prompt generates a dramatic live-action style poster of a rooftop Beyblade launch at sunset, ideal for toy advertising, fan art, or action campaign visuals.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual foundation, expand the single sky-palace scene into a complete cinematic world-building presentation for a fantasy civilization. Preserve the same East Asian celestial imperial design language, floating architecture above clouds, gilded ornamentation, warm sunset lighting, and ultra-detailed realistic concept-art look, then turn it into a polished multi-panel lore board on a dark background with elegant editorial typography. Include 8 labeled sections: 1 large hero overview panel for the civilization, 1 architecture section with 9 images, 1 characters section with 7 full-body character designs, 1 clothing and armor section with 6 outfit variations, 1 vehicles and transport section with 4 vehicle designs, 1 world map section with 1 illustrated map, 1 environments section with 6 environment images, and 1 culture and details section with 6 close-up detail images. Add a refined fantasy title and short lore paragraph for the civilization, using the name {argument name="civilization name" default="Celestial Dynasty"}. The architecture section should show 9 distinct items: palace, temple, gate, pillar, bridge, throne hall, garden, library, and observatory. The characters section should show 7 archetypes: emperor, empress, high priest, general, royal guard, scholar, and artisan. The clothing and armor section should show 6 designs: ceremonial robe, battle armor, noble attire, priest robes, artisan garments, and dancer costume. The vehicles and transport section should show 4 designs: an airship, a flying beast mount, a sky chariot, and a ceremonial palanquin. The environments section should show 6 scenes: one wide banner panorama plus 5 smaller locations, including forest, mountain peaks, lotus valley, golden fields, and a celestial port. The culture and details section should show 6 images: dragon motif, lantern or artifact, palace interior, scholarly scene, mechanical instruments, and decorative symbols. Keep all panels visually unified as if from one official franchise world bible, with extremely rich detail, believable material design, and cinematic realism.
title: Celestial Dynasty World Bible Board
description: This prompt turns one reference scene into a complete fantasy civilization pitch board with architecture, characters, costumes, vehicles, map, environments, and cultural details for concept development or franchise worldbuilding.

content: A dense surreal collage poster blending retro Japanese street culture, dystopian futurism, environmental collapse, and cosmic dream imagery in one vertically stacked composition. The image should feel like layered mixed-media street art made from torn posters, ink illustration, manga textures, watercolor washes, newspaper print, spray paint, and graphic design fragments. The overall palette combines deep midnight blues, black, cream paper tones, neon magenta, crimson red, cherry blossom pink, and industrial gray. In the upper left, show a large red sun behind Mount Fuji with cherry blossom branches crossing the corner, and a small airplane in the sky. Along the left side and lower left, depict a crowded Tokyo-like city street packed with pedestrians, glowing signs, dense buildings, and a tall cylindrical building with a smiley face near the top and a vertical sign reading AI IS WATCHING YOU. Include stylized Japanese-style signage on nearby buildings. Add a giant wave motif and a pagoda integrated into the urban scene. In the upper center, place a dark industrial skyline with multiple smokestacks releasing massive black clouds, transitioning into a giant astronaut floating forward with one hand reaching out. In the upper right, transform the sky into outer space with stars, a swirling purple-and-blue nebula, and a black hole. Beneath that, create a futuristic eco-city of sleek skyscrapers mixed with lush trees, cliffs, and cascading waterfalls. Add a glowing neon sign on the far right that reads DREAMING IS FREE. Near the astronaut, place a torn poster with the text THE FUTURE IS UNWRITTEN in large type and below it But we are the authors in smaller type. Across the center, layer floral elements including cherry blossoms and large roses around a partially obscured central human portrait to give the sense of fragmented identity. In the lower center, show a person from behind wearing a dark hooded jacket with graffiti-style text reading QUESTION EVERYTHING. Around them, include additional cutout portrait fragments, a Mondrian-inspired geometric block of red, blue, yellow, white, and black rectangles, a classical marble bust fragment, a white dove in flight, a small protest sign that reads EQUALITY ≠ EQUITY, and a seated figure looking toward the futuristic landscape. In the lower left corner, include part of a noir-style person in a dark hat and coat, and in the lower right, part of a manga-style female face in profile. Scatter graffiti, torn edges, ink splatters, layered paper textures, and poster remnants throughout. The composition should be extremely busy, cinematic, and thought-provoking, balancing hope and anxiety, tradition and technology, nature and urban overload, in the style of a high-detail contemporary collage mural.
title: Surreal Futurist Japanese Collage Poster
description: A richly layered mixed-media poster prompt for generating a dense editorial collage that merges Tokyo street life, space-age symbolism, protest art, and eco-futurist cityscapes.

content: A gritty retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of black, deep red, and aged beige paper texture, designed like a bold vintage screen-printed action poster. Show 2 stylized women in a dramatic diagonal composition, frozen mid-fight. On the left, a woman dressed like a nurse in a short white uniform and angular nurse cap lunges forward with one knee raised and one arm bent, her body sharply foreshortened. On the right, a woman in a fitted black dress and wide-brim black hat leans backward in a defensive pose, one arm raised above her head and the other near her torso, long dark hair flowing behind her. Render both figures with hard-edged geometric shapes, exaggerated limbs, sharp shadows, and high-contrast noir facial planes. Use aggressive red diagonal rays sweeping across the background, with black architectural bars and abstract constructivist shapes framing the scene. Add distressed paper grain, ink wear, and slight misregistration for a worn print effect. Place a small blurred monkey head emblem in the upper-right corner. Include large blocky poster text in the lower left across 3 lines reading “SCOTTISH RECIPE:” then “MINCE AND” then “TATTIES”, with the first 2 lines in beige and the final 2 lines in strong red, using a heavy squared sans-serif display font. Add a red cross-like graphic element in the lower-right corner. The overall mood is violent, satirical, cinematic, and strikingly graphic, like a Soviet constructivist pulp film poster advertising {argument name="dish name" default="Scottish Recipe: Mince and Tatties"}.
title: Retro Constructivist Fight Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold vintage propaganda-style poster with two women in a stylized fight scene, ideal for satirical pulp artwork or dramatic graphic poster designs.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the cast reference, transform the simple lineup into an ornate Japanese light-novel character relationship chart poster. Keep the same 10 named characters and reuse their existing portrait art as the base visuals, but redesign the layout into a polished infographic on a soft cream and pale-blue fantasy background with decorative borders, sparkles, roses, and a small European-style hotel building vignette in the upper left. Add a large Japanese title at the top, 「支配人はかりそめの顔」, with the subtitle 「キャラクター紹介＆相関図」, and place a dark badge in the upper right that says 「ネタバレ配慮版」. Put the heroine 一条 紬希 in the center as the main focus in a framed character card labeled 「主人公」, and place 秦野 啓司 in a large framed card on the right as the key counterpart. Arrange the remaining 8 characters around them in individual profile cards: 加賀坂 その葉, 川原 澪, 樫村, 紬希の母, ハルカ, 杏子, 美果, 桜子. Connect the characters with multiple colored arrows and relationship labels to visualize the network; include exactly 14 visible relationship labels: 「親友」, 「理解者」, 「本音を見抜く」, 「憧れ」, 「相談」, 「画策」, 「仲直り中」, 「直感的理解」, 「メンター」, 「実務支援」, 「保護者的存在」, 「後輩　ムードメーカー」, 「後輩　グループを支える」, 「後輩　明るさ・希望」. Also add the 8 central horizontal relationship callouts between 一条 紬希 and 秦野 啓司: 「偽溶み→公認」, 「ライバル」, 「秘密を共有」, 「対等な相棒」, 「気になる存在」, plus a pink central badge reading 「反発から信頼へ」, and 3 lower callouts: 「信頼」, 「協力を後押し」, 「二人の空気に気づく」. Include a gold-ribbon group label above the three lower girls that says 「ASTRALの仲間たち」. Add a bottom section with exactly 10 smaller summary cards, one for each character again, lined up across the width. On the far right, add 2 boxed sidebar sections titled 「作品のキーワード」 and 「関係の見どころ」; the first should contain 4 bullet items with icons, and the second should contain 4 bullet items with icons. Fill every card with dense Japanese profile text and role tags in a clean editorial style, as if for a promotional relationship guide included with a novel. Make the overall design elegant, readable, romantic-mystery themed, and magazine-quality.
title: Japanese Character Relationship Chart Poster
description: This prompt turns a cast lineup reference into a polished Japanese novel-style character introduction and relationship map poster for story promotion or reader guides.

content: A dreamy anime-style low-angle illustration of a young schoolgirl standing in a flower field under a vivid clear blue sky, viewed from near ground level as if the camera is among the blossoms looking up at her. She has a short platinum-blonde bob with soft bangs, bright blue eyes, pale skin, and a calm slightly serious expression. She wears a round yellow sunhat with a blue ribbon tied at the back, an oversized light blue smock-like dress with a white collar, a visible name tag pinned to her chest reading {argument name="name tag text" default="兀華"}, and a mustard-yellow crossbody satchel. One hand is extended toward the viewer with the palm open, creating strong foreground foreshortening. Use a high-contrast teal, amber, black, and gold color palette with intense cinematic grading, sharp focus on the character, and atmospheric glow around the lights. Add stylized poster typography: at the very top, a gold all-caps tagline reading {argument name="top tagline" default="NO PAIN. MUCH GAIN. SUCH LEGEND."}. Add 2 blocks of small white Japanese copy, 1 on the left of the character and 1 on the right, each set in 2 lines. At the bottom, place a gigantic cracked stone-textured gold title in all caps reading {argument name="movie title" default="SQUAT HERO"}. Beneath it, add a red all-caps subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle" default="LEG DAY IS DESTINY."}. Add a small red stamp-like Japanese label near the lower right of the title. Include dense tiny mock film-poster credits in white across the lower center, a ratings box in the lower left, 3 tiny studio or audio logos in the lower right, and a centered release line near the bottom reading {argument name="release text" default="COMING SOON TO A GYM NEAR YOU"}. Make it look like a polished blockbuster action-comedy sports film poster with absurdly epic intensity, photoreal rendering, dramatic shadows, volumetric smoke, reflective ground, and premium theatrical poster design.
title: Cinematic Shiba Squat Hero Poster

content: Create a highly detailed, colorful isometric festival poster illustration of a bustling Latin American technology fair in an open urban plaza, packed with dozens of people networking, coding, presenting, eating, recording media, and attending talks. The overall style should feel like a premium editorial cityscape poster: vibrant, dense, optimistic, playful, and full of readable signage, with crisp linework, painterly textures, warm sunlight, and a celebratory startup-community atmosphere. The main headline on the large stage at upper left reads {argument name="headline text" default="LATAM TECH FEST"}, with a subheading in Spanish reading "Aprender para transformar". On the stage, show a live conference with blue lighting, a presenter, and a seated audience; include 4 vertical icon panels on the stage area labeled "Educación", "Tecnología", "Innovación", and "Futuro", plus 3 glowing topic icons on the back wall labeled "Código", "Comunidad", and "Impacto". Build the plaza as a dense multi-zone event map with exactly 24 clearly labeled signs or booths distributed across the scene: "Keep Coding Keep Growing", "YO APRENDÍ EN LÍNEA", "Remote Work Zone", "ENGLISH UPGRADE YOUR FUTURE", "STARTUPS BUILD THE FUTURE", "DESIGN THINKING", "HACKATHON 24 HORAS DE IDEAS", "Café con código", "AREPAS CON TODO", "Hechas con código y ♥", "Inspiración", "Networking", "Aprendizaje", "Café", "Baños", "SOMOS LATINOAMÉRICA", "AI LAB", "DATA PEOPLE", "DEVS QUE IMPACTAN", "MARKETING GROWTH & COMMUNITY", "PRODUCT BUILD WHAT MATTERS", "FINTECH EL FUTURO DEL DINERO", "FOUNDER MODE", and "DEMO DAY LAUNCH · SCALE". In the center of the plaza, place a circular fountain with a large green geometric logo sculpture as the visual anchor. Surround it with tables, laptops, whiteboards, crowds, planters, and benches. Include a colorful hillside neighborhood in the background with mountains, palm trees, power lines, and exactly 2 red cable cars crossing the sky; also add exactly 1 small drone flying overhead. On the upper right building, place a large brand sign reading {argument name="brand name" default="Platzi"} and a green billboard that says "NUNCA PARES DE APRENDER". Populate the lower and middle foreground with many micro-scenes: a podcast booth labeled "PODCAST ON AIR", a neon "LIVE STREAM" corner, a startup workspace with people using laptops, a hackathon judging table, a founder pitch area, a fintech board with charts, and a coffee stand with espresso equipment and menu boards. Add 6 animal or mascot details across the scene: 1 orange cat lounging near the left worktables, 1 capybara at the lower left, 1 multicolor llama piñata in the lower center-left, 1 yellow rubber duck near the center-bottom, 1 small green robot near the bottom center-right, and 1 tiny turtle near the bottom beside a coin. Also place exactly 4 vehicle elements: 2 green scooters at the lower left, 1 decorated taco truck at the lower right with the sign "TACOS AL PASTOR", and 1 wheelchair user moving through the crowd. Include extra props that reinforce tech culture: whiteboards with sticky notes, a board titled "Traction" with an upward graph and bullet points "Users", "Revenue", "Retention", "Love", a board titled "CAP TABLE" with percentage rows, a Bitcoin-style coin on the ground, microphones, cameras, cables, monitors, smartphones, and branded green merchandise. Clothing should be modern casual startup attire with hoodies, jackets, backpacks, jeans, sneakers, and conference badges, featuring a diverse mix of ages and Latin American identities. Use rich greens, teals, oranges, purples, and warm neutrals, with lush plants and vines integrated into architecture. Make every corner busy and discoverable, like a Where's-Waldo-style tech ecosystem celebration, but keep the composition readable and inviting.
title: Latin American Tech Festival Poster
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric festival-style illustration of a vibrant Latin American tech conference plaza, ideal for event branding, startup community posters, or social media showcase art.

content: Create a dramatic luxury sports poster for {argument name="player name" default="Bernardo Silva"} as a Juventus football star, in a dark cinematic black-and-gold editorial style. The background is a massive waving Juventus flag filling the upper half of the image, black fabric with broad white stripes and a large metallic gold Juventus "J" crest on the right side, topped by exactly 3 gold stars. In front of the flag, place an oversized close-up half-body portrait of the player wearing a classic Juventus home kit, facing slightly left, with wet textured hair, visible neck tattoos, dramatic rim lighting, and the face partially obscured by shadow for a mysterious heroic look. In the foreground, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with a soccer ball at his feet on a floodlit pitch, centered near the bottom, wearing the black-and-white striped Juventus jersey with white shorts, white socks, black boots, gold number 20 on the shorts, gold Adidas details, and the Jeep sponsor logo clearly visible. The stadium should wrap across the lower half with bright white floodlights, dark packed stands, light fog, and subtle smoke near the ground. content: A classical Chinese ink-wash painting on warm aged rice paper, combining landscape art and calligraphy in a clean two-part composition. On the left half, leave broad negative space filled with bold black brush-calligraphy showing the poem title {argument name="poem title" default="早发白帝城"}, the poet name {argument name="poet name" default="李白"}, and four large vertical lines of poem text in expressive handwritten script: {argument name="poem text" default="朝辞白帝彩云间，千里江陵一日还。两岸猿声啼不住，轻舟已过万重山。"}. On the right half, paint a serene river gorge at sunrise in the style of a traditional shan shui scroll: a soft orange sun low above misty layered mountains, tall steep cliffs on both sides, faint haze in the distance, and calm reflective water glowing with pale gold light. In the foreground at lower right, place a small wooden river boat with a simple covered cabin and a vertical mast. A solitary ancient Chinese scholar in flowing white hanfu stands on the deck facing the landscape from behind, hair tied in a traditional topknot, long robe and sash slightly trailing in the breeze, creating a contemplative mood. Add a tiny temple pavilion perched high on the top of the right cliff. Use delicate ink outlines, subtle sepia and gray washes, textured paper grain, elegant empty space, and refined literati-painting aesthetics. The overall image should feel poetic, quiet, balanced, and museum-quality, with especially beautiful legible calligraphy integrated into the artwork.
title: Classical Chinese Poem Scroll Landscape
description: A traditional Chinese ink-style artwork featuring a famous poem in calligraphy beside a sunrise river gorge scene, ideal for literary posters, cultural prints, or editorial art.

content: Create a cinematic sports advertising poster featuring a giant close-up running shoe in motion splashing through shallow water on a wet city street at sunset. The composition is a low-angle, ultra-dynamic action shot with 1 primary shoe dominating the right half of the frame and 1 secondary blurred shoe visible behind it, implying a runner mid-stride. The hero sneaker is a white and gray knit performance shoe with a black side swoosh-style logo, gray laces, small red lace-loop accents, a thick translucent cushioned sole, and a bright orange-red outsole glow along the bottom edge. Show the shoe covered in realistic water droplets and sharp texture detail, with explosive splash particles frozen around the sole. The runner wears dark athletic leggings, visible only from the lower legs down. content:
{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. 
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}" strictly using the font {argument name="font family" default="Inter Semibold"}.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
title: Dual Exposure Sports Graphic
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating a mixed-media sports tribute poster using silhouette containers, photo-mosaic grids, and tactile textures like halftone dots and film grain.

content: A vertical Japanese anime fantasy game or light-novel promotional poster in a soft pastel lavender, white, and gold palette, featuring a single heroic teenage girl as the main subject in a grand celestial city. Her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block centered over the head, but the visible design suggests a delicate anime heroine with very long flowing silver-lilac hair, side bangs, loose strands, and star-shaped hair ornaments with dark indigo ribbon bows. She wears an elaborate magical-girl style dress: off-shoulder white bodice with navy and violet trim, gold star motifs, layered asymmetrical skirt in white, periwinkle, violet, and deep indigo, a very large dark blue waist bow with a gold star jewel, detached flowing sleeves, gold chains with tiny star charms draped at the hip, white thigh-high stockings, and a blue star-shaped garter ornament on one thigh. On the left side, add 1 vertical Japanese copy block running downward beside the character. At the lower right, include 3 small portrait inset panels of the same girl, stacked diagonally: 1 calm front-facing expression, 1 side-profile serious expression, and 1 smiling eyes-closed expression. At the lower left, place the large Japanese title "星紡ぐレガシア" with the English subtitle "— LEGACIA: Weave the Stars —" beneath it. At the bottom right, add the date text "2025. 夏" and one short Japanese tagline line below. At the very bottom edge, include 2 small social or website info blocks on the left and a tiny copyright line on the right. Render in high-end modern anime promotional illustration style, luminous pastel fantasy atmosphere, elegant composition, smooth linework and coloring, soft cel shading, delicate fabric movement, glossy highlights, intricate costume details, clean typography layout, and refined commercial poster finish.

content:
A polished anime-style vertical key visual poster for a futuristic fantasy action series. Center the composition on a full-body young heroine in a confident three-quarter back pose, looking over her shoulder, with her face partially obscured by angle and hair. She has long flowing silver-white hair blowing dramatically in the wind, pale skin, and cool violet accents. Her outfit is a sleek black, white, and purple combat uniform: black cropped jacket with white hood and cape-like layered back panels, fitted bodice, short pleated skirt, utility belt and straps, black gloves, thigh strap on one leg, and subtle star-emblem details. In her right hand she holds a large angular sci-fi sword with glowing purple energy lines. The background is a bright blue daytime sky with soft clouds, several white birds, and an elegant white city of tall cathedral-like spires and bridges, creating a grand utopian futuristic kingdom atmosphere. Use strong wind effects in the hair, ribbons, coat tails, and fabric. Add smooth linework and smooth coloring, clean anime rendering, high-detail cel shading, crisp lighting, glossy highlights, and a premium game-promo illustration finish.

Design it as a complete Japanese promotional poster layout. On the upper left, place a large bold vertical headline in Japanese reading "未来を、自分の手で。" with the middle phrase in purple and the rest in black, over a pale decorative emblem. Beneath it, add a short Japanese blurb in smaller text. On the right side, place a tall dark vertical sidebar with white Japanese text reading "信じてる。だから、私が道を切り開く。". On the lower left, include 3 tilted rectangular inset images stacked diagonally: 1 close-up portrait of the heroine's face, 1 action shot of her fighting with the glowing sword, and 1 wide cityscape view. Below those in a dark character info panel, show the character name "ルシア" with the romanized name "Lucia" and a small emblem, followed by 7 profile lines in Japanese: "CV：悠木 碧", "年齢：17歳", "所属：黎明騎士団（不屈の翼）", "武器：双刃剣（レプリカント）", "誕生日：4月12日", "身長：165cm", "好きなもの：静かな場所、星空", and a final dislike line. At the bottom center, place the large series logo text "黎明のリベリオン" with the English subtitle "REIMEI NO REBELLION" beneath it, and below that the release line "2025年、始動。". Color palette: white, black, deep indigo, electric violet, and sky blue. Overall mood: heroic, elegant, aspirational, premium anime game or light novel promotional poster.

content: A dense isometric steampunk-cyberpunk city illustration at dusk, designed like a whimsical indie tech district called {argument name="city name" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}. The scene is a single sprawling urban plaza packed with narrow brick buildings, rooftop antennas, cables, pipes, neon signs, market stalls, tiny pedestrians, and playful programmer humor. In the center background, a plaza labeled “PLAZA DEL PROMPT” surrounds a sculptural fountain with pale blue water, with benches and people gathered around it. To the left background, a tall building with a giant sign reading “BARRIO CÓDIGO ABIERTO” is covered in balconies, windows, hanging laundry, air conditioners, plants, and street activity. To the right background, another block bears a large sign “CALLEJÓN DE LOS AGENTES,” with stacked storefront signs including “Codex Barbería cortes exactos,” “Gemini Lavandería,” “Claude’s Coffee,” and “Dr. Llama.” Further right, a heavy industrial factory zone with smokestacks, cranes, ducts, crates, and catwalks displays 3 large signs: “ZONA INDUSTRIAL,” “FÁBRICA DE TOKENS,” and “LLM.” A cloud of floating letters and symbols rises above the chimneys like generated text smoke. In the foreground center, a tall clocktower-like corner building has a vertical neon sign reading “INDIE MIND,” a large round clock on the facade, warm lit windows, and a small stone animal sculpture at its base. To the right foreground, a lively market district glows with string lights and a bright neon sign “MERCADO NOCTURNO,” with 3 visible stall signs: “Memoria usada barata,” “Embeddings frescos del día,” and “Se cambian vectores.” Nearby are 3 more joke signs: “HARD HAT: prompt injection zone,” “HACKATHON: entra y sal con un bug,” and a food stand labeled “STACK OVERFLOW NOODLES.” To the left foreground, an older mixed-use building is filled with signs and visual jokes, including a huge rooftop billboard with 2 cats on top and the title {argument name="main billboard text" default="INDIE MIND CITY"}, plus a small version label “v1.0.0.” On that same block, include these visible signs: “FORGE & CAFE,” “git push cafe +$2,” “Tienda de MERGE CONFLICTS abierto 24/7,” “Se reparan linters,” “NO rm -rf aquí,” “Ralph was here,” “npm install vv,” “sudo make me sandwich,” “WORKTREE,” “SE VENDE GPU USADA,” “MUSEO DEL MERGE CONFLICT,” “NOTARÍA DE COMMITS FIRMADOS,” “PSICÓLOGO PARA SENIOR DEVS 50m 80,” “GATO PERDIDO responde a localhost,” and a poster board reading “HOY: charla sobre agentic coding entrada libre” and “REUNIÓN DE AA^AI REUNIDOS DE LOS AGI.” Near the center-left plaza, add a sandwich-board style sign labeled “PROMPTS USADOS” with 3 lines beneath it, and small plaza signs that read “HELLO WORLD,” “Tailscale,” “OpenRouter,” and “Deepseek.” The streets are cobblestone and crowded with exact small story details: 1 yellow tram labeled “LÍNEA MAIN,” 1 small blue car, 1 bicycle cart, 1 delivery scooter, outdoor café tables, chess players, pedestrians, crates, potted plants, striped awnings, laundry lines, glowing windows, rooftop cats, and a white llama standing near the agent alley. Use a warm muted palette of dusty teal, rust, amber, tan, and faded neon pink and cyan. Render it as an ultra-detailed editorial illustration with clean isometric perspective, intricate linework, soft atmospheric lighting, tiny readable signage, cozy urban clutter, and humorous handcrafted worldbuilding.
title: Indie Mind City Isometric Tech District
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric retro-futurist city scene full of humorous AI and programmer references, ideal for editorial art, posters, or social media visuals about indie AI culture.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the hero food photo, transform it into a polished one-page restaurant branding board for a fried chicken and waffle-fries concept named {argument name="brand name" default="Can Dende"}. Keep the yellow-table food photography as the visual anchor, but redesign the output as a clean square brand guideline sheet on a warm off-white background with a cheerful, retro, hand-drawn fast-casual identity. Add a large logo area in the upper left with bold vintage red lettering, a small illustrated fried-food mascot above it, and the tagline “FRIED CHICKEN & RUFFLES”. Build the page as a structured multi-panel layout with 9 sections: 1) logo/hero area, 2) brand story text block, 3) top-right hero photo crop from the reference, 4) color palette showing exactly 5 swatches with hex labels, 5) typography section with a large display sample of the brand name plus 3 text styles labeled header, subhead, and body, 6) patterns and textures section with exactly 4 playful assets: a yellow wavy stripe pattern, a red checker pattern, a handwritten phrase, and a small doodle heart, 7) iconography section with exactly 5 simple icons: chicken, bottle, fries, smiley face, and heart, 8) photography style section with a 2x2 grid of exactly 4 food-photo crops derived from the reference and matching close-up shots, plus a short bullet list of photography guidelines, and 9) brand applications section with exactly 5 mockups labeled signage, takeout packaging, menu design, social media, and staff apparel. Include a circular badge near the hero photo that says {argument name="badge text" default="CRISPY GOOD MOOD"}. Use the palette {argument name="primary palette" default="yellow, tomato red, deep navy, leaf green, soft pink"}. Add a bottom banner with 2 sections titled “VOICE & VIBE” and a short brand summary paragraph. Overall feel: modern branding presentation, vibrant, appetizing, playful, sunny, editorial, highly legible, premium-but-fun.
title: Retro Fast-Food Brand Board
description: This prompt turns a reference food photo into a complete restaurant branding presentation board for showcasing logo, palette, typography, photography style, and brand applications.

content: A traditional Chinese calligraphy painting on aged tan xuan paper, landscape orientation, styled like an antique literati hanging scroll reproduction. The main composition is a large block of bold black semi-cursive to cursive brush calligraphy arranged in 10 vertical columns, read right to left, featuring the poem title at the top of the rightmost main column as {argument name="poem title" default="雨霖铃"}. The calligraphy should feel elegant, fluid, and expressive, with varied ink density, dry-brush texture, thick and thin stroke transitions, and natural hand-written spacing rather than perfect typesetting. Use the visible poem text as written in the image, including its inaccuracies, with the right-side main columns beginning: “寒蝉凄切，对长亭晚，骤雨初歇。都门帐饮无绪，留恋处，兰舟催发，执手相看泪眼，竟无语凝噎。念去去，千里烟波，暮霭沉沉楚天阔。多情自古，雷情自古伤离别，更那堪冷冷宵，酒醒倦兼芊？杨柳岸，晓风残月。此去经年良宰，经年，应是良辰好景。便纵有千种风情，更与何人说？” Place a narrower signature column on the far left with 1 vertical inscription reading {argument name="signature text" default="柳永《雨霖铃·寒蝉凄切》"}. Add 4 red seals total: 1 oval collector-style seal near the upper right margin and 3 square seals stacked vertically near the lower left inscription area. Include a faint monochrome ink-wash landscape in the lower right corner with 1 drooping willow tree and 1 small pavilion by the water, partially faded into the paper. The paper should have warm brown aging, subtle stains, mottling, foxing, worn edges, and a museum-photograph feel. Overall mood is refined, poetic, historical, and scholarly, like a Song-dynasty-inspired calligraphy artwork photographed flat in soft even light.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
description: This prompt generates an antique-style Chinese brush calligraphy artwork with poem text, seals, and a faint ink landscape, suitable for cultural art prints or classical literature visuals.

content: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled {argument name="title text" default="DARK LEGENDS"}, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text “Death Note,” posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling {argument name="headline text" default="DARK LEGENDS"} in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.
title: Dark Anime Legends Poster
description: A dramatic gothic crossover-style anime poster featuring four dark male characters in a ruined city under a blood moon, ideal for cinematic key art or promotional poster generation.

content: A dark, cinematic anime villain poster in an ultra-detailed gothic horror style, arranged as a single dramatic collage against a ruined infernal city. Use a wide landscape composition with a black, crimson, and electric violet palette, heavy smoke, ash, embers, magical lightning, and chaotic painterly energy. Feature 4 major villain figures. In the center foreground, a massive obese pirate emperor with a huge grin, wild black beard, open red captain coat, bare scarred chest and belly, layered necklaces, belt, and multiple pistols tucked at his waist, holding 2 flintlock pistols outward in a triumphant pose. Behind him at upper center, a tall pink muscular demon-like humanoid with a smooth head and a single curled head tentacle, standing with arms slightly spread, glowing with purple aura and lightning. On the left foreground, a pale long-haired Japanese swordsman in loose light robes, head bowed slightly, surrounded by a giant coiled serpent rising behind him with open mouth; add the vertical Japanese text "大蛇丸" near this figure and the vertical text "魔人ブウ" near the upper-center figure. On the right, a tall elegant demon lord in layered dark kimono-like robes, long flowing hair, calm sinister posture, framed by 8 smaller dark red moons plus 1 large full red moon above the head, for a total of 9 moons; add the vertical Japanese text "黒ひげ" near the pirate and "鬼舞辻無惨" near the right figure. The background should be a hellish apocalypse of shattered towers, burning ruins, and shadowy architecture fading into smoke. At the bottom, place huge aggressive brush-painted title text reading {argument name="headline text" default="RISE OF VILLAINS"} in blood red with magenta highlights, rough torn edges, and glowing texture. Make the whole image feel like an epic crossover key art poster, extremely high contrast, ominous, supernatural, and menacing.
title: Dark Anime Villains Crossover Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic gothic crossover poster of four iconic anime-style villains for use as striking key art, wallpapers, or promotional fan poster imagery.

content: A hyper-detailed cinematic anime crossover poster featuring 4 legendary shonen-inspired heroes charging forward in a single epic battle composition under a dramatic apocalyptic sky. The scene is wide, symmetrical, and explosively energetic, with a glowing break in the storm clouds at the top center sending intense golden sun rays downward across the characters. From left to right: a blond ninja-inspired teenage hero in an orange-and-black outfit with a forehead protector, crouched in an attack stance and forming a glowing spinning energy orb in one hand, surrounded by orange chakra flames and several floating black spheres behind him; a muscular black-haired martial artist in an orange gi at left-center, twisting mid-strike while charging a bright blue energy sphere in his hand, wrapped in crackling blue aura and electric arcs; a lean pirate-inspired young man at right-center wearing a straw hat, sleeveless red vest, blue shorts, and sandals, lunging forward with a fierce grin, one arm extended, with white steam-like energy curling around his body; a dark-haired swordsman at far right in a flowing black-and-red checkered haori, drawing or swinging a katana with a sweeping arc of fiery red-orange energy around him. The background is a chaotic fantasy battlefield of shattered rock, sparks, lightning, embers, molten light, and swirling elemental effects, with orange fire dominating the left and right edges, cool blue energy concentrated around the martial artist, and white vapor around the pirate hero. Use extreme contrast, ultra-saturated colors, sharp inked anime linework, painterly textures, dynamic foreshortening, intense motion blur in the effects, and premium poster-quality rendering. Add a massive title across the bottom foreground reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHONEN LEGENDS"} in oversized distressed brush lettering, bright yellow-gold with thick black shadows and rough torn edges, partially overlapping the characters and debris. Make it feel like a blockbuster key art poster for {argument name="franchise theme" default="legendary shonen anime crossover"}, with thunderous energy, heroic rivalry, and unstoppable momentum.
title: Epic Shonen Crossover Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-impact anime-style ensemble poster with four iconic shonen-inspired heroes and is ideal for splash art, promotional key visuals, or fan crossover concepts.

content: A cinematic fantasy anime poster in a tall vertical composition, showing two childlike adventurer characters standing in a vast magical library-cathedral with impossibly high gothic arches, towering bookshelves on both sides, floating pages, glowing dust, and a grand staircase rising in the center toward a radiant portal-like window filled with intricate celestial magic-circle patterns. The viewpoint is low and dramatic, looking slightly upward, with both characters reaching one hand toward the viewer in an inviting gesture. On the left is a slightly taller child with short silver-white hair, soft bangs, and large green leaf-like ear ornaments or animal-like ears, wearing a navy hooded jacket over a warm orange top, dark pants, sturdy boots, and a black crossbody satchel; keep the face partially obscured by framing or angle. On the right is a shorter child with a matching design language, short silver-white bob hair with green-tinted ends, large teal-green eyes, and the same green leaf-like ear features, wearing a navy hooded jacket, orange inner layer, short dark bottoms, boots, and a mauve-purple shoulder bag decorated with small charms including a star. Between their outstretched hands, create a bright burst of magical light where two energies meet: luminous cyan-blue streams curling around the left character and warm pink-gold streams curling around the right character, with spark particles and ribbon-like trails. Split the lighting mood into cool blue on the left side and warm golden-magenta on the right side, blending at the center into a brilliant white flare. Add dense atmospheric detail: glowing motes, magical filaments, floating sheets of paper, layered architecture, and a sense of wonder and discovery. At the top, include centered Japanese tagline text in elegant white serif style: "わかることと、感じること。2つの力で世界をひらく。" At the bottom, place a very large luminous gold serif title reading "{argument name="title text" default="Epix&Ria"}" with ornate cinematic poster typography. High-detail, polished key visual, fantasy adventure film poster, richly textured, radiant, emotional, awe-inspiring, premium illustrated promotional art.
