content: Create a dramatic square commercial poster for a spicy snack brand, with a fiery red storm atmosphere and high-energy food advertising style. The background is a dark crimson sky filled with glowing clouds, scattered sparks, and visible lightning bolts. In the center, a giant tornado made of swirling transparent wind rings, glossy whole red chili peppers, square corn chips, crumbs, and seasoning particles rises upward from an opened snack bag, forming a powerful vortex. The tornado should feel dynamic and explosive, with chips and chili peppers flying outward in different sizes and depths for a cinematic 3D look. At the bottom center, place a glossy red snack packet standing upright, labeled with the brand logo and product name {argument name="product name" default="Crispy Nachos Chips"}, with a spicy flavor badge reading {argument name="flavor text" default="Spicy Masala"}, a small chili illustration, a corn note near the bottom, and a printed image of square nacho chips on the front. Put a stylized playful logo at the top left reading {argument name="brand name" default="SnaX"} in bold yellow and white script with a red outline, and a clean white platform watermark at the top right reading {argument name="platform text" default="Pollo.ai"}. On the left side, add a huge stacked distressed headline in bold condensed uppercase, with the first word in golden yellow and the remaining three lines in white, reading exactly: {argument name="headline text" default="WARNING! CRUNCH STORM INCOMING"}. Use intense rim lighting, glossy highlights, deep shadows, rich red-orange color grading, and a premium snack advertisement composition that feels spicy, crunchy, chaotic, and irresistible.
title: Spicy Nacho Tornado Ad
description: A bold square snack advertisement featuring a tornado of chips and red chilies erupting from a spicy nacho bag, ideal for food marketing and social media promos.

content: A dramatic UFC fight-poster style sports promotion for {argument name="event title" default="UFC 305"}, designed as a high-contrast vertical matchup graphic with two female MMA fighters facing inward in orthodox guard poses. The left fighter is a fit blonde woman with shoulder-length messy beach-wave hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly right. The right fighter is a fit dark-haired woman with long straight black hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly left, with a large detailed black-and-gray tattoo sleeve on her right arm and script tattoo text on the inner upper arm. Both fighters are sweaty, intensely lit, and centered close together with fists raised near chest height. Use a split background: fiery orange sparks and smoke on the left, icy blue-white sparks and haze on the right, with a dark black center seam. At the top center, place a black rectangular logo box with gold trim containing the gold text {argument name="event logo text" default="UFC 305"}. Beneath it, in stacked condensed white uppercase type, add the tagline: "TWO ICONS. ONE OCTAGON." Along the far left edge, place the surname "SWEENEY" vertically in large distressed gold letters; along the far right edge, place the surname "FOXX" vertically in large distressed silver-gray letters. In the center, overlay huge distressed white condensed sans-serif typography with the matchup names stacked exactly as {argument name="left fighter name" default="SYDNEY SWEENEY"} above a small gold "VS" and {argument name="right fighter name" default="MEGAN FOXX"}. Below that, add a small gold subtitle reading "BANTAMWEIGHT BOUT". At the bottom center, show a small realistic UFC octagon cage seen from a slightly elevated front angle, embedded into the poster. In front of the cage, place a black date card with gold trim containing stacked gold text: "JUNE 14", "SATURDAY", "10PM ET / 7PM PT". Below the card, add white text "LIVE ON" and the ESPN+ logo. Bottom left, add small gold and white ticket text reading "TICKETS ON SALE APRIL 25" with the Ticketmaster logo beneath. Bottom right, add the Rogers Arena logo and white text "ROGERS ARENA" with gold text "VANCOUVER, BC" below. Use a glossy premium combat-sports poster finish, cinematic rim lighting, gritty texture overlays, metallic typography, and intense face-off composition.

content: A soft, airy anime portrait of a delicate young woman in a minimalist off-white background, shown from the chest up in a close three-quarter view. She has long, slightly wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown with ash-gray highlights"} hair with wispy strands and straight-cut bangs, tied on one side with a large black ribbon bow. Her eyes are large, glossy, and pale gray with detailed lashes and a dreamy, distant expression. She rests her cheek against one hand, with slender fingers partly covering her face and muted gray nail polish visible. She wears a white off-shoulder blouse with voluminous sleeves, soft ruffles, gathered fabric, and thin black ribbon ties on the sleeves, creating a gentle monochrome contrast. Add a single long, elegant gold drop earring with a small pearl on the visible ear. Use a clean manga-inspired illustration style with light linework, subtle blush tones, soft cel shading, and painterly highlights in the hair. The mood is quiet, wistful, and feminine, with a refined fashion-illustration feel and a very limited palette of white, black, taupe, and gray.

content: A hyper-energetic Japanese shonen manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge with explosive pop-art chaos and bright candy colors, in the style of a weekly comic anthology cover. The main focus is a trendy gyaru teenage girl at the center, leaning toward the viewer in a dynamic foreshortened pose, grinning widely with her mouth open and pointing directly at the camera with one hand while holding a pink toy hammer over her shoulder with the other. She has layered medium-length wavy hair in {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with blonde and pink streaks"}, warm amber eyes, multiple colorful hair clips including stars and lightning bolts, earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces, flashy nail art, and a bold street-fashion outfit: vivid pink satin bomber jacket, white cropped top, black belt with gold buckle, and mixed glam accessories. The cover logo dominates the top center in huge red Japanese lettering with thick black outline and yellow border reading {argument name="masthead text" default="バクアラ!?"}, with smaller text above it reading 週刊少年. At the upper left, add a loud burst caption reading 超豪華付録(ゴミ)付き!!! with a shocked cartoon trash can mascot. Along the left side place two giant sound-effect style callouts, ドーン! near the top left and バンバーン! in blue near the lower left. On the right side, create an oversized main headline in chunky black, yellow, white, and pink Japanese display type reading 笑って暴れて今日もカオス全開!!, surrounded by smaller promotional blurbs such as 全ページ抱腹絶倒!, 笑いすぎ注意報発令中ーっ!!, and 笑撃の新連載!. In the top right corner include a magazine issue box with the date 2026年4月22日号 and price 390円. Scatter exactly 3 supporting manga-style characters around the central girl: 1 silver-haired boy with goggles on the left aiming a spiral blaster toward the viewer, 1 cheerful purple-haired girl below him holding a dessert drink, and 1 orange-haired idol-like girl in headphones at the upper right making a peace sign. Fill the background and foreground with a dense collage of floating sweets, snacks, toys, doodles, and mascot faces, including donuts, cookies, chocolate bars, candy, pudding, ice cream, popcorn, planets, stars, speech bursts, and goofy creatures, all layered with thick outlines and halftone texture. Along the bottom, include exactly 7 small serialized feature boxes in a row, each with manga-style character art and Japanese titles, creating the look of a crowded anthology teaser strip. Use an ultra-saturated palette of hot pink, yellow, orange, red, cyan, and black, with maximal visual density, overlapping typography, comic speed lines, sticker-like elements, and a glossy printed magazine cover finish. Make it feel hilarious, rebellious, loud, youthful, and irresistibly cluttered, like a parody-yet-premium next-generation Weekly Shonen Jump cover.
title: Chaotic Shonen Manga Cover
description: A loud, candy-colored parody manga magazine cover featuring a gyaru heroine, explosive Japanese headlines, and dense anthology-style teaser art for use in comic cover generation.

content: Create a hyper-detailed Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover, full-bleed, explosive and crowded, with no empty space. The format is a single vertically oriented magazine cover illustration packed with layered typography, character art, motion effects, and urban sci-fi chaos. At the top, a gigantic stylized Japanese masthead in fiery orange-red with heavy black outline and gold edging dominates the width of the page, reading 週刊少年ブレイズ, with a small celebratory badge integrated into the title showing 40年. Add a small slogan line across the very top edge in Japanese. In the top right corner, place a black issue-information box with bright yellow and white text showing the date 2026年4月22日号 and the price 特別価格 380円. The main image features exactly 3 anime characters in a dynamic triangular composition. In the center foreground, the star heroine lunges toward the viewer with strong foreshortening, one hand thrust out almost touching the camera. She is a teenage gyaru-style action heroine with {argument name="hair color" default="light brown with pink streaks"} long wavy hair flying wildly, sharp golden-brown eyes, a confident mischievous grin, sun-kissed skin, multiple ear piercings, and a flashy rebellious street-fighter vibe. Her outfit is black and gold with exactly 6 key visible pieces: a cropped top, a short jacket with metallic trim, short shorts, a belt with dangling chains, a thigh strap on one leg, and fingerless gloves. Add gold lightning motifs and glossy highlights across her clothing. Around her hand and body, draw arcs of yellow energy and speed streaks to emphasize impact. Behind her on the left midground, place a white-haired teenage boy in a black-and-white futuristic combat outfit, crouched aggressively and aiming a large mechanical gauntlet or weapon toward the viewer, surrounded by icy blue shards and angular motion lines. Behind her on the right midground, place a pink-haired teenage girl with twin tails or tied-up hair, wielding a circular bladed ring weapon, posed in motion with vivid magenta energy trails. In the upper right background, add a fourth visual focal area but not a separate main character count: a dark-haired teenage boy in a green-black combat suit aiming a glowing sci-fi rifle diagonally across the page, partially obscured by text and effects, embedded into the background action. The background is a dense neon-lit futuristic Japanese city street at night with tilted perspective, towering signs, debris, sparks, shattered fragments, electric streaks, and saturated blues, purples, pinks, and oranges. Use extreme contrast, glossy print texture, ink splatter accents, halftone-like manga magazine energy, and premium anime key visual rendering. Add large dramatic Japanese cover copy on the left in stacked blocks with thick white, yellow, red, and black lettering, including the prominent headline 新時代をブチ抜く 超熱量ヒロイン ここに爆誕!!. Add exactly 5 left-side feature callouts in colored rectangular boxes with bold names and smaller subtitle lines beneath: 雷閃ブレイカー / 天城ノア, 空駆けエンジン / 南雲ハヤト, 魔境デリバリー / 倉科ミツル, 白狼ストライカー / 久世リョウ, 超深海クラッシュ / 早瀬シン. Add exactly 5 right-side feature callouts in matching bold boxes: 極光パレット / 鳴海ユウト, 機巧グラフィティ / 胡野レイ, 龍骨ランナー / 火野アツシ, 王冠のラグナ / 深町カイ, 風神リベリオン / 東雲ガク. Also add exactly 3 promotional bursts on the right side in starburst or explosive label shapes with large yellow and white lettering: 巻頭カラー, 特大ポスター付き, 新連載スタート. Make the entire cover feel like a blockbuster debut issue for a hot new battle manga era, energetic, rebellious, flashy, polished, and unmistakably like a high-impact Japanese manga magazine cover illustration.
title: Explosive Shonen Manga Cover
description: This prompt generates a crowded, high-energy Japanese shonen magazine cover packed with anime characters, dramatic cover lines, and flashy urban sci-fi action for mock magazine art or promotional visuals.

content: A glossy Japanese shoujo manga magazine cover illustration, packed edge to edge like a real weekly romance comic issue, in a dreamy spring sunset city scene with glowing bokeh lights and falling cherry blossom petals. The cover is dominated by 4 high-school-age characters in fashionable modern anime style. In the foreground, 1 main girl stands large and centered-right, shown from mid-thigh up, with long wavy blonde hair with pink streaks, multiple ear piercings, soft glamorous makeup, and a shy romantic pose with one hand near her lips. She wears a white blouse, a large pink plaid ribbon bow, a pink plaid skirt, a loose pink cardigan slipping off her shoulders, layered necklaces, and a navy school backpack over one shoulder. Behind her stand 3 supporting students: 1 tall handsome boy in a dark school blazer and loosened tie, 1 elegant girl with blonde hair in a braided bun wearing a beige cardigan and school uniform, and 1 shorter dark-haired girl in a school uniform with a ribbon tie. The background shows a glowing pedestrian bridge or riverside walkway at dusk, lined with lights and cherry trees in full bloom, with a pink-orange-purple sky and sparkling romantic atmosphere. The composition should feel like a premium manga cover: highly rendered anime illustration, luminous highlights, delicate linework, glossy print finish, dense overlapping Japanese cover text, issue badges, callouts, hearts, sparkles, and a barcode at the bottom right. Include exactly 7 main text clusters: 1 giant magazine masthead across the top in large bubbly pink Japanese lettering with white outline, 1 vertical romance headline on the right in large pink characters with a huge numeral 3, 2 circular promotional badges on the left, 1 angled banner on the lower left, 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names at lower left, and 1 stacked list of 5 serialized story titles with author names near the lower center-right. Add exactly 3 small publication info elements on the upper right: a date/price block, a circular issue number badge, and a narrow vertical tag. Add exactly 1 inset bonus poster preview near the lower right above the barcode. Use a hyper-detailed shoujo manga cover aesthetic, romantic, fashionable, youthful, sparkling, soft glow, sunset rim light, cherry blossom storm, print-magazine realism, intricate typography layering, vibrant pinks and warm golds.
title: Shoujo Manga Magazine Cover
description: A richly detailed anime-style Japanese romance magazine cover, ideal for generating editorial-looking shoujo artwork with multiple characters and dense cover typography.

content: Create a premium vertical fast-food lifestyle advertisement in a polished commercial photography style, designed like a summer campaign poster for McDonald's and McCafé. Show a glamorous young woman with softly blurred, unidentifiable facial features sitting confidently on the hood of a sleek red sports car parked on a winding mountain road at golden hour. She has long wavy auburn hair glowing in warm sunset backlight, wears a dark green satin bomber jacket with gold detailing, a white camisole, high-waisted burgundy pants, and black ankle boots with heels. Her pose is relaxed and stylish, one leg bent and one extended forward, while she holds out a clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw and visible McDonald's golden arches branding toward the camera. Scatter red roses across the car hood around her, and place 1 McDonald's paper takeout bag on the right side of the hood. Use a dramatic canyon or hillside background with warm sunlight, soft haze, cinematic depth of field, and a luxurious aspirational road-trip mood. Include floating red flower petals in the air. Compose the layout as a high-end ad with the model centered slightly right and large promotional typography on the left. Add exactly 3 large headline lines in the upper left: "SIP.", "SAVOR.", and "{argument name="headline text" default="SUMMER."}" with the first 2 in bold white and the third in bold golden yellow. Below that, add the subheadline: "Refresh your drive with McCafé." with "McCafé" highlighted in yellow. Add exactly 3 circular feature icons stacked vertically on the left with short captions: "PREMIUM McCAFÉ ICED COFFEE", "WORLD FAMOUS FRIES", and "QUALITY YOU CAN TASTE". Place the McDonald's golden arches logo with the text "i'm lovin' it" in the top right. Add a small lower-left tagline reading "Good days start here." with "start here." in yellow. Create a bold yellow bottom banner spanning the width, divided into 3 content areas: left area reads "SUMMER SAVINGS" and "ENJOY EXCLUSIVE OFFERS"; center area includes a McDonald's app icon and the text "DOWNLOAD THE APP FOR DEALS NEAR YOU"; right area reads "FOLLOW US @MCDONALDS" with social icons. Use brand-accurate red and yellow accents, glossy product styling, realistic lighting, sharp editorial retouching, shallow depth of field, luxury commercial ad composition, and mobile-first poster proportions.
title: Summer McCafé Mountain Road Ad
description: A polished vertical fast-food campaign image showing a stylish woman on a red sports car holding iced coffee, ideal for recreating premium summer mobile ads for restaurants or beverage brands.

title: Japanese Hair Salon Catalog Poster

content: A bright, ultra-realistic summer streetscape in Japan, photographed at pedestrian eye level on a wide, clean urban sidewalk lined with mature green trees casting dappled shadows. The scene shows a modern mixed-use city block on a clear sunny day, with a contemporary cafe or restaurant on the right featuring tall glass windows, dark frames, a stone facade, and a warm wood soffit extending over the terrace. Place 3 large beige patio umbrellas outside the cafe, with wooden tables and chairs beneath them. Show a lively but orderly sidewalk with around 14 pedestrians spread into the distance, most dressed in light summer office-casual clothing in white, beige, navy, and gray. In the center foreground, include 1 person riding a bicycle away from the camera, wearing a short-sleeve white shirt and dark pants with a shoulder bag. On the right foreground, include 2 women walking away, one in a white blouse and long dark floral skirt holding a round hand fan, and one in a white top and light patterned skirt carrying a bag. Add 2 visible standing signs outside the cafe: one vertical banner with large Japanese text "氷" and icy blue graphics, and one sandwich board with Japanese text reading "夏季限定 冷たいドリンク" plus images of 2 cold drinks, one dark iced beverage and one pale lemonade-like drink. On the left side, show a quiet street with a few vehicles in the distance, benches, low concrete planters, and neatly trimmed shrubs. Composition should emphasize depth with a long vanishing point down the tree-lined boulevard, crisp midday sunlight, realistic reflections in the windows, and an upscale, calm urban atmosphere. Photorealistic architectural photography, natural colors, high detail, wide-angle lens, deep focus.
title: Sunny Japanese Cafe Street Scene
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic modern Japanese city sidewalk with a cafe terrace, summer pedestrians, signage, and a cyclist, ideal for editorial urban lifestyle or travel imagery.

content: Using the provided reference image, transform the portrait into a luxury lipstick advertisement while keeping the same girl, hairstyle, outfit, accessories, and elegant anime illustration style. Change the framing to a polished beauty-campaign composition with a dark crimson-to-black glamorous background, glossy lighting, and premium cosmetic brand aesthetics. Add a lipstick product in her raised hand on the right side, and add a large foreground product shot at the bottom left showing 1 opened lipstick tube and 1 separate cap on a reflective surface with a splash of deep red gloss. Add Japanese ad typography and layout elements: top left a small boxed label reading "新発売", a very large headline "ROUGE", a vertical text block reading "視線を奪う、ひと塗り。", followed by 3 smaller lines "鮮やかな発色。", "上品なツヤ。", "忘れられない印象へ。", then "2026 SPRING NEW COLOR" and a badge reading "全6色" with 6 lipstick swatches beside it. Add a top-right luxury logo with the letters "GB" and the brand name "GUFU BEAUTY". Add a bottom-right campaign block with a large "NEW" and the line "うるおい続く、密着ルージュ". Use rich ruby reds, gold accents, glossy highlights, soft sparkles, and a high-end magazine cosmetic poster finish.
title: Luxury Lipstick Ad Transformation
description: This prompt turns a character portrait reference into a premium Japanese lipstick campaign poster, useful for beauty-ad mockups and cosmetic branding visuals.

content:
16:9 theatrical anime movie poster. Boundary area of a night forest. In the center-left foreground, a Japanese girl in her late teens. Black hair ponytail, slender, wearing a dark-colored practical winter outdoor jacket and a research backpack. 3/4 rear view showing her back, looking back over her shoulder. Calm tension and strong will.
Above the forest in the upper right, a giant spherical paranormal phenomenon emitting white-blue light. An energy sphere intertwined with countless luminous filaments and electrical outlines. Foggy white light inside, surrounded by fine pale blue particle light. Mt. Fuji emitting plumes of smoke in the far left background. In the middle ground, forbidden entry tape with Japanese warnings, realistic disaster response staff, and emergency vehicles on both sides. No military feel required.
Ground is muddy mountain forest, with shallow water streams and wet ground reflecting the light. Tall trees on the left and right frame the scene. Sky is full of stars, with subtle city lights at the foot of Mt. Fuji. An atmosphere where mystery and disaster coexist.
Triangular composition of the girl, the giant light sphere, and Mt. Fuji. Slightly low cinematic viewpoint. The girl and the light sphere are clearly shown as the two main protagonists. Based on cold night blue, the main light source is the white-blue emission from the giant light sphere. Strong rim light on the trees, ground, water surface, and the girl. Secondary light sources are starlight and the faint orange glow of the distant eruption. The girl's face is not too dark and her expression is readable. High contrast.
High-end key visual for the latest Japanese theatrical anime. Movie poster grade completion. High-density, delicate background, precise light expression, atmospheric perspective, beautifully organized anime drawing leaning towards realism. Overall tone is dark navy, white-blue emission, and faint volcanic orange. Solemn, unsettling, mysterious, and high drama.
Small Japanese copy in the top center: "{argument name="poster slogan" default="It was not a miracle. It was a disaster that connected to the beyond."}"
Large elegant English serif title in bottom center with pale light close to white: "{argument name="movie title" default="Re:Connect Worlds"}"
Directly below it, a small Japanese subtitle: "{argument name="subtitle" default="Forest of Boundaries"}"
Characters are accurate and highly readable. Do not include characters, logos, or watermarks other than specified. Do not include unnecessary people, monsters, mechs, or unnecessary flashy particles or noise.
title: Cinematic Anime Movie Poster Prompt
description: A highly detailed, professional-grade prompt for generating Japanese theatrical anime posters, including specific instructions for layout, lighting, and typography.

content: A clean, minimalist anime illustration of a melancholic young woman in three-quarter profile, seated and resting her cheek against one hand. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="blue-black"} hair with blunt bangs, very pale skin, and soft gray-blue eyes with a distant, tired expression. Her face is small and delicate, with a tiny beauty mark under one eye and subtle lashes. She wears a dark oversized layered outfit in deep navy and charcoal: a high-neck black top under a loose draped jacket or kimono-like outer layer, with faint gold line accents and tiny eye motifs worked into the fabric. Her accessories are occult-inspired and elegant: multiple ear piercings, one long dangling earring shaped like an eye with a teardrop pendant, a thin necklace with a small eye charm, and several rings including an eye ring on the hand touching her face. Her nails are painted muted slate blue. The background is a flat warm off-white with a carefully arranged gallery of mystical eye symbols and hanging ornaments. Include exactly 6 eye-themed wall elements: 1 framed eye picture in the upper left, 1 circular eye ornament hanging below it, 1 small circle target-like ornament near the upper right, 1 black hanging charm with an eye and geometric crystals on the far right, 1 square panel with a radiant eye at mid-right, and 1 dark rectangular panel with an eye and 4 teardrop shapes at the lower right. Add a dark bottle silhouette and a few muted blue-gray leaves on the left side as secondary decor. Use a restrained palette of navy, black, cream, gray-blue, and touches of muted gold. The composition should feel quiet, gothic, feminine, and introspective, with flat graphic shapes, crisp linework, little shading, and a modern decorative poster aesthetic.
title: Occult Eye Motif Anime Portrait
description: This prompt generates a stylish single-character anime portrait with mystical eye-themed decor, ideal for moody editorial art, posters, or profile illustrations.

content: A cinematic dark-fantasy full-body portrait of a fierce warrior queen walking forward across a rugged, autumn-toned field at golden hour, accompanied by 1 large wolf at her right side. She has very long windblown {argument name="hair color" default="deep copper red"} hair streaming dramatically to the left, with an ornate metallic headpiece on one side. Her face is partly obscured by shadow for a mysterious, faceless look. She wears ultra-detailed biomechanical elven armor in pale silver, ivory, and champagne metal, shaped like a sculpted bodice with filigree, engraved lines, layered shoulder plates, articulated gauntlets, decorated thigh armor, and armored boots. The outfit includes 1 flowing translucent skirt panel in beige and 1 long torn crimson-orange cape or veil trailing behind her, filled with glowing ember-like perforations and scattered sparkling particles. In her right hand she carries 1 tall ceremonial spear-staff with an intricate bladed head and multiple hanging chains and charms. The wolf is highly detailed, grey-white and muscular, wearing matching ornamental armor and harness pieces with metallic accents and red markings. The environment is a windswept mountainous wilderness with blurred rocky hills in the background, glowing dust, embers, and backlit haze. Lighting is warm, low sun, dramatic rim light, volumetric glow, rich contrast, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed textures, epic fantasy realism, dynamic motion, powerful goddess-like presence, centered composition, vertical 2:3 format.
title: Epic Fantasy Warrior and Wolf
description: This prompt generates a cinematic high-detail fantasy portrait of an armored red-haired warrior walking with a wolf companion, ideal for dark fantasy character art and heroic poster-style imagery.

content: A highly detailed anime illustration in the style of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure, presented as a dramatic vintage manga character sheet poster for {argument name="character name" default="OpenAI"} personified as a glamorous female stand master. The layout is a single page with 6 distinct sections framed by ornate art nouveau borders and manga panel lines. Main section on the left: a full-body fashion portrait of the character in a confident contrapposto pose, wearing a tailored white suit with emerald green and black accents, gold trim, a long cape lined in teal, fitted vest, corset-like torso panel, high-waisted pants, heeled shoes, gloves, chain accessories, circular hair ornaments, earrings, and multiple OpenAI logo emblems integrated into the outfit. The belt buckle reads GPT, the pant leg has vertical text reading “SAFETY ★ ALIGNMENT ★ BENEFIT,” and the jacket sleeve shows the OpenAI name and logo. Her hair is silver-white, styled in elaborate curled twin buns and long ringlets, with glossy emerald accessories and JoJo-inspired luxury fashion detailing. Top left section: a cream parchment title panel with the OpenAI logo and the large text “OpenAI”, plus 3 text blocks reading “STAND NAME: GPT-∞”, “[dʒi: pi: ti: mu: geni ti]”, and “STAND MASTER: OPENAI”, followed by an italic Spanish quote: “La curiosidad es el prompt, el conocimiento es la respuesta, y la humanidad… es el contexto.” Top right section: a close-up portrait panel of the same woman from the shoulders up, turned partly away with one hand raised elegantly, against a dark purple manga background with 4 large stylized purple sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with smaller English translation beneath it: “Mi propósito es extender el potencial de la humanidad.” and “(My purpose is to extend humanity’s potential.)” Center-right section: a stand ability information box titled “STAND ABILITY: [INFINITE CONTEXT]” with Spanish descriptive text beneath: “Permite analizar, conectar y generar conocimiento ilimitado a partir de cualquier información existente.” Lower center-right section: a humanoid robotic stand in a dynamic reaching pose, feminine and sleek, with a glossy black faceplate displaying the OpenAI knot logo, white biomechanical armor, emerald glowing seams, gold accents, and several floating holographic rings and data panels orbiting around it. The rings contain readable words including “DATA”, “CREATIVITY”, “REASONING”, and a distorted futuristic label similar to “RETRIEVAL/AGENT”. The background is cosmic and starry with dramatic energy effects. Bottom right section: a smaller rear three-quarter portrait panel of the woman looking over her shoulder with a confident smile and one finger near her chin, again over a purple manga background with 3 large stylized sound effect glyphs. Add a Spanish speech bubble with two lines: “¿ME PREGUNTAS SI TENGO LÍMITES?” and “MI ÚNICO LÍMITE ES TU IMAGINACIÓN.” Bottom left section: a circular JoJo-style stat chart with 6 labeled attributes in Spanish, showing “POTENCIAL ∞”, “VELOCIDAD A”, “ALCANCE ∞”, “DURABILIDAD B”, “PRECISIÓN A”, and “POTENCIA A”. Under it, include a small cream biography box titled “OPENAI” with Spanish text: “Fundada: 2015 (San Francisco, EE. UU.)” and “Misión: Asegurar que la inteligencia artificial general beneficie a toda la humanidad.” Use a richly inked manga print aesthetic, detailed crosshatching, cel shading, aged paper texture, elegant cream margins, deep emerald, ivory, black, and gold palette, exaggerated JoJo fashion anatomy, sharp linework, dramatic comic-book composition, and luxurious supernatural sci-fi energy.
title: JoJo-Style OpenAI Stand Poster
description: A stylized manga poster depicting OpenAI as a JoJo-inspired female stand master with multiple character panels, stats, and lore text for anime fan art or promotional parody art.

content: A luxury fashion editorial advertisement poster in a vertical smartphone format, centered on a female model from chest-up wearing a structured olive green leather coat with a sharp pointed collar and a single visible round brown button at the neck. Her dark wet-look hair is slicked back and slightly messy, her head tilted upward with an elegant elongated neck, and her face mostly obscured by framing and shadow to create a mysterious high-fashion mood. Across the center, place the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="LOEWE"} in very large white high-contrast serif capital letters, spanning nearly the full width of the image. Build the composition as a collage framed by 5 torn material swatches: 1 embossed olive suede piece in the top left with a luxury monogram pressed into it, 1 coarse taupe-beige canvas fabric piece in the top right attached to a warm tan leather strip with visible white stitching, 1 pale textured fabric scrap with frayed edges in the bottom left, 1 dark brown glossy leather piece in the bottom right with a subtle embossed monogram, and 1 narrow vertical weathered beige panel along the left edge. Inside that left panel, include thin dark desert plant stems with small seed heads. In the background behind the model, use a dramatic golden-brown sunset sky with soft clouds and a faint rocky desert landscape near the lower right, creating a warm earthy palette. Lighting should be cinematic, moody, and directional, with rich shadows, tactile material detail, premium fashion-magazine styling, and an elegant artisan-luxury aesthetic. Use a color palette of olive green, camel, tan, beige, chocolate brown, and sunset gold. The overall feeling is sophisticated, handcrafted, minimal, and expensive, like a heritage luxury leather-goods campaign.
title: Luxury Leather Fashion Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-end vertical fashion advertisement with a mysterious model, torn material collage framing, and bold luxury branding for premium apparel or leather goods campaigns.

content: Luxury fashion editorial collage poster for {argument name="brand name" default="LOEWE"}, vertical composition, moody autumn earth-tone palette, designed like a premium magazine advertisement made from layered torn-paper fragments. In the center, a waist-up female fashion model with wild windswept dark wavy hair wears a rich cognac-brown belted leather coat with a high collar and soft natural folds, posed slightly turned to the side in a dramatic fashion stance. Her face is partially obscured and de-emphasized, with the styling and garment taking focus. Surrounding her are 8 clearly visible collage fragments: 1 central model portrait, 1 top-left dark textured fabric swatch, 1 upper-left rocky desert landscape fragment, 1 upper-center black circular moon or planet against cloudy sky, 1 upper-right leafless tree silhouette, 1 right-side gray textile swatch with part of a brown leather strap and metal ring, 1 left-lower brown leather sample embossed with an anagram logo, 1 lower-right cream fringed fabric patch embroidered with the same logo. Add an additional soft beige paper layer at the bottom left to increase depth. Use torn deckled edges everywhere, overlapping cut-paper assembly, tactile material contrast, and subtle shadows between layers. Background is a stormy cloudy sky blended with barren landscape, evoking raw nature and artisanal craftsmanship. Place large elegant white serif text {argument name="headline text" default="LOEWE"} across the lower middle over the coat, centered and spanning most of the width. Include a refined embossed monogram logo on the leather sample and embroidered monogram on the fabric patch. Lighting is soft, cinematic, and diffused, with high texture detail in leather, cloth, paper fibers, and landscape. Overall mood: sophisticated, tactile, artistic, premium luxury campaign, handcrafted collage, fashion house advertisement, high-end print editorial.

content: A bright, cheerful summer co-branded beverage poster in a clean Chinese commercial advertising style, showing a collaboration between {argument name="brand one" default="蜜雪冰城"} and {argument name="brand two" default="STARBUCKS"}. Vertical poster layout with a soft blue sky background, sunlit greenery, and an outdoor cafe atmosphere. At the top, place both brand logos side by side with a large bold Chinese headline in playful hand-drawn display lettering: {argument name="headline text" default="雪王遇见星朋友"}. Beneath it, add a green ribbon banner with Chinese subheadline text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="米雪冰城 × 星巴克 联名开启"}, and a smaller line reading "甜蜜加倍·快乐翻倍". Include 2 circular stamp-style graphics: one on the left reading "联名限定", and one on the upper right like a postmark with Chinese text around a small drink icon. In the center foreground on a wooden outdoor table, display 2 iced drinks: on the left, a tall clear cup of vivid green matcha slush topped with a tall swirl of vanilla soft serve and green matcha drizzle, with visible ice texture and a cute snowman mascot logo on the cup; on the right, a tall clear Starbucks-style iced latte with milk and green matcha swirls at the bottom, topped with whipped cream and dark cookie crumbs, with the green siren logo on the cup. In front of the drinks, place 1 cute white snowman mascot figurine with a tiny crown, round body, rosy cheeks, red cape, and a happy wink, sitting and holding a small takeaway coffee cup. Add 2 vertical product name tags beside the drinks: left tag "雪顶抹茶星冰乐", right tag "抹茶雪王奥利奥". On the right midground, place 1 small black chalkboard sign on a wooden easel reading "ICE CREAM & COFFEE" with chalk drawings of an ice cream cone and a takeaway cup. In the lower left, create a torn-paper price block showing a combo offer with large red numbers "¥19.9", green supporting text, and a small green badge reading "立省 ¥6". In the lower center-right, add a "联名周边" area displaying exactly 4 merchandise items: 1 cup sleeve, 1 character keychain or acrylic charm, 1 round badge, and 1 small sticker or token, all using the snowman mascot and coffee collaboration theme. Use warm sunlight, glossy drink photography, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh trees, high contrast product retouching, crisp packaging details, and an upbeat youthful retail-promo aesthetic. Include scattered doodle hearts and playful decorative accents around the typography. Keep all visible text in Chinese except the Starbucks wordmark and the chalkboard text.
title: Summer Coffee Ice Cream Collab Poster
description: This prompt generates a bright Chinese-style co-branded beverage advertisement poster for retail promotions, social media campaigns, or menu launch visuals.

content: A high-end luxury fashion advertising poster in vertical 9:16 format, featuring a tall elegant female model with her face intentionally obscured, standing in a dramatic three-quarter pose against a stormy cinematic sky at golden sunset. She has windswept auburn hair pulled back loosely with flying strands, and wears a two-tone belted trench coat split in rich burnt orange and deep black, layered over a cream ribbed turtleneck sweater, with one hand in the coat pocket. The trench has a structured collar, double-breasted buttons, and a slim black leather belt with a polished gold circular buckle. Surround the model with 6 large torn fabric panels framing the composition from the left and right edges, in orange, tan, and charcoal textile textures with visible stitching and frayed edges, as if fabric is ripping open around her. It can automatically choose ice blue, moon white, green, purple, red gold, ink black, silver gray and other color schemes according to the character and props, and use a small amount of light gold or cold light for divine embellishment. Overall requirements: beautiful, dreamy, ethereal, mysterious, detached, sacred, exquisite, with movie-level lighting and shadow, volumetric light, sense of air, ultra-detailed CG illustration texture; avoid vulgarity, avoid cheap ancient style photo sense, avoid internet celebrity faces, avoid cluttered backgrounds, avoid plastic textures.
title: Epic Eastern Fantasy Character Concept
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating high-end, cinematic Eastern fantasy character CG, featuring detailed descriptions of lighting, attire, and mythical elements.

content: A dark gothic fantasy scene inside a vast abandoned cathedral, vertical full-body composition. In the exact center stands a mysterious sorceress in an elegant Victorian-inspired black gown with a fitted corset bodice, intricate silver embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, long draping lace panels from the arms, black gloves, and a long trailing skirt. Her hair is styled in a neat dark updo with a subtle ornamental hairpiece, and she wears delicate jewelry. She holds an open spellbook in one hand and raises the other hand in a poised spellcasting gesture. Surround her with low-lying mist and curling smoke. The cathedral interior is immense and decayed, with towering pointed arches, ribbed vaulted ceilings, cracked stone floors, broken tombs or altars on both sides, and thick twisted roots spreading across the ground and wrapping around the stone structures. Place exactly 2 large gargoyle statues perched symmetrically on elevated side structures, one on the left and one on the right, looming over the scene. Add many black candles with warm orange flames scattered across the foreground and midground, creating ritual ambience. In the background, show tall stained-glass windows with cold bluish daylight streaming through them in dramatic god rays, contrasting with the candlelight. Mood is haunting, arcane, cinematic, solemn, and highly detailed, with realistic textures, deep shadows, volumetric lighting, atmospheric haze, dark blue-gray color palette, and ultra-detailed gothic architecture.
title: Gothic Sorceress in Ruined Cathedral
description: This prompt generates a cinematic dark-fantasy portrait of a spellcasting woman in a ruined gothic cathedral, ideal for horror, occult, or gothic book-cover style artwork.

content: A cinematic dark fantasy scene inside a vast gothic cathedral at night, centered on a mysterious woman in a floor-length black ceremonial gown standing in the middle of a glowing occult circle. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and frontal, with the woman placed dead center beneath a huge rose window and a bright full moon visible through the stained glass. She wears an ornate, form-fitting {argument name="dress color" default="black"} gown with lace, embroidered filigree, semi-sheer sleeves, a corseted bodice, and a long flowing train spreading across the stone floor. Her pose is regal and ritualistic, arms slightly extended at her sides with open hands, as if summoning smoke or dark magic. Her face is obscured and indistinct, with dark updo hair and a high gothic collar or headpiece. Around her feet is a large circular sigil inscribed in glowing {argument name="sigil glow color" default="amber-gold"} lines, with intricate symbols and concentric rings. Place exactly 30 black candles of varying heights around the circle and foreground, all lit, with warm flames casting low orange highlights. Fill the air with drifting smoke and mist, especially around her hands, the lower floor, and the side aisles. The cathedral interior is towering, shadowy, and highly detailed, with ribbed vaults, pointed arches, weathered stone, elaborate carvings, and deep blue-black darkness. On the left and right sides, include exactly 2 massive gargoyle or demon statues perched on ornate pedestals, one per side, leaning inward protectively or menacingly. Behind the woman, a raised altar and clusters of additional candles recede into darkness. Lighting is moody and high-contrast, dominated by cold moonlight from above and warm candlelight from below, creating metallic highlights on the dress and architecture. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, dramatic volumetric fog, gothic horror atmosphere, occult elegance, epic scale, sharp textures, realistic shadows, and a haunting, majestic mood.
title: Dark Gothic Ritual in Cathedral
description: This prompt generates a cinematic dark-fantasy ritual scene with a gothic woman, candles, sigils, and cathedral architecture, ideal for dramatic horror or occult-themed concept art.

content:
Please draw a brightly colored, vertical (9:16) hand-drawn style "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Journal Illustration." The style should look as if it were created with crayons by a curious child. Use a soft and warm light-colored background (such as light yellow), paired with bright tones like red, blue, and green, to create a cozy, child-like, and travel-inspired atmosphere.

I. Main Image: Journal-style Travel Route

Draw a "winding travel route" in the center of the illustration, connecting multiple locations with arrows and dashed lines. Recommended attractions will be automatically generated based on a {argument name="number of days" default="1"}-day itinerary:

Example format (automatically replaced with {argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} related content):

- "Stop 1: {Attraction 1 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 2: {Attraction 2 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 3: {Attraction 3 recommendation + short fun description}"
- ...
- "Final Stop: {Local signature food/souvenir + warm closing statement}"

> The number of travel stops is automatically generated based on the number of days. If no days are input, a 1-day/highlights route will be generated by default.

II. Fun Surrounding Elements (Automatically replaced based on the city)

Add plenty of child-like elements around the route, such as:

- Cute travel characters: "A child holding local snacks," "An adventurous kid wearing a backpack," etc.
- Child-like Q-version hand-drawings of local landmarks: such as "{landmark 1}," "{landmark 2}," "{landmark 3}."
- Fun signboards: "Watch out for getting lost!", "Mind the crowds!", "Good food ahead!" (Adjusted according to city context).
- Sticker-style slogans: "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Memories Unlocked!", "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Food Adventure!", "Where to next?"
- Cute small icons of local delicacies: such as "{food 1}," "{food 2}," "{food 3}."
- Exclamations (maintaining a child-like tone): "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} is so much fun!", "I want to go again!"

III. Overall Style Requirements

- Hand-drawn crayon style / children's travel log style
- Bright colors, full but warm composition
- Emphasis on the joy and exploration of travel
- All text uses cute handwritten fonts
- Make the entire image look like a travel journal page full of child-like wonder.
title: Hand-drawn Travel Journal Illustration
description: A detailed prompt for creating a child-like, hand-drawn travel journal illustration with customizable city names, landmarks, and routes.

content: A breathtaking Japanese anime movie poster in the style of a blockbuster theatrical key visual, ultra-detailed and emotionally grand, with a delicate luminous sky reminiscent of prestige modern anime cinema. The scene shows 2 characters from behind on a flower-covered cliff overlooking a glowing coastal fantasy city at sunset and twilight: a teenage boy in a dark school uniform with a loosened tie and windblown short dark hair stands on the left, and a teenage girl in a long flowing pale dress with very long silver-white hair stands on the right. Both face the horizon in awe. Above them, an enormous celestial sky fills most of the composition, painted with vivid deep blue, indigo, violet, magenta, and gold clouds, a brilliant comet-like meteor streak slashing diagonally from upper center toward the horizon, scattered stars, sparkling particles, and a glowing circular magic-like ring constellation in the upper right sky. The sea and city below shimmer with reflected light, with slender fantasy skyscrapers and towers rising from the coastline and a radiant sunlit gap at the center horizon. Foreground flowers are saturated blue and purple with glowing highlights, and white-pink petals drift through the air. Use dramatic rim light, cinematic backlighting, lens-glow sparkle effects, highly polished anime rendering, crisp linework, atmospheric depth, and a vertical poster composition. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: giant embossed gold headline text across the top reading {argument name="top headline text" default="興行収入100億円突破"}, a gold subheadline block at upper left reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="大ヒット上映中"}, a vertical white tagline on the upper right reading {argument name="tagline text" default="あの日、君と見上げた空が、世界を変える。"}, and a very large glowing white-lavender Japanese film title at the bottom center reading {argument name="movie title" default="星屑の約束"}. Beneath the title, add small elegant romanized subtitle text reading {argument name="romanized subtitle" default="Hoshikuzu no Yakusoku"}, plus dense small production credits, cast lines, website text, release-copy lines, and cinema format logos along the bottom edge in authentic Japanese movie-poster layout. Add 2 gold laurel emblems flanking the top headline, one on the left and one on the right. Make it feel like a fictional anime film that earned 10 billion yen at the box office, sweeping, romantic, bittersweet, magical, and destined to make audiences cry.
title: Blockbuster Anime Sky Fantasy Poster
description: A dramatic Japanese anime film poster featuring two youths beneath a comet-filled sky, ideal for generating fictional theatrical key art with premium box-office-hit styling.

content: A cinematic vertical poster inspired by The Little Prince, set on a rainy city street at blue hour in modern Shanghai. In the center foreground, a small child in Little Prince styling stands in side profile facing right, with messy curly golden-blond hair, a long flowing mustard-gold scarf blowing dramatically to the left, and a muted sage-green ankle-length coat tied at the waist. The child holds 1 single red rose upright in both hands. The face is simplified and softly obscured, with no detailed facial features. The wet pavement reflects neon lights, traffic, and the evening sky. In the background, the Oriental Pearl Tower rises softly out of the dusk with glowing pinkish lights, surrounded by blurred city buildings, storefronts, pedestrians, and car headlights, creating a dreamy bokeh urban atmosphere. On the upper right, include 1 street sign mounted on a traffic pole reading {argument name="street sign text" default="星球大道\nPLANET AVE."}. Also on the pole, include 1 red pedestrian traffic light showing a standing human figure. On the left side, place large handwritten brush-style Chinese quote text in warm pale yellow: {argument name="main quote" default="重要的东西，\n用眼睛是看不见的。"}, with a smaller signature line beneath reading {argument name="author text" default="—— 小王子"}. Scatter a few tiny hand-drawn star doodles and 1 small planet doodle around the text. Near the lower left, add 3 lines of small warm-yellow Chinese dedication text above a stylized script title reading {argument name="title text" default="Le Petit Prince"}. On the right side near the pole, tape 1 small paper note with handwritten Chinese text about not seeing truly important things with the eyes, plus a simple doodle. Add 1 vertical storefront sign on the left reading "咖啡". The composition should feel poetic, nostalgic, gentle, and premium, like an art-house movie poster or literary inspirational street poster. Color palette: twilight blue sky, amber street glow, soft gold typography, muted green clothing, vivid red rose. Shallow depth of field, glossy rain reflections, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed illustration with realistic urban atmosphere and storybook character design.
title: Little Prince Shanghai Rain Poster
description: A poetic cinematic poster of a Little Prince-like child holding a rose in a rainy Shanghai street, ideal for inspirational quote art and literary social media posters.

content: A high-energy vertical anime street poster inspired by a pirate adventure crew, designed like a stylish summer campaign key visual in a modern Japanese shopping street under a vivid blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Show exactly 8 characters grouped closely in the foreground and midground, all happily eating colorful ice cream cones while walking through the city. Center front: a young man in a wide straw hat, oversized red graphic T-shirt, blue shorts, and a black crossbody waist bag, holding a mint-blue ice cream cone. Front left: a green-haired young man in a black oversized graphic shirt with green lettering and layered necklaces, eating ice cream. Front right: a small chibi-like reindeer mascot character wearing a large pink hat with a white X, black and pink streetwear jacket, and holding a blue-and-pink ice cream cone. Right midground: a long-nosed smiling young man in a cap and casual streetwear, loudly laughing with an ice cream cone; behind him a tall skeleton man with a large black afro, crown-like hat, purple hoodie, sunglasses, and an ice cream cone. Left midground: an orange-haired young woman in a cropped white tank top and jeans holding ice cream; behind center-left a blond young man in a blue shirt with a relaxed pose and ice cream; center-right a dark-haired young woman in a purple outfit with sunglasses on her head holding ice cream. The mood is cheerful, summery, fashionable, and adventurous. Make the composition feel like a premium anime tourism or retail poster with dramatic perspective from street level, dense urban signage, shop windows, hanging signs, and branded poster panels. Add large brush-script title text across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="ONE PIECE"} in huge white paint strokes, with a yellow handwritten subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Straw Hat Crew"}. On the upper left, stack poster text blocks reading exactly: "STRAW HAT CREW", "2024", "WE GO! TOGETHER! NEW WORLD!". On the right side, add a vertical street sign reading "New World". Include a pink hanging sign reading "ICE CREAM" with a skull emblem. Add pirate-skull hat emblems in the corners and on storefront signage. At the lower left, place white handwritten script reading "Enjoy! Ice Cream" with a small smiley, and beneath it smaller bold text reading "一起去吃冰淇淋吧！". At the lower left edge add small text: "I'M GONNA BE KING OF THE PIRATES!". At the lower right add "ONE PIECE 2024", a barcode, and tiny caption text "STRAW HAT CREW SUMMER ICE CREAM". Use glossy anime illustration rendering, bold cel shading, crisp line art, rich fabric folds, detailed accessories, vibrant summer lighting, cinematic contrast, poster-grade typography, and a polished commercial key art finish. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait.

content: A dramatic anime theatrical movie poster in a tall vertical composition, centered on 2 young women in classic black-and-white maid uniforms standing back-to-back and facing opposite directions. The left maid has a short silver bob haircut with straight bangs and a white maid headband; the right maid has a short vivid pink bob haircut with straight bangs and a matching white maid headband. Both wear fitted black dresses with puff sleeves, white aprons with ruffled trim, white collars and cuffs, and black ribbon accents at the neck. Their poses are confident and tense, with one hand lowered at their sides, suggesting mystery and rivalry. Place them large in the foreground, filling most of the poster height. Behind them, create a split-color night sky: deep electric blue on the left and saturated magenta-pink on the right, blending at the center. In the upper left, show a bright full moon and a small helicopter with a searchlight. Along the horizon and lower sides, include a glowing city skyline, blue-lit on the left and pink-lit on the right. In the center background, place a gothic mansion or castle with pointed towers at the end of a path, illuminated with warm lights. In front of the mansion, show 2 smaller full-body figures of the same maids from behind, walking toward the building side by side. Add 4 supporting characters around the lower edges: 1 dark-haired man in a suit at bottom left, 1 older stern man in a suit at lower right-center, 1 young woman with long dark hair at bottom right, and the 2 small maid figures in the center distance, for a total of 6 visible human figures in the poster. Scatter bright pink flower petals across the image as if blown by the wind. Use intense cinematic lighting, glossy anime rendering, high contrast, sharp linework, glowing rim light, and a suspenseful psychological thriller mood. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on both sides, a large stylized title at the bottom center reading {argument name="title text" default="Re:maid"}, smaller Japanese subtitle text beneath it, and release text at the lower left reading {argument name="release date text" default="7.25 [FRI] ROADSHOW"}. Add a final Japanese tagline line along the bottom. content: Create a refined editorial presentation cover slide in a warm, Claude-inspired design system. Use a landscape 16:9 composition with a parchment-paper background, subtle paper grain, soft shadows, and layered torn-paper collage elements. The overall palette should be warm ivory, cream, sand, charcoal, muted black, and terracotta accent. On the left half, place a small top label reading "{argument name="system label" default="Claude-inspired presentation system"}" with a small terracotta dot and a thin horizontal divider line. Below it, set an oversized elegant high-contrast serif headline in black that reads "{argument name="main headline" default="Thoughtful Systems"}", split across two lines and dominating the left side. Under the headline, add a smaller serif subheadline in terracotta reading "{argument name="subheadline" default="Warmth can still feel precise."}". Beneath that, create a vertical list of exactly 4 design principles, each on its own row with thin divider lines and a small icon at left: 1) a rectangular parchment-sheet icon with the text "Parchment canvas", 2) a serif capital T icon with the text "Serif-led hierarchy", 3) a filled terracotta circle icon with the text "Terracotta for signal", 4) a chain-link icon with the text "Organic diagrams over cold chrome". Add a tiny footer caption at bottom left reading "CLAUDE-INSPIRED PRESENTATION SYSTEM" in spaced small caps. On the right half, build a layered collage of exactly 3 paper cards: first, a tall off-white art card with a fine border containing the heading "A more considered approach", a short body paragraph about complex problems yielding to clarity, a minimal landscape line drawing with a terracotta sun, and a vertical terracotta botanical branch overlapping the card; second, a dark charcoal rectangular card partially behind it with the lowercase title "thinking process" and an exact 5-step numbered list: "01 Observe", "02 Interpret", "03 Connect", "04 Synthesize", "05 Act with care", plus a delicate circular orbital diagram in dotted lines and terracotta highlight; third, a torn off-white note card in front near the bottom with a hand-drawn overlapping-circles diagram where one crescent-shaped intersection area is shaded in terracotta, alongside a handwritten quote reading "{argument name="quote" default="Clarity emerges when systems are designed with intention."}". Include one extra light beige paper strip tucked beneath the lower cards. Emphasize tactile realism, elegant negative space, print-editorial sophistication, soft natural lighting, and a calm, thoughtful luxury-tech mood.

content: A dramatic Japanese fantasy movie poster in a painterly, ultra-detailed cinematic illustration style. The poster is vertically composed like a theatrical key visual, with a warm gold title at the bottom and multiple emotional vignettes layered into one unified scene. The central character is a small fluffy pig-like creature with soft pale cream fur, oversized pink inner ears, a tiny snout, a curled tail, and large feathered angel wings glowing with golden light. It stands upright on a rooftop or elevated wooden platform overlooking a vast Tokyo cityscape at sunset, holding a whiskey glass in one hoof with the other hoof on its hip, posed like a weary but resilient middle-aged salaryman. In the distance are the Tokyo skyline, water, bridges, floating lanterns, and Tokyo Tower glowing orange-red under a radiant sky filled with clouds lit in gold, peach, violet, and deep blue. Around the center are 4 supporting vignette scenes: 1) top left, the winged pig sits alone at a narrow bar counter in a nostalgic lantern-lit Japanese alley at night, looking exhausted and melancholy, with a bottle and a glass nearby; 2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. The whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. Use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a Japanese film poster. Include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". High detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, Japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism.

content: A richly detailed vertical editorial travel illustration of a bustling Seoul market alley rendered in polished hand-drawn realism with warm cinematic lighting, dense urban storytelling, and highly legible signage. The scene is packed with a large crowd of pedestrians, shoppers, diners, street-food customers, musicians, and commuters in a narrow neighborhood market street, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level so the full alley feels layered and alive. At the top left, a large illustrated poster reads “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” with the subtitle “Can you find Kyle in Seoul?” in bold playful English typography, styled like a search-and-find book cover. The environment should clearly be Seoul, with a visible Namsan tower in the distant skyline, tangled overhead power lines, rooftop seating, stacked low-rise buildings, shop signs in Korean, and a subway entrance sign on the right showing line numbers 4, 2, 4, 4 and the bilingual text “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station.” Include exactly 15 major visible signs or text panels: 1) the “WHERE IS {argument name="character name" default="KYLE"}?” poster, 2) “할머니 손칼국수”, 3) a hanging vertical sign “낙원상가 2F”, 4) a small blue street sign, 5) a vertical sign “이름 떡볶이”, 6) the large market arch sign “황진다운시장 영”, 7) a vertical orange sign “커피”, 8) a wall mural map with “남산 가는길”, 9) the subway sign with “출입구 4” and “서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station”, 10) the produce sign “경성 야채”, 11) the lower produce sign “신선한 채소”, 12) a handwritten busker sign, 13) the street-food cart sign “호떡·어묵·붕어빵”, 14) the menu board “오늘의 추천 김밥 떡볶이 순대 튀김”, and 15) the delivery box text “빠른 배달”. Populate the alley with exactly 8 vendor or activity zones: 1) a noodle restaurant at left under a red-and-white awning with seated diners, 2) a vegetable stall with stacked produce crates, 3) a busking duo with guitar and percussion, 4) a central street-food cart selling hotteok, fish cake, and bungeoppang, 5) a standing crowd eating snacks and holding cups, 6) a small magic performance table in the lower center with cards and cups, 7) a painter at an easel near the lower left, and 8) a scooter delivery cluster at the lower right. Add exactly 6 notable background accents: 1) rooftop diners on the upper right terrace, 2) a cat lounging on a roof ledge upper left, 3) colorful market umbrellas in the middle distance, 4) stairways and narrow side passages, 5) dense balconies and windows full of plants and people, and 6) the distant tower and skyline. The crowd should feel extremely varied in age and clothing, mostly casual contemporary Korean street fashion in jackets, hoodies, backpacks, skirts, slacks, and sneakers, with a few office workers and students. Hide a single subtly distinct person meant to be the findable target, {argument name="target outfit" default="a young man in a blue hoodie with yellow lettering"}, integrated naturally among the central crowd rather than spotlighted. Use a vibrant but grounded palette of brick red, teal, forest green, cream, mustard, asphalt gray, and sky blue. Emphasize intricate linework, readable Korean text, observational city details, lively human gestures, and the playful feel of a premium “Where’s Waldo?” style Seoul search poster. Aspect ratio 2:3.
title: Find Kyle in a Seoul Market
description: A dense search-and-find style illustration of a lively Seoul market street, ideal for posters, social media showcase images, or editorial travel artwork.

content: Create a clean luxury skincare product advertisement in a square 1:1 layout with a warm beige studio background and strong natural sunlight casting soft palm-leaf shadows across the wall. Place 1 amber glass dropper bottle on the left-center, standing upright on a round cream stone pedestal. The bottle has a glossy gold collar and a matte white rubber dropper top. Add a white rectangular label with elegant minimal typography: brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="NATURELLE SKINCARE"}" at the top, a large orange product name "{argument name="product name" default="VITAMIN C"}", then black text reading "BRIGHTENING SERUM" and smaller subtext "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide". On the right side, place a large bold black serif headline in 3 stacked lines reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Glow Naturally. Every Day."}". Beneath it, add a smaller clean sans-serif benefits line reading "{argument name="benefits text" default="Brightens | Hydrates | Protects"}". Below that, include 3 circular black outline ingredient or values icons in a horizontal row, each with a simple leaf-style symbol inside; add tiny caption text beneath them with the same slightly imperfect ad-like wording seen in the original, including "Barban Free", "Dermicologyg", and "Creuty-free". At the lower right, place a glossy rounded green call-to-action button with white bold text "{argument name="button text" default="Shop Now"}". Add 1 sliced orange on the far right edge, partially cropped, with vivid juicy texture to reinforce the vitamin C theme. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Style the whole image as a polished commercial product mockup, photorealistic, high-end beauty branding, soft warm highlights, subtle shadows, balanced composition, sharp label detail, premium ecommerce social ad aesthetic.

content:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
title: Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.

content: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.
